E: Pursued in the Fragmentum

C: 你与黄泉、黑天鹅回到梦境酒店大堂，见到遍地的迷因怪物残骸，以及星核猎手萨姆。萨姆请你们就此离开，否则，你们都会死。
E: You, Acheron, and Black Swan came back to the Dreamscape hotel lobby, discovering meme creature remnants all around and the Stellaron Hunter, Sam. Sam asked you all to leave now, or else all of you would die here.

C: 金色的血如雨落下，长夜月召出极为强大而危险的金血忆灵。
E: Golden blood fell like rain as Evernight summoned an ichor memosprite, mighty and perilous.

C: 得知母亲为自己留下的爱与信件之后，佩拉流下感动的泪水，失声痛哭。
E: After discovering the love and letters her mother had left behind, Pela had broken down in tears, sobbing from the depths of her heart.

C: 符玄启动「穷观阵」，以额间法眼审讯卡芙卡。仪式结束，符玄露出难以置信的神情。卡芙卡则微笑询问符玄，是否喜欢这个真相。
E: Fu Xuan initiated the Matrix of Prescience, using her omniscia to interrogate Kafka. When the ritual concluded, Fu Xuan appeared completely shocked. Kafka just smiled and asked if Fu Xuan liked the truth she had found.

C: 停云带来仙舟工造司开发的仿生追踪装置「谛听」，可以锁定脚印和气味特征。在正式搜捕前，停云提议调试一下这个小玩意儿。
E: Tingyun brought the bionic navigation device "Diting," which was developed by the Xianzhou Artisanship Commission and can lock in footsteps and specific scents. Tingyun recommended testing this little gadget before you conduct the formal hunt.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>星期日</color>与<color=#f29e38ff>知更鸟</color>来到酒店前台。星期日请砂金借一步说话，知更鸟则请星穹列车的各位与她稍事休息。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Sunday</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Robin</color> arrived before the hotel reception. Sunday called Aventurine for a conversation, and Robin invited everyone from the Express to take a short break with her.

C: 「蕉授」再次宣扬科研梦想，却遭到乱破驳斥。「蕉授」将万千小猴心愿所汇聚的力量交予诸位「蕉师」，为你们带来「期末考试」。
E: Once again, Profnana preached about its dreams on research, only to be refuted by Rappa. Profnana entrusted the collective wishes of countless little monkeys to BananAdvisors, bringing you the "final exam."

C: 你将「死亡」的火种带回创世涡心，为遐蝶代行归还火种的职责。在缇宁的主持下，你向世界献上「死亡」。
E: You returned the Coreflame of "Death" to the Vortex of Genesis, fulfilling Castorice's duty for her. With Trinnon's guidance, you offered up "Death" to the world.

C: 昔涟选择回望过去。昔涟相信那个她最在乎的你，一定会替她见证，每一个星星闪耀的明天。
E: Cyrene chose to look back at the past. She believed that you, the one she cared about most, would surely witness every starlit tomorrow for her.

C: 姬子现身克里珀堡，称公司的方案并不能确保贝洛伯格成功重建。布洛妮娅拒绝用民众的未来冒险，决定抵抗公司，并请求列车组协助。
E: Himeko appeared at Qlipoth Fort and said that the IPC's proposal could not guarantee Belobog's successful reconstruction. Bronya refused to risk the people's future and chose to stand against the IPC. She asked the Express Crew for help.

C: 玛吉是卢卡的忠实拳迷，她渴望成为像卢卡一样的厉害的拳手，并尽力帮助下层区的大家，把坏人全都赶走。
E: Margie was Luka's devoted fan. She aspired to become an awesome boxer like Luka and do her best to help everyone in the Underworld by chasing all the bad guys away.

C: 云璃得知了「孤云」的过去，她认同这是一柄英雄之剑，但她仍然要熔了这把剑。
E: After learning about Guyun's past stories, Yunli acknowledged it as a sword of heroes. But she still remained determined to melt it down.

C: 希露瓦尝试操控栈桥，推测终端的能源可能被切断。她提议接着前进，寻找源头的供能设备。
E: Serval tried to engage the controls but suspected the terminal had been cut off from its power source. She proposed pressing forward to locate the energy supply.

C: 你们收到一封讯息，对方称奉太卜之命等候于此。你们尝试去讯息图片中所示地点寻找太卜司使者。
E: You received a message, indicating that someone was waiting there under the Master Diviner's orders. You tried to head to the location shown in the message to find the Divination Commission messenger.

C: 你们找到一位幸存者，经询问却发现对方是药王秘传的爪牙。药王秘传驱使堕入疯狂的云骑军士兵，向你们发动攻击。
E: You found a survivor, and after questioning, found out that the survivor was a disciple of Sanctus Medicus. They used the maddened Cloud Knights as forces and ordered them to attack you.

C: 列车前往匹诺康尼，帕姆提醒众人注意忆质浓度与家族规矩，并希望大家顺便寻找曾留下的三位无名客踪迹。
E: As the Express headed toward Penacony, Pom-Pom reminded everyone to mind the memoria concentrations and The Family's rules. They also hoped that everyone can find traces of the three Nameless that were left behind.

C: 流萤向你介绍「钟表小子」雕像，这是匹诺康尼最著名的卡通人物。据说钟表小子的原型，就是梦境世界的奠基人——「钟表匠」。
E: Firefly introduced you to the Clockie statue. Clockie is the most famous cartoon character in Penacony. It was said that Clockie was originally modeled after the founder of the Dreamscape: The Watchmaker.

C: 你从不知名的房间醒来。周遭环境并非白日梦酒店，反而与你初次入梦时的氛围类似。
E: You woke up in an unknown room. The surroundings were not of the Reverie but instead reminded you of the atmosphere when you first entered the dream.

C: 你与留在酒店房间里的黑天鹅交谈，向其倾诉心事。作为忆者，黑天鹅不需要入梦池，她会在此处陪伴你入梦。
E: You remained in the hotel room and chatted with Black Swan, sharing your thoughts with her. As a Memokeeper, Black Swan does not need to enter the Dreampool, and can accompany you into the Dreamscape from where she stands.

C: 加拉赫带你们来到「惊梦酒吧」，调饮师舒翁接待你们。加拉赫让你带回些喜欢的材料，他要给远道而来的各位准备点特调饮品。
E: Gallagher brought all of you to the Dreamjolt Hostelry, where the drinksmith Siobhan welcomed you. Gallagher asked you to bring back some of your favorite ingredients, and he'd prepare a special drink for his guests from afar.

C: 你的思绪坠入无边黑暗，直到一簇火光将你拥入怀中。你见到了似有话要对你说的萨姆。
E: Your thoughts plunged into endless darkness until a flicker of firelight embraced you. You saw SAM, who seemed as if they had something to say.

C: 加拉赫带星期日来到流梦礁，提议与其合作，寻找家族中的叛徒。流萤找到此处，加拉赫称她能带星期日找到知更鸟。
E: Gallagher brought Sunday to Dreamflux Reef and proposed that they work together to find the traitor within The Family. Firefly arrived shortly after, and Gallagher said she could lead Sunday to Robin.

C: 你用悲伤情绪诠释重逢剧情，严苛评委被深深打动，感慨表演超越原作。
E: With sorrow, you portrayed a heartfelt reunion scene. The harsh judge was profoundly moved, remarking that your performance surpassed the original show.

C: 米沙忆起童年生活场景，讲述壁炉与玩具房的回忆，记忆与现实交错引发疑问。
E: Misha recalled scenes of childhood, sharing memories of the fireplace and the toy room, where the interweaving of memory and reality began to stir deep questions.

C: 你们进入《秩序颂》的剧目世界，迎来第三幕，剧目预示匹诺康尼的未来走向。
E: You entered the world of the play Ode to Order, welcoming the third act that prophesied Penacony's future direction.

C: 会谈前托帕在空艇上四处闲逛，与账账互动、打听家族情报，并留意到有人在处理可疑按钮。
E: Topaz sauntered around the airship before the meeting, interacting with Numby and trying to get information on The Family. She noticed that someone was dealing with the suspicious buttons.

C: 流萤目睹赌徒史黛西靠典押行获得好运，赢下赌博却失去所有亲密关系。
E: Firefly witnessed how the gambler Stacy gained good fortune from the pawnshop and won the gamble, but lost all her close relationships.

C: 银枝通报找到<unbreak>145</unbreak>个假娃娃，鼓励大家保持耐心，你们继续寻找。
E: Argenti reported that he found <unbreak>145</unbreak> fake dolls and encouraged everyone to remain patient. You keep looking.

C: 翡翠从家族手中救出星期日，提出实现兄妹理想的交易机会。
E: Jade saved Sunday from the clutches of The Family, offering an exchange that would allow the siblings' dream to be fulfilled.

C: 筑梦蕉师锐利地点评你、三月七和恰丽卡的画作。交白卷的恰丽卡遭到严厉的批评，乱破打断了蕉师咄咄逼人的欺辱。
E: Dreamweaver BananAdvisor sharply critiqued the artworks of yours, March 7th's, and Chaletka's. As Chaletka submitted a blank canvas, she was faced with harsh criticism, but Rappa interrupted BananAdvisor's overbearing bullying.

C: 姬子与螺丝咕姆谈及「翁法罗斯」，因得知其受到智识命途影响，而求助于黑塔。以此为契机遇见了<color=#f29e38ff>停云</color>，并将护送她还乡。
E: Himeko and Screwllum talked about "Amphoreus." As Himeko knew the location was influenced by the Path of Erudition, she sought help from Herta. That was how she encountered <color=#f29e38ff>Tingyun</color> and ended up escorting Tingyun home.

C: 列车组众人商讨「开拓」之旅的人员安排，决定由你和丹恒打头阵，瓦尔特与星期日处理其他事务，姬子与黑天鹅留下来照顾三月七。
E: The Crew talked over who should go on the trailblazing mission. They decided you and Dan Heng would lead the expedition, Welt and Sunday would handle other business, and Himeko and Black Swan would stay to care for March 7th.

C: 在当地公民的热心帮助下，你与丹恒的通信石板连接上奥赫玛的<color=#f29e38ff>万帷网</color>，并且成功加入「粉霞天女」讨论组。
E: With some helpful locals' assistance, you and Dan Heng got your teleslate connected to Okhema's <color=#f29e38ff>World Wound Web</color> and managed to join the Rosy Celestial Maiden Discussion Group.

C: 白厄希望你与丹恒加入黄金裔的阵营，一同讨伐尼卡多利。如果你们留下，白厄与遐蝶会尽力弥合嫌隙。丹恒将去留的决定权交给你。
E: Phainon wanted you and Dan Heng to join the Chrysos Heirs and help defeat Nikador. If you decided to stay, Phainon and Castorice would try to patch things up with Aglaea. Dan Heng let you decide whether to stay or go.

C: 白厄提议与万敌比试一番，看谁能干掉更多「纷争」眷属，赌注是给尼卡多利的最后一击。万敌应允，让你与白厄组队与他较量。
E: Phainon suggested a contest with Mydei to see who could kill more Strife Titankins, with the winner getting to land the final blow on Nikador. Mydei agreed and let you team up with Phainon against him.

C: 白厄与你谈论起相机的主人「三月七」，认为你一定很珍视与她的关系。正是你对待伙伴的态度，使白厄对你多信任了几分。
E: Phainon talked with you about March 7th, the camera's owner, guessing you must really care about her. Seeing how you treated your friends made Phainon trust you more.

C: 经受「浮黎」的瞥视后，你从记忆之旅中醒来。为了使用迷迷复现过去的特殊能力，你们前往悬锋城收集记忆。欧洛尼斯已经陷入沉默。
E: After seeing Fuli's gaze, you came out of the memory journey. To use Mem's special ability to recreate past events, you needed to go to Castrum Kremnos and collect memories. Oronyx had fallen silent.

C: 大黑塔经由「谒见系统」进入命途狭间，等待博识尊的回应。
E: Through the Audience System, The Herta entered the Path Space, awaiting a response from Nous.

C: 命运的箴言揭示：<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将凋零，令逝者自残余中发芽，一同死去的火新生。」</color>若要完成火种试炼，玻吕茜亚与姐姐必须有一人牺牲生命。
E: The prophecy revealed: <color=#f29e38ff>"You shall wither, and through that, the dead will sprout again from the remains, and be reborn with the dead flame."</color> To complete the trial of their Coreflame, either Polyxia or her sister had to sacrifice their lives.

C: 丹恒注意到平台下方的黄金池，风堇称那是驱动晨昏之眼的神性能源。你与风堇尝试使用西风罗盘创造微型彩虹桥。
E: Dan Heng noticed the pool of gold beneath the platform. Hyacine identified it as the divine energy that powered the Eye of Twilight. You and Hyacine tried using the West Wind Compass to create a miniature rainbow bridge.

C: 你与知更鸟在圣杯前交谈，发现这玩意是桑博卖给老奥帝的。杯中有一张记载桑博心愿的纸条，他希望世上人人幸福、快乐、得偿所愿。
E: You and Robin chatted in front of the Holy Grail, discovering Sampo had sold it to Old Oti. Inside was a note with Sampo's wish: that everyone in the world would be happy, joyful, free, and have their every desire fulfilled.

C: 你再次来到「神话之外」，来古士将此改造成专属于你的「观众席」。在这片<color=#f29e38ff>时间流速慢于世界内部</color>的空间，你将见证翁法罗斯步入尾声。
E: You returned to Exomyth, which Lygus had modified into an exclusive "audience area" for you. In this place, <color=#f29e38ff>where time flowed slower than within Amphoreus</color>, you would witness the end of that world.

C: 海瑟音的真名为「海列屈拉」。她用曼妙的歌声吸引众海妖，以此响应深海女王法吉娜的召见。
E: Hysilens' true name was Helektra. With her bewitching voice, she summoned the sea sirens in answer to the deep-sea queen Phagousa's call.

C: 丹恒进入房间，见到许多黑色的浮游物。丹恒察觉到自身陷入了别有用心者的陷阱，遂与窃忆者的迷因们战斗。
E: Dan Heng entered the cabin and spotted numerous floating black things. Realizing he had fallen into a trap set by someone with ulterior motives, Dan Heng engaged the Memosnatcher's memes in battle.

C: 密钥上传之后，新的道路出现。你的耳畔响起昔涟的回声——以关于「明天」的故事，昔涟呼唤「救世主」与翁法罗斯的黎明。
E: After the encryption key was uploaded, a new path appeared. Echoing by your ear, Cyrene spoke of a story about "tomorrow," calling to the "Deliverer" and the dawn of Amphoreus.

C: 你与丹恒、三月七分享着重逢的喜悦，约好一起继续「开拓」。与此同时，长夜月最后一次行使「忘却」，将<color=#f29e38ff>「无漏净子」</color>从三月七的记忆中抹去。
E: You celebrated the reunion with Dan Heng and March 7th, promising to continue the Trailblaze journey together. At the same time, Evernight used "Oblivion" one last time, erasing the <color=#f29e38ff>Pure Child of Anāsrava</color> from March 7th's memories.

C: 来古士的举动证明德谬歌存在，而「长夜月」的说辞与权杖现状都反映出德谬歌不存在。假设二者同时成立，「矛盾」就会指向真相。
E: Lygus's actions proved the existence of the Demiurge, while Evernight's words and the Scepter's current state suggested the Demiurge doesn't exist. If we assume both are true, this contradiction points to the truth.

C: 「翁法罗斯之心」仍然存在，但来古士断定德谬歌无力改变实验结果，「毁灭」的巨匠必然诞生——它的憎恨将点燃众神的星空，却只出于对凡人的哀怜。以上事实只待博识尊计算中的「时刻」到来，即可证毕。黑塔则并不这么认为，决心亲自颠覆来古士的论证。
E: The Heart of Amphoreus still exists, but Lygus determined that the Demiurge was powerless to change the experiment's outcome. The Archsmith of Destruction will inevitably be born, whose hatred would ignite the starry skies of gods, yet only out of lament for mortals. The above will be proven true once the "Instant" arrived as calculated by Nous. Herta, however, disagreed and was determined to personally overturn Lygus's thesis.

C: 权杖系统在运行时发生错误。来自未知发布者的程序「Philia<unbreak>093</unbreak>.exe」被允许写入并运行。
E: An error occurred in the Scepter System during operation. The program "Philia<unbreak>093</unbreak>.exe" from an unknown publisher was allowed to write and run.

C: 遐蝶为未经许可就躲进你的浴池致歉，并询问为何会有辣椒油放在浴池边。遐蝶称赞星穹列车真的很温馨，像是一个永不分离的大家庭。
E: Castorice apologized for sneaking into your bathtub without permission and asked why there was chili oil next to it. She praised how cozy the Astral Express was, like a big family that never parts.

C: 你回到黑塔空间站。黑塔希望作为模拟宇宙测试者的你去见见<color=#f29e38ff>阮•梅</color>，艾丝妲则称阮•梅日常只出入主控舱段和月台。
E: You returned to the Herta Space Station. As a tester for the Simulated Universe, Herta wanted you to meet with <color=#f29e38ff>Ruan Mei</color>. According to Asta, Ruan Mei usually stayed within the master control zone or on the railway platform.

C: 星核危机解除后，公司派托帕前来追讨债务。布洛妮娅请求你们劝说托帕，以星穹列车的声誉从中斡旋。
E: Once the Stellaron crisis had passed, the IPC dispatched Topaz to collect on that loan. Bronya asked you to speak with Topaz, hoping the Astral Express's reputation might help mediate the matter.

C: 你找到了「齿狼」型号的自动机兵，但该机体已在决斗中报废，无法带走。
E: You found a Direwolf model automaton, but it was destroyed in a duel and couldn't be salvaged.

C: 你该作何选择——是听从史瓦罗的方法，将帕斯卡格式化，但代价是舍弃它的情感智能；还是选择克拉拉的方案，保留帕斯卡的情感智能，但克拉拉必须承担持续维护的责任与再次失控的风险？慎重地选择其一，然后说服另一人吧。
E: What choice would you make? Should you follow Svarog's method to format Pascal, sacrificing its emotional intelligence, or go with Clara's plan to preserve Pascal's emotional intelligence? However, Clara would need to bear the responsibility of ongoing maintenance, and there might be a risk of Pascal losing control again. Choose carefully, and then convince the other person.

C: 佩拉来到一处背风背阴、地面平整的地点，可惜四周都是山崖，视野不是很好。玲可想到一个好地方，离这里不远。
E: Pela found a shaded place, shielded from the wind, where the ground was flat and even. Unfortunately, it was surrounded by cliffs with limited visibility. Lynx thought of a better place not far from here.

C: 按照三月七的说法。怪物会说话这件事是为了增加紧迫感…总之，进入战斗吧。
E: According to March 7th, the talking monster was just there to create urgency... Anyway, time for battle.

C: 这个蜃影不相信白露有能力继承龙尊，转而信奉寿瘟祸祖。
E: This Mirage Echo didn't believe Bailu had what it took to become the high elder and turned to worship the Plagues Author.

C: 名为「浮烟」的岁阳依附在你体内，提议与你合作以逃出另一只岁阳「恚炎」设下的幻障迷境。只要逃脱十王司追捕，浮烟就会离开你。
E: A heliobus named "Cirrus" had taken refuge within your body. They proposed working together to escape the Illusory Maze created by another heliobus named "Furynox." Cirrus promised to leave you once the pursuit by the Ten-Lords Commission had ended.

C: 你同云璃了解情况，她想要找到魔剑以洗清嫌疑。她正对一件事感到奇怪：窃贼偷走了剑，却<color=#f29e38ff>留下了剑匣</color>。
E: You discussed the situation with Yunli. She aimed to find the cursed sword to clear her name. Yet one thing puzzled her: The thief had taken the sword but <color=#f29e38ff>left the case behind</color>.

C: 你没能说服斯科特。斯科特不介意与你们耗上几天，反正只要引擎一修好，公司货船就会离港。彦卿决定动用武力打开局面。
E: You failed to convince Skott. He wouldn't mind dragging things out for a few days. As long as their engine got fixed, the IPC freight skiff would leave port. Yanqing decided to use force to break the stalemate.

C: 众人商议继续运营「罗浮杂俎」账号。至此，捉鬼小队的工作终于告一段落。
E: Everyone agreed to keep the Ghostly Grove account running. And with that, the ghost-hunting squad's mission finally drew to a close.

E: Prolonged Past

E: March 7th / Say~Cheese~

C: 热砂海选会场紧锣密鼓的节目摄制今天也在继续，或许有合适的演出可以拍摄？
E: The intense filming at the Scorchsand Audition Venue continues today. Perhaps there's a fitting performance you could capture?

E: Identifying target

E: Watch Ruan Mei closely!

C: 希望孩子们也能从始至终做到。
E: Hopefully, the children will also follow through with this principle.

C: 你好歹也用过不少智能设备，你能想到的——
E: You're a smart person well-acquainted with smart devices. You'll come up with something...

C: 创新又能有多创新？试试。
E: How innovative can it be? Let's try.

C: 太卜轮流做，今天我当家。
E: Master Diviner takes turns, and I'm in charge today.

C: 太好了，是猫meme，我们有救了。
E: Excellent, cat memes to the rescue.

C: 你定睛一看，她究竟是在做什么？
E: You squint... what exactly is she doing?

C: 可惜这里的路人们早就收过免费宝石了。
E: Too bad they've all claimed their free gems already.

C: 为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，伦纳德请求你协助完成一项测试。
E: Leonard is asking for your help to complete a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job.

C: 西桥没说几句话就匆匆下线了，真不知道他这个引导员到底引导了什么……
E: Seymour logged off after just saying a few sentences. As a guide, what exactly did he guide you to do?

C:
爱墨瑞得-Ⅲ的激雷乐队凭借着几支强劲的先行曲，迅速点燃了整个星球的激情。

节奏吉他手戴夫激烈扫弦时迸发出的雷电火花，是巡演开场的标志，却被乐迷们视为余生唯一的光。

乐队的巡演皆由乐迷们自发维持秩序，他们在进场时派发丝质手环用以识别身份。这些乐迷们大多支付不起高昂的逃生费用，无奈接受了等待电磁爆发的命运。但自从目睹叛逆的年轻人重返行星，便感到自己的灵魂也在这一刻点燃。他们在手环上记录了歌词，记录了每一场演出的时间，也记录了自己的无声呐喊。

贝斯手席德收集了每一场巡演的手环，他让女友南希编成了手绳，并一直戴着。

「没有意义没有方向，没有别的地方可去，我们没有未来。」《我们的路》，激雷乐队第二张专辑里的单曲，席德的人生信条。
E:
Sizzling Thunder from Emerald-III quickly emblazed the whole planet's enthusiasm with several hits.

Marking the beginning of their concert tour were the dazzling sparkles of electrifying thunder when Daeve the rhythm guitarist fiercely struck chords, which coincidentally was also worshiped by hordes of their music fans as the only light in their lives.

In every concert tour the band had, there would be fans keeping order voluntarily and handing out wristbands to everyone upon entering the concert grounds. Most of these fans could not afford the costly fees for an escape, so accepting their fate and waiting for the electromagnetic burst to arrive was their only option. Ever since witnessing the return of these rebellious youths to the planet, they had felt it in their bones that their souls were ignited at this very moment. Onto these wristbands they wrote their lyrics, their showtime, as well as the band's unvoiced scream.

Sid the bassist collected the wristbands for every tour. His girlfriend wove them into a bracelet, which Sid then wore all the time.

"There's no meaning, no direction, nowhere else to go, and no future for us." From "Our Way," a single from Sizzling Thunder's second album, and Sid's life credo.

C:
「报告家主。这些人自称是有要事会见，其中好几人身份成疑，进入梦中的手段非同一般……」

闯入梦中的不速之客排成一排。不出意外，以恶待人的凶徒将被驱逐，谎报身份的罪犯将遭收押，他不发一言，便已然安排就绪。无辜之人目睹了他的盛怒，眼中闪烁着期待与不安——随后，他露出微笑，向面前众人探出手作邀请状，是表达认可，也是展现威严。

「各位是橡木家系的尊贵客人，自当礼遇。或许你们好奇自己是如何得到正当评判，在此容许我稍作解释，那是因为诸位所行之『道』与我相会。」

侍者、艺伶、无业无为之人…纷纷打消疑虑，他们理解了邀约的真诚含义，心中再无介怀。

「让罪人得到应有的惩罚，让客人得到应有的礼仪，谐律本应如此。」

家主恩威并施，足以博得来客的信任。他环视众人，缓缓侧身微躬——

「欢迎来到橡木家系。」
E:
"These visitors claimed to have urgent matters to report, esteemed head, but some of their identities remain questionable, and they used shady means to enter the Dreamscape..."

The uninvited guests trespassing the Dreamscape are lined up. If all goes according to plan, malefactors who inflicted harm will face banishment, and impostors with fraudulent identities will be apprehended. He says nothing, yet all arrangements have been made. The innocents witness his wrath, and expectations and uneasy spark in their eyes — Then, he smiles, extending his hand in an inviting gesture to the people remaining before him. It is a symbol of acknowledgment and a display of authority.

"You are all esteemed guests of the Oak Family, and therefore you shall be welcomed with courtesy. Perhaps you wonder how you are judged fairly. Allow me to give a short explanation — It is because the 'road' you walk on has crossed with mine."

The attendants, the artists, and the jobless ones dispelled their doubts as they recognized the truth behind his invitation.

"Let transgressors face deserved punishment, and let guests receive deserved courtesy. Such should be the law of harmony."

The family head's combined sternness and generosity are enough to earn him the trust of his guests. Surveying the assembly, he bows slowly...

"Welcome to the Oak family."

C:
「后援队」围绕着星神克里珀身边的星系往来匆匆，旧日舰船轨迹形成了最初的航道。

深信着星神所为必有意义的「后援队」，向邻近的星系跨出物物交换的第一步。「后援队」备好运力充足的舰队，稀缺珍贵的物资，以及难以拒绝的条件，无数跨越星系的贸易就此产生。随即，「后援队」掌管航道信息，独占议价权利，率先制定了银河商业铁则。

满载着木材、石头、钢筋、超钛的舰队行过星神克里珀身边，如同飞虫盘旋。琥珀王不言不语，未曾投下注视。

时移世易，邻近星系的贸易已经不再满足繁忙的「后援队」。两位聪明人决心纵深银河，星际和平公司就此成立。公司提供一切其他星球感兴趣的商品，并用「信用点」标上了公平价格。从此以后，银河的贸易航道建立起来，加入公司商业网络的各星球都能共享同样的货币，购买同样的商品，享用同样的服务。

「信用点体系」下的商船在星海间流动，贸易航道交叠重合，交织成泛银河网络。满载着远星异宝的舰船无数次行过星神克里珀身边，仍如萤虫环绕，星神沉默如旧。

自「后援队」时代累积的建材，已经堆满星神克里珀身边的每颗星球，数目只增不减。星神克里珀无意采用殷勤的馈赠，祂始终关注着凡人不可预见的危机，不得不以光年为单位铸造障壁。昔日采办物资的小组织，早已成为银河中伸手云覆手雨的庞大势力，他们凝望着无首巨像，从未觉得这一切都是徒然无功。

「一切资本的翻滚及增长，都是为了在克里珀有需要之时，能够满足星神的愿望。」
E:
The support team hurried around the star system close to the Aeon Qlipoth, with the old ships' trajectories forming the first routes.

Believing in the meaningfulness of the Aeon's actions, the support team took the first step in exchanging goods for other goods with a neighboring star system. The support team prepared an adequate fleet, rare and precious goods, and offers that were hard to refuse, thus creating countless trades across star systems. Then, the support team controlled trade route and business information, held exclusive bargaining rights, and spearheaded the formulation of the cosmos's trade regulations.

Fleets full of wood, stone, rebar, and supernium passed by Aeon Qlipoth like a swarm of circling flies. The Amber Lord kept silent, never once casting THEIR gaze upon the humans.

Eventually, times changed and trade with neighboring star systems was no longer sufficient for the bustling support team. The two wise ones were determined to delve deeper into the cosmos, and thus the Interastral Peace Corporation was born. The IPC offered anything a planet could ever want, at fair prices pegged to their "credits." Since then, the cosmos's trade route was founded, and all planets that join the IPC's business network can share the same currency, buy the same goods, and enjoy the same services.

Merchant ships under the credit system travel between the stars, and the trade routes merge and separate to weave a pan-cosmic network. The ships full of treasures from distant stars passed the Aeon Qlipoth countless times like fireflies, and yet the Aeon remained as silent as before.

The building materials accumulated since the time of the support team piled up on every planet around the Aeon Qlipoth, and the amount will only increase. The Aeon Qlipoth has no intention of accepting these eager gifts, instead always solely focused on the crisis that will befall the unsuspecting mortals, having to cast the gargantuan barriers measured in light-years. The small organization that used to purchase materials has long since become a tremendous influence in the cosmos. They gaze upon the headless colossus, never once feeling that their efforts were in vain.

"All the toil and growth of our capital is for Qlipoth, and to execute the Aeon's will when the time comes."

C: 在宇宙风的吹拂下，风帆孤独地飘荡。这张铺陈在太空的机械网络原本是文贰星巨构发电机的核心组件，它捕捉恒星喷吐的带电粒子流，将之转化为传输向地表的能源。但一切都结束在了绝灭大君「焚风」到来的刹那，而后便是超新星爆炸的火光，直到光芒渐褪、军团离去，一无所有的尘埃中，只剩一朵残花述说着历史曾经存在。
E: The sail floats alone under the caress of the cosmic wind. This mechanical web laid out in space was originally the core component of Wen-II's giant generator. It captures the charged particle beams breathed out by stars and converts them to energy that is then transported to the planet. However, everything ended the moment the Lord Ravager Zephyro arrived. What followed was the fire of a supernova exploding. When the light faded and the Legion left, only a single broken flower showed that history once existed among the now-empty dust plains.

C: 是否存在一种无止境的破坏冲动，将目之所及的事物全数毁灭。敌人已消失殆尽，代谢腔在蠕动间上涌的愤怒仍无处排解。可食物的外壳已经崩裂，再不能反抗，能吐出火焰的身体被野蛮地拆开，供子嗣们大快朵颐。而恒星已然死去，在坍缩的引力场中化作饵食，你仍记得它有多么香甜。\n\n死亡，请带来更多的死亡！来自碎星王虫的呼唤在裸脑质间轰鸣，你看见另一个新天地，它完整而美丽，大气尚未被蛰毒侵染，活物有待遭死光分解。你展开翅膀，带着同胞们启程，奔赴下一场欢宴。
E: Does an unceasing urge to destroy everything in sight exist? Although all enemies have been eradicated, yet the anger surging within the metabolic cavity as you wriggle your body still have nowhere to be released. However, the carapace of the food has already ruptured, meaning it can no longer resist. The body capable of spewing flames is brutally torn apart for your offspring to feast on. The star has long fallen, becoming prey in the collapsing gravitational field, and you still remember how delicious it was.\n\nDeath! Please bring about more deaths! The call from the Starcrusher Swarm King rumbles in your exposed brain matter. You see a new world, complete and beautiful, with its atmosphere uncorrupted by insect venom. Living beings are waiting to be disintegrated by the death ray. You spread your wings and set off to the next feast with your companions.

C: 一个错误，在无数次基因转移中的变异，某种意义上，卵鞘里的蛰虫获得了完美的身体。你分泌出黏液，将身体固着在礁石上，悠闲地过滤水中的沙砾。阳光穿透水面，激活沉睡的细胞，它们源源不断地为你供给能源，无需觅食，也更无需移动。\n\n海底铺满了你的子嗣，它们对生态并无危害，路过的有颌鱼用牙齿撬起一枚甲壳，但你不为所动，只是悠闲地享受自养生活带来的正反馈。一只披甲的软体动物啃下你一半的身体，但你不为所动，它们会慢慢长出来，而你只需感受阳光即可。
E: One mistake, a mutation over countless transfers of genetic information, has allowed the Sting within its egg case to obtain what is, in a sense, a perfect body. You secrete mucus, anchor your body to the reef, and casually filter the sand in the waters around you. As the sunlight penetrates the water's surface, it activates your dormant cells and they provide your body with endless energy. You are left with no need for nutrition and no need to move.\n\nYour offspring litter the ocean floor, but they pose no harm to the ecology. A passing jawfish gouges up a nearby shell in its teeth, but you remain unmoved, only casually enjoying the positivity offered by a completely self-sustaining existence. An armored mollusk nibbles half of your body away, but you remain unmoved. Your body will grow back slowly, and all you need to do is enjoy the sunshine.

C: 予月以蜜糖，予星以歌唱。你咽下乏味的尘埃，扇动翅膀，在微弱的重力中向前行进。嗷嗷待哺的子嗣悬浮在囊泡里，它们抱成一团，爪子勾在你的腹腔，本能地用疼痛刺激你分泌出食物。你将冷硬的无机体搅碎，消化道压榨着躯体仅存的些许生机，营养被输送至体外，成为哺育种群的糖浆。\n\n但子嗣们成长得太快，你已无法供给如此庞大的营养需求。就连驮着囊泡行走都开始踉跄。你知道，作为一只虫子，你已走到了使命的尽头。你瘫倒在地上，撕开自己的外壳，目光中映射出身躯被啃食的模样。
E: Give the moons honey and the stars song. You swallow the tasteless dust and flap your wings, moving forward in weak gravity. Wailing offspring are suspended in their vesicles, huddling together with their claws hooked into your belly, instinctively urging you to secrete sustenance through pain. You churn the cold, hard inorganic matter into debris, your digestive tract squeezing out the last remnants of life within your body. Nutrients flow out of your body and turn into the molasses that nourishes your species.\n\nBut the offspring are growing so rapidly that you can no longer meet their enormous nutritional demands. Even walking with vesicles begins to feel like a struggle. As an arthropod, you realize you have reached the end of your mission. You collapse to the ground, tearing open your shell, your eyes reflecting the scene of your body being gnawed.

C:
你还记得那支璀璨的剧团吗？
剧作家埃斯罗科斯谱写的悲喜。
他们在剧团中最像战士，永远在纷争的火焰下放歌。
他们在战士中最像祭司，歌颂奥赫玛之巅，照亮尘世的黎明。
「英雄科林刻起身，用短剑捍卫荣誉，」
「埃克斯的战车碾过僭主，迎来胜利。」
离散的公民聚拢，向灾厄举起武器。
多洛斯的偷儿也为他们驻足，
带着勇气踏入废墟，如英雄般拯救生命。
世上最好的剧团早已凋零，可我依然在梦中窥见他们，
带上刻法勒的面具，扮演神明背负天地。
E:
Do you remember that radiant troupe?
The sorrows and joys penned by the playwright Aeschylus.
They are the most warrior-like among theater troupes, always singing amidst the blazing fires of Strife.
They are the most priest-like among warriors, praising the peaks of Okhema and the dawn that lights the mortal realm.
"The hero Corinchi rises, guarding his honor with his short sword."
"Aecus' chariot crushes the tyrant, heralding victory."
The dispersed citizens gather, raising their weapons against calamity.
Even the thieves of Dolos pause for them,
Venturing into ruins with bravery, saving lives like heroes.
The legendary troupe of all time may have faded, but I still glimpse them in my dreams,
Where they don the masks of Kephale, playing as the god that upholds the world.

C:
求求你，带着这部孤本离去，无论去哪里。
原谅我唐突的请求，但时间已所剩无几，
那群文化的践踏者身着红衣，
正驾着双轮马车朝此前进。
自称瑟希斯的使徒，行使的却是断绝文脉的把戏，
他们承认知识的价值，却否认求知的意义。
他们将图书馆洗劫，又将古籍掳去，
就连孩童的识字本，也逃不过他们的铁蹄。
对了，如果可能，请前往神悟树庭，
那里有捍卫真理的贤明。
你问我为何不亲自前去？
我已顿悟，对付这群疯子辩论毫无意义
请把佩剑给我，我要为进步的力量战斗到底。
E:
Please, take this unique manuscript with you wherever your travels lead.
Forgive my abrupt request, but time is running out.
Those cultural tramplers, dressed in red,
Are racing towards us on their chariots.
They claim to be the emissaries of Cerces, but all they do is destroy culture.
They acknowledge the value of knowledge, but deny the significance of seeking it.
They ravage libraries and loot ancient tomes,
Not sparing even children's primer books from their ruthless grasp.
If you can, please make your way to the Grove of Epiphany,
Where sages stand to uphold the truth.
You ask why don't I go myself?
I've come to realize that arguing with those psychos is a fruitless endeavor.
Give me a sword. I'll fight till the end for the cause of progress.

C:
真是可笑，你竟把那群逐火的暴徒称作英雄？
不过是一个失心疯的女皇，以济世的名义满足幻想，
引来群贪图神权和荣誉的疯子，对现状火上浇油。
撕裂黄金之茧的翅膀，有为丑陋的世界带来一丝美吗？
夺走磐岩之脊的火种，崩裂的大地吞噬了多少生灵？
逐火的灾难比黄金战争更可耻，
你们的罪业连尼卡多利和扎格列斯也自愧不如！
赫利塔克，你的那只眼睛是如何瞎掉的？
还有我的女儿，这座城市所有人的父亲母亲和孩子，
你怎有胆替那些没回来的人唱赞歌！
E:
You call those flame-chasing marauders heroes? Ridiculous.
They're nothing but zealots blindly following a deranged Empress, who indulges her fantasies under the guise of saving the world.
A horde of power-hungry, glory-obsessed lunatics, they only add fuel to the fire.
Has tearing the wings from the Chrysalis of Gold brought even a touch of beauty to this ugly world?
How many lives were consumed by the cracked earth after they took the Coreflame from the Pillar of Stone?
The calamity wrought by their flame-chasing is a disgrace greater than the Chrysos War.
Even the sins of Nikador and Zagreus pale in comparison to theirs.
Helioticus, how did you lose that eye of yours?
And what about my daughter — And the fathers, mothers, and children of everyone in this city?
How dare you sing praises for those who have not returned!

C: 真理究竟为何物？无人能参透。倘若「愚钝」是世界的顽疾，传播智慧便是在医治宇宙。但「书」可以医治众生吗？根据博识学会记载：历史上，月桂冠系的哲学家联合曾爆发过一场内乱，血液和机油浸染了沉思者柱廊的所有书籍，哲人们死伤无数，最终被目睹这一切的公司雇员称为「理性的溃败」——书籍以这样荒谬的方式，实现了对一个世界的再清洗。
E: What is truth? No one truly knows. Supposing that "stupidity" is an incurable disease in this world, then disseminating knowledge counts as a treatment for the universe. But can "books" mend all living things? According to the Intelligentsia Guild's historical records, the Philosopher Union of the Laurel Wreath Galaxy once erupted in civil war, and blood and machine oil had stained all the books in the contemplators' corridors. Uncountable numbers of scholars died, and the IPC employees who witnessed it all deemed this occurrence "Rationality's Fall" — Through such absurd means, books cleansed a world of its impurities once more.

C: 有出逃者称自己曾因打开奇怪的匣子获得一枚家族缘结，误入信仰「同谐」希佩的家族聚会，他描述自己见到了前所未有的画面：群星意志彼此相连，拧成一股绳结。在家族缘结下，人们睁大双眼、面露微笑，他们的表情惊人一致，并互相看着彼此。当他发出疑问时，大堂内数千人同时看向他，并异口同声发出了同样的声音——「欢迎。」出逃者立刻毛骨悚然，最后，为谋生存，他只好同样睁大双眼、面露微笑。
E: An escapee reported that he had acquired a Family Ties after opening a peculiar box, and inadvertently entered a gathering of The Family that venerates Xipe the Harmony. He described witnessing an unprecedented scene: The will of numerous heavenly bodies were intertwined, coiling into a single bound knot. Under Family Ties, people open their eyes wide, their faces etched with eerie smiles, staring at one another with identical expressions. When he voiced a question at the scene, everyone in the grand hall simultaneously shifted their gaze towards him and spoke with the same voice — "Welcome." The escapee was instantly unnerved, and, in a desperate bid for survival, he too held his eyes wide, his face plastered with the same smile.

C: 清冷寡言的少年，持有名为「击云」的长枪，于列车漫长的开拓之旅中担任护卫。\n丹恒对自己的过往始终讳莫如深，他与列车同行正是为了摆脱自己曾亲手造就的一切。\n然而，列车真的会带着他远离「过去」么？
E: A cold and reserved young man who wields a spear known as Cloud-Piercer. He acts as the Express' guard on its long trailblazing expedition.\nDan Heng never talks much about his past. In fact, he joined the Express Crew to escape from a past of his own making.\nBut can the Express really help him outrun his past?

C:
在那场极尽壮烈的战事之后，所剩无几的铁卫班师振旅，回到贝洛伯格。大守护者为了庆祝这场来之不易的胜利，立即下令召开庆典。举城上下彻夜狂欢三日有余，欢声笑语未曾间断，而庆典气氛在那场专为铁卫开设的授勋典礼上达到了最高潮。

在众人的注视下，大守护者为此役中军功最为卓著之人颁授奖励。出身于贝洛伯格望族的年轻戍卫官默默地佩戴那由地髓锻成的臂甲——轻便、灵活、强韧，同时散逸着极光般的辉彩——这是他对这件珍宝的全部印象。

如此荣耀的勋章是用多少战友的生命换来的？他逼迫自己不去想这件事。当下的他只能以笑容迎合大守护者与贝洛伯格的期待，因为这才是一名忠诚的卫士该做的。

在戍卫官将臂甲佩戴完全的那一瞬间，激烈的辉光从甲胄的连接处迸射而出。下一刻，典礼的观众席上爆发出经久不息的热烈掌声。

人们看不到众铁卫盔面下的倦容——他们以为这是一场凯旋。
E:
After the most epic of battles, the few surviving Silvermane guards made their way back to Belobog. The Supreme Guardian ordered an immediate parade to celebrate this hard-earned victory. For more than three days and nights, the whole city reveled in a carnival with great laughter and joy. The celebration reached its climax at an awards ceremony for the Silvermane Guards.

Under the watchful gaze of the crowds, the Supreme Guardian presented an award to the greatest soldiers for outstanding military service. This young captain from a noble house quietly puts on the arm armor forged out of Geomarrow — Light, flexible, and strong, while radiating a light reminiscent of auroras — That's the only impression he had of this treasure.

How many of his comrades' lives had been exchanged for such a glorious medal? He forces himself not to think about it. For now, he could only meet the expectations of the Supreme Guardian and all of Belobog with a smile — because this is what a loyal soldier must do.

The moment the captain finishes putting on the arm armor, a brilliant beam of light shoots out from the joints between the plates. The crowd erupts into a spontaneous and prolonged applause.

Nobody sees the weary faces beneath the helmets of those Silvermane Guards — they merely thought this is a triumphant victory.

C: 仙舟「曜青」的狐人医士、策士，常以笑脸迎人，实际颇有心计。\n出身于丹鼎司名家，曾一度心死避世，不再行医，后为医治「天击将军」飞霄再度出山。\n精于医食同源的丹方研究，尤其是能带给人痛感的辣味食物，发明了名为「九宫格」的鼎镬药式。
E: A foxian healer and counselor from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. Often greets people with a smile on his face and a scheme in his heart.\nBorn into a prestigious Alchemy Commission family, he once withdrew from practicing medicine due to a broken heart. However, he returned to the field to treat "the Merlin's Claw," General Feixiao.\nSkilled in the study of alchemical prescription that views food as medicine, especially those that induce a sensation of spiciness. He invented a cauldron-based medicinal formula known as the "nine-squared grid."

C: 她很快明白，或许离开是更好的选择。 借着龙师的帮助，师徒二人离开罗浮，前往朱明。过往种种在她眼前闪现，她们只沉浸于丹药的炼制，却不知一张人心织就而成的大网早已笼罩而来。 「如果不懂得如何面对尘俗，自己的理想迟早会迎来破灭的一天。」 她暗自下定决心，绝不让此事重演。 借着云华的引荐，她结识了朱明龙尊「炎庭君」，得以拜入「金鳞燃犀」一脉，学习针灸、熏香、火炙等特殊的医术。 她一改往日两耳不闻窗外事的习惯，不露声色地与各色人等相处周旋。 久而久之，她发现每类人，每种「病」，都有其特殊的味道。 她闻过嫉妒构陷的酸腐。 在朱明学习时，莫名丢失的药材、随之而来的误解与冷落没有将她压垮。她以令众多资深丹士望尘莫及的熏香扫平了一切质疑与讥笑。 她闻过阴谋虚伪的腥膻。 在接待来自其他星球生物技术专家时，她抽丝剥茧，徐徐图之，终于挫败对方与药王秘传勾结的图谋。 她闻过利欲熏心的恶臭。 任朱明随军医士时，她洞悉军中药品隐藏的巨大利益，不动声色地暗中调查，一举清除了贪腐舞弊的人员。 人群的各种「病症」在她的诊断下无所遁形，而她总能制出恰当的「熏香」驱逐异味。 「我既做不到如师父那般出尘脱俗，那就干脆好好地见识见识人心的模样，与这些人斗上一斗。」 她将自己的名字改为「灵砂」 ——其升降阴阳，既济水火，为扶危拯急之灵药，也是她希望自己成为的模样。
E: She quickly came to realize that perhaps leaving would be her best option. With the help of the Preceptors, they left the Luofu together and headed for the Zhuming. The past flashed before her eyes. As they were immersed in a world of medicine and research, they were blithely unaware that a huge net woven by the hearts of men had already ensnared them. "If you never learn how to face this world, your ideals will face only inevitable destruction." She vowed to herself never to let something like this happen again. Thanks to Yunhua's introduction, she was able to meet with the Zhuming High Elder Ardens Regia, and enter the Piercing Gaze sect to study specialist medical treatments such as acupuncture, aromatherapy, and pyropathy. She fixed her previous pattern of turning a blind eye to the world around her and came to work alongside people of all walks of life harmoniously. As time passed, she realized that every type of person, every type of "illness" had their own unique scent. She had smelled the putrid stench of envy. While she studied at the Zhuming, she did not allow the mysterious disappearance of medicinal herbs and the subsequent misunderstandings and cold shoulders to crush her. She dispelled all doubts and mocking with incense that no seasoned alchemist could ever hope to match. She had smelled the fetid stench of conspiracy, hypocrisy. When working with biotechnology experts from other planets, she traced the thin veil of clues that revealed their schemes and thwarted their secret intentions to collude with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. She had smelled the foul stench of covetous greed. When she served as a Zhuming military healer, she came to understand the huge benefits of medicines hidden in the barracks and investigated in secret to expose corrupt members in one fell swoop. The "afflictions" of humanity had nowhere to hide under her diagnosis, she was always able to formulate the perfect "incense" to dispel their scent. "If I am unable to stand head and shoulders above my peers like my master, then I shall dedicate myself to learning the hearts of man and fighting them fair and square." She changed her name to "Lingsha." Her medicinal namesake's fluctuation of yin and yang, its properties of both water and fire make it a miracle cure to those in mortal danger, just as she herself wished to become.

C: 乖巧懂事的「白日梦酒店」门童，梦想成为一名和爷爷一样的银河冒险家。\n工作十分努力，尤其擅长修理各类机械，热衷于酒店住客分享的星际见闻。\n希望自己快快长大，期待着早日有一天踏上探索群星的旅程。
E: A lovable and thoughtful bellboy at The Reverie Hotel. He wishes to become an intergalactic adventurer like his grandfather.\nHe is extremely hardworking and is skilled at fixing a variety of machines. He also has a fondness for listening to the interstellar rumors the guests share with him.\nHe hopes he can grow up faster and looks forward to embarking on his star-treading journey.

C: 「也许…这就是在奥赫玛度过的最后一天了……」 在苦旅的尽头，她终于寻到冥界的线索，前往那或许有来无回的地方之前，她还想再好好看一眼世界。 那是黄金裔的浴池。 她记得阿格莱雅曾在氤氲的水汽中，将精心修补的手套送给她。 「蝶，和第一次见面相比，你变了许多呢。」 她惊喜地触摸着手套上美丽的花纹，那平日淡漠的领袖微笑着向她眨了眨眼。 「即使是如今的我，也能看到你那被寒冷包裹着的、炽热的心……」 那是屋后静谧的花园，它已被塑造成了她梦中的模样。 在那时空错乱的梦中，她常常遇到另一个自己，她们一同在花园中耕作，培育，直到荒芜的土地变为盛大的花海。 「但愿在未来，我也能如此播种希望……」 那是她为曾在指尖逝去的生命立下的纪念碑。 从哀地里亚的逝者，到逐火之旅的黄金裔…千年以来，她尝试记住每一个人的名字和过去。 「有人记着，就不算真正的逝去。」 那是她初见{NICKNAME}的地方。 相遇是一件多么神奇的事，她想，往日见惯的街道，因为人而有了特别的意义。 「阁下，我一定会用我的双手，为你带来……」 门扉时将近，约定启程的时刻也将到来。 在那热烈的阳光下，她许下最初的、也是最后的心愿：以那寒冷而漫长的一生作为开端，她将与{F#她}{M#他}一同写下—— 一首以真正的拥抱作为句点的、名为「遐蝶」的诗篇。
E: "Maybe... this will be my last day in Okhema." At the end of a bitter journey, she finally found the clues about the nether realm. Before she headed to the place of no return, she wanted to look carefully at the world again. That was the Chrysos Heir's bath. She remembered how Aglaea once, in the thick steam, gave her a pair of gloves that she had carefully fixed. "Cas, you've changed quite a lot, compared to the first time we met." She touched the beautiful patterns on the gloves in surprise, and the usually indifferent leader smiled as she winked at her. "Even the present me can see your scorching heart beneath the frigid cold..." That was the serene garden behind the house, shaped like how it looked in her dreams. In that chaotic dream, she often met her other self. They tilled and nurtured the garden together, until the barren soil transformed into a lush ocean of flowers. "I wish that I can still sow seeds of hope like this in the future." That was the monument she erected for the lives once lost at her fingertips. From the deceased in Aidonia, to the Chrysos Heirs in the Flame-Chase Journey... Over a thousand years, she tried to remember everyone's name and past. "If someone still remembers, they are not truly dead." That was where she first met {NICKNAME}. Encounters are such miraculous things, she thought. The streets that she was so familiar with in the past had gained a special meaning because of someone else. "{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, with my own hands, I will definitely bring you..." As the Entry Hour draws near, the time for the promised departure is also nigh. Under the blazing sunlight, she made her first and last wish: With the freezing and arduous life as a beginning, she will write with {F#her}{M#him}— A poem titled "Castorice," which ends with a true embrace.

C: 抵达监控室的二人面对的却是不在此处的空间站主人随手留下的迷阵。\n「用奇物来隐藏奇物，的确是那女人会干的事情。」\n但很多时候即便猜到了手法，你也猜不到故事的结局。
E: The two arrive at the Monitoring Room to find a maze left by the absent space station's owner.\n"Using a Curio to hide another Curio sounds like something she would do."\nBut oftentimes, knowing the way does not equate to knowing how it ends.

C: 你找到了三月七，发现她似乎正沉浸在小朋友们的游戏中，并且完全没有注意到你。\n「当然了，」你想，「在一名同伴昏迷、另一名同伴下落不明的时候，难道还有比『找几个小朋友一起做游戏』更合适的解决方案吗？」\n你说服了自己，接下来就轮到可爱的三月七说服你了。
E: You find March 7th and discover her to be immersed in a children's game and doesn't notice you at all.\n"Of course," you think. "When a companion is unconscious and the other missing, what better way to resolve it than to 'find a few kids to play games with'?"\nYou've convinced yourself. Now it's the cute March 7th's turn to do the same.

C: 深入矿区的路途中，你可以听到惊叫哭喊始终此起彼伏、不绝于耳——看来此处事态已至危殆，你必须对沿途逃难的矿民伸出援手。\n不过，不知为何，你总觉得自己能够隐约听到打呼噜的声音…\n难道是连日舟车劳顿导致你产生错觉了吗？
E: On the way deeper into the mines, you can hear the constant screams in the distance. It is obvious that things have gotten pretty serious, you must help the fleeing miners along the way.\nHowever, for some reason, you seem to be able to hear the sound of someone snoring...\nCould it be that you're having hallucinations from the fatigue of travel?

C: 希露瓦轻车熟路地带着你们来到了能源中枢前，但此处仍有面露凶光的银鬃铁卫把守着关口——尽管你根本看不到他头盔下的脸。\n冰雪聪明的希露瓦此番能够故技重施、成功混入其中吗？你不好说。
E: Serval brings you to the energy hub, but there is a ferocious Silvermane Guard watching the place. You can tell his expression even without being able to see the face underneath his helmet.\nWill clever Serval manage to successfully use her old tricks and blend in again? You can't be sure.

C:
巨大的机关门扉再次阻断了你们的进路。
有了在铁卫禁区操作旋转栈桥的经验，你们很快意识到：要想解锁眼前的机关，必须找到与之相连的装置才行。
显然，控制机关铁门的装置并非只有一处——你不禁想，这道铁门存在的意义或许只是为了折磨其使用者…
不过抱怨也没用，继续寻找剩下的装置吧！
E:
A giant mechanism gate stops your advance once again.
Armed with the experience of dealing with the gear bridge in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, you quickly realize that if you want to unlock the mechanism in front of you, you'll have to find the device linked to it.
Apparently, there is more than just one device that controls the mechanism gate — you can't help but think that the sole purpose of this gate is to torture its user...
However, complaining won't do you any good. Keep searching for the remaining devices!

C: 你在机械屋里为希露瓦和克拉拉拍了一张合照。\n呃，合照的意思是，你的画面里至少得拍到他们俩…这点道理你应该懂吧？
E: You took a group photo of Serval and Clara in the workshop.\nUm, "group photo" means the photo should at least contain the two of them... You do understand this, right?

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶向星穹深处。\n不速之客卡芙卡向列车发出前往仙舟罗浮的邀约，但这份邀约的背后却潜藏着不怀好意的味道。你、三月七还有丹恒决心已定，心念一同——列车的方向绝不会轻易为外人左右。\n好啦，现在你可以回到观景车厢里，投出决定下一站的神圣一票了吧。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nIn a surprise move, Kafka invites the Express to visit the Xianzhou Luofu, but this invitation sounds ominous and could be a trap. March 7th, Dan Heng, and you have made up your minds and are of similar beliefs — The directions of the Express will not be altered by external forces.\nAlright, now you can return to the Parlor Car, and cast your hallowed vote for your next destination.

C: 为了令搜索行动事半功倍，停云展示了工造司发明的便利工具——一只寻人追物的机巧犬「谛听」。不过要熟练使用「谛听」，却要额外花些工夫。
E: To make searching operations exponentially easier, Tingyun has introduced a handy tool invented by the Artisanship Commission — Diting, an ingenium dog used for tracking. Getting proficient at using this tool takes some a little bit of practice.

C: 抵达「迴星港」，你们展开搜索行动。猎物总会不自觉留下痕迹，而分辨痕迹是否属于猎物，则是考验猎人技巧的时候了。
E: Having arrived at the "Stargazer Navalia," you begin searching for Kafka and the hunt is on. Prey always leaves behind traces of its presence unwittingly, and now is the time to hone your hunting skills and determine whether the traces you find belong to the prey or not.

C: 在星槎海，仪式即将开始。无论短生种还是长生种，如同所有星辰终会熄灭一般，告别的时刻来临了。
E: The soul-soothing ceremony is about to begin in Starskiff Haven. Like how every star will eventually dim and be snuffed out, it is time to bid farewell to the dead for both short-life and long-life species.

C: 经过米沙的讲解，你了解到梦中的「白日梦」酒店正在修缮，所有宾客因此必须通过一座临时中转站前往「黄金的时刻」——这也是你刚才所在房间的真面目。\n现在，只要触摸另一个画框，你就可以正式进入匹诺康尼了。
E: Having heard Misha's explanation, you come to understand that the Reverie hotel within the dream is under maintenance and all guests must therefore pass through a temporary transfer station in order to reach Golden Hour. This is the true nature of the room you were just in.\nNow, you need only touch the other picture frame to finally enter Penacony.

C: 离开诊所后，映入眼帘的是一座由垃圾桶构成的巨大王国。一名名为莎塔娜的垃圾桶找到了你，请求你帮助垃圾桶们从烦忧中解脱，带领众垃圾桶获得解放——前提是取得三个「信任的证明」。\n你解开了拉拉撕圾的封印。为了不让他为祸桶间，你必须击败他。
E: As you leave the clinic, what lies before your eyes is a giant kingdom formed of trashcans. A trashcan by the name of Shatana finds you and asks for your help in freeing the trashcans from their worries and leading them to liberation — The prerequisite is that you acquire three Proofs of Trust.\nYou have broken Garboski's seal. Now, you must defeat him to prevent him from wreaking havoc on the trashcan world.

C: 得知了伙伴们失散的消息后，黑天鹅带领你在忆域中继续前进。途中，你们意外遇到了正在此地探寻秘密的巡海游侠（尽管她给出了充分的理由，但你有理由怀疑她大概是又迷路了）。\n有了这位游侠的协助，你们抵达大堂应该不成问题——但黑天鹅似乎有些忌惮她，为什么？
E: Having learned of how your companions have become scattered, Black Swan continues to lead you forward in the Memory Zone. Along the way, you unexpectedly encounter the Galaxy Ranger, who is here searching for secrets (though she gave sufficient reasons for her to be here, you have reasons to suspect that she just got lost again.)\nNow, with the assistance of this Ranger, it should be no trouble for you all to make it to the hotel lobby — However, Black Swan seems a little apprehensive of her... Why could this be?

C: 你们在珍品室里找到了名为「格列佛拱门」的神奇道具。如果你看过那部以来自未来的蓝色猫咪担任主人公的有趣动画，一定能够联想到那个通过就能使人缩小的隧……\n呃，咳咳，出于版权方要求，后面的内容不予显示。好了，快把拱门放入沙盘中吧。
E: You two come across a wondrous item called Gulliver's Arch in the treasure room. If you've watched the fun animation with a blue cat from the future as the protagonist, then the item will surely remind you of the tunnel that can shrink the pers—\nAhem, the rest of the content will not be shown due to copyright issues. Now, please put the arch on the sandpit.

C: 加拉赫示意各位择地继续讨论。他将你们带到了「惊梦酒吧」，浮华美梦中一处毫不起眼的清冷角落。考虑到案情复杂，他决定浅露一手，调制特饮款待各位，以免交涉过程过于冗长——要是接下来的二十分钟你都将在听故事中度过，没有任何操作，那就没意思了。\n你可以在惊梦酒吧各处寻找调饮用的原材料，加拉赫会用神秘的魔法将它们完美调和。
E: Gallagher gestures for everyone to adjourn the discussion to somewhere else. He brings you to the Dreamjolt Hostelry — A quiet and ordinary corner in this frolicking dream. Considering the complexity of the cases, he decides to showcase his skills by preparing special drinks to keep everyone entertained. Otherwise, the negotiation process would be too boring. It will be dull if you have to spend the next <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes listening to stories with no gameplay!\nYou can explore the Dreamjolt Hostelry for ingredients. Gallagher will then use magic to make perfect concoctions out of them.

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 匹诺康尼的故事再次告一段落——剧目很快就会迎来最高潮了。
E: Once again, the story of Penacony has come to an end. The play will soon reach its climax.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 终于，匹诺康尼的「开拓」之旅还是迎来了美好的结局。是时候迎接新的冒险了——但在那之前，列车组还想和一些人做个正式的道别。\n为逝者的故事画上圆满的句号，就是最好的告慰。去吧，他们都在流梦礁…就在这里。
E: Finally, the trailblazing expedition on Penacony has come to a preferable conclusion. It's time for a new adventure — but before that, the Crew would like to wish say a formal farewell to certain people.\nDrawing a firm line under the stories of those who passed is the best form of comfort. Go on, then — they're all at the Dreamflux Reef... right here.

C: 筑梦艺术课开始了，所幸你的第一个任务不是跟混凝土打交道。课上的一切都很新奇，无论是想象力作画，还是你的忍者同学与猴子老师——看来这次学院之旅是离不开这两个词了。\n动手…不，动脑画出你的大作吧！
E: The Dreamweaving class has started, and thankfully, your first task doesn't involve dealing with concrete. Everything in this class feels fresh, from creative artwork to your ninja classmate and monkey mentor. It seems like these two elements are intertwined in your academic journey.\nUse your hands... or your brain to craft your own masterpiece!

C: 正所谓春天种下一位停云，秋天就能收获一…似乎不是适合用在这里的道理，并且，这里也远不止一个谜题。「她」是怎样变成了「她们」，又是如何从死亡泅渡回现实当中？
E: As the saying goes: Sow your Tingyun in spring for a healthy harvest in fall... That saying doesn't really seem to apply here, and there is more than one puzzle to be solved. How did "Tingyun" become "Tingyuns" and how did they traverse from death back to reality?

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 觐见的过程看似顺利，但是…黑塔听到的天外之声，似乎有些不对劲？
E: The audience appears to be proceeding smoothly, but... the voice from beyond the sky that Herta hears doesn't seem quite right.

C: 朝气蓬勃的悬锋稚童们让你再度思索悬锋城的未来，你决定找到悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯一叙。
E: Seeing the energetic Kremnoan children prompts you to reflect on Castrum Kremnos's future. You decide to seek out the Kremnoan veteran Krateros for a discussion.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 哪怕仇人多到能从克劳克影视乐园排到大剧院，孤狼也不会低下他高傲的头颅（大概吧）。
E: Even if his enemies stretched from Clock Studios Theme Park all the way to the Grand Theater, the Lone Wolf still wouldn't bow his proud head. (Probably)

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
E: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

C: 「我告别这美丽的世界，只为在你的回忆中，以我渴望的方式重逢。」 「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」 「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」 「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」 「现在，翻开这本书吧——」 「我会在过去等你。」
E: "I bid farewell to this beautiful world, so that we can reunite in your memories in the way I want." "You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie." "I have never had any other fate beyond this memory." "So, please remember me with 'love,' like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas." "Now, open this book." "I'll be waiting for you in the past."

C:
我来为你讲述「迷路迷境」的故事吧：哀丽秘榭的树林里，住着一群可爱的小朋友，它们的名字能连成一首歌谣——
一、二、三、四、五、六、七♪
哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻♪
生命微种萌蘖于无瑕忆中。心灵最柔软处，由哀怜触动的真挚颤抖，就是「生命的因」。
E:
Let me tell you the story of "Membrance Maze": A group of cute little friends live in Aedes Elysiae's forests. Their names can be connected into a song...
One, two, three, four, five, six, seven ♪
Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti ♪
Tiny seeds of life sprout within pristine memories. In the most tender corners of the heart, that genuine shiver stirred by lament... That's the "mover of life."

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 愿望，只是救世主执念的一部分。深入归墟的旅途中，我们又与刻律德菈、海瑟音、缇安、缇宁等伙伴重逢。每位黄金裔都目睹了白厄一路走来的孤独抗争，也都毫不犹豫地化身同行的记忆，只为与救世主并肩作战。
E: Wishes are but a part of the Deliverer's obsession. During our journey deep into the ruin, we reunited with other companions such as Cerydra, Hysilens, Trianne, and Trinnon. Each Chrysos Heir witnessed Phainon's solitary defiance along the way, and they transformed without hesitation into memories that walk with us, only to be able to fight alongside the Deliverer.

C: 在黄金裔们的陪伴下，我们终于来到归墟的最深处，白厄的英魂就在此处镇守「毁灭」的劫火。当空白的愿望烧灼为负世的意志，我们终将为卡厄斯兰那带来解脱，并接过他的责任与最后的心愿——击败铁墓，拯救翁法罗斯，乃至全银河。
E: Accompanied by the Chrysos Heirs, we finally reached the deepest part of the ruins, where Phainon's heroic soul guards the cataclysmic fire of the Destruction. As the blank wish is transformed through fire into the will to bear the world, we shall finally bring release to Khaslana and inherit his responsibility and final wish: to defeat Irontomb, help Amphoreus, and save even the entire cosmos.

C: 温天翁讲述了与「猎彗人」何塞的恩仇过往，并交给你一张宝藏显影图。前往图中所示地点，那里沉睡着何塞的昔日家当。
E: Wen Tianweng describes his past with the Comet Hunter Hosea and hands you a developed treasure map. Head to the marked location in the image to find Hosea's hidden possessions.

C: 在第一可疑藏匿点蹲守失败后，拉明娜继续履行承诺，帮助你寻访「水魈」踪迹。在她的带领下，你结结实实地一脚踩入了水魈布设的圈套。所幸拉明娜随身携带治愈药剂，怪物突袭终成了一场虚妄的陷阱。\n经历连环挫败，你与拉明娜改换策略，重审「宓堂传语」，前往密信所指地点，这一次，绝不失手。
E: You have gained nothing at the first of the suspected hiding places. Lamina keeps her promise and helps you look for the Xenohydro. Under her guidance, you step into the trap set by the Xenohydro. Thankfully, Lamina brought some healing potions with her. The surprise monster attack turns out to be a fabricated pitfall.\nAfter a series of failures, you decide to change your strategy and re-examine the Letter From Locus Silentii. You head to the place the letter points out, and you won't miss again this time.

C: 年迈的以斯帖授权你前去回收记录着奇景秘闻的录像带。
E: Esther authorizes you to retrieve the videotapes of wonders and secrets.

C: 你完成了温世齐的委托，是时候将月台区域的资产定损照片交给他了。
E: You've completed Wen Shiqi's assignment, and it's time to hand him the photos capturing all the damaged assets on the railway platform.

C: 前往中央房间
E: Head to the central room

C: 嗅嗅，嗅嗅。\n跟着佩佩前进吧！
E: Sniff sniff, sniff sniff.\nFollow Peppy!

C: 终端机屏幕上跳动的报错信息似在嘲笑出师不利的你。好在艾丝妲早已安排好维修工程师看守机房，是时候请他来检修下终端机了。
E: The terminal keeps reporting errors, as if it's laughing at you. Thankfully, Asta has asked a maintenance engineer to guard the terminal room. It's time to ask for his help.

C: 终端机上有着空间站所有人的数据记录，今天，你决定来查询乔安的数据记录。
E: The terminal stores the data records of everyone in the space station. You decide to check Joanne's record today.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助完成一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to complete a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 除了界种科的辛克尔你还向密卷科的什么人咨询过失踪奇物的线索，会是谁呢
E: Apart from Hinkel in the Department of Insight, you also asked for clues regarding the lost Curio from someone else in that department. Who might it be?

C: 虽然一度追上了冥火，但是穿梭空间的特性它又一次成功逃脱
E: Despite catching up to the infernal fire, its ability to shuttle through space allows it to escape again.

C: 穿梭空间的特性果然很难缠，冥火再一次在你眼前逃脱
E: The infernal fire has once again escaped from before you. Its ability allowing it to warp between locations is certainly difficult to deal with

C: 穿梭空间的特性果然很难缠，冥火再一次在你眼前逃脱
E: The infernal fire has once again escaped from before you. Its ability allowing it to warp between locations is certainly difficult to deal with

C: 空间站最近热闹不断。模拟宇宙再次更新、天才俱乐部的大人物都齐聚于此，每个人都心思各异——你总觉得会有些意想不到的事情发生。\n阮•梅的态度令你感到奇怪，她似乎有些话要对你说……
E: The space station has been bustling with activity lately. With the latest update to the Simulated Universe and the gathering of prominent figures from the Genius Society, everyone seems to have their own agenda. You can't help but feel that there might be some unexpected events on the horizon. \nRuan Mei's demeanor strikes you as peculiar, and she appears to have something to tell you...

C: 虎克正在召集她的鼹鼠党小伙伴，找到小寿星，一起去过生日吧。\n虽然这磐岩镇物资匮乏，但是住在这里的人们总是会想尽办法收获幸福。这对父女的生日宴会便是这样的幸福瞬间。
E: Hook is calling her friends in the Moles. Find her so you can celebrate her birthday with them.\nAlthough people in Boulder Town live in scarcity, they always know how to enjoy life. Hook and her father's birthday party will be another happy moment for them.

C: 根据克拉拉的描述，机械聚落中近期似乎发生了多起零件失窃案件。\n（疑似）犯罪的气息使你兴奋异常——出发吧，天才侦探少女克拉拉和她的天才助手！最近一起盗窃案的目击证人应该能为你们提供线索。
E: Based on what Clara said, there had been lots of recent thefts for mechanical parts in the robot settlement.\nThe (probable) scent of crime excites you — Go, genius detective Clara and her genius assistant! The witness for the most recent theft should be able to provide clues.

C: 矿民姐弟的际遇似乎使朗道姐弟的内心产生了共鸣。希露瓦似乎有话想说——在诊所门口听听她的想法吧。
E: The experiences of the mining siblings seemed to resonate with the Landau siblings. Serval seems to want to say something — Listen to what she has to say in front of the clinic.

C: 玲可似乎在架设暖炉时遇到了麻烦。眼下，她只有向佩拉求助了。
E: Lynx seems to have run into trouble while setting up the stove. She can only ask for Pela for help.

C: 无论如何，次元扑满离开了两人的露营地——但它似乎为两位女孩留下了某些物什。\n两位女孩决定上前检查，看看那神秘生物究竟准备了怎样的惊喜。
E: Either way, the Warp Trotter leaves the camping ground, but it seems to have left something for the two girls.\nThe two girls decide to move up to investigate what the mysterious creature had prepared for them.

C: 贝洛伯格的重建工作稳步开展，下层区的局势也逐渐稳定，人们开始重拾生活中遗失的乐趣。奥列格和希儿似乎正在这里商讨某事，此时一位拯救了世界的大英雄偶然路过……
E: Belobog's reconstruction is progressing steadily, and the situation in the Underworld is gradually stabilizing. People are beginning to regain the lost joys of life. Oleg and Seele seem to be discussing something here when a great hero who saved the world happens to pass by...

C: 在绿芙蓉的胁迫下，你不得不与这位倒霉的云骑展开一场「决斗」。好在你们足够聪明，可以将危机化为机遇。
E: Under Green Hibiscus's threat, you had no choice but to "battle" the unfortunate Cloud Knight. Luckily, with your wits, you can turn the crisis into an opportunity.

C: 药王秘传的事情似乎终于算是暂告一段落了。不过，丹枢似乎有一些其他的事情需要你帮忙。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus incident seems to be behind you. However, Dan Shu has some other matter requiring your help.

C: 陶德竟对丹鼎司药方略有研究，在拿到医书后，他发现有一味名为「天人金枝」的药材不知是何物…研究进度有些阻滞，还是麻烦你代他去丹鼎司里向医士们询问一下吧。
E: What a surprise. Todd actually has some knowledge in the Alchemy Commission's prescriptions. After obtaining the Compendium of Remedies, he realized he was unfamiliar with a medicinal herb called Divine Aureate Twig... His research progress has thus been stalled. Therefore, he asked you to go to the Alchemy Commission to ask the healers about it on his behalf.

C: 梅姐没有携带玉兆，也回答不上你的问题，只想着要找回散落的笔记。也许笔记上写着联系方式，你可以通过笔记联系上她的亲属，帮她找找看吧。
E: Mei doesn't have a jade abacus and can't answer your questions — she just wants to get the notes back. Perhaps there're some contact details on the notes and you can use them to contact her next of kin?

C: 根据青雀的观察，温符瑞的礼物还没有送到收件人的手上。去检查一下物流机巧鸟，看看它最后会去向哪里。
E: According to Qingque's observation, Wen Furui's gift has not been delivered to the recipient. Go check out the courier cycrane and see where it ended up.

C: 星槎的培育分为几个阶段，铖杰师傅想要见证的是，星槎从一枚种子长成一艘大船的过程。\n你也来过几次迴星港，说不定你从未注意过，星槎竟然是从培养舱里长出来的。
E: The cultivation of a starskiff is divided into several phases. Chengjie wanted to see the process between a starskiff seed and a fully cultivated vessel.\nYou have been to Stargazer Navalia a few times, but you probably haven't noticed that starskiffs are grown in an incubator.

C: 找回一位忧郁诗人，听上去还挺像是一件文坛轶事。很遗憾，你要找的是一台阴晴伞机器人。\n根据小聪的说法来看，他制造了不同类型的「诗仙机器人」，为的是写出最打动人的诗句，这就是所谓的「大力出奇迹」吧？\n不过，世界真的存在最打动人的诗句吗？
E: The recovery of a Gloomy Poet sounds like a literary anecdote. Regrettably, what you are looking for is, in fact, a Baroumbrella ingenium.\nAccording to Cong, he created different types of "Poetic Genius Ingenia" to write the most moving poem in the world. This is what they call "being your own miracle maker," right?\nHowever, is there really such a thing as the most touching poem in the world?

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 竟然把玫瑰花瓣留在剑匣里，看上去就像是不会写推理的劣质电视剧桥段…纯美骑士银枝竟然能做出盗窃之事，你仔细想了想，其中必有隐情。\n去找到银枝吧，他肯定会有话要说。
E: Just what thief would leave a rose petal in the sword casket... This is the exact kind of badly written mystery you see in second-rate TV shows. But could Argenti, a Knight of Beauty, really be the thief? After some pondering, you're convinced that there's more to this matter than meets the eye.\nFind Argenti. He'll have something to say about this.

C: 在丹鼎司新任司鼎的斡旋下，你们顺利打发了来自公司专员的责难，随她一同前往丹鼎司小叙。但这场未期的谈话却再起波折，与彦卿交锋的少女剑客早已等候多时。
E: Under the mediation of the newly appointed Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, you all successfully fended off the accusatory blame from the IPC Specialist, after which you had a chat with her at the Alchemy Commission. But more speed bumps threatened this doomsday talk, for the swordswoman had been waiting long for a showdown with Yanqing.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 你进入了莱斯利•迪恩的心绪空间。\n找到构建出这个联觉梦境的人们，然后解放他们吧。
E: You have entered Lesley Dean's Emoscape.\nFind the creators of this Synesthesia Dreamscape and free them from their obsessions.

C: 你和皇帝陛下总算是将埃夫姆捞了出来。去看看他们现在的情况吧。
E: The Emperor and you have finally rescued Ephraim. Go find out how they are doing.

C: 那时候的我，个子可真够小的。\n周围的人们都说，我比同龄人早熟，也比同龄人聪明。但我知道那都是我刻意营造出的假想。我只不过是个打肿脸充胖子的小姑娘罢了，强装出一副聪明世故的模样，来掩盖内心的不安。\n父亲死前对我说，生在帝王家，只有工于心计的人才能幸存。我并不擅长那些政治操弄，但我想活下去。
E: Back then, I was really little.\nEveryone around me said I was mature beyond my years and smarter than my peers. But I'm sure that was just an illusion I created. I was just an insecure little girl, pretending to be wise and smart.\nBefore my father died, he told me — in the royal family, only the cunning survive. I wasn't great at politics, but I wanted to survive.

C: 奥尔拉并不愿和费歇尔交流，看看费歇尔有没有什么其他办法。
E: Orla doesn't wish to speak with Fischer. Go see whether Fischer has any other ideas.

C: 你见证了天谴猎手的追忆，该如何形容这个故事？一场悲剧？一个误会？一段谎言？而她念诵那两个名字时的情感，是爱？是恨？还是只有疑虑？\n你为此探寻到最后，还是没能给出答案。\n凡是未开花的，或者凋谢的，无论身体抑或灵魂，又或者其他任何事物，爱慕都不会驻足。
E: Having witnessed the Furiae Archer's memories, how would you describe this story? A tragedy? A misunderstanding? A lie? And the emotion in her voice when she pronounces those two names... Is it love? Hatred? Or simply confusion?\nHaving explored this story to its end, you still cannot find an answer for yourself.\nLove will not grace the unflowering and the withered... Be it a body or a soul, or anything else for that matter.

C: 这场记忆的主人在陌生的城邦中生活着，感受着新的事物与自己的变化。这里有许多她从未见过的东西，就比如这场云石天宫的宴会——对悬锋人来说，法吉娜没什么好歌颂的，只有在纵欲畅饮的时候值得唱上两句。\n看来纷争的舞步没法在海洋的宴会上展示风采，偏见与恐惧像汹涌的大浪，刀枪盾斧是无法抵挡的。你和帕里斯能帮上忙的，也只是让这浪别这么早把她的小船掀翻，仅此而已。
E: Living in this unfamiliar city, the master of this memory is experiencing new feelings and changes within themself. There are many things here that she has never seen before, just like this banquet at the Marmoreal Palace... To the Kremnoans, Phagousa is nothing worth singing about. They may simply throw them a passing mention when they indulge in heavy drinking.\nIt seems that the dance of Strife cannot fully express its grace at a banquet of the ocean. When prejudice and fear rage like giant waves, no blade or shield can hold them back. The only assistance that you and Paris can offer is to prevent her little boat from being overturned so soon.

C: 打算寻短见的帕西提亚…得赶快找到她才行！
E: Pasithea is thinking of taking her own life... You must find her quickly!

C: 发现了一只看上去很着急的呜呜伯，去问问它发生了什么要紧事吧。
E: You come across a Wubbaboo that looks anxious. Go and ask it what's going on.

C: 出于一些原因，曼娅并不想和华劳斯做朋友。\n真是糟糕的消息…回去和华劳斯说明情况吧。
E: Manya does not want to be Wallace's friend due to reasons.\nWhat a piece of bad news... Go back to Wallace to explain the situation.

C: 磐岩镇的夜晚充满了故事，把你的发现带给马克西姆吧。
E: The night in Boulder Town is full of stories. Bring what you find to Maxime.

C: 为了尤利安筹划的「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，你得尽快把手里这箱物资送到磐岩镇的歌蒂手里。
E: To help Julian with his Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, you must quickly deliver this box of supplies to Gertie at Boulder Town.

C: 鼹鼠党的尤利安似乎正在到处寻找帮手。\n作为鼹鼠党的荣誉队员，你有义务去向这位二把手报告！
E: Julian from the Moles seems to be looking for helpers.\nAs an honorary member of the Moles, you have a duty to report to him, the second-in-command!

C: 在，咳，「你们」的共同努力下，失控的机器人倒下了。回去找邓恩邀功吧。
E: Thanks to, ahem, "your" hard effort, the Malfunctioning Robots have been defeated. Go back to see Dunn and take all the credit.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知亚诺发布了委托，想要行使他的正当权益。帮帮亚诺！
E: You see that Amo has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise his rightful rights. Go help Amo!

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 现在，就试着去解决这头大地兽的烦恼吧。
E: Now, try to solve this dromas's woes.

C: 原来刃还在仙舟，并且仍在通缉之中。卡芙卡计划使用「言灵术」压制刃的魔阴身，为此，她希望你在施术时保护她。
E: So Blade is still aboard the Xianzhou and is still wanted. Kafka plans to use her Spirit Whisper to suppress Blade's mara-struck condition, hoping that you would protect her while she uses her ability.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据旧照片找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on an old photo.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•蜘蛛」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Spider combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了鼹鼠党老大——漆黑的虎克大人。代她们前往磐岩镇，了解漆黑的虎克大人是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on the boss of The Moles, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great. Head to Boulder Town in their stead, and see whether Pitch-Dark Hook the Great is interested in the position.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 通往冠军之路如一卷红毯直铺你脚下。\n最后一枚徽章正由大矿区的某个人保管，找到并击败他，扫清比赛前的全部障碍吧！
E: The path toward becoming a champion unfurls like a red carpet beneath your feet.\nThe final Mastery Mark is in the hands of a certain someone in the Great Mine. Find and defeat him and sweep aside all impediments preventing you from starting your match!

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 光培育不养可不行，造物们也该学学空间站的规矩了。保姆机器人建议你用喷漆的方式为划分功能区域，这样便于它们定期维护打理。\n说到进食区，哪里适合充当进食区呢？
E: Just nurturing them without teaching them is no good. Time for the creations to learn the rules of the space station. The Helper Robot suggests using sprayed symbols to divide out functional areas, which would help them to better tidy up the place regularly.\nSpeaking of which, where would be best to put our Dining Area?

C: 很好，区区幻象而已，你轻松完成了测试，现在该找云端机器人聊聊了。不知道这次测试记录的阈值数据，是否符合界种科的期望值？
E: Very good, it was just an illusion. You completed the test smoothly. Now it's time to chat with the Cloudbot. I wonder if the threshold data recorded in this test is in line with the expectations of the Department of Ecology?

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n按照它的规划，你现在必须前往「那个房间」。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nBased on its plan, you must now proceed to "that room."

C: 家族正在朝露公馆招募临时警探，去面试现场凑凑热闹吧。
E: The Family is hiring provisional detectives at Dewlight Pavilion. Go to the interview grounds and see what's up.

C: 鸢尾花家系的米莫萨想要阻止拿走胶卷，去看看她的心底藏着什么秘密吧。\n与钟表小子不对付的家伙，就尝尝「钟表把戏」的厉害！
E: Mimosa of the Iris Family wants to stop you from taking the film. Go and see what secret she is hiding in her heart.\nAnyone who stands against Clockie can taste the power of clockwork!

C: 《美梦往事》成功上映，去帮皮斯了解一下观众们对这部影片的看法吧。
E: Dreamjoy Memoir has been released successfully. Go and help Pisce find out what the other audience members thought of it.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 世事无常，身为旁观者的你只能向前，见证旅途的尽头。
E: This world is transient. As an observer, you can only move forward and witness the end of the journey.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乐队演出得到了极高的评价，你的工作也终于要结束了……
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe band's performance received high accolades, and your job is finally about to end...

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就这幅作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about this work

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「黄金替罪羊」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Golden Scapegoat. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 你做过美梦、噩梦、白日梦，唯独没有做过预言梦。\n默念十次「预言梦」入睡，或许会有效果？
E: You have had sweet dreams, nightmares, and daydreams, but not a prophetic dream.\nSilently recite the phrase "prophetic dream" ten times before you sleep might work?

C: 是冠军赋予奖杯价值…但那是金的…\n而非奖杯来验证冠军的资历…但那是金的…\n收起胡思乱想——此刻，是属于你的荣耀时刻！
E: It is the champion that gives the trophy its value... but that's made of gold...\nIt is not the trophy that validates the champion's worth... but that's made of gold...\nSet aside these wandering thoughts — this moment belongs to your glory!

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 宴会准备完成！开场前，去和共同经营餐馆的伙伴们聊聊吧。留下的究竟是快乐的回忆，还是说仍有烦恼，和没能实现的愿望呢？
E: Feast preparations are complete! Before starting, take a moment to chat with your fellow restaurant companions. Are they full of smiles and fond memories? Or left with concerns and unfulfilled wishes?

C: 你为托帕调制了名为「放松」的配方，想必可以给她死气沉沉的上班生活带来别样的精彩吧。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者按照配方为托帕再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You've crafted a recipe called "Relaxation" for Topaz, which will surely bring some excitement to her dull work life.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Topaz according to the recipe.

C: 多亏了真理医生和素裳，你完美调制出了「情商」配方的两种不同功效！这份配方已尝试完毕，回到临时吧台，准备接待下一位客人吧。
E: Thanks to Dr. Ratio and Sushang, you've perfectly crafted two different effects of the "EQ" recipe! Now that you've finished testing this recipe, head back to the makeshift bar and get ready to serve the next guest.
