C: 剑谱代价千奇百怪，远超胜负之事。正巧，灵砂也来到太卜司……
E: The price of mastering the blade is far more complex than success or failure. Just then, Lingsha also arrived at the Divination Commission...

C: 觉得无聊了吗，瓦尔特？我能理解你的心情…不过我们以后还有很多机会。这一次的冒险回忆就留给他们三个吧～
E: Are you bored, Welt? I understand... But we have lots of opportunities ahead of us. Let's leave the memories of this expedition for them~

C: 一点儿也不记得。
E: I don't remember a thing.

C: 谁叫三月七乘客每次都想挑战自己，然后摔跤？
E: Well, it wouldn't be necessary, but Miss March 7th likes to challenge herself... and falls over every time.

C: 你就不能表现得积极点嘛！
E: Hey! That's not the spirit!

C: 「追逐宇宙中最危险的东西」吗？…在这点上，你们列车和我是同一类人吧。
E: In pursuit of the most dangerous objects in the universe, huh? ...In that sense, you Astral Expressers and I are cut from the same cloth.

C: 因此，联盟的「元帅」和六「将军」并不比军团的「绝灭大君」逊色。
E: It follows that the Alliance's Marshal and six Generals are in no way inferior to Lord Ravagers.

C: 怎么说，丹恒？你要留下来吗？
E: So, Dan Heng, you want to stay here?

C: 这回你们可以见识到「杨叔」的身手了。哈哈，他和你们一起行动，我很放心。
E: This time you'll get the chance to witness Welt in action, haha. I'm glad he's going with you.

C: 在出发前，我要先同两位明确此行的目的——
E: Before we set off, I need to clarify the aim of this journey with you...

C: 「存护」克里珀是一位淡漠的星神。除非你能始终保持「公司」那种非同一般的狂热…否则恐怕很难分到祂的力量。
E: Qlipoth the Preservation is known for THEIR... indifference. Unless you become a zealot like those with the Corporation, it's hard to share in the Aeon's power.

C: 可可利亚的力量来源…
E: The source of Cocolia's power...

C: 我一直在列车上观测你们三人的行动，期间也不少次手心捏汗。但你们总能交到值得信任的朋友，化解旅途中的困难——仅这一点，我也不得不佩服。
E: I'd been observing what's happening on the ground from the Express, and I have to admit that I got sweaty palms a couple of times. I was glad to see you three meet friends you could trust and overcome hardships. Well done.

C: 行驶环境已达到稳定阈值！允许列车启动！
E: The numbers have stabilized! Dispatch the Express!

C: ……你是在照镜子吗？
E: ...Are you checking yourself out?

C: 只需将枪口处的眼球对准常见的物体，随后扣动扳机，即可收获定分枪给予的评分。
E: Simply aim the eyeball located at the muzzle at any everyday object and then pull the trigger to receive a rating from the gun.

C: 画面不是十分清晰的屏幕，似乎是某些显示元件受到了损伤。
E: The image on the screen is not very clear. Some components of the display seem to be damaged.

C: 啊，我就知道……
E: Ah. I knew it...

C: 要是万能的丹恒老师在就好了，他懂一堆莫名其妙的东西，没准连电梯也会修……
E: Too bad Dan Heng's not here. He's like a walking encyclopedia... He knows a ton of complicated stuff — maybe even elevator repair...

C: 「<unbreak>110</unbreak>分！」定分枪对银狼宣布，声音里夹杂着奇怪的电子音。
E: "<unbreak>110</unbreak> points!" Reported the Rating Pistol at Silver Wolf. The voice sounded strange and digitized.

C: 唉，不会就要在这儿分开了吧……
E: Nah, we're not splitting up here...

C: 这问题我可有发言权啦，因为我一醒来，就在车上啦。
E: I'd like to know too, because I was already on the Express when I woke up.

C: 那就来看呀，上车就知道了。
E: Then come aboard and take a look for yourself.

C: 是这样么？我是列车的护卫，本能罢了。
E: Is that so? Well, I am the train's guard. I suppose it's just instinct.

 丹恒  饰  丹恒

 约阿希姆•诺基安维塔宁  饰  瓦尔特•杨

C: 看起来傻头傻脑的。没错，叫的就是你。
E: Hey, you over there looking dumbfounded. Yes, Pom-Pom's talking to you.

C: 他只是…单纯地赖在里边不走罢了，我也懒得管他。
E: He's just... sort of living in there, I guess. I can't be bothered getting him out.

C: 有点诡异，伙计，有些角度的照片是怎么拍出来的？
E: This is kinda creepy, man. How did you manage to shoot some of these angles?

C: …初来乍到？
E: ...Only just got here?

C: 这倒确实是个思维盲区…
E: I guess we'll have to find out...

C: 跟在戍卫官后面那几个人是谁？快看他们的打扮啊，真稀奇……
E: Who are those guys behind the captain? Look at their attire, so strange...

C: 退后！这是最后警告！
E: Move back! This is your final warning!

C: 可是，可是…我的财产证明都在里面啊，我什么都没……
E: But... B—But my proof of property is inside. I don't have any—

C: 大家叫我佩拉就好。
E: But you can call me Pela.

C: 对。而且跟你们描述的地下小镇可不一样，是真正支离破碎、毫无生息的裂界。
E: Correct. And it's different from the underground towns you described. The Fragmentum there has quite literally torn everything to pieces — there's no sign of life, despite the monsters.

C: 哎！先别走——那个…那些「入侵者」，我就是想问问，他们犯了什么罪？
E: Hey! Wait a sec — uh... Those intruders, I wanted to ask. What crime have they committed?

C: 有道理。但我早就被铁卫开除了，这种东西我完全没有印象……
E: Makes sense. But I was expelled from the Guard a long time ago. I have no idea about that kind of thing...

C: 欸？原来是佩拉长官…对不起，我、我遇到了一些突发状况…万分抱歉！
E: Huh? Oh, you're Officer Pela... I'm sorry, I—I'm in the middle of an emergency... I am very sorry!

C: 这可是身为情报官的基本素养，可不要小瞧我哦。
E: That's just one of the basic skills of an intelligence officer. So don't underestimate me.

C: 嗯…倒也不能算说错话，只是我必须指出你这番话中的两个问题——
E: Well, it's not wrong per se, but I have to point out two inaccuracies in what you said —

C: 也正是他们的到来让我意识到，在着眼于「存护」脚下这片土地的同时，我们也不该忘记仰望天空。
E: They made me realize that while we remain focused on "preserving" the ground beneath our feet, we should not forget to look up into the sky.

C: 但在完成这个目标之前，请允许我暂时以谦卑的身份引领大家前进……
E: But before we accomplish that goal, I humbly ask you to follow me into the future...

C: 可可利亚大人居然…
E: Madam Cocolia is...

C: …回列车再睡。
E: ...We can sleep when we're back on the Express.

C: 当然在，我只是混在人群里。你们没注意到我，就证明我的目标达到了——我想用自己的方式保证布洛妮娅的安全。
E: Of course I was! I was just hidden in the crowd. I'm glad you didn't notice me — means I'm doing something right. I want to protect Bronya in my own way.

C: 听你的意思，她也给你摆出过难题？
E: Is she creating trouble for you too?

C: 希露瓦，我问过了…
E: Serval, I already asked...

C: 你看见《远行者》，上面刊载了一篇堪比幻想生物图鉴的野兽观察。
E: You spot the Voyager, which contains an article about wildlife observation that is written in the manner of a bestiary for mythical creatures.

C: 空荡荡的长椅上积着雪。
E: Snow covers the empty bench.

C: …那些浑身难受的人真可怜啊。
E: ...Too bad for those who can't live without them.

C: 你绕着邮筒看了一圈，没有再找到别人遗落的信件。
E: You walk around the mailbox inspecting it but don't find any more letters.

C: 两个垃圾桶，一边用来回收干垃圾，一边用来回收湿垃圾。
E: Two trashcans. One for recycling dry garbage, one for recycling wet garbage.

C: 二：『这封遗书将是我人生的注脚。因此在生命的最末，我希望自己足够坦诚。通俗地来说，我觉得无事可千，活着』
E: 2. "I hereby tender my resignation. On this, my final day of work, I wish to be frank. Generally speaking, my job is uninteresting, and so"

C: 有人把一本书扔进了垃圾桶，你捡起来。这似乎是一部长篇连载小说，书名叫《雪国冒险奇谭》，你手中的残本是第四卷。
E: Someone threw a book into the trashcan. You pick it up. It seems to be a lengthy serial novel by the name of Tale of the Winterlands. You seem to have the incomplete 4th volume in your hands.

C: 「地火」就是一个志愿者性质的民兵组织，就像我说过的，你就当成是地底的银鬃铁卫吧。
E: Wildfire is a volunteer grassroots organization. Like I said, you can think of it as the Silvermane Guards of the underground.

C: 这种发亮的矿石是？
E: What're those shiny rocks?

C: 绝对不敢，怎么可能！放一万个心吧，马上就能找到！
E: I wouldn't dare! Trust me, we're getting close!

C: 她也被带下来了？
E: She's here too?

C: 后来呢？「地火」去哪了？
E: And then? Where did Wildfire go?

C: 沉住气——
E: Stay calm...

C: 哈哈哈！这家伙，初次见面就这么嚣张，我记住了。
E: Hahaha! That's quite the tone to take on our first meeting. I won't forget you in a hurry.

C: 那当然没有白吃的午餐，「地火」现在没理由帮你们，想办法找个理由不就结了？就几位的身手，还愁没有筹码么？
E: Well, there's no such thing as a free lunch, of course. Wildfire has no reason to help you yet, so we'll just have to give them one! With your talents, we have nothing to worry about.

C: 虎克？
E: Hook?

C: 我们真的想帮助你们。
E: We really do want to help you.

C: …我知道了，那我就去一趟铆钉镇，帮你把东西拿回来。
E: ...I know. I'll go to Rivet Town and bring them back for you.

C: 我们来得真是时候。
E: Sounds like we arrived just on time.

C: 你们要去的地方叫铆钉镇，顺着北方的山路走下去，不用多久就能看到它了。
E: The place you are going to is called Rivet Town. Follow the path through the mountains to the north for a bit and you'll arrive there.

C: 你好像格外关心她。
E: You seem to care about her a lot.

C: 哈哈哈，抱歉抱歉。娜塔莎做事一向谨慎，但她没什么坏心思，这点想必你们也发现了。
E: Hahaha, my apologies. Natasha is always cautious, but she has no ill intent, as you must have noticed.

C: 母亲大人…您一直都清楚「星核」的真相，对吗？我总有一天也会接触到那些知识。成为「守护者」所需要付出的代价之一，就是永远背负这些秘密。
E: Mother... you've always known the truth about the Stellaron, haven't you? The responsibility of bearing that truth will fall upon me one day. Such is the burden of being guardian — to carry these secrets for eternity.

C: 很好，不愧是忠诚的鼹鼠党荣誉队员！
E: Great! Your loyalty as an honorary member of The Moles is acknowledged.

C: 要把它卖掉吗？
E: Will you sell him?

C: 没什么好后悔的！下层的生活固然辛苦，但周围的人们态度都很亲切，大家相处都像自家人一样融洽。
E: There is nothing to regret! Life in the Underworld is hard, but people here are kind and everyone is close like one big family.

C: …有那么明显吗？
E: ...Is it that obvious?

C: 哼…没仔细想过。不过，跟你们一块旅行，的确常有意想不到的情况发生。
E: Hmm... I didn't really give it much thought. But traveling with you bunch does always lead to unexpected surprises.

C: 难道你有收集盔甲的爱好？
E: Do you have a hobby of collecting armor?

C: …真的不能再打拳了吗？
E: ...So I can't fight anymore?

C: 老板说了，您来打比赛那相当于免费给拳手们指导业务，我们巴不得您多来喂喂招儿呢。
E: Boss said you coming to the challenges is like free tutorials for the boxers. We wish you were here more often!

C: 咦，你们看——匹克躺着的地方，好像有什么东西？
E: Hey, look where he was lying. What is that?

C: 铁、铁卫…动作这、这么快…你们不觉得这里面有、有诈吗？
E: The Guards... they m—moved so q—quickly... don't you think it's a little f—fishy?

C: 生命的分量太过沉重，况且你还需要肩负起弟弟的那一份…我知道这肯定十分不易。
E: Taking care of yourself is hard enough under these circumstances, let alone if you have a brother to look after. I know it can't have been easy.

C: 我听虎克大人说了，虎克大人带着你去了铆钉镇冒险，专程帮我找回了玻璃弹珠。
E: I heard Hook say that she took you adventuring in Rivet Town just to find my marbles.

C: 我坦白了，我没看过。
E: I confess I haven't read it.

C: 听上去很有意思，但是完全不对！你一定要去看《冒险鼹鼠队》，书里全是有趣的大冒险。
E: Hmm, interesting, but you're totally wrong! You should do better and read The Adventurous Moles. It is full of fun adventures.

C: 你肯定以为儿童书里写的都是假的吧，哼，明明就是大人什么都不懂。
E: You probably think the things written in children's books are made up. Humph, you grownups just don't know better.

C: 搏击，又称搏斗。它不是斗殴，而是一种健康向上，有益身心，弘扬体育精神的竞技项目。
E: Fighting, also known as brawling. It is not just a scuffle, but a healthy, physical and mental athletic sport that promotes sportsmanship.

C: 海尔雷分队队长向公司介绍，该亚空间场实际上是一微缩星系，且该人造星系中很可能仍存有居民。
E: The squad leader told the IPC that the sub-space field they had discovered was in fact a miniature artificially made galaxy and that they were fairly certain that it was still populated.

C: 不，你们走不得。
E: I'm afraid that's impossible.

C: 各位与星核猎手之间的关系，我也略知一二。太卜司认为你们必是同党！我说不可能。星穹列车行事正派，见义勇为的美名诸界传扬，岂能与宵小之辈同流合污？
E: I have some knowledge of your relationship with the Stellaron Hunters. The Divination Commission is convinced that you made an alliance with them... I say that's impossible. The crew of the Astral Express are honorable people whose valiant deeds are lauded across the universe. There must have been a misunderstanding.

C: 这个景元有些可疑…
E: He seems suspicious...

C: 你哪回不是这样…
E: Ready for a nap? That's not like you, March...

C: 真是我抵达仙舟以来听到的，最亲切的一句话了！
E: That's the friendliest thing I've heard since we arrived!

C: 谁知道呢…哎，也不知道什么时候才能解封……
E: Who knows... *sigh* I wonder when the restrictions will be lifted...

C: 追逐、逃离和等待，也许人生就是这样……
E: Chasing and waiting — maybe that's what life's all about...

C: 包括你，{NICKNAME}，他们对你做的事情也是一样的……
E: ...which would include what they did to you, {NICKNAME}...

C: 我只是未来的一个变量吗？
E: Is that all I am — a future variable?

C: 请用您的玉兆手镯登记…哎，您是外来的旅客啊。
E: Please register with your jade abacus bracelet... Oh, you must be an outsider.

C: 太空船里哪棵树都符合描述吧？
E: Technically, any tree in the spaceship fits this description.

C: 要是有非去不可的理由，也请务必小心。
E: If you do have an important reason to go, then please be extra careful.

C: 这位{M#小兄弟}{F#小妹妹}打搅了，请留步。
E: Excuse me, {M#fella}{F#miss} — hold on a moment.

C: 如果您不介意的话，希望能拨冗来地衡司公廨一叙。我想和您聊聊「长乐天」眼下面临的麻烦……
E: If you don't mind, I hope you can take the time to come to the Realm-Keeping Commission. I'd like to talk to you about the issues Exalting Sanctum is currently facing.

C: 谁叫宇宙这么危险呢。作为行商，公司和联盟只能庇佑我们进行星际穿越而已，安保这件事可全得看自己的手段。
E: The universe is a dangerous place. The IPC and the Alliance only provide for our safety during interstellar travel — on-site security is dependent on our own capacities.

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
E: Have you seen this lady?

C: 唔，似乎是见过，但又好像没见过？您容我想想……
E: Yeah! Oh, wait, um... maybe not. Hmm, let me uh... search my memory for a moment...

C: 真可惜。还想多观察一阵子呢……
E: What a pity. I would've liked to observe it for a while longer...

C: 怪物僵死的身躯上，几处显眼的伤口正以肉眼能辨的速度缓缓收缩。尽管没有任何生命体征，你却觉得眼前这怪物并没有彻底死去。
E: On the monster's rigid body, several conspicuous wounds are shrinking at a speed discernible to the naked eye. Despite the absence of any vital signs, you sense that the monster in front of you is not completely dead.

C: 倒下的巨猿身躯庞然如山岩，但它似乎仍有暴起伤人的力量。
E: The fallen creature's body lay on the ground like a giant boulder. It looks as though it still has the power to spring back up and attack people.

C: 云骑军驻守在此，裹足不前，看来形势并不乐观。「药王秘传」…我在哪里听过这名字，记得是潜伏在仙舟内部，阴谋颠覆联盟的丰饶秘系……
E: That the Cloud Knights received orders not to advance is a bad sign. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... I've heard the name before. If memory serves, they're an underground sect of the Abundance that's said to have lain dormant within the Xianzhou, plotting to overthrow the Alliance...

C: 不止「药王秘传」炮制的怪物，也有我的同袍……
E: Yes, among the Sanctus Medicus monsters... there were our comrades.

C: 烟雾似乎变淡了一点……
E: Seems like the smoke is getting thinner...

C: 丹恒兄很久没回故乡了吧？
E: You haven't been back home for a long time, have you Master Dan Heng?

C: 聊些高兴的话题吧。你在列车上结交的朋友，眼下正在此间，不想见上一面吗？
E: Haha, let us talk of happier tidings. The friends you made on the Express are here. Do you wish to see them?

C: （不伸出手）
E: (Remain still)

C: 饮月君…的转世，丹恒，对吧？我听过你的名字。
E: Imbibitor Lunae's reincarnation... Dan Heng, correct? I have heard your name before.

C: 神秘的入侵者？可是，这个声音也好熟悉……
E: A mysterious intruder... but that voice is so familiar...

C: …各位，我回来了。
E: ...Brothers, sisters, I have returned.

C: 往生之业，犹如今世枷锁…
E: The karma of past lives chains the world of the present...

C: 能在这儿见到各位真好。
E: *sigh* It's a pleasure to see you all here today.

C: 当然不是！我既暂代将军一职，自然要以罗浮官方的身份感谢诸位仗义援手。如今事情告一段落，该是开诚布公回馈各位的时候了。
E: Of course not! On the contrary, I am eager to thank you all in my official capacity as acting general of the Luofu. Now that things have drawn to a conclusion, it is time to reward you.

C: 是啊，景元这次的违规之举可不少，我得一一替他处置…唉，云骑将军们个个麻烦得很呐。
E: Mm. Jing Yuan has committed quite a few violations this time around, and I'll have to deal with them one by one... *sigh* The Cloud Knight generals are all such a hassle.

C: 嘿嘿，那是。等你有空了，咱们一起去太卜司跑一趟，求太卜帮个忙。
E: Hee-hee, yup! When you're free, let's head over to the Divination Commission together and ask them for a favor.

C: 咱们把箱子里的东西都摆出来瞧瞧吧？
E: Okay, let's see what there is.

C: 看起来像是个古董？可谁会收藏这么奇怪的古董呢…
E: Looks like some kind of antique? But who'd want to hold on to something like this...

C: 我平时摸鱼打牌累了，都往那边的小吃店里吃碗陈婆豆腐。不好，你这一提，我不想上班了，赖你。
E: Whenever I'm tired of celestial jade or slacking off, I head over for a bowl of Granny Chen's Tofu. Darn it, now that you've brought it up, I suddenly don't feel like clocking in for work anymore.

C: 说起来，这道「红油乱斩牛杂」，也是把停云小姐吸引来敝店的菜色。这份鲜香辛辣，可惜她尝不到了。你们几位，可要替她大吃一碗！
E: It was our Chili Oil Beef Offal Stew that first attracted Miss Tingyun to our restaurant... I can't believe that she'll never taste it again. Please, you'll have to eat her share too.

C: 要我们加入你们吗？
E: You want us to join you or something?

C: 某种意义上说，家族真的是非常包容了……
E: Aside from that, I have to say The Family has been really accommodating...

C: 说到就到，瞧瞧这是谁来了——星期日，匹诺康尼最英俊的男人！还有闻名宇宙的歌者「知更鸟」。
E: Speak of the devil, look who's here! It's Sunday, the most handsome man in Penacony! Along with the singer renowned across the universe: Robin!

C: 可送抵我们手中的这只却有些奇怪…它播放的乐音背景中掺杂了一些不和谐音。
E: But the box that was sent to us was slightly unusual... The music it played had off-key notes in the background.

C: 我从不做赔本买卖的，希望各位「朋友」…别让我失望。
E: I don't do deals where I'm on the losing end. So, I hope that "friends"... don't let me down.

C: 几块石头罢了，这么悲观干嘛？没了又怎样？
E: It's nothing more than a few rocks, why so serious? Who cares if they're gone?

C: 我也是，现在只想赶紧进到房间，在床上狠狠打滚……
E: You and me both! I can't wait to get inside and just flop and roll on that comfy bed...

C: 你为什么还不走？
E: Why haven't you left?

C: 你忘了，是那位先生临走前说的。我记性是不太好，但还不至于忘记几分钟前发生的事。
E: *smiles* You forget, that man mentioned it before he left. My memory's not very good, but it's not so bad that I can't remember details from just minutes ago.

C: 我刚才捡到了一张纸条…
E: I just picked up a note...

C: 你们入侵餐车后厨，向所有人宣称那里需要消杀，致使四十二块香香酥酥脆脆帕姆帕姆派不翼而飞，并带走了保鲜柜上层最后一碗列车锅，令列车长挨饿——
E: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 你们入侵餐车后厨，向所有人宣称那里需要消杀，致使四十二块香香酥酥脆脆帕姆帕姆派不翼而飞，并带走了保鲜柜上层最后一碗列车锅，令列车长挨饿——
E: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

C: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
E: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

C: 行了，滚吧。让我来处理。
E: Well, just get out of my way and I'll take care of this.

C: 我还知道，你们经常在银河各地到处旅行——你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
E: I also know that you guys often travel around different places in the cosmos. Did The Family invite you here? I—I'd be happy to show you around!

C: 现在，你得完成这位哈努兄弟在卡通里做过的事——或者再碰一碰这台电视机——才能变回来。
E: Now, if you want to return to your normal size, you have to do everything that Hanu has done in the cartoon series — or you can just touch this TV.

C: 我可不会告诉你这样一个天大的秘密——如果你现在通过电视机再次交换身体，就能随意打破那个障碍物了！哈哈哈！
E: There's a huge secret that I would never tell you — if you swap bodies again through the TV, you'll be able to destroy the obstacle and break through! Hahaha!

C: （…得让她给个说法才行，先找到她吧。应该没走太远……）
E: (...I must find her and demand an explanation from her. She shouldn't be too far off...)

C: 你没事就好！
E: I'm glad to hear that!

C: 总之，再次承蒙各位关照。祝你们在梦里过得愉快，我就不打扰二位…约会了？
E: Once again, thank you for being kind to me. I wish you a great time in the dream, and I shall not interrupt your... date?

C: 不、不是约会…！
E: N—No! We're not on a date!

C: 我也没想到这么快。
E: I'm surprised too.

C: 美、美丽的小姐……
E: B—Beautiful lady...

C: 真的非常感谢！果然无名客都是很了不起的人啊…希望我们有缘再见！
E: I really appreciate your help! The Nameless are indeed a bunch of talented people... May our paths cross again!

C: 我没想到…
E: I never saw that coming...

C: 没关系，我可以创造危险！
E: Well, you're in luck then, for I Am The Danger!

C: 他不是我的朋友。
E: He's not my friend.

C: 放轻松，小妹妹，我是站在你们这边的哦。
E: Easy, girl. I'm on your side.

C: 你什么意思？
E: What do you mean by this?

C: 让我们言归正传吧——您…曾听说过「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫吗？
E: Let's get back to the question... Have you heard of Tatalov the Garbage King?

C: 然而，当天外之物随寒潮降临此地，他的双眼便被蒙蔽了——他不再倾听呼告，使穷苦之桶遭受欺凌，令忠诚之桶平白蒙羞……
E: However, since the thing from beyond the sky arrived here along with the Eternal Freeze, Tatalov's eyes have been blinded. He stopped listening to our calls, leaving the impoverished to be bullied and his loyal servants to be degraded...

C: 当你重新睁开眼时，垃圾桶已不再是垃圾桶，而是一只长着双手与双腿的...垃圾桶。
E: When you open your eyes again, the trashcan is no longer just a trashcan. It's now a trashcan... with arms and legs.

C: 九万七千八百六十三…
E: Ninety-seven thousand eight hundred sixty-three...

C: 还没意识到吗？所谓的「梦想之地」…其实是家族不知用何种手段精心维护的成果，一场设计好的美梦。
E: Have you not sensed it yet? This apparent land of dreams... It's a carefully designed dream maintained by The Family through unknown means.

C: 刚才发生了什么？
E: What just happened?

C: 他和党羽组成「永火官邸」，视纳努克为恩主——实际是受这位大公领导，四处烧杀掳掠，践行「毁灭」的意志，甚至连其他泯灭帮也不放过。
E: He and his thugs formed "Ever-Flame Mansion" and viewed Nanook as their savior — in actuality, they were led by this duke to go around burning and looting, practicing the will of Destruction. And even the other Annihilation Gangs weren't spared.

C: 他们在赴约途中覆灭了。凶手以一种神乎其技的方式将阿弗利特残忍杀害，劫走了泯灭帮收到的邀请函。永火官邸也分崩离析，作鸟兽散——
E: They were eliminated while on their way. The assailant, demonstrating remarkable expertise, ruthlessly ended Ifrit and swiped the invite that the Annihilation Gang had in their possession. The Ever-Flame Mansion disbanded, each going their separate ways...

C: 但我会担心最坏的可能，假如梦境的异变确实存在，并且不是自然发生，而是有人在幕后推动……
E: But I worry about the worst outcome: If the Dreamscape's anomaly really exists, and it isn't a natural occurrence, but instigated by someone behind the scenes...

C: 被发现了怎么办…
E: What if we get found out...

C: {NICKNAME}和小三月，回到各自的房间吧。准备入梦，如果顺利…我们在梦境酒店的大堂集合。
E: {NICKNAME} and March, return to your own rooms. Enter the dream, and if everything goes without a hitch... we'll see one another at the dreamscape Hotel's lobby.

C: 我会留在现实，确保各位安全无虞。如有需要，也会出面与家族交涉——没问题吧，黑天鹅小姐？
E: I'll stay in the real world to ensure everyone's safety. If needed, I will also parlay with The Family. I assume there's no problem, Miss Black Swan?

C: 拜托你了，瓦尔特。至于我们…就准备好一睹「梦境的真容」吧。
E: We're counting on you, Welt. As for us... Let's get ready to see the Dreamscape's true visage.

C: 我的意思是，没问题。
E: I mean, no problem.

C: …黄泉小姐的话不无道理。无论如何，我们得登上悬在头顶的那个平面——当然，绝不是抱着柱子上去。
E: ...Miss Acheron's words speak sense. Regardless, we have to reach that flat surface hanging overhead. And we're not scaling the pillar, of course.

C: …不对，三个？还有第三个人在寻找去大堂的路？等等…这是……
E: ...Wait, three? There is a third person seeking the way to the lobby? Wait... it's...

C: 黑天鹅，你…
E: Black Swan, you...

C: 他需要你，这是收复匹诺康尼必需的一环，而我认为他有潜力，也能助我收获独一无二的记忆，便答应了合作。
E: He needs you. It's essential if we want to reclaim Penacony. Recognizing his immense potential and the invaluable memories he can help me gather, I opted to join forces with him.

C: 若是有人刻意而为…先是*偷渡犯*，后是*家族的明星*，凶手的用意难免有些耐人寻味。
E: If someone has chosen these victims deliberately... First a stowaway, then a Family celebrity... Then this murderer's motives are worth thoroughly chewing over.

C: 但我的火焰已然嘶哑，时间已经不多。看见远方的盛会之星了么？我要将炼狱带往那里——所以在那之前，我必须将你跨越。
E: But my flames are faint and time is running out. Can you see the Planet of Festivities in the distance? I plan to bring purgatory with me there — and before that, I must surpass you.

C: 答案并不重要，重要的是它存在，正如你的存在。一切为了被毁灭而存在——令使也不外如是。
E: What's important is not the answer, but that it exists — just as you exist. Everything exists to be destroyed — Emanators are no different.

C: 事到如今，我们能信任的恐怕只有自己了。
E: At this point, I'm afraid the only ones we can trust are ourselves.

C: 究竟是为什么呢…
E: But why, though...?

C: 对住客下手吗？不像。匹诺康尼的客人有不少寰宇皆知的大人物，即便是公司也不敢轻易动这些人。砂金是个精明的商人，不可能不明白这点。
E: An attack on the hotel guests? Unlikely. Penacony's guests include quite a few big wigs known throughout the whole cosmos, people who not even the IPC would dare take lightly. Aventurine is a shrewd merchant, and there's no way he doesn't know that.

C: 会是「黄泉」吗？
E: Perhaps he's going for Acheron?

C: 欸？啊…还以为终于能看见姬子和杨叔同行了呢，那杨叔多注意安全！
E: Huh? Ah... I thought I'd finally get to see Himeko and Mr. Yang go out on a mission together. Oh well, take care then, Mr. Yang!

C: 一声惨叫后，这个兵人崩溃了——甚至还没来得及让你为他打出五星好评。
E: After screaming, the soldier collapses — he didn't even have time to earn a five-star rating from you.

C: 找到了，就是它。
E: Found it. This is it.

C: 尝试再次洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his inner thoughts again.

C: 关于「烫金的时刻」…
E: Regarding the Gilded Hour...

C: 那里所有人都衣着精致，脚步匆匆。进入「烫金的时刻」工作，是当地皮皮西人对后代最大的愿望。
E: Everyone there is exquisitely dressed and always in a hurry. The greatest wish of the local Pepeshi people is for their future generations to work in the Gilded Hour.

C: 好啊，那麻烦你现在就去报个信吧。就说「砂金已经做好万全准备，十七个系统时后即可入场。」
E: Great, then tell your people that Aventurine is ready to go in seventeen system hours.

C: 呵呵…好…嗐！就是…脖子很大的…海马！
E: Haha... yeah... It's a... seahorse... with a long neck!

C: 因为我快要触及「真相」了，对么？
E: Because I'm getting closer to the truth, right?

C: 十六个系统时啊，真的足够么？那让我再给你添把火吧。
E: Oh, really? "Only" sixteen system hours? Well, let me lend you a hand.

C: 等你走投无路的时候，就按下它吧。当然你也可以联系我，就当是我的「临终关怀」！
E: Just press the button when you're at your wit's end. And of course, feel free to reach out to me for my "hospice care" too!

C: 恐怕我得拒绝你的提议了，谁知道你这小玩具到底有没有用？顺便，我也不打算去找你口中的「另一位哑巴朋友」，但我很乐于听到这人还在匹诺康尼。
E: I'm afraid I'll have to decline your offer. Who knows if your little gadget will actually work? By the way, I have no plans to search for the other mute friend you speak of, but it's good to hear that he's still here in Penacony.

C: 你将「<unbreak>50000</unbreak>信用点」放入了空杯里……
E: You put <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits into the empty cup

C: 「幸福是卑微者的梦」…这句话的意思是我们可以把它拿走咯？总觉得哪里怪怪的……
E: "Happiness is the dream of the humble." Does this mean we can take it? Something feels weird about this...

C: …他就是{RUBY_B#哈努努}「哈努兄弟」{RUBY_E#}。梦境小镇的老大哥，和平的建立者，弱者永远的伙伴。
E: ...He is {RUBY_B#Hanunue}Hanu{RUBY_E#}, the great leader of Dreamville, the great peacemaker, and the faithful companion of the underdogs.

C: 不知他们现在关系如何。
E: I wonder how their relationship is now.

C: 「卡卡瓦夏」…是个好名字，可惜注定要被埋进土里。但「你」值得活下来，为我们创造更多财富。
E: Kakavasha... A good name, but unfortunately destined to be buried in the dirt. You though, you deserve to live, to create even more wealth for us.

C: 所以一踏进酒店，你就摘下高高的帽子，开始四处求人，像极了一条在沙漠里捡食的鬣狗。因为你知道，机会稍纵即逝。
E: Which is why once you step into the hotel, you remove your high hat and beg everyone you come across for help, like a hyena scavenging for scraps in the desert. Because you know that opportunities are fleeting.

C: …没意思。
E: ...Boring.

C: 因此，在继续我们的合作前，他有义务给出一个合理的解释。
E: Which is why, before we continue working together, he has a duty to explain himself.

C: ——没有理由，也没有余地。
E: ...Nor do you have any reason or grounds to.

C: 总有从阴影中归来的人。
E: There are always those who rise from the shadows.

C: 你还留有一丝色彩……
E: You still have a strand of color...

C: 十分明智的选择。
E: A wise choice.

C: 都说了，没想找你们麻烦。我有事必须去趟匹诺康尼，但没有邀请函，家族连酒店门都不让进。这不…只能借用下无名客的身份。全银河都知道你们是家族的贵客。
E: I already said that I seek no trouble. I must go to Penacony for a matter, but I don't have an invite, and I can't even enter The Family's hotel doors. If only... I could borrow the Nameless' identity. The entire cosmos knows you're guests of The Family.

C: 然后那些筹码就直接消失了对吧？嗯，看来…是鸢尾花家系筹备已久的「拟梦技术」呢。
E: And then those chips simply disappeared? Ah, it appears... to be the DreamSim Tech the Iris Family has been developing.

C: 然后深呼吸，在心里描绘梦境的轮廓，记得…绝对不要睁眼。
E: Take a deep breath, and visualize the Dreamscape's outline in your heart. And remember... you must not open your eyes at all times.

C: 我觉得，人们之所以会认为飞翔是鸟类的天性…是因为他们从没见过坠亡的鸟儿。
E: I think people believe birds are meant to fly because... they've never seen those birds crashing to their death.

C: 要对付梦主啊？我先投降。
E: Going up against the Dreammaster? Nah, I'd surrender.

C: 咦？怎么回事……
E: Wait, what's going on...?

C: 麻烦借你的{RUBY_B#「沉眠」}宠物{RUBY_E#}一用。我需要回一趟「黄金的时刻」，前往梦境贩售店确认一些事情……
E: Can I borrow your {RUBY_B#"Dormancy"}pet{RUBY_E#}? I need to make a trip back to Golden Hour and check something at the Dreamscape Sales Store...

C: 瓦尔特先生恐怕会成为近些年首位与梦主会晤的宾客呢。
E: Perhaps you'll be the first guest to meet the Dreammaster in years, Mr. Yang.

C: 不，她说的有道理，我也能感觉到她打心底里感到幸福，只是……
E: She had a valid point, and I could sense her genuine happiness. It's just that...

C: 家族确实帮了我许多，我要对此表示万分感谢。他们为我安排了一个舒适的房间、全银河最先进的维生装置，还有足足一个加强排的护理师。
E: They have, and I'm truly grateful for that. They provided me with a comfortable room, the most advanced life-support devices in the Cosmos, and a stellar team of caregivers.

C: 既然你玩够了，那还是趁早离开为好。「同谐」的乐章不能容忍杂音。
E: Now that you've had your fill, it'd be wise to leave before it's too late. The music of the Harmony doesn't tolerate discord.

C: 好，好～我走就是啦。不过，知更鸟小姐，我还是得奉劝你再仔细琢磨琢磨——
E: Alright, alright. I'll go, but Robin, I suggest you seriously consider this...

C: 总觉得，我离开的这段时间，很多事都变得不一样了。到底发生了什么？
E: Seems like a lot has changed during my absence. What exactly happened?

C: 你走后不久，它就坠落在了你房间的窗前。
E: Shortly after you left, it crashed to its death right in front of your window.

C: 你就是那位忆者？
E: You are the Memokeeper?

C: 要不这样，先让我在你身上开几个窟窿，看看里面藏着的究竟是什么，然后咱们再来谈信任……
E: How about this? I'll put a few bullet holes in your head and see what secrets spill out, then we can talk about "trust"...

C: 没时间商量了，就这样吧。
E: Enough chit-chat, let's do this!
...Hmph!

C: 滴答，这时候就要轮到我出场了！
E: Tick-tock, it's time for me to make an appearance!

C: 我…我昨天才知道一个惊人的事实。他们说，梦境迷钟根本不是钟表小子，只是当年钟表小子的造型废案。
E: I... I came across a startling revelation yesterday. Apparently, Dreamscape Ticker isn't the same as Clockie at all. It's just a discarded prototype from Clockie's early development.

C: 你看上面…如果把那个东西推下来，是不是就能搞定它了？
E: Look up there... If we can push that thing down, do you think that would do the trick?

C: 现在…我们应该有办法对付那些坏蛋了。
E: Now... we should have a way of dealing with those baddies.

C: 那座雕像…是不是说话了？
E: That statue... Did it just speak?

C: 正如之前所承诺的，我、家妹及瓦尔特先生已面见了梦主，向他就匹诺康尼与星核的真相展开了深入讨论，并且达成了共识——
E: As previously promised, my sister, Mr. Yang, and I have met with the Dreammaster. We delved into the truth about Penacony and its Stellaron, and have come to a consensus—

C: 最高分通过！
E: You pass with full marks!

C: 噢，多么令人温暖的结局啊！
E: Oh, such a warm and fuzzy ending!

C: 快去吧，哈努兄弟！触碰那台电视机。变回你原来的样子。然后上楼去吧，你的武器就在那里等你！
E: Hurry now, Hanu! Touch that TV set and transform back into your old self. Then, head upstairs — your weapon awaits you there!

C: 这则故事发生在我任职「铎音」期间。铎音是橡木家系特有的职位，负责聆听梦境居民的困惑和迷茫，给予他们相应的指导。
E: This story happened when I was appointed as Bronze Melodia — a position exclusive to the Oak Family, charged with listening to the problems and vexations of Dreamscape residents, and providing them with the relevant guidance.

C: 你啊…这种时候就别闹腾了，都走到这一步了，还有「前进」以外的选项吗？
E: Come on... Stop joking at a moment like this. We've come this far. Surely there's no other option than moving forward.

C: 再见了，拉格沃克，照顾好铁尔南和拉扎莉娜。记得…要给我们写信啊。
E: Farewell, Legwork. Take care of Tiernan and Razalina, and don't forget to... write to us.

C: 「腐朽的人心惟有从<color=#dbc291ff>沉静</color>的旋律中焕发新生。」新至的主人如是说。
E: "The decaying human heart finds rebirth only within the <color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>," proclaimed the new master.

C: 准备应战吧，看来我们又要打一场了。
E: Prepare for battle. Looks like we'll have to fight again.

C: 说到这位橡木家系家主…他如今又在哪里？
E: Speaking of the Oak Family head... Where is he now?

C: 别心急，牛仔。客随主便，交给他们定夺吧。
E: Hold your horses, cowboy. It's for those to decide.

C: 哎…我就不该期待你说出什么正经的话。
E: ...I should have known better than to expect anything serious from you.

C: 可惜，它对我而言不过是思维系统折射出的虚像，可望而不可即。但在了解到匹诺康尼如今的成就后，我终于意识到，那火焰并非不能攫取。
E: Alas, they are nothing but projections of my thought system to me — desired, but unattainable. But after learning of Penacony's accomplishments, I have come to realize that the flame is not beyond my grasp.

C: 拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔
E: Mikhail Char Legwork

C: 波提欧
E: Boothill

C: （匹诺康尼之旅到此为止……）
E: (Penacony's journey ends here...)

C: 若非黄泉小姐提前布局，我们或许就要永远沉沦在这场梦中了。
E: If it wasn't for Acheron's plan, we might have been trapped in this dream forever.

C: 梦里的食物…味道应该不会差吧？
E: Food in the dream... shouldn't taste bad, right?

C: 我不认为「同谐」是完全的受害者。无论出于何种理由，他们也有息事宁人的诉求，并且十分强烈，个中缘由不免引人遐想。
E: I don't think the followers of the Harmony are completely innocent victims in all of this. For reasons unknown, they have a strong desire to smooth things over, which leads to speculation about their motives.

C: 是我的错觉吗，女士？你说话的语气和刚才比…很不一样。
E: Is it just me, Miss? Your tone sounds... very different now.

C: 我先挂了，搭档…我要敬自己一杯。
E: I'm gonna hang up for now, partner... I need to raise a glass to myself.

C: 从走出慈玉典押的那一刻起，星际中的每一间赌场都会记得她的名字，而父母手足会因此和她断绝往来，史黛西也不可能再交到真正的朋友。
E: From the moment she stepped out of the Bonajade Exchange, every casino in the cosmos would remember her name, but her parents and siblings would sever ties with her, and it would be impossible for Stacy to make any real friends again.

C: 听着离谱，不像真的。
E: Nah, sounds too good to be true.

C: 不知道要拿什么做抵押？
E: I wonder what they'll ask for in return?

C: 别擅自改词。
E: Don't change the words.

C: 看来…事情要变得有意思起来了。
E: Looks like... things are about to get spicy.

C: 你把谁认成我了？
E: You mistook someone else for me?

C: …两起「命案」、与公司使节的对决、无名客道路的传承、一位梦想代替星神创造乐园的「秩序」残党——你们最后甚至还击碎了美梦…真是波澜壮阔的假日呀。
E: ...Two murder cases, a showdown with the IPC's ambassadors, the legacy of the Nameless, and a remnant of the Order who dreams of creating a paradise in place of the Aeons. You guys even ended up shattering the dream... It's truly been quite a vacation.

C: 啊，说到这个…其实我一直觉得自己还欠你一个正式的道歉，就是「鸢尾花家系艺者」的事。
E: Speaking of which... Actually, I feel that I still owe you a formal apology, for... that matter with "the performer of the Iris Family."

C: 我竟然被火子哥可恶的爪牙打败了…但你们绝不会得逞——因为我只是个造型可爱的娃娃，根本不是什么虚数中子弹！
E: To think I was defeated by the despicable underling of Blazin' Bro... You'll never get away with this. Because I'm just an adorable doll, not some imaginary neutron bomb!

C: 花火的声音消失了，只剩下娃娃体内的白噪音滋滋作响。看来这只可怜的娃娃是被花火改造成喇叭了。
E: Sparkle's voice faded, leaving behind the doll's body buzzing with white noise. It seems this pitiful doll was transformed into a megaphone by Sparkle.

C: 你要是不说话，那就是默认了。
E: If you don't speak, then your silence equates to consent.

C: 抱歉抱歉，把气氛搞得这么沉重——丹恒，快说个冷笑话缓解下气氛！
E: I'm really sorry for bringing down the vibe! Quick, Dan Heng, tell us a dad joke to lighten the mood!

C: 准备出发。
E: Ready to go.

C: 不知道。巡海游侠一向独来独往，但波提欧应该不会做出有害列车的行为。
E: I don't know. Galaxy Rangers always work alone, but I don't think Boothill will do anything that is detrimental to the Express.

C: 只要触碰此物便可回到安全的地方，梦土「毗乃昆尼」果真玄奥无穷。
E: You can return to a safe location after touching this object. "Pinecany" truly is filled with boundless mysteries.

C: 你从哪知道这么多的？
E: How do you know so much?

C: 可话说回来，家族为什么要在梦里办学？会有人专程跑「盛会之星」来读书吗？
E: Why is The Family running a school in a dream anyway? Do people really come to the Planet of Festivities just to study?

C: 分…院…？
E: Assigned...?

C: 那么第一个问题：介绍一下自己的身份吧。
E: Now, for the first question: Please, introduce yourself.

C: 你是说自己身体好吧？不错，剧组最欢迎「吃苦耐劳」的新人。
E: I suppose you mean you're in good shape? Yes, the cast welcomes newcomers who are hardworking and persevering.

C: 试镜结束。你现在是「筑梦学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。
E: The audition is over. You are now a student of Dreamweaver Academy. Here is your student card.

C: 怎么了？
E: What's wrong with that?

C: 他也提到了仙舟联盟，可能是看到了姬子递交的入学材料吧。
E: He also asked about the Xianzhou Alliance. Maybe he saw it in the admission documents Himeko submitted.

C: 不要怀疑大厨的选择！
E: Don't question the master chef!

C: 看起来不错啊，让我尝尝——
E: It looks good! Time for the taste test...

C: 新品只有预售是惯例了，多多见谅，多多见谅。
E: It's customary for new products to be available for pre-orders only. My apologies.

C: 原来是演艺社的摊位
E: So this is the booth for the Performing Arts Club.

C: 但那双眼睛我还记得——「多好啊，在这里每一个人都能做自己的梦。」刚刚来到这里时，你是这么说的，眼里亮着难得一见的神采。
E: But I still remember those eyes — "This is great! Everyone can make their own dreams here." — That's what you said when you first arrived. Your eyes gleamed with spirit.

C: 只是些年轻人的风尚而已，对我来说…一位巡海游侠来到流梦礁才更稀奇。
E: It's just a fad among youngsters. If you ask me, it's even stranger that a Galaxy Ranger is in Dreamflux Reef.

C: 带社员证了吗？编号多少？
E: Got your membership card with you? I'll need your member ID.

C: 这倒不用，我只是个普通人，就和所有喜欢睡蕉小猴的人一样。
E: You don't have to give me special treatment. I'm just a normal person like every other Slumbernana Monkey fan out there.

C: 其实我完全不懂该怎么谱曲。这首是我从其他地方借来的。
E: To be honest, I'm absolutely clueless when it comes to songwriting. This song was taken from somewhere else.

C: 哎哎哎先等等——
E: Eek! W—Wait!

C: 哥们，别愣着了，那边有场大派对，相当爱你，不去看看？
E: Snap out of it, cowpokes! There's a big party going on over there, and it's lit as fudge. Why don't you go check it out?

C: 但你要说有派对，他们肯定抢着来。
E: Not when you tell them there's a party. That's when people come flockin'.

C: 将它泼洒在「忍之都」吧，用墨彩将这城的阴霾驱散，扬起反抗罪恶的旗幡。
E: Paint it throughout the Ninja Capital. Banish the shadows with ink, and raise the banner against evil.

C: 筑梦学院马上有一堂筑梦设计课，说是课程，实际是校庆活动的一环。
E: A Dreamweaving class will start soon at Dreamweaver Academy. It's more a part of the anniversary celebrations than it is a regular class.

C: 梦是潜意识的画布，在梦里，一根香蕉也会蕴含千丝万缕的感情，更不用说承载了无数蕉粉厚爱的睡蕉小猴。
E: Dreams are the canvas of one's subconscious. Within it, even a banana can carry intricate emotions, not to mention the Slumbernana Monkey adored by countless Ripe Bananas.

C: 此番风景正是甘饴•忍者心中所想。方才阁下转身的刹那，她相由心生，灵感如涌泉喷发，整个过程只在<unbreak>0.1</unbreak>微•秒之间，就连忍者的超•视力也无法捕捉！
E: This magnificence is conceived by none other than Patissier Ninja Initiate. At that precise instant you turned around, a look of dawning eureka graced her visage! Inspiration surged through her and this came to fruition in just <unbreak>0.1</unbreak> microseconds — imperceptible even with a ninja's hypersight!

C: 会有效果吗？
E: Will it work?

C: 蕉，蕉蕉。
E: Bana, bana.

C: 这都什么跟什么！助蕉，快给我揍她！
E: The banana was that? Assistananas, beat her to a pulp!

C: 是说我们吗？
E: Is he talking about us?

C: 哦，看着资质不错啊。蕉蕉蕉，希望你们不会让蕉师失望。
E: Oh? They seem to have potential. Bana bana! I hope you don't leave me disappointed.

C: 他们扭头看向你，但口中只有*蕉声*。他们的眼神中充满了澄澈的善意，应该已经完全进入了睡蕉小猴的角色——真是一群称职的演员。
E: They turned to look at you, but only Banagibberish came from their mouths. Their eyes were filled with pure goodwill, fully immersed in their roles as Slumbernana Monkeys — truly a dedicated group of actors.

C: 所以，虾蟇•忍者，现在阁下能将一切阐明了吗？
E: Ninja Gama, can you kindly enlighten us on the proceedings thus far?

C: 有…内鬼…*蕉易*终止……
E: Ugh... mole... among us... Deal aborted...

C: 啊…没关系的，三月同学，你们先聊吧。我去那边等你。
E: Um, it's okay. You guys go ahead. I'll wait for you over there, March.

C: 尽管语气一如往常，但匆匆跑远时，蒙塔娜的神情中仍带着几分紧张……
E: Although her tone is normal, there was still a hint of nervousness in Montana's expression as she hurriedly ran off...

C: 校园里也有参加过前几次显圣的学生。
E: We have a few other students from campus who attended a few theophanies before.

C: 不，是只有我。
E: No, not her. Just me.

C: 这就是最后的教导了，我会让你彻底领会他的哲学。
E: This is my final lesson for you. You shall thoroughly understand his philosophy.

C: 你是说已经结束的事，还是现在才要开始的事？
E: You referrin' to what's finished, or what's only just beginnin'?

C: （这是…乱破的声音，是过去的她？）
E: (This is... Rappa's voice. Is this a past version of her?)

C: 缭乱•忍符，开！
E: Dazzling Ninja Seal, open!

C: 在下没有辜负缭乱•忍法…苦茶大师，真希望你能见证此景……
E: I have not let down Dazzling Ninjutsu... Master Kucha, I really wish you could witness this...

C: 大功告成！如此一来，邪忍的阵法就被破坏。
E: Success! This way, the Evil Ninja's matrix can finally be broken.

C: 是！就让在下为大师展示一番，方才领悟的缭乱•忍法吧。
E: Understood! I shall demonstrate for Master the Dazzling Ninjutsu I just learned!

C: …也罢。
E: ...Forget it.

C: 你早晚会击败御猿•邪忍的，那之后呢？成为缭乱•忍侠只是为了打败仇敌吗？
E: You'll eventually defeat Evil Ninja Osaru one day. Then, what happens next? Is your reason for becoming the Dazzling Ninja solely for defeating your enemies?

C: （…快出发吧，真的不想再「蕉」了蕉。）
E: (...Yes, let's hurry up and get there. Please no more "bana," bana.)

C: 蕉蕉蕉，可惜，如果不是搅局的变量太多，这里还能变得更加热闹。
E: Bana tsk, what a waste. If it wasn't for so many variables disrupting the plan, this place would have been even more bustling.

C: 「AK-A-3」，承载着返祖实验进从<unbreak>32</unbreak>个文明中筛选出的优质灵长类基因，却因一位见习研究猿的错误培养而误入歧途。
E: "AK-A-3," carrying high-quality primate genes selected from <unbreak>32</unbreak> civilizations for the atavistic experiment, went astray due to a trainee research ape's erroneous cultivation

C: 在下的忍法只会将邪祟送出此处，莫要担心，尽情施展忍•空手道吧！
E: My ninja arts will only send the fiendlings out of this place. Fret not, freely use my ninja fist!

C: 「年轻的神，自苦痛中崛起吧！」
E: "You shall rise from suffering, young god!"

C: 再回想下翁法罗斯的特征吧——这是一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
E: Let's think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus instead. An isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power...

C: 立即出手，阻止士兵。
E: Intervene and stop the soldier.

C: 缇宝都鉴定为假，你还想狡辩？
E: Tribbie already called it a fake! Are you trying to pull a fast one on us?

C: 嗯，感激不尽。
E: Much appreciated.

C: 你来了，风堇。这些日子辛苦你照顾伤者了。
E: Hyacine. Thank you for taking care of the wounded over the past few days.

C: 正式引荐一下吧——这位是来自神悟树庭「智种学派」的讲师助理，也是医疗机构「昏光庭院」的首席护理师，风堇。
E: Allow me to do the honors. This young lady is Hyacine, assistant lecturer of the Nousporists at the Grove of Epiphany and head nurse at the medical institution known as the Twilight Courtyard.

C: 变得…更加毛茸茸？
E: You might... become fluffier?

C: 算了，他两辈子遇见这么大的树时，都处于万分头疼的境地。
E: Never mind, every time he encounters a tree as big as this one, it would be a deeply troubling situation.

C: 如果不错…我们应当能借金丝从这枚蝶蜕中汲取力量。
E: If I'm not mistaken... we should be able to draw power out of this butterfly exuvia with the golden thread.

C: 我差不多有头绪了。走吧，取得余火，找到她当面对质。
E: I've got a hunch. Come, let's collect the embers and go confront her.

C: 成功啦！道路长出来了——
E: It's a success! The path has appeared...

C: *泰坦悲伤的低鸣*
E: *Titan's sad cries*

C: 说吧，你有何事要找我这老人商量？
E: So, tell me, why have you come to seek this old man's counsel?

C: 尤其，是它足以主宰整片猎场的时候。
E: ...Especially when it wields power enough to dominate the entire hunting ground.

C: …呵，换位思考，你的确是读书的料。
E: ...Heh, you truly have the makings of a fine scholar, putting yourself in other people's shoes like that.

C: 打捞，花了很久。运气很好，我们。
E: A long time to fish out, it took. Very fortunate, we were.

C: 最后「轰——！」的一下，我就醒了。
E: Then there was a "bang!" and I woke up.

C: 当然可以。但我的好女孩，你会找到更合适的人选。
E: Of course you can! But you'll find someone else who's better for the job, my dear.

C: 我想，那人应该住在一座华丽的神殿里，那神殿矗立在长满金色无花果树的山坡上。
E: I think that person lives in a beautiful temple that sits atop a hillside covered in golden fig trees.

C: 现在还未到{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，你还可以休息很久。
E: It's not yet the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}. You still have plenty of time to rest.

C: 树庭之行平安无事，这都是缇安的功劳。多亏有你在，逐火之旅才能平稳地继续。
E: We got back safe from the Grove because of you, Trianne. You're the reason the Flame-Chase Journey can continue.

C: 也许只是错觉，缇宁只是在想……
E: It might just be an illusion, but Trinnon wonders...

C: 你在这里吗——？
E: Are you in here —?

C: 什么？！
E: What!?

C: 白厄，你们的计划…时间紧迫，长话短说吧。
E: Phainon... Tell us your plan. Time is of the essence.

C: 白厄，我希望与你达成共识：我们要将那盗火行者一举拿下，斩获战果。此后，面对元老院的挑战，我们也将有自己的底牌。
E: Phainon, it is my hope that we can come to an understanding on this: We must take down the Flame Reaver in one go and retrieve the Coreflame, and in doing so, grant ourselves an advantage against the Council of Elders.

C: 以我对那个人的认识…他一定能做到。
E: Based on what I know of him, he can do it.

C: 不久之后，我就会离开奥赫玛，去和这世间的至暗搏斗，去背负…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的命运。
E: I'll be leaving Okhema soon to fight the great darkness of this world... and to shoulder {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} destiny.

C: *我们*接过它的命运，走上相同的轨迹也是理所当然。
E: It's only natural for us to follow the same path since we inherited their destiny.

C: 这是每一位半神的使命。终有一日，我们都要卸下过往，踏上和他同样的道路。
E: That is the fate of every demigod. We will all eventually let go of our past to follow the same path as his.

C: 踏上前来，汝会亲手埋葬自己……
E: Step forth, and thou shalt bury yourself...

C: 谢谢。然后…好好睡吧。
E: Thank you. Now... may you rest well.

C: 如此，拨开翁法罗斯漆黑的迷雾……
E: And thus, we shall sweep apart Amphoreus' pitch-dark fog...

C: 是啊…你会回想起来的，然后下定决心，帮助自己重新来到最初的门前。
E: Yes, you'll remember it all, and then find your way back to the gate where everything began.

C: 倒是波提欧先生，你出现在这儿，代表着流梦礁又要发生什么大事了吗？
E: But you, Mr. Boothill, your appearance here means something big's about to go down again in Dreamflux Reef, doesn't it?

C: 有人搅局。制片人，正面作战可不是我的长处。这个来片场闹事的家伙显然不好惹。还是先迈动您高贵的腿，开跑吧！
E: Someone's crashed the set. Producer, I'm not built for front-line combat. And that guy is bad news. So, how about we take the smart approach and run?

C: 不，我不喜欢这样的称呼。我想要一个你选择的名字，而不是一个选择了你的名字。
E: No. I don't like that. I want a name you chose, not a name that was chosen for you.

C: 先不聊这些了，快找地方吃饭吧，听着你肚子打鼓，我也饿了。
E: Alright, enough about that. Let's find something to eat. Listening to your stomach rumble is making me hungry too.

C: 那…先吃饭吧？
E: So... let's eat first?

C: 但这一刻，无论是来自异界的Saber小姐，还是来自过去的音符小姐……我确定，你们是某种更真实的存在，绝不是受人包装而成的商品。
E: But at this moment, whether it's the otherworldly Miss Saber or the historical Miss Note... I'm certain you both are more real than that, and not just some commercialized product.

C: 我就说嘛，那个叫梅林的魔术师吹得煞有介事，「将宝剑从石头里拔出的人会成为不列颠的王」。就算是见习骑士，也会忍不住想去试试。
E: I knew it. That mage Merlin spun such a tall tale, something about "Whosoe'er pulleth out this sword of this stone is rightwise king of all England." Even an apprentice knight wouldn't be able to resist that.

C: 你让我想起了星期日…
E: You remind me of Sunday...

C: 知更鸟小姐的兄长…确实，我当时的所想与所为，与他何其相似。
E: Miss Robin's older brother? His thoughts and actions sound a lot similar to mine.

C: 没错，我就不卖关子了，就是{M#小爷}{F#小姐}您啊。是艾丝妲站长法外开恩，把你送来了这儿找份工作。
E: Yep, you guessed it. It was you, {M#brat}{F#lass}. The only reason you got a job here is that Lead Researcher Asta took pity on you.

C: 你试着向眼前的科员呐喊，但你的声音却颤抖着给出了截然不同的回答。
E: You try to yell at the researcher before you, but your wavering voice gives a different response.

C: 我马上收拾行李！
E: I'll pack my bags right away!

C: 列车已经离开了，过去只会扑一场空。
E: The Express's already left. Going there will be pointless.

C: 米哈伊尔乘客，要记得喔，无论你们是否离开，星穹列车是无名客永远的家。帕姆…会一直留在这儿，欢迎你们回来！
E: Mikhail, remember: whether you leave or stay, the Astral Express will always be the home of the Nameless. Pom-Pom will always be here... waiting for your return!

C: 喂，芮克边上那人穿着公司的制服…你认识吗？
E: Hey. You know him? The guy in the IPC uniform next to Reca?

C: 都什么时候了，你还关心这个？
E: Seriously? It's not the time for this!

C: 在这里还是监狱的年代，公司狗们将这里变成了人间地狱。而观众最爱看的，正是他们遭难的戏码。
E: Back when this was still a prison, the IPC scoundrels turned it into a living hell. What do audiences love most? Watching those criminals suffer.

C: 是吗？我倒觉得挺正常的。
E: Really? I thought it was pretty normal.

C: 年少轻狂？我斯科特因为你从中作梗三番五次被迫学动物叫、被贬职调职的悲惨人生，竟然被你轻描淡写地归咎于「你的年少轻狂」？
E: Young and didn't know what you were doing? You ruined my life! You made me bark and oink and face a demotion, moving from one puny post to another in the cosmos in despair and misery... And this is what you call it? "Young and didn't know what you were doing"!?

C: 和解？因为你从中作梗让我坠入了三番五次被迫学动物叫、被贬职调职的悲惨人生，而你竟敢厚颜无耻地说想要和解？
E: Make it up to me? You ruined my life! You made me bark and oink and face a demotion, moving from one puny post to another in the cosmos in despair and misery... And this is all you have to say? "Make it up to me"!?

C: 我为什么要为一个敌对的从者放下武器？让你们两个一起死掉，岂不是皆大欢喜？
E: And why would I spare an enemy Servant? Two birds with one stone sounds perfect to me.

C: 我会时刻盯着你的！
E: I'll keep my eyes on you at all times.

C: 大家请离我近一些。我已经捋清了这部影片的旋律，只要稍作调律，应该就能离开葛瑞迪的宝具了。
E: Everyone, please come closer. I've decoded this film's melody. With a few adjustments, we should break free from Grady's Noble Phantasm.

C: 你投得也太快了！
E: You gave up WAY too quickly!

C: 林登•斯科特！我*监狱星时代粗口*，怎么会有这么没有素质的观众！
E: Lyndon Skott! Well, *obscene language from the prison world era* me. How can there be an audience so uncultured!

C: 不死之躯，瞬间移动，精神控制。
E: Immortal body, teleportation, mind control.

C: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯……
E: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land...

C: 你说什么，哪有那么久啦。
E: Huh? Has it been that long?

C: 用来自投罗网？
E: By walking straight into a trap?

C: 「非演职人员请勿走上台前」——这条规矩倒是正常。
E: "Only cast and crew members are allowed on the stage." Hm, a surprisingly reasonable rule.

C: 先等等。
E: Wait till later.

C: 我说别瞎掺和，{M#他}{F#她}非要试试，结果试试就出事了呗。
E: I didn't really wanna do it, but {M#he}{F#she} insisted on us giving it a shot. That's how we got into this problem.

C: 换言之，散落在这里的是「停云」的一道道面相。
E: In other words, it means the Tingyuns we see here are all different aspects of her psyche.

C: 小女子明明手无缚鸡之力，莫非说的是心思活络？
E: But I'm not very strong physically. Are you referring to my quick wits?

C: 你…别当面告状呀！
E: Hey! No tattling!

C: 你还是和过去一样坦然。
E: You're still the same — carefree as always.

C: 天将们判断，你的生还不在幻胧计划之内，若运用得当，必能作为一支奇兵，帮联盟取回先机。
E: The Arbiter-Generals concluded that Phantylia did not intend for you to survive. If utilized strategically, this could give the Alliance an element of surprise.

C: 万维克小姐说话很有哲理呢，像是我认识的一个人。
E: You're very philosophical, Miss Wonweek. You remind me of someone I know.

C: 好熟悉啊……
E: It seems familiar...

C: 此时此刻，天上还有无数世界在等待星穹列车到访。可您和同伴停留在这里，只是为了一位素未谋面的故人，和一位声名狼藉的逃犯。
E: At this very moment, there are countless worlds above the skies still waiting for the arrival of the Astral Express, yet you and your companions have chosen to stay here. All for an "old friend" you never knew and a notorious fugitive.

C: 我也深知，只有当一个人决意告别过去的时候，他才会坦然面对全部的自我。就像此时此刻，你所做的一样……
E: I also know that a person will only be able to truly face themselves once they've decided to say goodbye to their past... the same way you're doing right here, right now...

C: 我第一次来大剧院时还是个孩子。从这里望去，我被幕布后边的光芒吸引，深信那就是指引梦想之地的启明。
E: I was a child when I first visited the Grand Theater. I remember seeing the light behind the curtains from here and believing it to be the Morning Star guiding me toward the Land of the Dreams.

C: 事到如今，也无需再向您隐瞒。我认为匹诺康尼星核一事，背后另有隐情。
E: At this point, there is no need to hide things from you. I believe there's more to the incident involving the Stellaron on Penacony.

C: 若非命途使然，也许你我不至于走向对立的结局。
E: If not for our Paths, perhaps you and I wouldn't be in opposition.

C: 黑天鹅不参加吗？
E: Black Swan isn't joining us?

C: 「纯美」伊德莉拉的飞升之地，永存不灭之美的世界。据说那里是星核之灾的原爆点之一，多半不怎么安全。
E: That's where Idrila the Beauty ascended, a world of undying allure. It's also said to be one of the initial sites of the Stellaron Disaster. Probably not the safest choice.

C: 旅程尾声，想要纪念的时候…
E: The end of the journey, when we wanna commemorate the adventure.

C: 是洗车星。
E: We're going to a Washtopia.

C: 它潜藏在「智识」和「记忆」的光芒下，与二者分庭抗礼。是「均衡」？「神秘」？还是「不朽」？我没有头绪。
E: Hidden beneath the brilliance of Erudition and Remembrance, yet possessing enough power to rival the other two Paths. It could be the Equilibrium, the Enigmata, or perhaps the Permanence? I have no clue at all.

C: 你觉得翁法罗斯会和三月七的过去有关吗？
E: Do you think March 7th's past could be connected to Amphoreus?

C: 看来我们得留下来处理些大人的事务了。
E: So we're... staying behind to take care of the grownup stuff?

C: 耳濡目染，耳濡目染——虽然我既没耳朵也没眼睛，哈！
E: Mirror see (and hear), mirror do! Though I neither have eyes nor ears, haha!

C: 这片扇区…好像还挺正常的？这些人偶也都在运作，没看出有什么故障……
E: This zone... seems to be functioning fine? These puppets are doing their job, and I don't see any obvious malfunction...

C: 嘘，别出声。这可是我的高光时刻，你只要乖乖听着就行了。
E: Hush now, keep quiet. This is my moment to shine, so just listen.

C: 要叫醒她么，瓦尔特先生？
E: Should we rouse her, Mr. Yang?

C: 给我停下，不许用那么恶心的腔调说话！
E: Enough. Don't use that nauseatingly fawning tone on me!

C: 一段时间后……
E: Some time later...

C: 明明差一点就能开打了。
E: Tsk, a little longer and I would've shown you what I can really do.

C: 小心动静。
E: Stay quiet.

C: 你也能看见？
E: You see it, too?

C: 我叫{NICKNAME}。
E: My name is {NICKNAME}.

C: 远方就是云石天宫，天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…就在那里。
E: Marmoreal Palace, the Lance of Fury, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They're all there, in the distance.

C: 这叫安全？！跟缇宝说的完全不一样啊！
E: You call this safe!? It's not how Tribbie described it at all!

C: 我诅咒你，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}！
E: Curse you, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}!

C: 奥赫玛永世唾弃你！
E: Okhema shall forever despise you!

C: 站在我身边，我会抵御它的怒火！
E: To me! I shall withstand their wrath!

C: 是冥河的气息……
E: It's the smell of the River of Souls...

C: 为什么？
E: But why?

C: 边疆…？
E: The frontier...?

C: 话说回来，其实我有件事想请教二位英雄，没想到正巧遇上，那我可直接问了……
E: Say, I've been wanting to ask you guys something. I didn't think I'd actually get the chance but...

C: 请别把它当成不可理喻的迷信，世人都经历了从怀疑到笃信的转变，而且那转变来得并不容易，许多人都为之付出了代价。
E: Please don't simply dismiss it as silly superstition. The people of this world have already experienced the transition from skepticism to firm belief, and this transition wasn't easy to achieve. Many have paid the price.

C: 是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
E: It's {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: 不能直接给你吗？
E: Can't I just hand it to you?

C: 希望黄金裔没空冲浪…
E: I hope that the Chrysos Heirs are too busy to surf the web.

C: 你们…刚才说了什么？
E: What... did you just say?

C: 离开之前，去看看不知为何聚在一起的市民们吧。
E: Before you leave, take a moment to visit the citizens who have somehow managed to gather together.

C: 凯妮斯冷笑着离开了。
E: Caenis sneers and departs.

C: 天女！天女！
E: Celestial maiden! Celestial maiden!

C: （把这件事也告诉丹恒吧。）
E: (I should probably mention this to Dan Heng.)

C: 解决落雷的问题前，还是先离那条铁链远点吧。
E: Best keep a safe distance from that chain until we find a way to get rid of the lightning.

C: 照万敌的说法，我们应该继续深入悬锋城，是那个方向。
E: According to Mydei, we need to go deeper into Castrum Kremnos. It's that way.

C: 简而言之，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}是司掌诡计的泰坦，偷盗、欺诈、背叛，这些令人不齿的词语都和它有关。
E: Simply put, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} is the Titan of trickery — thievery, deception, and betrayal, these unsavory acts are all tied to them.

C: 伟哉，吾主{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
E: All hail {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, my master and guide.

C: 但现在，也许我们都该屈从内心的兽性。
E: But right now, perhaps it's best for us to submit to the beasts inside.

C: 就算不死是种诅咒，它也不该被运用得如此卑劣。
E: Even if immortality is a curse, it shouldn't be used so despicably.

C: 它已是强弩之末了！
E: They're already near their end!

C: 真是奇形怪状啊…
E: What a strange shape...

C: 万敌不知已赔上了几条性命，遐蝶。我的犹豫就是对他的残忍。
E: Castorice, our hesitation is just cruelty to Mydei. How many lives must he have lost already?

C: 还有姬子跟丹恒…这是哪段记忆？
E: There's also Himeko and Dan Heng... What memory is this?

C: 卡芙卡…
E: Kafka...

C: 可爱的小家伙…它是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的馈赠吗？
E: What a cute little creature... Is it a gift from {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?

C: 这是……
E: This...

C: 共赏？你们不配！
E: Savor it? You're unworthy!

C: 为了保护奥赫玛。
E: To protect Okhema.

C: 动身前…我想再和阿格莱雅大人确认一番。请稍等，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Before we leave, I'd like to check with Lady Aglaea again. Do you mind waiting for me, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?

C: 我和吾师还有必须处理的要事，恕不远送。
E: My teacher and I have other pressing matters to attend to. Please see yourself out.

C: 你收回了金线，该处理眼前的污秽了。
E: You retract the threads, ready to deal with the filth before you.

C: （还有，姐姐你…真的好漂亮！简直就像石版上记录的{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}女神一样，金闪闪的！你的眼睛…也像两颗宝石一样，真让人羡慕！）
E: (Oh, and by the way, you look so pretty! Just like Goddess {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} on the teleslate — so shiny and sparkly! Your eyes are like two beautiful gems! I'm so jealous!)

C: 哎、哎哟！谁啊，哪个不长眼睛的——
E: O—Ouch! Watch where you're going, will you—

C: 为迷迷收集的记忆全都指向黄金战争的尾声，或许能以此为基点来做推断。
E: The memory fragments we gathered for Mem all point toward the final stage of the Chrysos War... We might be able to use that as a starting point for our deductions.

C: 你我都为终结这荒谬而来。那就结伴而行，将死亡还给那位泰坦吧。
E: You and I are both here to bring an end to this absurdity. So, join me comrade. Let us bring death unto that Titan.

C: 「纵使腹背受敌、内外交患，它亦从未向邪劣的诡计妥协，守护着战士的尊严……」
E: "Even when enemies close in from all sides, they have never conceded to evil schemes, fiercely guarding the warrior's dignity..."

C: 不知何时，从遥远的地平线外诞生了黑潮——它缓慢地逼近翁法罗斯的边界，而{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}是第一位与之接触的泰坦。
E: No one knows when the black tide first appeared beyond the distant horizon, but when it slowly encroached upon Amphoreus' borders, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} was the first Titan to venture forth.

C: 我的连续登录要断了。
E: I'm gonna lose my login streak.

C: 掌心里的火种起初滚烫无比，现在已经完全冷却下来了…我几乎快要察觉不到它的存在。
E: The Coreflame was blazing hot in my palm in the beginning, but it has completely cooled off now... I can barely feel it.

C: 「证明你拥有无法被摧毁的意志…击溃你内心最根深蒂固的恐惧……」
E: "Prove that you possess an indestructible will... And vanquish the fears deep in your heart..."

C: 不，它平平无奇，绝不是什么孤本。
E: No, it's just an ordinary book. It's definitely not some kind of unique copy.

C: 是一「位」，人家也是「一位」啦。
E: It's also "who" for me, not "that."

C: 说吧，我在听。
E: Speak, I'm listening.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，请听我说——
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, listen to me...

C: 四下望去…此地可有描绘吾的壁画？吾倒是好奇，树庭以外的人子，如何看待别尊泰坦呢。
E: Now that I look around... I wonder if there are any murals bearing my portrait around here. I'm quite intrigued to see how the children of humanity beyond the Grove perceive another Titan.

C: 你那至亲…她现在身在何处？快将她送离树庭，去到人寻不得的地方，否则你我都将接受七贤人会的审判哪…！
E: Your beloved... Where is she now? Send her away from the Grove at once, to a place where nobody will ever be able to find her. Otherwise, the both of us will be judged by the Council of the Seven Sages...!

C: 我的故事就到这里，该说说你的秘密了。正所谓「等价交换」，对吧？
E: My story ends here. Now, it's time for you to tell me your secret. After all, this is what equivalent exchange means, correct?
Hmm...?

C: 行了，凯妮斯阁下，免去客套话吧。我是为与元老院诸君共济世业才应邀前来，别用这些繁文缛节测试我的耐心。
E: That's enough, Lady Caenis. Dispense with the niceties. I only accepted your invitation so that I can serve the commoners alongside the members of the Council of Elders. Don't test my patience with such superfluous formalities.

C: …说得不错。
E: ...Well said.

C: 与此同时
E: At the same time...

C: 哀地里亚人在冰原中找到了踽踽独行的我，将我的诅咒视作{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福。他们相信我的双手能终结黄金世的错误，带人们觐见伟大的死亡之神。
E: I was trudging across the frosty plains on my own when the Aidonians found me. They saw the curse in me as a blessing from {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, and believed that my hands could correct the Era Chrysea's mistake and lead them to meet the great god of death.

C: 我了个猫咪怪盗啊…
E: Holy moly, a kitty thief?

C: 很显然，猫咪怪盗想和你玩一个小游戏——两根短矛，一个正确，一个错误。
E: Clearly, Kitty Phantom Thief wants to play a little game with you — two short spears, one correct, one wrong.

C: 没什么，单纯因为我怕了裁缝女那副冷冰冰的面孔。如果可以，我一秒都不想在奥赫玛多待。
E: Oh, nothing really. Just a bit scared of the seamstress' frosty face. I wouldn't stay a second longer in Okhema if it were up to me.

C: 不过呢，二位知道吗？依照神话故事里说的，想要让死者顺利渡过冥河，去往冥界，就得在他们的嘴里，或者眼睛上放上一枚{RUBY_B#小银币}欧布罗斯{RUBY_E#}……
E: Did you know that the legends say you have to put an {RUBY_B#little silver coin}obol{RUBY_E#} into the mouth of the dead or over their eyes if you want them to successfully cross the River of Souls and enter the nether realm?

C: 来吧，完成你的使命。
E: Come. Fulfill your duty.

C: …我答应你。我将如母亲一般照料她成长，守护她不为「死亡」所害。
E: ...I promise that I will care for her as a mother, that I will protect her from the evils of "Death."

C: 不过…听小缇安的意思，我们确实也快要到冥界的入口了。
E: But according to what Trianne said... We're almost at the entrance of the nether realm.

C: 看到缇安大人的礼物，我才发现…自从踏上逐火之旅，一路走来，我已经拥有了太多曾经不敢想象的一切。
E: Only now, when I see Lady Trianne's gift, do I realize that I've already obtained so many things I would never have dared to dream of since I embarked on the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 我还在思量，万敌阁下。
E: I have yet to make my decision, Lord Mydei.

C: 利用「炼金」之法的力量，令它的残躯回归一身。
E: We have to reforge its body with the power of "alchemy."

C: 也许，斯缇科西亚人选择拥抱死亡，并非是迷恋上了它阴森可怖的一面……
E: Perhaps the people of Styxia chose to embrace death not out of fascination with its cruel and fearsome side...

C: 又或者，在遗恨消去后…将能再度示现？
E: Or will you show yourself again... once we eradicate this hatred and regret?

C: 可命运弄人，作为成神的代价<color=#dbc291ff>…我们必须亲手夺去至亲的生命。</color>
E: But fate was cruel. The price of attaining divinity was to <color=#dbc291ff>take the life of our closest kin with our own hands.</color>

C: …这也是泰坦神力的一道侧面。
E: ...This is yet another aspect of a Titan's divine power.

C: 看，那里还有升降平台。
E: Look. There's even a platform lift over there.

C: …咀嚼着生与死，离别，还有漫长的孤独。
E: ...All while mulling over the subject of life, death, partings, and enduring an endless loneliness.

C: 真是人之将死，其言也不善哪。
E: And they say men whose ends are nigh have but kind words.

C: …明白了。
E: Got it.

C: 而要带着炙热的体温，将「爱」播撒向大地。
E: They will radiate with an intense warmth, sowing love far and wide throughout the land.

C: 不错。当我们的肉体诞生，便成为世界新的延伸。由此，我们的种子也在某人记忆中播下，并在未来播散到无数人心中。
E: Correct. Once our physical bodies are born, we become new extensions of the world. From there, we plant our seeds into someone's memories and then scatter them into the hearts of countless people in the future.

C: 要想消灭我们的存在，就得毁灭世界本身。然而，总有一人将带着他完美的记忆活下去……
E: To destroy our very existence, one must destroy the world itself. But we have someone who will still live on with his perfect memory...

C: 前进吧，列车会和你一起。
E: Keep going. The Express is right here with you.

C: 好像用不着你了。原地待命吧。
E: It seems like I have nothing for you. Just stand by and wait for orders.

C: 您的反应正如我的计算。看来，即便经历了漫长的守望，我对人性的测算仍旧准确。在您身上，存在着美丽的求知欲。
E: Your reaction is completely within my calculations. Despite my long years as a watcher, it seems like my assessment of human nature still remains accurate. From you, I am able to sense a beautiful desire for knowledge.

C: 呵呵，无妨……
E: I'm fine...

C: 对了，这沓投诉信提醒了我，树庭里还有个地方，或许存在石版中都查不到的线索……
E: By the way, this stack of complaint letters has reminded me of a place in the Grove... We may find clues there that aren't on the teleslate.

C: 我身为「敬拜学派」的贤人，根系早已与巨树相连，一举一动必将牵掣它的每一根枝、每一片叶，甚至撼动大树本身。
E: As a sage of the Venerationists, my soul has already become inextricably linked to the Great Tree. Every word I say and every move I make is certain to influence every leaf, every branch... even the Tree itself.

C: …果然。先前在悬锋竞技场，我们没有真正杀死它。
E: ...I guessed as much. We didn't actually kill them back at the Kremnos arena.

C: 来了，黄金裔们来了。
E: They're here. The Chrysos Heirs are here.

C: 换我来吧，姐姐！让我来做「死亡」的牺牲品，我本就命不久矣…但你不一样……
E: Let me do it, sister! Let me be Death's sacrifice. I was never long for this world anyway... but you're different...

C: 那是…露奈比斯和索拉比斯阁下？
E: Are those... Lady Lunabis and Lord Solabis?

C: …也能一并取回阿格莱雅的护符。
E: ...and also retrieve Aglaea's amulet.

C: 阿提…阿提卡斯…是你吗？
E: Atti... Atticus... is that you?

C: 是为了「全世宝石」…？
E: Is it for the Gem of All Worlds?

C: 耐力也是一绝！
E: They've got the stamina to match!

C: 风堇…？发生什么了？
E: Hyacine...? What happened?

C: 白厄阁下，在翁法罗斯的神话中——<color=#dbc291ff>黎明机器是艾格勒赠予刻法勒的礼物</color>，对么？
E: Lord Phainon, in Amphoreus's mythology, <color=#dbc291ff>isn't the Dawn Device said to be a gift from Aquila to Kephale?</color>

C: 如果火种给你留下的消息属实，奥赫玛失去了黎明机器的加护……
E: If the Coreflame's message is true, Okhema has lost the Dawn Device's protection...

C: 飞鸟、若虫、人们…他们的记忆全都混杂在了一起，全都在…哭嚎。
E: Birds, nymphs, people... their memories tangled together, their cries echoing as one.

C: 此刻，请忽略我这位旁观者，去完成你必须完成的事业吧，白厄阁下。
E: At this moment, please disregard this observer, and finish what you must, Lord Phainon.

C: 冥河静悄悄的，好像发生的一切只是场梦。小蝶…她在那边还好吗？如果人家写一封信，用漂流瓶送去，她会收到吗？
E: And the River of Souls is so quiet... It's like everything that happened was just a dream. I wonder if Cas is doing okay on the other side? If I write a letter and put it in a drift bottle, will she be able to read it?

C: 那刻夏归还{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种后，肉身彻底归殁。至此，「逐火之旅」即将到达尾声，众人将目光移向天空……
E: After returning {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame, Anaxa's physical body completely disappeared. With this, the Flame-Chase Journey neared its conclusion, and all eyes turned skyward...

C: 毕竟哈托努斯也是逐火之旅的一员，干劲满满呢！
E: Chartonus is part of this Flame-Chase Journey after all, full of energy!

C: 你不知道？咱们都认识多久了，真让人寒心呐……
E: You didn't know? After all this time we've known each other, that pains me...

C: 依我之见，恐怕是有用心险恶之人觉察到了金线的松动，于是开始策划阴谋，乘隙启衅。
E: In my opinion, malevolent forces have noticed the slack in the golden threads and are now plotting to exploit the opportunity.

C: …等等。
E: ...Hold on.

C: 对、对呀！你、你肯定跟我说过，我记得可清楚了！可能时间过了太久，你的记忆也变模糊了吧？桀、桀桀……
E: Yes! You definitely told me, and I remember it clearly! Maybe it's been so long, your memory's gotten a little fuzzy, hehe...

C: …我不会再心慈手软。
E: ...I won't be merciful this time.

C: 总觉得这是她的计谋…
E: Something about this feels like a scheme...

C: 我可没那么说啊，那刻夏老师。毕竟要是没有你传授给我的技巧，逐火之旅还存不存在都两说了。
E: Not at all, Professor Anaxa. Honestly, without those techniques you taught me, the Flame-Chase Journey might not have survived.

C: 奥赫玛有没有什么稀罕的宝贝，是连你…唔…连我们的店里都没有的？
E: Does Okhema have any treasures so rare that not even your... I mean, our shop, has seen?

C: …那我还能怎么办？以我的力量能做到的…就只有这些而已。
E: ...What else am I supposed to do? That's the only thing I can do with my power!
Hmm...?

C: 看来你的努力没有白费。
E: Looks like your efforts paid off.

C: 送人礼物怎么还带猜谜呀，真是的……
E: A gift with a mysterious twist? Seriously?

C: 请放心吧，赛飞儿女士。虽然我不像千年前的塞涅俄丝大人那样骁勇善战，但我有信心能完成天空后裔的使命。
E: Don't worry, Lady Cipher. I may not be as strong and warlike as Lady Seliose from a thousand years ago, but I'm confident I can carry out the mission of the Skyfolk.

C: 我们要去哪？
E: Where are we going?

C: 捏塑天象的艾格勒，手握惊雷、额戴赫日的百目神鸟……
E: Aquila, the celestial shaper, the hundred-eyed divine bird crowned with the blazing sun and wielding thunder...

C: 英雄{NICKNAME}！您的故事会被写入史诗，在新世界被众人传唱。
E: Hero {NICKNAME}, your saga will be chronicled in epics and celebrated across the new world!

C: 那团黑暗的背后藏着什么…？
E: What's on the other side of this?

C: 果然，你就是露奈比斯阁下，对吗？
E: So, you're Lady Lunabis, aren't you?

C: 人们都是那么以为，直到塞涅俄丝的枪尖穿透了艾格勒的怒火。
E: Everyone thought so until Seliose's spear pierced through Aquila's wrath.

C: 你是说…你在露奈比斯阁下身上，闻到了熟悉的气息？
E: You're saying... You smell a familiar scent on Lady Lunabis?

C: 浑象仪还无法运作…先想办法给它补充能源吧。
E: The celestial globe still isn't working... Let's find a way to supply it with energy first.

C: 流动…汇聚……
E: Flowing... Gathering...

C: …介意同我述说吗，两位阁下？
E: ...Would you mind sharing more, honored ones?

C: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝启——
E: Dear Seliose,

C: 建筑…也有记忆？
E: Buildings... have memories too?

C: 两位所在之地，翁法罗斯，<color=#dbc291ff>是一个由数据和忆质构建的世界，一位星神的实验场。</color>
E: The place where you stand, Amphoreus, <color=#dbc291ff>is a world constructed from data and memoria, an experimental field of a certain Aeon.</color>

C: 把秘密从他嘴里撬出来吧！
E: Time to make him talk!

C: 别…就是些小孩子的胡言乱语，没什么好看的。
E: Don't bother... It's just some silly childish nonsense... Nothing worth reading.

C: 怀念过去，是不是总会延误启程呢？
E: Guess reminiscing makes us take our time, doesn't it?

C: 可如果是这样，我们的远行……
E: But if that's the case, our journey...

C: 好华丽啊…金色的织者，听名字肯定是豪门贵族出身。
E: Such elegance... The Gold Weaver must be of noble birth.

C: *我们*抹去自己的千重耳目，只为更专注聆听圣殿里的呢喃！
E: We have surrendered our countless senses, dedicating ourselves to the sacred whispers within the temple!

C: 小小的哀丽秘榭，一昔之间降临了无数或尊贵、或传奇的人物：织者、门匠、君王、羁客、侍女、医师、学士……
E: The sleepy village of Aedes Elysiae in just one fleeting moment, welcomed an array of legendary figures: the Weaver, Gatekeeper, Ruler, Traveler, Servant, Healer, and Scholar...

C: 为什么要突然疏散整个命运三相殿……
E: They're evacuating the Temple? Why now?

C: 回来吧，留给我们思考的时间不多了。
E: Come back. We need to decide this here and now.

C: 别怕，你已经有答案了，不是么？
E: Don't worry. You already know what the answer is, don't you?

C: 恰如此时此刻，在塔兰顿的见证下，预言中的半神悉数集结……
E: Such as this very moment, as the prophesized demigods gather with Talanton as witness...

C: …我明白了。我不会辜负你的好意…你们的心愿。
E: ...I see. I won't squander your kindness... your hopes.

C: 明白了，我就在此地等候。
E: Very well, I'll be here. Waiting.

C: 你的无能令我失望，但真正引我发笑的，是你毫不自知的狂妄。
E: Your incompetence disappoints me, but what truly makes me laugh is your utter lack of self-awareness.

C: 每一位黄金裔都是如此，从未改变。
E: That's what it means to be a Chrysos Heir. So has it always been.

C: ——「生命的第一因」，于斯合题。
E: Thus, is the synthesis of the "prime mover of life" formed.

C: 好了，无名剑士。挽住我的尾流，换个地方说话吧。
E: Alright, nameless swordmaster. Hold onto my wake. Let's find somewhere else to talk.

C: 他说对了？
E: He got it right?

C: 直到，逆转「再创世」揭示的残酷未来。
E: Until, finally, the brutal future revealed by "Era Nova" is reversed.

C: 万敌…你对我的称呼始终没有变过。
E: Mydei... your name for me has never changed.

C: 我明白……
E: I understand...

C: 辛苦了，伙伴。
E: Thank you for all you've done already, friend.

C: 好。倘若我能超越命运……
E: Fine. If I can defy fate...

C: 毕竟看了那么多片段，我的过去，也一点一点浮出水面啦。{NICKNAME}这么聪明，是不是已经有头绪了？
E: After watching so many fragments, my past is finally coming into focus, little by little. {NICKNAME}, you're smart. You must have a clue now.

C: 去找到未来的昔涟，和她一起再度踏上旅途吧。答应我：可别让「我」等太久哦？
E: Go find the future Cyrene, and set out on another journey with her. Promise me, you won't keep me waiting too long, okay?

C: 别吓唬我呀！不、不管你是谁，能不能出来说话？压迫感太强…我、我会语无伦次的！
E: H—Hey, cut it out! If you're there, just... come out and talk, okay? You're freaking me out... I can't even think straight!

C: 果然，我的过去不是什么冰雪公主的童话呀……
E: Well, there goes my ice princess fairy tale...

C: 可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
E: But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.

C: 是呀，白厄他…也是因为这片风景才踏上旅程，孤独地走过三千多万次轮回。
E: Yes. Phainon, too, embarked on his journey because of this view... He then walked alone for more than thirty million cycles.

C: 它要如何毁灭「智识」？
E: How will it destroy the Erudition?

C: 从公司提供的情报来看，铁墓多半不是「星啸」或「焚风」那样由人类升格的大君，而是一道算法序列。只要有计算载体，它就无处不在。
E: Based on info provided by the IPC, Irontomb probably isn't like Celenova or Zephyro, who are Overlords ascended from human beings. Instead, Irontomb is an algorithmic sequence. It can be anywhere, as long as there is a receptacle for its calculation.

C: 有人在幕后推动这一切：名为「来古士」的观测者。推测：他是权杖系统的管理员。
E: Something in the shadows has been driving everything forward: It's the observer named "Lygus." Speculation: He's the Scepter system's Administrator.

C: 真是…两位充满个性的「天才」呢。
E: Those two geniuses... certainly have memorable personalities.

C: 原来，我们所有人都身处于白厄和昔涟创造的「永劫回归」中，而盗火行者就是背负无数火种后燃烧殆尽的白厄。他们的目的很简单：对抗星神，改写世界注定「毁灭」的结局。
E: It turned out that all of us were trapped in the "eternal recurrences" created by Phainon and Cyrene, and the Flame Reaver was Phainon himself, who had burned out after bearing countless Coreflames. Their goal was simple: To oppose the Aeon and rewrite the world's doomed fate of Destruction.

C: 当古老的安提基色拉人在沙滩上绘制几何图形，用羊皮纸记录下最初的数字符号，宇宙便化作一道沉默的方程，出现在这群孜孜不倦的破译者笔下。
E: The moment ancient Antikytherans sketched geometric shapes on the sandy beach and recorded the first numerals and symbols on parchment, the universe turned into a silent equation flowing under the pen of these relentless decoders.

C: 这还真是一份…大礼。
E: Quite the... generous gift.

C: 真是守口如瓶。
E: Her lips are sealed tighter than armor.

C: 见到此牌就等于见到凯撒本人，你们可以在城中随意行动。启程征伐海洋泰坦前，两位就在奥赫玛暂时休憩吧。
E: This medallion represents the will of the Imperator herself, and you may act freely within the city with it. Before we embark on the crusade against the Ocean Titan, you should rest in Okhema for a time.

C: …咳咳！
E: ...Ahem!

C: …因为我早已享受过最极致的自由。
E: ...Because I've already tasted ultimate freedom.

C: 听她的意思，确实。这也意味着她随时都有可能回来…聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
E: It seems that way. This also means she could return at any moment... If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.

C: 那接下来，我们就以阿格莱雅提到的<color=#dbc291ff>宴会</color>为突破口吧。那时刻律德菈的亲信应该都会在场，也是一个和他们拉近距离的好机会。
E: Well then, let's use the <color=#dbc291ff>banquet</color> Aglaea mentioned as our next starting point. Cerydra's trusted followers should all be present at that time. It'll be a good opportunity to get closer to them.

C: 咳咳咳…人类的憋气是有极限的，而你从短暂的沉浸中学到一件事……
E: *cough*... There's a limit to how long humans can hold their breath, and from that brief immersion, you learned one thing...

C: 我想听听你的直觉。
E: What does your gut tell you?

C: …啊，没有。只是想问问，二位见过凯撒吗？
E: ...Ah. No. I'm just wondering whether you've seen the Imperator?

C: 二位贵客，还有什么事吗？难道是想听我唠唠凯撒大人的事迹？
E: Is there anything else we can help you with, dear guests? Or do you want me to recount the Great Imperator's heroic deeds?

C: 别心急，我知道两位在等什么。
E: Don't worry. I know what you've been waiting for.

C: 呀，他往这边看了！快，随便做点什么，假装看不见他们——
E: Ah, he's looking this way! Quick, do something and pretend we can't see them...

C: 阁下将我视为祂忠诚的信徒，对么？
E: Do you see me as THEIR faithful disciple?

C: 时间膨胀、流速不统一什么的…你不是已经知道了么？
E: Yes. Time dilation, resulting in an uneven flow... Don't you know this already?

C: （…但要是叫来反物质军团和泯灭帮，真的能帮上忙吗？）
E: (...But what if I end up pulling in the Antimatter Legion or the Annihilation Gang? Can they really help?)

C: 前辈无名客们的形象逐一映现，只要融入他们遥远的合唱，也许道路就会在你面前显现……
E: The visages of past Nameless appear one by one. If you blend into their faraway song, perhaps a path will appear before you...

C: …看来翁法罗斯的命运，确实未到收梢之时。
E: ...It seems Amphoreus' fate isn't sealed just yet.

C: 她吟诗的声音愈发微弱，逐渐与呼吸一同消失在唇边，如缓缓平息的风。
E: Her voice, reciting poetry, grows ever fainter, fading with each breath until they all vanish completely at her lips, like wind slowly dying away.

C: 蠢狗…唔…看来我也没办法复仇了，暴君…没有我…你的征程必将落败……
E: You mutt... heh... looks like I won't get my revenge after all. Tyrant... without me, your conquest is doomed...

C: 我会在冥河中等着你蒙羞到来…砍下你顶着皇冠的头颅……
E: I'll be waiting for you in the River of Souls... to slice off that crown-wearing head of yours...

C: 试问：他们此时又身在何方？
E: I ask of you: where are they now?

C: 如你所见，他们的决心令人叹服。有如此坚定的「忆灵」相助，我们的对话——也将持续很久。
E: ...both have an astonishing amount of resolve, which I'm sure you can testify to. I am also sure that with the support of such a resolute memosprite, our conversation can last for a long, long time.

C: 她口中的「公司」…听上去是个更大的势力？
E: That "IPC" she spoke of... Is it a more powerful organization?

C: 于是，您眼前这位少年选择用「秩序」的力量谱写律法，希望能在梦中塑造一处绝对幸福的圣地。
E: Then, this young man before you chose to rewrite its laws using the power of the Order, hoping to shape a dream-bound paradise of perfect happiness.

C: 一切。关于这世界运行规则的一切，那神礼官口中的演算法则…「终极协议」。
E: Everything. I saw everything regarding the rules of this world's operation. I saw the laws of extrapolation that Theoros spoke of... I saw the "Ultimate Protocol."

C: 踏碎旧律，铸成新律…在翁法罗斯的界限内，我的征服已经抵达了尽头。既然神谕已经宣判，凯撒必无法遂愿征服星海，那我便就此退场，不再作他想。
E: Destroy the old laws and forge new ones... My conquest has reached its limits within the borders of Amphoreus. Since the prophecy already decreed that the Imperator would never conquer the stars as she wished, I will bow out here and try no more.

C: 「据说，在他们争斗的每一处，金血都汇聚成了同样的铭文：还是那个名字，它属于奥赫玛最初，亦是最后的君主，『凯撒』刻律德菈。」
E: "It is said that golden blood congealed into the same letters everywhere they fought. It was the name borne by Okhema's first and final sovereign: the 'Imperator' Cerydra."

C: 我看到了！瞄准胸椎和腰椎的连接点！破坏那里——
E: I see it! Target the connector between his thoracic and lumbar vertebrae! Destroy that spot...

C: 我们无意与阁下闲谈叙旧。逻辑：拖延时间，更证明你束手无策。
E: We have no interest in chatting about the past with you. Logic: You are stalling, which means you feel trapped.

C: …喔，原来如此。
E: ...Ah. I see.

C: 不可能，我无法信任你。
E: No. I can't trust you.

C: 而且，这也是三月七所希望的喔。
E: Besides, that's what March 7th wanted.

C: （努力回忆一下，和{NICKNAME}分别时的情况……）
E: (Think back to when {NICKNAME} and I separated...)

C: 我必须请各位——离开此地！
E: Any suspicious and uninvited guests to leave!

C: 令人迷惑的事层出不穷，我甚至不知该从何问起。说来惭愧，没能带回好消息……
E: So many baffling things kept happening one after another, I don't even know where to begin. I wish I could've returned with better news...

C: 空间站「黑塔」经常迎来不速之客，而「量力而行」从来不是他们的美德。这群窃忆者被悉数清理，关押在第四面镜中。
E: Herta Space Station often has uninvited guests, and they never seem to know their limits. That group of Memosnatchers has been taken care of, and they are now trapped in the Fourth Mirror.

C: 还记得么？三重命途缠绕翁法罗斯，有三位比肩「令使」的存在在这个世界留下过痕迹。
E: Do you still remember how Three Paths are said to intertwine in Amphoreus? That three entities, each comparable to an Emanator, left their marks in this world?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>█ ██ 回来 █ ██ {NICKNAME} ███</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> ██████ back█ ██{NICKNAME}███</color>

C: 昔涟理应在每次轮回的开端就死去了，为何会出现在这里？她又在和谁对话？
E: Cyrene should have died at the start of every recurrence, so why is she here? And who was she talking to?
"Truth"...?

C: 最后，温柔的彩虹遍布「天空」。无论往世、此世或来世，雅辛忒丝都会点亮人们心底里的微光。
E: In the end, the gentle rainbow covered the Sky. Whether in the past, present, or future, Hyacinthia will always illuminate the glimmering light in people's hearts.

C: 在哀丽秘榭，我与昔涟相遇，并联系到了螺丝咕姆和黑塔。他们指出必须在新的世界循环中取得「负世」的火种，但来古士将成为我们的阻碍，要依靠「律法」的力量与之抗衡。
E: In Aedes Elysiae, I crossed paths with Cyrene and reconnected with Screwllum and Herta. They revealed that the Worldbearing Coreflame must be secured in the world's next cycle, but Lygus would stand in our way. Only with the power of the Law could we hope to oppose him.

C: 以彼之道，还治彼身。我以故乡为灵感打造的「迷宫」，长夜月小姐，希望你喜欢。
E: Let's give you a taste of your own medicine. With my home as the inspiration, I've created this "maze"... Hope you like it, Miss Evernight.

C: 但我的计划可一点也不脆弱！没人比我更懂{NICKNAME}和丹恒。既然约好了，他俩就不会食言——
E: But my plan was super thought-out! I know {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng better than anyone. A promise is a promise for them. They never go back on their word!

C: 你…一直都知道？
E: You... knew all along?

C: 别道歉呀，「长夜月」。
E: Don't apologize, Evernight.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>一股冲动涌入你的心口，催促你阅读便笺上的内容……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>An impulse rushes into your mind, urging you to read the note...</color>

C: 我们先在这里躲藏一会儿。如果{NICKNAME}想四处看看，不要离人家太远。
E: We'll stay hidden here for now. If you want to wander, {NICKNAME}, don't go too far from me!

C: 回答我：神话中的地兽之王，理应陨落的半神，为何会以人形现身？
E: Answer me: Why would the Dromas King of the legends, the demigod who should have fallen, appear in a humanoid form?

C: 这是…错乱的记忆？
E: Is this some... disordered memory?

C: 请告诉我，「长夜月」和{NICKNAME}如今身在何方？
E: Tell me, where are "Evernight" and {NICKNAME}?

C: …那么，丹恒阁下，请允许我的分身一同随行。作为见证此世末路的半神……
E: ...Then allow my specter to accompany you, Lord Dan Heng. As the demigod who witnessed the end of this world...

C: 这场战前告别，我不止一次在梦中见过。
E: I've seen this farewell more than once in my dreams.

C: 我将再度扬起山火，烧毁那束缚你我的枷锁！
E: I will once again start a fire that burns away the chains that shackle us!

C: 我身为半神的职责，就于此刻将其卸下。
E: I now relinquish my duty as a demigod.

C: 就让「海洋」一同沉入忆潮……
E: Let the "Ocean" sink into the memoria tide...

C: 这壶酒…模样倒是新奇。又是白珩带来的？
E: This is an interesting-looking wine jar. Was it Baiheng who brought it?

C: 事关重大，做足准备吧。我等你，{NICKNAME}。
E: This is important, so make sure you're fully prepared. I'll be waiting for you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 走吧，为了三月七。
E: Let's go! For March 7th.

C: 话虽如此，我也得为长远考虑。
E: Even so, I must think long-term.

C: 但我不是为了谴责而来。
E: But I'm not here to blame you.

C: 有关「星核」的记忆，就在忆潮深处流淌……
E: Memories of the Stellaron are flowing deep within the memoria tide...

C: 这一世，<color=#dbc291ff>那位徒劳的负世者将自身化作封印</color>，意图压制黑潮的蔓延。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That futile worldbearer turned himself into a seal</color> in this cycle, attempting to suppress the black tide's spread.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 「智识」的演算、「毁灭」的火种、「记忆」的质料，三重命途在世界的尽头再度交汇。
E: The extrapolations of the Erudition, the Coreflames of the Destruction, and the textures of the Remembrance... the Three Paths converge once again at the world's end.

C: 不，在我看来，恰恰相反。
E: No, I'd say exactly the opposite.

C: 重塑愿望。
E: Reforge the wish.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「——以及，海洋的剑骑，海瑟音。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"And Hysilens, Knight of the Ocean."</color>

C: 这次，又能看到怎样的「愿望」呢……
E: I wonder what kind of "wish" we'll see this time...
Mmm...

C: 直到这一刻来临前，我都如此深信。
E: I believed it with all my heart... until this very moment.

C: 我们，是来接你回家的。
E: We're here to take you home.

C: 我的愿望…是什么呢？
E: My wish... what could it be?

C: 大人会把责任和理想当作心愿。但「愿望」…本该是至为纯粹，至为美好的事物。
E: Grown-ups often think duty and ideals are wishes. But a true wish... should be the purest, most beautiful thing of all.

C: 好久不见，大家。
E: Long time no see, everyone.

C: 权杖的中枢，铁墓的温床……
E: The Scepter's mainframe, and Irontomb's breeding ground...

C: 各司其职吧，我们会赢。
E: Let's each do our duty. We've got this.

C: 没想到，你们也在这里。
E: I didn't expect you'd both be here.

C: <color=#dbc291ff><size=28>向着明天，出发吧！</size></color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff><size=28>We depart... for tomorrow!</size></color>

C: 昔涟，我来了。
E: I'm here, Cyrene.

C: 「如果铁墓的力量，来自对一切原动力的否定。」
E: "If Irontomb's power comes from the denial of all Primum Mobiles,"

C: 一个有关「爱」的故事，对吗？我一直在期待。
E: A story about "love," no? I've been looking forward to that.

C: 以往昔的「记忆」，「开拓」来日的命运——
E: Using the Remembrance of the past, we will Trailblaze tomorrow's destiny—

C: …再来一杯吧，迈德漠斯。
E: ...Have another drink, Mydeimos.

C: 这恐怕并非制度的胜利，而是逐火军的武力和凯撒本人计谋的胜利吧？
E: I'd say that wasn't a victory of the system, but rather a triumph of the Flame-Chase Army's might and the Imperator's cunning strategies. Wouldn't you agree?

C: 我…答应你。
E: I... promise you.

C: 大家，该回家啦♪
E: Time to head home, everyone ♪

C: 真没想到，老师你还擅长黑色幽默啊……
E: I never would have guessed you had such a dark sense of humor, teacher...

C: …欸？等等，有什么东西掉出来了——
E: ...Huh? Wait. Something fell out...

C: 原来如此。我之所以能如此熟练地拉弓，都要归功于三月呢。
E: So that's how it happened. My skill with the bow, I owe it all to March.

C: 好在，黑天鹅小姐捉住了那一瞬呀。
E: Thankfully, Miss Black Swan caught that fleeting moment.

C: 因果…真是无法被阻拦的力量呢。
E: Causality... really is a force that cannot be stopped.

C: 还有永远不知疲倦的微风和涛声。
