E: And the breeze and sound of the waves never seem to rest.

C: 这里，是我们第一次拿起仪式剑的地方……
E: This is the place where we first picked up the ceremonial blade...

C: 因果在这一行闭合…或者，有个更浪漫的词，封笔。
E: Causality comes full circle in this line... Or, more poetically, the pen is laid to rest.

C: 当然，虽然没有证据，但我多半可以确信……
E: Of course. Though I don't have hard proof, I'm almost certain...

C: >>>δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>:\amphoreus\Irontomb.exe 运行时错误
E: >>> δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>:\amphoreus\Irontomb.exe Run Time Error

C: 需要。新的。「空白」。
E: Needs. New. "Blank spaces."

C: 鲁珀特敢这么干，我为什么不敢？这里集齐了权杖原型机、博识尊之父，还有一颗天才的大脑——万事俱备。
E: If Rubert dared to do that, why shouldn't I? I've got the Prototype Scepter, the father of Nous, and the brain of a genius. Everything's set.

C: 被当成配角了？该死啊！不过——
E: Did you all just treat me as a side character? Darn it! But anyways...
And leave the final step▄▀to me▄█▀██▄████████████████

C: 贯彻极致的信念，甚至取代星神。
E: To embody the ultimate conviction, even replacing Aeons.

C: ███████然终末诞生，终点必已存在███████
E: ███████ But if the Finality has been born, the destination must already exist ███████

C: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯
E: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

C: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》
E: Honkai: Star Rail

C: 我能诱来的兵力就这么多了，你也不想这里被军团的主力盯上吧？
E: I could only attract this much. Did you really want the entire Legion to come here?

C: 咕噜噜…坏了我的好事，一点也不好玩……
E: *gurgle*... You spoiled my plan. This is not fun...

C: 有什么怪的？都是「公司」报销，坏了就是坏了，咱也不跟他们客气。
E: Odd? IPC will reimburse us for everything, there's no need to be coy about it with them.

C: 找着了？是些啥？
E: Did you find them? What are these?

C: 哈，记得多来陪我这老头子解解闷哦。
E: Ha! Just remember to come more often to chat with me.

C: 随着偶然的光线折射，可以发现上面印着模糊的「集团」字样。
E: When the light is at a certain angle, the words "Corporation" can vaguely be seen printed on the card.

C: 都是些酸诗。
E: They are pretty cringy.

C: 臭小子。
E: Brat.

C: 你知道为什么吗？不，你不知道。很少有人明白星震到底是怎么一回事……
E: Do you know why? No, you don't. People rarely understand what a starquake means...

C: 似乎是…因为星震的引力效应，她的时间每过去一个月，我的时间就会过去数十年。那岂不是等她回来，我已经像师父一样老了？
E: So... Because of the gravitational effect of the starquake, every month she spends in her time will be decades for me. Am I going to be as old as my master when she's back?

C: 这事不由你控制。
E: This is not up to you.

C: 阻挠我的，是盘踞于必经之路上的怪物。
E: The real challenge is all the monsters along the way.

C: 我也有点受不了他。
E: I can't stand him either.

C: …好的，古恩先生。但我现在有些不舒服。
E: Yes, Mr. Gunn... But I don't feel so good.

C: 可她还记得你藏匿资料的地方。
E: But she still remembered where you hid your information.

C: 你真的已经想好了吗？
E: Have you really thought it through?

C: 我好像做了一场非常冗长的梦。
E: Like I just had a very long dream.

C: 我到这里来，替法政科的古恩•科诺列夫先生取几卷录像带。
E: I'm here to pick up some videos for Mr. Gunn Konolev of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics.

C: 被他们发现了怎么办？
E: What if they find out?

C: 审核流程倒计时开始，还有三十分钟。
E: Review countdown begins, <unbreak>30</unbreak> minutes left.

C: 好了好了，知道了，这就去。
E: All right, all right, got it. I'll get on it.

C: 正常人都接受不了吧。
E: It's unacceptable.

C: 由于光学身份校验程序是<color=#dbc291ff>在每天开启后动态刷新的，因此你每次进去都需要重新校验身份。</color>
E: Since the optical identity verification program is <color=#dbc291ff>refreshed dynamically after it is turned on every day, you need to re-verify your identity every time you enter.</color>

C: 啊，是因为我刚刚不在，就没把终端机的数据联通。等我先开一下，很快就好——
E: Ahh, I didn't connect the data to the terminal while I was away. Let me turn it on. It'll just take a second...

C: 这岂不是…岂不是让他这个防卫科负责人显得很不靠谱！
E: Wouldn't that... Wouldn't that make Arlan look incompetent as head of the Security Department?

C: （目瞪口呆，嗤之以鼻）
E: (Look skeptical and scoff)

C: （清醒一点！回忆起来我来这里的目的是什么！）
E: (Wow, the cringe is strong... I need to remember what I came here for!)

C: 波少之前承诺阿兰队长的时候，说的话和刚才一模一样、分毫不差。
E: He said the exact same thing when he promised Captain Arlan.

C: 既然是一家人，就不说两家话。来来来，这是我们最新版的波少粉丝后援会入会大礼包，再额外送你一份「波少个人百科」更新版内容！
E: We're on the same side after all! Here, this is our latest welcome bundle for new members of the fan club, and I'll toss in an updated version of Master Capote's Life Wiki!

C: 可是小姐……
E: But, my lady...

C: 所以…我并没有给你带来那些压力吗？
E: So... you don't feel pressured around me?

C: 没错没…不对！你又想破坏这美好的气氛！
E: That's righ— Hey! This is supposed to be a happy moment!

C: 你们是不知道，那「呜呜伯」出了名的喜欢戏弄人心，所以民间绰号才会叫做「戏命鬼」。
E: You don't know, the Wubbaboos are infamous for their manipulation tactics, so they have been nicknamed Jinx.

C: 不愧是正义之士卢卡奇！
E: You really are a fighter for justice, Lukacs!

C: 唉，从一开始嘱咐你的时候我就猜到了……
E: *sigh* I knew it from the moment I told you...

C: 这么多的呜呜伯…它们好像围着一个东西。
E: So many Wubbaboos... They seem to be gathered around something.

C: 至于荣仓终的纪念碑，就让它永远屹立在此处吧——所有物集齐，纪念碑落定，祭奠也已礼成，呜呜伯们可以放心了。
E: As for Eikura Shuu's memorial stone, I suppose it wouldn't hurt to have it stand here for eternity. With belongings gathered and the memorial stone secured, the ceremony is now complete. The Wubbaboos can now be appeased.

C: 不如放任它们惜别。
E: Why don't we just let them be?

C: 黑塔，我无意质疑你，也不会否定你曾为模拟宇宙做出的努力。
E: Herta, I don't mean to question you, nor do I want to deny the hard work you've put forth for the Simulated Universe.

C: 而「以太卡带」，它是朋克洛德的骇客用以编辑现实的芯片，记录了他们认知世界、改写世界的方式。
E: An "Aether Cartridge" is a chip that Punklordian hackers use to edit reality. The ways through which a hacker perceives and modifies the world are recorded on the chip.

C: 我好像出现幻觉了…
E: I think I'm hallucinating...

C: 我尽力了，这一版就是最终方案，是我的自信之作。算是我的个人请求吧…抛开那些样本、数据，就把它当作一次纯粹的挑战，好吗？
E: I tried my best. This is the final edition, it's my magnum opus. Think of it as my personal request... Do away with all those samples and data, and just think of this as a simple challenge. Alright?

C: 是，但不限于此。正如我为这株盆栽宣扬「美」的所在，我所期许的是一场邂逅，是心灵与理念的碰撞与交流。
E: Yes, though not exclusively. Just as I extol the "beauty" in this foliage, what I anticipate is an encounter — a collision and exchange of minds and philosophies.

C: 维利特是谁？
E: Who's Velite?

C: 那你们为什么追尾列车了？
E: Why did you rear-end the Express?

C: {NICKNAME}，能否麻烦你先去检查一下那位维利特先生的状况？他看上去吓得不轻，我们应该礼待来客。
E: {NICKNAME}, could you please go check on Velite? He looks uneasy. He is a guest of ours, after all.

C: 「丑陋」…不和谐的音调被揪了出来。
E: Ugliness... The inharmonious pitch has surfaced.

C: 三月之所以会在房间中看到另一个自己，恐怕就是因为吸入了些许翅粉。
E: I'm afraid March may have inhaled some of these particles. That's why she saw another version of herself in the room.

C: 偶尔，你也曾希望，这个世界不要有那么多令人困惑的材料。
E: You find yourself wishing once in a while for this world to have less bewildering things.

C: 他似乎也陷入了幻觉。
E: I think he's also fallen into a hallucination.

C: 无需此举，我非常感谢。即使被虫角贯穿也无妨，越接近死亡，或许就越接近「纯美」的道途……
E: Thank you, but that won't be necessary. It matters not if my flesh is pierced by the insect's horns. The closer I get to death, the closer I may get to the Path of the Beauty.

C: 难道你是在关心我？或许你也未察觉自己灵魂的高贵——表征虽与我不同，但仍有自己的风采。我希望我能守护住我的誓言：助你抵达终点。
E: You, too, are worried for my safety? You may not have realized, but you have a unique and noble soul. I hope I can keep my promise to escort you to your destination.

C: 靠人力搜查效率比较低，{NICKNAME}，你能想想是否有更迅速的方式吗？
E: Scouring the train like this isn't very efficient. {NICKNAME}, any thoughts how to speed thing s up?

C: 黑塔？
E: Herta?

C: （她似乎提到了令人在意的事，但我想不起来了。）
E: (I think she mentioned something important, but I can't remember.)

C: 小打小闹，上不了台面的。你要是搁学会那儿发达了，苟富贵，勿相忘。
E: Small-scale — best left under the table... but if you ever make it big in the Guild, don't forget your humble friend, okay?

C: 嗯嗯，好的好的，您有事儿说事。
E: Mm-hmm, sure. Can I help you with something?

C: （艾丝妲提到的科员失踪应该也和阿兰的调查有关。）
E: (The disappearances Asta mentioned are likely related to Arlan's investigations too.)

C: 或许<color=#dbc291ff>界种科和密卷科</color>的人会知道些什么。
E: Maybe the researchers at the <color=#dbc291ff>Departments of Ecology or Insight</color> may have an idea?

C: 哦，现在都叫它呜呜伯了。
E: Oh, nowadays, people call them Wubbaboos.

C: 你的办事能力，我信得过。要不考虑下？此间事了，跟我一同离开？
E: I have faith in your abilities. So, how about my offer? Why not come with me after this is done?

C: 你找阿德勒什么事？
E: Why are you looking for Adler?

C: 是你啊，我跟你说，阿德勒，阿德勒他不见了呜呜呜啊啊啊啊……
E: Oh, it's you! It's Adler... Adler disappeared! *sob*

C: 不然呢，让他们俩到处乱跑，把「空间站出事了」写脸上？
E: You have a superior strategy? Pray tell. Do we set the two of them loose, turning whispered fears into full-blown pandemonium?

C: 可她一来空间站就鸠占鹊巢，黑塔女士也完全不管……
E: But once she arrived on the space station, she just took over everything. And what did Madam Herta do? Absolutely nothing...

C: 鸠占鹊巢？
E: Took over everything?

C: 你培育出了一个牛奶五仁味生命！
E: You have nurtured a copy of a five nut milk-flavored lifeform!

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 说！为什么在空间站闹事？
E: Confess! Why are you stirring up trouble on the space station!

C: 我们聚在这里的理由，各位心里都清楚。除了「答案」，还有什么能把天才俱乐部的家伙召集在一起？
E: The reason for our gathering is clear to everyone present. What else could prompt such a gathering of brilliant minds except for the "answer"?

C: （只是换了一种口味嘛……）
E: (It's just a different flavor...)

C: （空间站会被它毁掉的…！）
E: (It'll destroy the space station...!)

C: 我必须承认，在过程中诞生的这些小家伙，它们有时令人动容。
E: I have to admit that these little ones born in the process... sometimes move me.

C: 嘶嘶，是小炒饭机器人的双生机器，炒冷饭机器人。嘶嘶。
E: *buzz* I am a twin of the Rice-Frying Robot. I am the Leftover Rice-Frying Robot. *buzz*

C: 本区域清扫完毕，等待执行下个队列的清扫计划。
E: This area has been cleaned. Waiting to execute the next cleaning plan in line.

C: 其实我是想让你带着小机器人出去，做一些实地训练，这样用起来才能更贴合你的习惯。
E: I actually wanted you to take this little robot along with you to do some field training. This way, it will become more suited to your habits.

C: 不过也多亏{F#她}{M#他}把事办砸，我才决定自己创立科学期刊，才有机会结识华劳斯。
E: Although, it is thanks to {F#her}{M#his} screw-ups that I finally decided to make my own scientific publication. Without that, I would never have had the chance to meet Wallace.

C: …唔，背景、构图、光线、姿势和表情，都无可挑剔，正如我和雷金先生完美的友谊。
E: ...Wow. The background, the composition, the lighting, the poses, the expressions... I would not change a thing, just like my perfect friendship with Mr. Regin.

C: 她们启发了我，我离开空间站前也应该和科员们合张照。
E: They have inspired me. I should have taken a picture with the researchers before I left the space station.

C: 下个版本的活动你来设计。
E: You should design the event for the next update.

C: 回来啦？看你的表情，想来收获不少吧？
E: You're back? That face of yours tells me that it was a worthwhile trip.

C: 外来者们，跟我来吧。贝洛伯格就在这片雪幕背后。
E: Outsiders, follow me. Belobog lies beyond this blizzard.

C: 这里还没有被侵蚀，但裂界滋生的怪物已经跑出来了。
E: This place still hasn't been corroded, yet Fragmentum monsters have already made it here.

C: 怎么办…聊了半天，压根一点进展都没有嘛！
E: So... what now? We spent ages trying to convince her and she didn't move an inch!

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ居然这么快就能跟公司建立起联系，甚至都开始谈合作了——动作真快，不愧是布洛妮娅！
E: Bronya moves fast! The crisis is only just over and she's already opened talks with the IPC.

C: …啊，看来有重要的访客来了。
E: ...Oh, it looks like we have some visitors!

C: 长线来说，这是一个…不，只有这么做才能保证贝洛伯格长远的利益。我需要你的协助才能达成这个目的。
E: In the long run, this is a way — the ONLY way — to ensure Belobog's long-term interests. I need your help to achieve this goal.

C: 「——部分严重违反此条指令的项目组，组内全体员工处以扣除<unbreak>60%</unbreak>年终奖金的处罚……」
E: Teams that violate this directive will have their year-end bonuses reduced by <unbreak>60%</unbreak>...

C: 噢，这不是{NICKNAME}和三月小姐吗！许久不见，没想到你们又来贝洛伯格了。
E: Is that {NICKNAME} and Miss March? It's been a while! I didn't think you'd be back in Belobog so soon.

C: 又要去老地方冒险了，我们走！
E: Here we go again, back to our old stomping grounds for another adventure!

C: 稍等一下。
E: Just a minute.

C: 你们知道嘛？上层区以后好像要开铁卫生活体验营，听说会很有趣哦？
E: Guess what — I heard there's gonna be a Silvermane adventure camp opening in the Overworld soon. It's gonna be super awesome.

C: 我去，兄弟，不是我说，你这回脸皮可够厚的！换成是我犯了事被扔进班房，肯定没脸叫我老爸过来捞人。
E: Haha, you're shameless, Norbert! Not to be rude, but if I were thrown in jail, I wouldn't possibly ask my father to bail me out.

C: 如果有必要的话…软硬兼施！
E: This time, the gloves are off!

C: 通常而论，在类似的互助会上，患者之间能够交流经历、互相支持鼓励，努力战胜疾病对各自的负面影响…但眼下这个「互助会」恐怕没那么单纯。
E: Generally speaking, mutual aid societies like these allow patients to share their experiences and support each other. It's a way of countering all the negative emotional effects of being ill... But there might be more to this society than that.

C: 你快走吧，你在这儿待着，怕是那家伙永远都不会再营业了……
E: You should leave — if you stay here that guy might not ever sell to us again...

C: （那个卖药的家伙，好像表现得特别心虚……）
E: (That medicine seller sure shut up shop in a hurry...)

C: 能做出这种事…足以证明他们不是什么纯粹的「互助会」。
E: Any organization doing something like that is interested in more than just "mutual aid..."

C: 好想修理那个嘴碎的家伙！
E: I'd like to straighten out that loudmouth myself!

C: 「重量级」赛事现已开放——您已经可以随意挑战全部赛事了！
E: The heavyweight league is now open, you can challenge all of the leagues now!

C: 得亏你记性好才能记住。
E: I am glad you have such a good memory.

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 嗯…也许是解开了「不世之材」，才突然福至心灵……
E: Well... Maybe it's the unraveling of the Unearthly Marvel that suddenly sparked my realization...

C: 亲人牺牲了自己的一切，供养我来这里，我难道就用…捡垃圾，来报答吗？
E: They have sacrificed everything for me so that I can come here. Do I repay them... by being a cleaner?

C: 它也像一面宝鉴，照出的拉明娜，能够摆脱他人的钳制，终于活得像个人样。
E: It also taught me a valuable lesson. Even Lamina can liberate herself from the constraints of others and live like a person.

C: 你回来啦，有结论了么？
E: You're back. Did you conclude the matter?

C: 她的名字叫做…呃？
E: Her name is... uh?

C: 哪、哪还有心思干活啊，呜……
E: How can I be in the mood to work? Woo...

C: 干得漂亮！
E: Great work!

C: （尝试抓住希莉儿的手）
E: (Try to grab onto Cyrille's hand)

C: 欸？发生什么事了……
E: Huh? What happened...?

C: 它是我的情感支持机器人。
E: It's my emotional support robot.

C: 将纸张翻面，你看到一些字迹娟丽却略显潦草的手稿。词句支离破碎，你只能大约猜测出这段文字与名为「阿尔乔姆」、「安娜」和「达米尔」的人有关。
E: You turn the sheet over and see some beautifully written but illegible scribbles. The words are all jumbled, but you do see that this passage is about three characters, respectively named Artem, Anna and Dalmir.

C: {NICKNAME}，你，啊…气死我了！你不给我我就要抢了！给我拿来——
E: {NICKNAME}, ahhhh... You gotta be kidding me! If you don't give it back to me right now, I'll... I'll have to take it back! Give it to me.

C: 谢天谢地，总算到头了…
E: Thank God, it's over...

C: …这里和印象中相比好像没什么变化呢。
E: ...this place doesn't seem to have changed much from what I remember.

C: 再见，哥哥。希望你还记得爸爸的教诲。
E: So long, brother. Hope you don't forget dad's teaching.

C: （下层区人想一夜暴富，还有别的途径吗？值得留意……）
E: (If people in the Underworld want to get rich, what options do they have? This is noteworthy...)

C: 还是先从熟面孔开始吧，我记得有几个人平时一直在这附近放风…就从他们开始问起吧。
E: We can start with people we already know. I remember lots of folks like to relax around the plaza. Let's head there first.

C: 我是华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，莱姆士汀家族第二十五任家主。很荣幸有机会与你交谈！
E: I am Wallace Cambridge Limestein, the <unbreak>25</unbreak>th head of the Limestein family. I am honored to make your acquaintance!

C: 呃…在大多数人眼里，「职业」和「琐碎杂事」还是有很大区别的……
E: Ugh... In the eyes of most people, there's a world of difference between "trivial matters" and a career.

C: 没办法，看来想通过这里就只能来硬的了！
E: Guess we'll have to do this the hard way!

C: 猛地一下破门而入！
E: Break down the door with a bang!

C: 什么，五十万？！就凭你小子这点口才，能谈成这种价码？！
E: What? <unbreak>500,000</unbreak>!? No offense kid, but I can't see you haggling that kinda number...

C: （拒绝）你别想收买我！
E: (Reject) You think I can be bought?

C: 我也和你好久没见了啊！
E: I haven't seen you in a long time either!

C: 在大守护者可可利亚上任以前，筑城者们始终没有放松对壁外的探索——科学考察队则承担了这个危险的任务。
E: Before Supreme Guardian Cocolia took office, the Architects had never suspended exploration beyond the outer walls. And the scientific expeditionary team was entrusted with this dangerous task.

C: 虎克要去当那个支援…支……

E: In order to see Liangmu for the very last time, she donned the armor that could never be taken off.

C: 我是丹鼎司医士陆英，如你所见，也是个持明族人。我听闻大罪人的转世之身重返罗浮，想来见上一面，给个忠告。
E: I'm healer Luying of the Alchemy Commission — I'm a Vidyadhara too, as you can see. I'd heard the reincarnation of the great sinner has returned to the Luofu... and wanted to offer some advice.

C: 欸，小姐？
E: Ah!? Miss Bailu?

C: 明白。地衡司会立刻疏散群众，「追猎行动」即将开始。
E: Got it. The Realm-Keeping Commission will evacuate the residents, and the "Hunting Operation" will commence.

C: 原来是三月姑娘和瓦尔特先生，久仰久仰。辛苦各位先歇会儿啊，稍微等我一下。净砚！把那几张相片给我拿来！
E: Miss March, Mr. Yang, I've been looking forward to meeting you. Make yourselves comfortable. One moment, please... Jingyan! Get me the photos!

C: 我们那天想找个安静的地方练习一下新段子，没想到找的那个地方，总也没人去，有点年久失修…地上有个大坑。
E: There we were, looking for a spot to practice our new routine. We found a place eventually — a little dilapidated but nice and quiet... *sigh* Shame about the giant ditch.

C: 路上一定要当心啊，不要再掉进沟里了。
E: Watch your step — wouldn't want to find ourselves in another ditch now, would we?

C: 然后他去了三余书肆，没有买书。离开书肆之后，就钻进了一个小角落。
E: Then he goes to Spare Time Book Shop, but doesn't buy anything. Finally, he leaves and turns a corner into a dark alley.

C: 我继续尝试修复丢失的影像，如果有什么新进展，会联系各位的。
E: I'll keep trying to recover the lost footage. I'll contact you if there's a breakthrough.

C: 确实不太好，下次别这样了。
E: It was a bit of a goof, huh...

C: 嗯…嗯？什么情况？
E: Wait, what?

C: （即便罗刹可以解开门锁，他进去的目的是什么呢？）
E: (Even if Luocha was able to unlock the door, what was his goal?)

C: 咳，晴霓小姐，这是你的家务事，我不便置喙。但是，我可以说些亲身体验——
E: Ahem... Miss Qingni, these are family matters, I'm not sure it's my place to comment. However, in my personal experience...

C: 二位恩公对我真是太好了，下次一定要请你们吃很多好吃的！
E: You're too kind, benefactors. I'll treat you to something better than mung bean soda next time!

C: 瓦尔特先生真是博学多识！
E: You're so smart, Mr. Yang!

C: 当然了，你们来此也是因为驭空司舵对这么做的理由绝口不提。
E: ...but naturally, you are here because you fear that Helm Master Yukong would decline to answer.

C: 晴霓，我其实很明白你的心情。我会当做什么都不知道地离开——在领导隐私曝光的时刻不在场，这也是咱职场人最基本的素养了。
E: ...I can understand your position, Qingni. I'll take my leave and pretend I didn't see anything. After all, it's an unwritten rule that subordinates should be absent when their superior's privacy is exposed.

C: 在星海之间像一叶孤舟似的漂游，一些人称之为「孤独」，但我们更愿意称之为「自由」。
E: To float like a single leaf in the fathomless stellar sea... Some called it "loneliness," but we called it "freedom."

C: 是啊！帝弓司命的浩荡神恩，只用一击就荡平了那群孽物！可仅为了阻挡它们的前进，我们就付出了几十万条生命的代价！
E: Yes! The mighty blessing of the Reignbow Arbiter annihilated all abominations in a single strike! But we had to pay with the blood of hundreds of thousands of soldiers just to halt their advance!

C: 幸好半夏她没有看到这封信。
E: It's lucky Banxia didn't see the letter.

C: 你的选择是这样吗？接受我的请求，来帮助我？
E: So... was this your choice? To respond to my request for help?

C: 那么，我会再问你相同的问题。并非我想要纠缠不休，而是我深深明白，在这看似广大的世界里，真正的选择从不存在，也没有意义。
E: Well, let me ask you the same question again. It's not that I can't let it go, it's just that I deeply understand that in this seemingly vast world, real choices never exist and have no meaning.

C: 来到仙舟之后，他的魔阴身发作得非常猛烈，一度到了我的「言灵」也无法压制的地步。这种状况下，他是没法进行星际旅行的。
E: After we arrived on the Xianzhou, the mara in him flared up so violently that even my Spirit Whisper couldn't suppress it. He's not fit for interstellar travel in this state.

C: （咦？我…是怎么看待卡芙卡的？）
E: (Huh? What do I... think about Kafka?)

C: 我为什么能容纳星核？
E: How am I able to host a Stellaron?

C: 罗浮兵卒竟敢对元帅无礼！
E: A Cloud Knight pawn dares to speak like this to the Marshal!?

C: 刃就在后面，提防他的自愈能力！
E: Blade is right here. Be careful of his regenerative ability!

C: 喝！你们一个也休想逃走。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: Hah! None of you will get away. Everyone, take them down!

C: （拳头说话。）
E: (Talk to the fist.)

C: 可恶，你俩就不能骗骗我。咱还以为自己坚持运动卓有成效呢。
E: Ugh, can't you two humor me once in a while? I thought all that working out was finally paying off...

C: 当我见证「丰饶」陨落时，也许你和应星都将得到真正的解脱。再见了，饮月。
E: Maybe, when I witness the fall of the Abundance, you and Yingxing will find true release. Goodbye, Imbibitor Lunae.

C: 即便因为龙师的操弄，你从未有过真正的轮回蜕生……
E: ...even if the Preceptors' interference denied you a true rebirth...

C: 与此同时，鳞渊境深处，显龙大雩殿中……
E: Meanwhile, in the Dragonvista Rain Hall, Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 而认罪伏法，则是畏惧惩罚。银河虽大，我区区一介行商，想必逃不过整个联盟的追捕。
E: It is through fear of punishment that I am choosing to surrender. The galaxy is a vast place, but I am merely a wanderer. It would be silly of me to think I could outrun the Alliance.

C: 一枚玉扣静静躺在地上，浅绿的纹理闪过一抹亮彩，在空气中勾勒出一名少年的身形。
E: A jade tracer lying on the ground. Its light green vein flashes out an image of a teenager in the air.

C: 小弟弟，你剑术不错哦。
E: You are quite the swordmaster, young man.

C: 「加派几个人」…嘿，瞧不起谁呢。
E: "Dispatch a few knights..." Hmph, how incapable does he think I am?

C: 听起来很麻烦…
E: Sounds like one big headache to me...

C: 听起来很危险…
E: Sounds pretty dangerous...

C: 咱们出发吧，这里人太多，不宜久留。
E: Good, then let's make haste — there are too many people here to linger.

C: 看来只能灭口了…
E: Looks like I'll have to make sure no one finds out...

C: 那你现在想怎样？
E: What's your next plan?

C: 好，就知道信得过你…那我可就把这条命托付给你了啊！
E: Good. I know I could trust you... My life is in your hands!

C: 这位云骑壮士呢？
E: And you, Cloud Knight?

C: 我不知道。据说有几万人之巨。
E: I don't know. I've heard our members are in the tens of thousands.

C: 你不是云骑吗？
E: Aren't you a Cloud Knight?

C: 放心吧大叔！我会保你周全的！
E: But don't worry! I'll keep you safe!

C: 那东西…看样子不想让咱们过去啊。我看看，我上去吼两声，应该能让它退下吧？
E: ...Doesn't look like it wants to let us through. Do you think if I yell at it I could scare it off?

C: …明日愁来明日愁嘛。
E: ...Tomorrow comes worry, let it come tomorrow.

C: 换句话说，在穷观阵推演所构筑的记忆宫殿里，能依靠的只有你自己。
E: In other words, inside the memory palace that the Matrix constructs, the only person you'll be able to count on is yourself.

C: 符玄小姐？是你吗？
E: Miss Fu Xuan? Is that you?

C: 不要回忆，这于你无益。
E: Leave your memories in the past — they have no place in the present.

C: 扭曲这段经历的力量…很靠近了。
E: The force that's distorting this experience... is nearby.

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 无名客登上列车的那一刻，就意味着重获新生，我们脚下的将是一条永不回头的道路。
E: The moment a Nameless boards the Express, a new life begins. We set out on a new road, never to return.

C: 三月七和符玄向你讲述了刚才发生的一切。你也向她们讲述了关于「信使」的事。
E: March and Fu Xuan try their best to recount everything that just happened. You also tell them about the Messenger.

C: 我一天也就五十块零花钱。
E: I don't have much money on me right now.

C: 不行，这把剑可是含光……
E: No! This sword was forged by Hanguang...

C: 含光是老朽疼爱的徒弟，也是自应星之后焰轮铸炼宫里罕有的匠作天才。
E: Hanguang was my beloved disciple, a rare genius not seen in the Flamewheel Forge since Yingxing.

C: 那就别捣乱！
E: Then stop joking around!

C: 大毫执事官，骑士先生在哪？
E: Official Dahao, where can we find that knight?

C: 那你最是清楚，仅是一次触碰，我不会夺走任何人的理智。
E: Well, you know best that a single touch won't snatch away anyone's sanity.

C: 我不想成为一柄杀人的剑。
E: I don't want to be a sword that brings death.

C: 真是美丽的名字！不知道你是否听说过纯洁无瑕的伊德莉拉女神的圣名……
E: What a beautiful name! I wonder if you have ever heard the holy name of the pure and flawless Goddess Idrila...

C: 要欣赏这出戏剧，你只能凑上台前，站到聚光灯下，看一切围着你手舞足蹈——跟我走吧，这里才是最好的观众席！
E: If you want to appreciate this drama, you have to stand up under that spotlight as you take the stage and watch the dancing envelop you — come with me, this is the best seat in the house!

C: 收到如此直接的挑衅，我也多少被激起了些好胜心呢。
E: Such a direct act of provocation is enough to get my competitive side worked up too.

C: 二位想知道什么尽管开口。
E: If there's anything you'd like to know, please ask away.

C: 救命啊，这笑话真的太冷了……
E: Somebody save me from this cringe joke...

C: 于是她偷走佐罗的领带，将钟珊的戒指含入口中，踩在小板凳上，在阿佑的店里悬梁自尽！唯一的目的就是嫁祸三人。
E: And so she stole Lefton's tie, placed Zhongshan's ring in her mouth, stepped up onto the stool, and hanged herself from a beam in Wright's shop! And her motive was to try and frame all three of them.

C: 两名猎犬家系的保镖保护着犯罪现场，确保不会有任何无关人员靠近。
E: The two Bloodhound guards are protecting the crime scene, ensuring no one unrelated to the matter is able to get near.

C: 是可以用心托付的人。哼，本座可不像那位将军。各位并非太卜司门人，岂可随意使唤？
E: It's nice to have people I can entrust with difficult matters. I'm not like the general, and you don't even belong to my commission — I certainly won't be bossing you around.

C: 这里该是「界寰阵」了。听说这座阵基是专用来调取「空间」相关的信息。
E: This must be the Spatial Terminal. They say this terminal is designed to retrieve information related to space. You probably could've guessed that...

C: 接下来，我会审问卡芙卡。位于阵心的人，或许会感受到一些…冲击。
E: Now, to interrogate Kafka. Those of you in the core may feel a few... impacts.

C: 不，再等等。
E: Not quite.

C: 开玩笑，我可是此道高手。
E: Are you kidding? I'm an expert now.

C: 结果，不死的诅咒污染了他们。而「巡猎」出现，一箭斫断建木。从此，为了令不死诅咒自星海断绝，联盟便随「巡猎」追逐着药师的痕迹。
E: ...But immortality turned out to be a curse for the Xianzhou. That's when The Hunt appeared — firing an arrow and felling the Ambrosial Arbor. Ever since, the Alliance has followed The Hunt in pursuit of Yaoshi, erasing the curse of immortality from the universe along the way.

C: 星核侵蚀诸处，却绕过神策府、幽囚狱两大机要，显然别有图谋。敌人如此谋划，定然掌握罗浮内部情报，故内患将出。想明白这两点没什么难的……
E: The Stellaron corrosion continues to flood into the ship, and yet it bypassed both the Seat of Divine Foresight and The Shackling Prison... there is forethought here — our enemy must have had access to Luofu intelligence for things to unfold in this way. It is evident now...

C: 啥也别说了，得令。
E: Orders received, General.

C: 连里面是何情况都不晓得就闯进去，小女子觉得多少有些鲁莽。
E: It seems more than a little reckless to charge in when we don't know what's ahead of us.

C: …不是，救人这么单纯的事儿哪那么多心眼……
E: ...It's not like that. You're making this too complicated...

C: 这是代号「匣里流光」的机关装置。
E: It's a mechanical device code-named the Luminflux Pyxis.

C: 两包零食？不错啊，拿出来给我们哥儿几个看看吧。
E: Snacks? Not bad, let's see them.

C: 要打也是先打你！
E: If it's a fight you want, you're getting it first!

C: （情况有些怪异，还是去神策府找青镞商量一下吧。）
E: (This doesn't seem right, I'd better talk to Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight.)

C: 你向青镞讲述了与丹枢之间发生的一切。
E: You recount everything that happened between you and Dan Shu to Qingzu.

C: 你很谨慎，这非常好。切记不要让私人情感影响了你的判断。
E: You're prudent, and that's a good trait to have. Just try not to let your emotions cloud your judgment.

C: 我不好吃，去吃那个谛听。
E: I don't taste good. Go eat that Diting.

C: 不过，既然把这些机器当成生命，各位少不得亲手救治一下他们，让他们「起死回生」。
E: Since you regard these machines as living things, you need to at least administer treatment and bring them back to life.

C: 钟珊蹲下身，检查了一下几台机兵的状况。
E: Zhongshan crouches down to examine the automatons.

C: 打她啊，打我干嘛？
E: Why don't you let the automatons attack her instead?

C: 笨蛋，冬妮娅小姐可是放生帮的大善人！福报等身，岂能遭遇这样的飞来横祸？
E: Are you in your right mind? Miss Tonya is a Benevolent One of the Unshackled! How can we make her suffer when she has accumulated so many merits?

C: 走咯，攒功德去咯～
E: Let's go and get some merits!

C: （期待地搓手）
E: (Rubbing your hands in anticipation)

C: 放心，钟珊走了…
E: Don't worry. Zhongshan is gone...

C: 她不是你的朋友吗，我们都以为，你请她来做说客，想加入放生帮，不就是这么一回事吗？在她带你来之前，我们根本就不认识她。
E: Isn't she your friend? We thought she was there to help you persuade us to let you join the Unshackled. Wasn't it the case? We didn't know her at all before she brought you here.

C: 恚炎的力量这么强大，为何却如此轻易地愿意将自己分裂开来？
E: If Furynox is so powerful, why would they allow themself to break apart so easily?

C: 家人啊，看破不说破。这条视频文案是花钱请西衍先生帮我写的，能不专业吗？
E: Ugh, man, is it that obvious? I paid Mr. Xiyan to write it up for me. Sounded a little too professional, huh?

C: 深呼吸！小桂子，冷静！深呼吸！欸，能不能让我和这、这个尾巴大爷再聊两句？
E: Deep breaths, Little Gui, deep breaths...! Ahem, c—can I have a small chat with this... "Mr. Tail?"

C: 我已经找到离开这里的线索了…
E: I've already found clues that can get me out of here...

C: 是你啊，浮烟。躲在傀儡的身体里玩腹语，还真符合你这杂碎一贯的操行。
E: Cirrus... it's you. Still a fan of your pathetic ventriloquist act, I see.

C: 要不你也去安慰她两句吧？
E: Why don't you go say something nice to her?

C: 情况吾已明了，不过眼下暂时不是操心浮烟的时候。绥园已被某个更强大的岁阳拖入了幻境，前去镇伏的冥差们也都已失去音信。
E: I understand. This isn't the time to deal with Cirrus. Fyxestroll Garden has been dragged into a powerful illusion by an even mightier heliobus, and the spiritfarers who went to suppress it have lost contact with me.

C: 今日善举，十王定当感念。拜托了。
E: The Ten Lords will not forget your acts of kindness. Thank you.

C: 哦～没想到你说起狠话的样子还挺有模有样的嘛。
E: Oh-ho? Sounds like someone finally learned to talk tough.

C: 明白。
E: Okay.

C: 是啊，咱们会再见面的。
E: ...We will meet again.

C: 原来如此。不必害怕，藿藿对吾知根知底，足以辨别真假了。
E: I see. Do not be afraid. Huohuo knows me well — she will be able to discern me from the counterfeits.

C: 燎原碎裂后最强大的碎片，没想到多年过去之后，竟还有如此实力。
E: It's the most powerful fragment of Ignamar's demise. Who would have guessed it still contained so much power after so many years...?

C: …抱歉，突然说了些莫名其妙的话…我想到有几件服饰挺适合您的，想看看吗？
E: ...Apologies for suddenly spouting such strange words... I have a few outfits that I think would be perfect for you. Would you care to take a look?

C: 这件大衣需要五十个梦境织工耗费三十个系统时的时间织成，相比那些速成的产品，它拥有令人难以置信的细节。
E: This overcoat took fifty Dreamscape weavers thirty system hours to thread together. Other mass-manufactured products pale in comparison to its astounding artistic details.

C: 柯柯娜小姐生病了吗？
E: Is Miss Cocona ill?

C: 啊，就是一种配方十分特别的苏乐达——专门为像柯柯娜这样的人准备的，全梦境独一份的特别饮品。
E: Ah, it's a very special recipe of SoulGlad, specially prepared for those like Cocona — a special drink unique in the Dreamscapes.

C: 不，从事音乐相关的工作。
E: No, I wish to work in something related to music.

C: 成为店长的这一路，我学会了很多令自己厌恶的品质。我不断地背叛自我…以交换他人眼中的成功。
E: On the path to becoming a shop owner, I discovered many inner qualities that made me hate myself. I betrayed myself time and again... in exchange for what is so-called success in the eyes of others.

C: 您的生活，大概过得很充实、很热闹吧？
E: Your life, I bet it was fulfilling and lively, no?

C: 目送柯柯娜离开。
E: You watch Cocona leave.

C: 我…{F#女士}{M#先生}，我有些紧张，膝盖有些软……
E: I... {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I'm nervous, and I can feel my knees going weak...

C: …莱斯利先生？您怎么了？
E: ...Mr. Lesley? What's wrong?

C: 别怕，这次钱我出。下次你放学就来我家，我们一起看。
E: Don't worry. I'll cover it this time. Come to my place after school next time and we can watch it together.

C: 你大概知晓，无论自己制造多大的响动，都不会对这个空间中的罗伯特产生实质影响——但你依然希望尽量轻柔地完成这一系列行动。
E: You are aware that no matter how much noise you make in this space, it is unlikely to have any real effect on Robert... But you still wish to complete this operation gently and carefully.

C: 接下来，为了确保飞艇的正常运营，您需要聘请一位可靠的大副，由大副来统筹空艇杂务。
E: Next, to ensure the airship's proper operation, you need to hire a reliable first mate to organize its daily affairs.

C: 噢，匹诺康尼人尽皆知的形象，这可以节省一笔宣传费用。
E: Oh, by using a well-known image in Penacony. This will save a fortune in promotional costs.

C: 大大方方地用我的形象吧。
E: Proudly use my image!

C: 啊…您这模样怎么长的？{F#好美}{M#好帅}的一张脸。这半身像做得真不错，还原了您起码七成的美貌，看着还挺威严！
E: Ah... How did you even get this face? It's so {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}. This bust's quality is outstanding — it's managed to capture at least <unbreak>70%</unbreak> of your visage. So stately!

C: （是时候开始整顿匹诺康尼的职场环境了…酒店大堂就是我的第一站。）
E: (It's time to straighten out Penacony's workplace conditions... This hotel's lobby will be my first stop.)

C: 你绝对不会允许这种事发生。你身为大堂经理的尊严绝不会被一部冰冷、丑陋的机器夺走。
E: You will not allow such a thing to happen. Your pride as the lobby manager will not be usurped by a cold, ugly machine.

C: 「砸烂它！」——腰间的球棍如此向你低语到，你把手伸向它——
E: "Smash it to smithereens!" Your baseball bat strapped on your waist whispers to you, and you reach for it...

C: 「啪」——你一脚踹掉了终端机的电源插头，为那些被夺走美好前程的折纸大学酒店管理专业应届毕业生报了一箭之仇。
E: *thud* You dislodge the power supply plug with a swift kick, dealing vengeance for the Paperfold University's hospitality graduates whose bright futures were stolen away.

C: （又来了个皮皮西人？）
E: (Another Pepeshi!?)

C: 以你的资历，P<unbreak>25</unbreak>…不对，起码P<unbreak>30</unbreak>起步，直接进驻庇尔波因特总部。住宿、三餐全包，所有差旅走公费报销，如何？
E: With your credentials, P<unbreak>25</unbreak>... No, P<unbreak>30</unbreak> at least, posted straight to Pier Point HQ. Meals, accommodation, and travel expenses are all reimbursed — how about it?

C: 我也不知道具体是谁，但是邀请我来的那条信息我还留着呢。
E: I don't actually know who, but I still have the invite message saved.

C: …然后，等我旅行归来的那天，我想把它唱给流梦礁的孩子们听。
E: ...Then, I'll sing the songs to the children in Dreamflux Reef on the day I return.

C: 必须想办法让青雀意识到你就是她的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}{NICKNAME}——该怎么做呢？
E: You have to find a way to let Qingque know you are {NICKNAME}, her {F#sister}{M#brother}-in-arms. What should you do?

C: 污秽的巨人族啊，你们因何要打破这「四尺圣堂」的宁静？你们受何种殃孽驱使，要将苦难传播给这世上的人？
E: You filthy giants, why must you disrupt the peace of the Four-Foot Hall? What kind of vile belief compels you to spread misery to the people of this world?

C: 看来你深谙取胜之匙——没错，在这个时代，组成银河战舰才是赢家正道。
E: You have grasped the key to victory. That's right, the key to winning in this era is to combine yourselves into a cosmic battleship before crushing your opponents.

C: 对我来说这可是件大好事…您知道为什么吗？因为这样一来，我就有时间多刷刷帝垣琼玉的视频，增长牌技了。
E: It's actually a blessing in disguise for me... Why, you ask? Because now I'll have more time to watch Celestial Jade videos and improve my skills.

C: 看来是等不到列车家长组了？
E: Looks like our Express family aren't going to make it in time?

C: 你在竞锋舰上向呼雷刺出的制胜一剑已臻于妙境，确实不俗。
E: The finishing blow you landed on Hoolay on the Skysplitter was masterful, truly remarkable.

C: 你怎么突然这么消极？
E: Why are you so self-pitying all of a sudden?

C: 不对，这是我能为师傅做到的最后一件事情了。我必须做到！我一定要做到！
E: No, this is the last possible thing I can do for my master. I have to do it! I'm definitely gonna do this!

C: 唉，对咱们这样没什么天分的人，学业艰辛，我是深有体会啊。{NICKNAME}和我会想办法帮你的。
E: Alas, I have a profound understanding of how hard it is for untalented students such as ourselves to study. {NICKNAME} and I will come up with a way to support you.

C: 你说的对，我整天说着「师傅的梦想」。但我已经快对「梦想」这个词感到麻木了。
E: You're right. I've been talking about my master's dream all day. But I'm quickly growing numb to the concept of this word, "dream."

C: 这一路上怎么全是入魔机巧，都交给你了。
E: Why are there all these Entranced Ingenia along the way? You take them, here.

C: 这不是我自己说过的话嘛…对啊，老师明明将那么重要的时间赠予我，我为什么还在这里一动不动呢？
E: Isn't that what I've said before? Why am I not doing anything here when my master has given me his precious time?

C: 我不是这个意思…抱歉，我撒谎了，我确实是想躲着你们二位的。
E: That's not what I mean... I'm sorry for lying. In fact, I was trying to avoid you two.

C: 按你所说，莱恩师傅是孤身一人在仙舟过世的，并无亲友来料理后事。那么他的灵魂、也就是他的意识数据，应该会被收入因果殿里。
E: According to what you said, Master Ryan passed away alone on Xianzhou without any relatives or friends taking care of his funeral. In that case, his soul — which is the data of his consciousness — should be stored in the Hall of Karma.

C: 法眼预见了这个结局。虽然有些伤感，甚至有点残酷，但这是最好的做法。
E: The omniscia has predicted this. Although it's saddening, or even somewhat cruel, it's the best solution.

C: 呵呵，本座倒是觉得，莱恩老师授业解惑，尽了自己最后的导师职责，是个不错的老师啊。
E: Hehe, I see Master Ryan as a good teacher. After all, he has already done his duty as a teacher by answering his student's questions.

C: （希儿和奥列格…他们俩在聊什么呢？）
E: (Seele and Oleg... I wonder what they're talking about?)

C: 反正后来我们也没真打起来。两个「地火」的干部在俱乐部里大打出手…那场面怎么想都有点离谱吧？
E: It's not like we actually fought. Two senior members of Wildfire duking it out in the Fight Club? That would be bad form.

C: 好，那就这么定了！这次修炼的地点就选在史瓦罗的地盘——你们之前干的大事我都有耳闻，你俩对那边的环境应该熟悉得很吧？
E: Great! That's settled then! The training is on Svarog's turf. I heard about your achievements — you probably know that place like the back of your hand, right?

C: 这就准备好了？那我们出发！
E: That was fast! Let's do it!

C: …那次他差点就没挺过来，连着昏厥了两三天。我在他病床前守着，心里火急火燎的，又内疚又着急。结果，你猜…他醒来以后第一句话是什么？
E: ...He almost didn't make it — he was unconscious for two or three days. I sat next to his bed, anxious and guilty. Guess what he said to me after he woke up?

C: 可就在前几天，我最满意的两个机器人伙伴突然不见了！我平时出去都会把它们留在帐篷里，这聚落周围也都是熟人，以前从来没出过类似的事……
E: But a few days ago, two of my robots suddenly disappeared! They were my pride and joy. I usually leave them in the tent when I head out — everyone in the settlement knows each other. This has never happened before...

C: 当真？要是有什么漏洞，你们可得及时指出来啊。
E: Seriously? You've gotta tell me if there are holes in my logic.

C: 得想办法把这小家伙修好——{NICKNAME}，能帮把手吗？
E: We need to fix this little guy up — {NICKNAME}, can you lend a hand?

C: 哈哈，虽然我刚认识你没多久，但是你这股精神头我很欣赏！
E: Hahaha, I like your spirit! Shame I didn't run into you sooner.

C: <size=36>「无敌的磐岩冠军——」</size>
E: <size=36>"...the peerless Boulder champion..."</size>

C: 一切顺利……
E: Smooth as you like...

C: 卢卡哥哥，你好！
E: Mister Luka, hello!

C: 妈妈说，有个叫史瓦罗的家伙一直拦着我们，不准我们回上层区看看……
E: Mom said there's someone called Svarog who keeps stopping us from going back to the Overworld...

C: 卢卡应该会劝她回镇上去吧？毕竟那家伙很在意小孩子的安全。
E: Luka should tell her to go back to town — he's always worrying after the kids' safety.

C: 对了彦卿，下一步咱们该去哪？
E: By the way, Yanqing, where are we headed next?

C: 丹恒随时奉陪。
E: You're more than welcome, General Huaiyan.

C: （这阴阳怪气的声音实在耳熟…似乎在<color=#dbc291ff>金人巷</color>里听到过？）
E: (That toxic voice sounds familiar... Haven't I heard it before in <color=#dbc291ff>Aurum Alley</color>?)

C: 你可别小瞧仙舟的技术。检查过程就算是把货物拆成零件，工造司的人也能给你拼回去。
E: Don't underestimate Xianzhou technology. Even if they need to dismantle your cargo, the Artisanship Commission can easily put it back together.

C: 呵？想放低姿态来博取我的同情？我身为公司的专员，你觉得我的胸膛里还剩下一毫克的同情心吗？起开！
E: Huh? Attempting to play the humility card to gain my sympathy? I'm an IPC specialist. Do you honestly think I have even a shred of sympathy left in me? Just get lost already!

C: 原本以为各位是可以讲理的文明人，但现在看来，仙舟人还是不能理解何谓商业精神。
E: I thought you were reasonable and civilized, but now it seems you Xianzhou folks just don't understand the basics of business.

C: 等等！
E: Wait a minute!

C: 飞…霄？莫非你就是爷爷时常提起的那位……
E: Fei... Feixiao? Grandpa always talks about you... Could it be that you are...

C: 真、真的吗？
E: R—really?

C: 既然彦卿也答应了，那么剩下的便只有三月小姐一个点头。
E: Now that Yanqing has agreed too, it all comes down to Miss March giving her nod.

C: 你学剑也好，这样我就不用担心你每次射中我屁股了。
E: It'll be great learning swordplay. That way, I won't have to worry about you accidentally shooting me in the butt all the time.

C: 因为…怀炎先生希望我们在罗浮仙舟驻留一段时日。
E: Because... General Huaiyan wants us to stick around on the Luofu for some time.

C: 时候也不早了…
E: It's getting late...

C: 状况还算稳定。不知你还记不记得，当年在战阵中救起我的那位军医？
E: Still stable, I suppose. Do you still remember the medic who saved me in battle?

C: 一只机巧鸟，双眼幽光闪烁，它的脑袋不时颤动，看向空无一物的地方。
E: You see a cycrane twitching its head every so often, staring into space with a ghostly glint in its eyes.

C: 咳，是医士！不想当医士的厨子算不上好的将军幕僚。算了，你就当我是个厨子吧。
E: I'm a healer! But anyway, a cook who isn't interested in health doesn't make for a good advisor. Fine, call me a cook if you want.

C: 怎么突然跟小孩较起劲来了？
E: Why suddenly getting all serious with kids?

C: 那之后，彦卿不得不低下头去，将这些碎片一片片拾起、拼合，试图重新拼出过去那个快乐的自己。但无论怎么做，我似乎都无法再现往日的心境了。
E: After that, I had to pick up the pieces and try to put myself back together. But no matter how hard I tried, I couldn't seem to find my old, happy self again.

C: 趁着这几名可疑的「官方人员」暂时离去，你如履薄冰地来到一个箱子旁，试图钻进去。
E: Seizing the moment when the suspicious "official personnel" temporarily step away, you tread on thin ice to reach a crate, attempting to slip inside.

C: 不管他们是谁，把他们的行动都拍下来作为证据。
E: Never mind who they are, let's just film them.

C: 你打定主意不对这个问题发表意见。
E: You've decided to withhold your opinion on this question.

C: 飞霄微微一笑，也不动怒。
E: Feixiao offers a slight smile, displaying no anger.

C: 但愿你行在与帝弓为友的道路上。
E: I hope you'll walk alongside the Reignbow's path as a friend.

C: 这名武弁似乎十分清楚你是谁与你的来意。她侧身让路，示意你踏入幽囚狱的入口。
E: The warden seems to recognize you and understand your purpose of visit. She steps aside and motions for you to enter The Shackling Prison.

C: 既然你有逃离的计划，那么说说，接下来该怎么做才能离开这艘大到没边的天船？
E: Since you have an escape plan, tell me, what's our next move to get off of this ridiculously large ship?

C: 去吧！
E: Go!

C: 太好了，这东西还在。
E: Good, it's still here.

C: 务必，务必将消息递往外界。
E: Make sure you deliver the news to the outside world.

C: 我们必须在步离逃犯离开前封死大门。
E: We must seal the entrance before the borisin fugitives get out.

C: 幽囚狱里暴动了…幸好我们被狱卒保护了起来，等来了云骑军的救援。
E: There was a revolt in The Shackling Prison... Fortunately, we were protected by the guards until the Cloud Knights arrived to rescue us.

C: 看得出来，灵砂小姐对我有怨气。药王秘传死灰复燃一事，景元责无旁贷。至于呼雷这头孽物为何只被镇伏在牢狱中…我也可以为你解释一二。
E: I understand if you hold grudges against me, Miss Lingsha. I take the blame for the resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. As for why Hoolay was only imprisoned... I can shed some light on that too.

C: 巨大的机器重回沉寂，像是流干了血的伤兽，再也无力动弹。
E: The giant machine goes silent again. Like a wounded beast drained of blood, it can no longer move.

C: 元帅没有将呼雷留在曜青的原因，就在眼前这台机器上。
E: The reason why the marshal didn't leave Hoolay on the Yaoqing lies in the very mech in front of us.

C: 其一，以步离劫狱者逃离幽囚狱的路线来看，应当是有人将幽囚狱的地形透露给了他们。在幽囚狱的修建过程中，持明族出力不少。
E: Well, it seems that someone provided the attackers with a map of The Shackling Prison. And considering the Vidyadhara's involvement in the prison's construction, it raises suspicions about their role in this.

C: 幽囚狱的消息一旦传开，云骑会封锁所有港口。你们以为自己逃出了监狱，但你们只是被困在「罗浮」这个牢笼中。
E: Once the news about the prison break spreads, the Cloud Knights will close all the ports. You may think you've escaped the prison, but you're just trapped in another cage known as the Luofu.

C: 是，不过不止我一个人…
E: Yes, but we have several passengers...

C: 没有的事。倒是天舶司正在清空航道，给登上竞锋舰的星槎让路。这样一来，咱们的船在逃离时会变得更显眼。
E: No, not at all. Instead, the Sky-Faring Commission is clearing routes to prioritize starskiffs heading to the Skysplitter. This will make our ships more noticeable when we try to escape.

C: （有人在盯着我…不行，我不能跑得太远。）
E: (Someone is keeping an eye on me... No, I can't get too far away.)

C: 你来瞧瞧，这人是谁？
E: Come and take a good look. Who is this person?

C: 为此他牺牲了无数步离人与狐人的生命，注入长生主恩赐的泉水，在基因巫术的催动下，水中孕育了一个奇迹——「胎动之月」。
E: To achieve his goal, he sacrificed the lives of countless borisin and foxians, pouring them into the spring bestowed by the Master of Immortality. Through a form of genetic sorcery, the water gave birth to a miracle — the Lunar Embryo.

C: 我们收到了上级指示，为了避免无关人等干扰云骑检查，我们特地将这里封锁了起来，请你们理解我们的工作。
E: Yeah, we've received orders from the higher-ups, so we've blocked off this area to prevent any interference with our inspection. Thank you for your understanding.

C: 这就是「网开一面」么…？放任步离人逃走，然后顺着他的路线追猎。
E: Is this how you... "leave one side open"...? You let that borisin escape so you could track him.

C: 不错，因为没有谁比步离人更清楚「死亡」所能带来的价值。而像你这样见惯死亡的医士，简单的恐惧也吓阻不了你。
E: Yes, I did. As borisin, we understand the value of "death" more than anyone. And as a healer who has witnessed so much death, you won't be swayed by fear.

C: 吞噬你们的血肉，滋养我们的筋骨，粉碎你们的愿景，开辟我们的猎途；要让你们的死魂灵好好见证，未来属于我！
E: We will consume your flesh and blood, nourishing our own. We will crush your hopes and dreams, clearing a path for our hunt! Your feeble souls will witness a new future, a future that belongs to me!

C: 咳，咳！
E: Ahem!

C: 好啊，在别人问你的时候你不妨就这么大声说出来。
E: Alright! When people ask you, you might as well tell them this loud and clear.

C: 嗯…这只是普通的云骑阵刀。
E: Ah, yes... This is just a regular Cloud Knight devastator glaive.

C: 嗯嗯，「我不是参赛选手哦」，我明白啦。
E: Ah, it's saying "I'm not a contestant." Got it.

C: 你就别再继续知己知彼了，走吧，我想去看看擂场。
E: That's enough knowing the enemy for now. Come on, I want to see what the ring looks like.

C: 嗯…有什么想问的，可以抓紧问，不然「三月七的理智」就要回来了。
E: Hmm...If there's anything you want to ask, hurry up or March 7th's rationality will come back.

C: 他会没事的。云骑，搜索目标！
E: He will be fine. Cloud Knights, search for the target!

C: 你是朱明仙舟的？
E: Are you from the Xianzhou Zhuming?

C: 全是什么？
E: Would be what?

C: 乍一听到这么有冲击性的事实，还真是又自豪，又让人担心来着。
E: When I first heard the news, I was definitely proud, but also a little concerned...

C: 抱歉，这艘船上并没有你期待的观众——这儿的所有人，全都为你而来。
E: My apologies! The spectators that you were expecting aren't here... Everyone here actually came to see you.

C: 做师父的上阵，怎么能少得了我这个弟子呢！
E: If my masters are going to battle, how could they go without their disciple?

C: 答案，我早已告诉过你。
E: I've already told you the answer.

C: 亏你们几个能撑到现在。这场狩猎总算是圆满收场了，云骑军正在善后撤离中。
E: This hunt is finally over. Thank you for holding out so long. The Cloud Knights are withdrawing as we speak.

C: 我还能再打十个！
E: I could take on ten more!

C: 我确实败了，但这并不出乎我的意料。但你还是露面了，飞霄。
E: Yes, I was defeated, but this was not unexpected. And regardless, you still showed your face, Feixiao.

C: 喔？即便自称「高贵的龙脉」，我们自始至终也不过是直立行走的动物。种族存续是根本之事，我若不做兽行，持明怕是连人都做不得了！
E: Oh? Despite calling ourselves a "noble draconic bloodline," at our core, we're merely bipedal beasts. The survival of our kind is paramount. If I hadn't resorted to beastly actions, the Vidyadhara might not even exist!

C: 白露小姐，您贵为罗浮持明的龙尊，请告诉我，您此刻的想法。
E: Miss Bailu, as high elder of the Luofu Vidyadhara, please share your thoughts at this moment.

C: 云璃师父擅自跑出来的？
E: Did Master Yunli run out on her own?

C: 啊，时间不早了，我还要继续巡逻…回见。
E: Ah, it's getting late. I'll need to continue my rounds... See you around.

C: 说实话，我没什么参与感。
E: To be honest, I didn't feel too involved.

C: 没办法，朕只能独自巡逻啦！好在匹诺康尼治安很好，独行夜巷也不会有危险。
E: Alas, I'll have to make the rounds all by my lonesome self! Good thing Penacony's a super safe place, so safe that you won't even run into danger walking down a dark alley alone.

C: 陛下怎么变成小孩了？
E: Why has Your Majesty turned into a child?

C: 不久，那位叫做「琳儿玛」的年轻女子进入了王座室。
E: A short while later, a young woman named Lenamar enters the throne room.

C: 现在是讨论公平的时候吗？陛下，能救一个是一个啊！
E: Is this really the time to discuss fairness? Your Majesty, every life saved is a precious one!

C: 已经很久没人和我说过话了。有些…太久了。
E: It's been so long since I talked to someone. Far too long...

C: 你动作真快。
E: You're so efficient.

C: 正在计算……
E: Calculation in progress...

C: 疑问：你是否认定这是最稳妥的解决方案？
E: Question: Do you think this is a surefire solution?

C: 欢迎回来，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: Welcome back, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.

C: 他们一定早有准备，所以整个忆质迁徙的过程十分迅速——迅速到连查德威克弥留之际的自我意识都被保存了下来……
E: They must have prepared for it in advance, as the process took place right after his death, so fast that even his consciousness in his final moments was preserved...

C: 墙壁上的保险箱，不知道里面保存着什么。
E: One wonders what's inside the safe on the wall.

C: 好眼力。可惜，暂时还没到解密「折纸小鸟」的环节。
E: Good eye. Unfortunately, it's not time yet to solve the "Origami Bird" arc.

C: 只是一个称呼，不必在意——权力与地位会让人盲目，在非工作时间，我更希望别人能称呼我为「惠特克爵士」。
E: Please dispense with the formalities. Authority and power blind the soul. When it's after work hours, I much prefer people address me as Sir Whittaker.

C: …这是……
E: ...This is...

C: 据我所知，那孩子在来到隐夜鸫家系前，是一个流浪的星际难民。
E: From what I know, that child was a wandering interstellar refugee before he came to the Nightingale Family.

C: 谈判结束了，此后他们不会再牵连其他的筑梦师，也不会追究过去的恩怨。
E: The negotiations are over, they won't implicate other Dreamweavers nor will they be pursuing old grievances.

C: 又见面了，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: We meet again, {F#madam}{M#sir}.

C: 打起来，打起来~
E: Fight, fight, fight!

C: 说得轻巧。市场总共就那么大，哪儿还能容下更多摊位了？
E: Easier said than done. The market's only so big, how many more stalls can it hold?

C: 的确有公民认为，这种筛选不过是东道主的正当权利——我们有资格决定帮谁。
E: Some citizens do think that these conditions are but the authority of the host city — we have the right to decide who we help.

C: 疯王的眷属果然没那么容易退去。帕拉滕，你留在安全的地方；小友，待会我的身后就拜托你了。
E: Though expected, the Mad King's Kin are admittedly resilient. Palaten, you stay in a safe place. Young friend, I'll be counting on you to watch my back.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 我要了。
E: I'll take it.

C: 谢、谢谢{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}……
E: Th—Thank you, kind {F#lady}{M#man}...

C: （后来苏克提瑞斯邀请我详谈此事。在云石天宫的浴池里，我表达了<color=#dbc291ff>对外邦人的同情</color>。）
E: (Later, Soctires invited me to discuss this. I professed my <color=#dbc291ff>sympathies toward the outlanders</color> at the bath in the Marmoreal Palace.)

C: （现场有这么多人…或许我应该试着调动这些公民的情绪。）
E: (So many people present... Maybe I should try to appeal to the public's emotions.)

C: 派去义务劳动？
E: Assign him community service?

C: 钟表把戏…是什么东西？我不会呀！
E: Clockwork... What is that? I can't do that!

C: 唔，听起来挺好吃的？
E: Hm, that actually sounds good?

C: …或许你是对的，许多带来浪漫的东西，实际上都平凡甚至粗劣，但身陷在其中的人很难意识到这点，他们会将泥潭看作甘泉，将粗丝看作金线。
E: ...Perhaps you are right. Many of the things that bring romance to our lives are in fact so unremarkable they are almost crude. However, this is something that those who have fallen in love struggle to realize for themselves. They see a swamp as a sweet spring and rough twine as a golden thread.

C: 我至今为止的人生，只不过是为了那个还未开始的旅途做准备：参军攒钱，收集情报，还有…寻找愿与我同行的旅伴。
E: My entire life till this moment has been no more than making preparations for a journey I've yet to begin. I joined the army to earn money, I have gathered information, next... I must find someone willing to travel by my side.

C: 这样…就算是舞蹈了吗？
E: You... call that dancing?

C: 在石像破碎的巨响过后，气氛瞬间沉寂。欢笑退潮之后，泛起了低声私语的泡沫——
E: The sound of the statue shattering to the ground brought the entire atmosphere to dead silence. As the laughter faded, the bubbling of whispers began...

C: 不，凡人的口舌无法发出我们的言语……
E: No, a mortal tongue cannot pronounce our language...

C: 而你，你如今依然在刻法勒的宝座前显露着你石刻的颜面，那没有表情的颜面像是带着笑意。
E: And you, you bow before the throne of Kephale with your stone face. Your emotionless expression has almost a smile in its place.

C: 是我？这不好吧？
E: Me? But wouldn't that be wrong?

C: 它只在看到它的人眼中显现，只在相信它的人眼中璀璨。
E: Beauty is in the beholder's eyes, and only those that believe it will see it shine.

C: 旧日的悬锋城，一场失败的战争后……
E: The former Castrum Kremnos, after a defeat in battle...

C: 能挪动吗？
E: Is it possible to move it?

C: 一百万匹开拓力！你的球棒狠狠砸在雕像的头上——
E: Unleash a million horsepower worth of Trailblaze Power! You swing your ball bat and strike the statue's head with all your might —

C: 要找帕西提亚女士的话，她已经离开了，看她心事重重的样子，多半又是那个梦的缘故。
E: If you're looking for Lady Pasithea, she has left. Judging by her troubled look, it's likely caused by that dream.

C: 迷迷神情严肃，目光渗透向过去。不过，从你的视角看，它就只是在飘浮而已。
E: Mem has a serious expression, with a gaze that seems to penetrate into the past. But, from your perspective, it looks like it's just floating about.

C: 神谕是必要的，一旦我们失去神谕，雅努萨波利斯在同盟中的地位将荡然无存。
E: Prophecies are necessary. Once we lose the prophecies, Janusopolis' position in the alliance will be obliterated.

C: 再不济…我们还可以把那个女孩推上去。
E: If worse comes to worst... We can prop that girl up.

C: 就在不久以前，我还见过您的丈夫，那位总能凯旋的将士。可现在，贫穷竟也要沿着扎格列斯的讥笑笼罩住一个英雄的家庭。
E: Just a while ago, I met your husband, the warrior who always returned victorious. But now, even poverty shrouds a hero's family alongside Zagreus' mockery.

C: 听说，尼卡多利的军团和你们的城邦只剩不到三天的距离，他们可不会相信来自命运的预言。
E: I hear that Nikador's legion is but fewer than three days away from your city. They won't buy any contrived prophecies of destiny.

C: 沉默了这么多年，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}就这样回应我们？
E: After being silent for so many years, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} responded to us just like that?

C: 腐败衰亡的世界。
E: A corrupted and ailing world.

C: 我可能会成为学者。
E: I might have become a scholar.

C: 她还活着吗？在这个万物走向寂灭的时代。你向被自己背叛的欧洛尼斯祈祷，愿命运庇佑她的前路。
E: Is she still alive? In this era where all life heads towards quietus, you pray to Oronyx whom you betrayed, in hopes that destiny will bless her journey.

C: 不知从何时起，帕西提亚的身边已挤满了前来寻求谕示的市民，仿佛你们所在的并不是奥赫玛，而是过去的命运三相殿。
E: At some point, Pasithea found herself surrounded by citizens seeking an oracle. It felt as if you were no longer in Okhema, but transported to the Temple of the Three Fates in the past.

C: 都怪「毁灭」，孤儿院的孩子现在都不敢出门…不提了，你们打算聊什么？
E: The kids at the orphanage are too scared to even go outside now because of the Destruction... Never mind that. What did you want to talk about?

C: 假如我也是黄金裔就好了！像「捷足的赛法利娅」，每天值班结束就用神速力嗖地一下溜回家，躺在暖洋洋的被窝里……
E: If only I were a Chrysos Heir too! Like "Swift-Footed Cifera" I could just zoom home with godly speed after my shift and snuggle up in my cozy warm bed...

C: 师妹这么乐观，可真叫人欢喜。看来「乐观将军」是罗浮特色呀——你的访客到了，我也该走了。
E: Junior soror's optimism is truly delightful. Looks like "Optimistic General" is a Luofu specialty. Your visitor's here, so I should get going.

C: 此事需要天舶司伸出援手。去找驭空聊聊吧，本座会把前因后果转告她的。
E: This matter requires the Sky-Faring Commission's assistance. Go talk to Yukong, I will inform her of the full situation.

C: 我想问个私人问题：你对翁法罗斯的这趟旅途作何评价？
E: I'd like to ask you a personal question: What do you think about this journey to Amphoreus?

C: 无论狐人、天人还是持明，都有着超乎短生种的寿命。弊端之一，就是不易忘记。
E: Whether foxians, the Celestials, or the Vidyadhara, they all possess lifespans far beyond those of short-life species. One of the downsides is that it's not easy to forget.

C: …哎，瞧瞧我，在说些什么呢。星神也好，战事也罢，话题太过宏大，不应让它们消耗太多心神。
E: ...Ah, look at me, what am I saying? Be it the Aeons or the war, these topics are too grand. We shouldn't let them consume too much of our thoughts.

C: （叫好）。
E: (cheer)

C: 你无视了家具们的意见，决定相信自己。
E: You ignore the furniture's opinions and decide to trust yourself.

C: 你在这片梦中梦里度过了不知多久。当故事结束时，你内心的某簇情感也变得更加强烈，像一枚燃烧的火种。
E: You spent countless moments in this dream within a dream. As the story ended, a certain emotion in your heart grew stronger, like a burning ember.

C: 同伴，呜呜呜，危险，呜！
E: Companion. Wooo... Danger! Wooo!

C: 欸，怎么是折腾呢？年轻人多吃多干，一辈子才能没病没灾。
E: Hey, how is that ordering you around? Young people should eat more and work more, that's how you stay healthy and out of trouble.

C: 总感觉你好像学废了…
E: I get the feeling you've been led astray...

C: 学习就是我的全部爱好，我总觉得学的还不够多，要追上大家的脚步，我还差得远呢。
E: Learning is my only hobby. I can never feel like I have learned enough. I have a long way to go.

C: 原来这就是人类在虚拟世界里的社交吗？话题虽然很奇怪，但总体来说很有意思。
E: So that's how people socialize in a virtual setting? The topics are a bit weird, but they have me intrigued.

C: 她跟你们有仇吗？
E: Has she got a vendetta against you folks?

C: 错误编号<unbreak>00026</unbreak>，定位装置信号弱，无法读取指定位置。
E: Error code <unbreak>00026</unbreak>. Weak signal from positioning device. Unable to read location data.

C: 可是…我见到的是「星际和平家电」的售后人员诶？
E: But... it was the service staff from Interastral Peace Appliances who met me.

C: 究竟是谁修的我也不清楚，但还是谢谢您……
E: I don't know who exactly fixed the robots, but I should still thank you...

C: 当我再次醒来的时候，我躺在了一个陌生的实验室里。我的终端也在，一切功能正常，于是我便离开了那里，中间没有发生任何异常。
E: When I woke up again, I was lying in an unfamiliar lab. My terminal was there too. Everything was normal. So, I left that place, and nothing strange happened in the process.

C: 遇到马桶的位置。
E: Where did you encounter the toilet seat?

C: （得找到发色是<color=#dbc291ff>蓝色</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>棕色</color>的人。）
E: (I need to find people with <color=#dbc291ff>blue</color> hair and <color=#dbc291ff>brown</color> hair.)

C: 蓝色！
E: Blue!

C: 我没染成，总之浪费了你的一番心血，实在是不好意思。
E: I didn't end up dyeing my hair. I'm so sorry for wasting your efforts.

C: …听起来怪怪的。
E: ...That sounds weird.

C: 我真心希望人类在这个世界上不是孤独的存在…所以我想找到其它物种，想办法保护它们，或是与它们和谐共存。
E: I truly hope humans are not the sole existence in this world... That's why I want to find other species, and to try to protect them or live with them.

C: 毫无经验。
E: Poor. I have no experience.

C: 干巴巴的讨论永远比不上实际行动。走吧，我已经物色好了今天的拍照地点。
E: Meaningless discussion can never be compared to real action. Come on, I've found a photo spot for today.

C: 他很有钱…
E: He's rich...

C: 他只是想和你交朋友…
E: He just wants to be friends with you...

C: …意思是这里边没有法律纠纷，这位公子哥单纯地想和我交朋友？
E: So... there is no legal trouble, and this man just wants to be my friend?

C: 我相信，只要继续把持莱姆士汀家真诚的待人之道，本人有朝一日必定能友遍天下。
E: I believe that I will one day make friends all over the world as long as I continue to treat people with sincerity like all the Limesteins.

C: 一把矿镐落在这里，木柄上刻着「马克西姆」。
E: A mining pick with name "Maxime" on the wooden handle is left here.

C: 什、什么啊，你别胡说八道！鼹鼠党才不会干那种事！
E: N—Nonsense! The Moles wouldn't do that!

C: …「鼹鼠党」？那不是一帮小孩子吗……
E: ..."The Moles"? Isn't that a bunch of kids...

C: 快点，{NICKNAME}！我们去教训那帮坏家伙一顿，把她给救出来！
E: Hurry, {NICKNAME}! Let's teach those bad guys a lesson and save her!

C: 啊，差点把正事忘了！荣誉队员，赶紧把伊蕾恩姐姐的东西交给她吧。
E: Ah, I almost forgot! Honorary member, please give Elaine her stuff.

C: …不必不必！看他睡得这么熟，肯定是采矿的工作太累了吧？
E: ...No, no! He must have been tired from mining and needs a good rest.

C: 邓恩啊，你还是个新兵蛋子的时候我就特别照顾你，怎么当上队长以后就把架子端起来了呢？
E: Dunn, I took special care of you when you were a new recruit. Now that you've become a captain, how come you are putting on airs with me?

C: 哦，对了，这些你拿去吧。我知道打倒故障机器人都是你的功劳，总不能让你白跑一趟，是吧？
E: Oh right, take these. I know you did all the work in taking down that malfunctioning robot. I can't let you leave empty-handed, now can I?

C: 但事后仔细一想，感觉真是对不起老婆孩子…这下她们又得再多等几个月了。
E: But when I gave it a second thought later, I felt bad for my wife and child... They have to wait for another handful of months.

C: 请不必紧张，这是一个基础问题。
E: Don't be nervous. It's a very basic question.

C: 不说这些废话了。你快帮我去找她问问，申请进度怎么样了啊？什么时候才能有下文啊？
E: Enough chitchat. Help me find the person who is in charge of the submission process and ask when I can expect an outcome.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，看来你也只能到此为止了啊！
E: Hahaha! Looks like this is as far as you come, then!

C: 哎，明明闯过了第一关，真是功亏一篑。没事，这不怪你。是那群官僚太不尊重科学了。
E: Tsk, I already made it through their first hoop, only to fall at the final hurdle like this. That's alright, and it's not your fault. Those bureaucrats have so little respect for the sciences.

C: 虽然结果是一场空，但是不管怎么说…嗯…还是得谢谢你。
E: Even though it came to nothing, it doesn't matter... I still have to give you my thanks.

C: 谁知道呢，说不定论文被拒收也是件好事…搞不准我还能研究出什么新的科学理论呢！
E: Who knows, perhaps it's best that my thesis is rejected... maybe I can come up with some new scientific theories!

C: 卢卡。
E: Luka.

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 小女子是出于自己的崇拜之情才去研究她的，要是被店员认了出来，那该多尴尬呀~
E: I'm just studying to be like her because she's my idol. It'll be super awkward if any of the staff catches me~

C: 关于塔米拉…
E: About Tamila...

C: 没关系啦，你肯帮我，我已经很感谢了。
E: Don't say that. The fact that you're willing to help me is already helpful in itself.

C: 啧…算了。这次就信你一回吧，下不为例！
E: Tsk... Never mind. I'll believe you this once!

C: 我就在这里等你的好消息——拜托你啦！
E: I'll be waiting right here for your good news — Please!

C: …会的。
E: ...Yes, I will.

C: 装傻是吧？谁不知道你成天在街上做些偷鸡摸狗的事啊？
E: You pretending to be dumb? Everyone knows you've been stealing things left and right!

C: 你好呀，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！能…能请你为我拍张照吗？
E: Hello! C—Can you take a picture of me?

C: …你总是在海滩上捡到奇怪的漂流瓶，差点就让我忘了，我们本来是抓放生帮的。
E: ...With all those strange drift bottles you kept picking up at the beach, I almost forgot that we were here to catch the Unshackled.

C: （不知道漂流中的故事是真是假，但比起被人打扰、被人左右情绪的日子，我更喜欢无人问津的时光。）
E: (I don't know if this story from the waves is true, but I definitely prefer my moments of solitary peace to when I have others bothering and disrupting me.)

C: 在无法区分致敬和玩梗的世界里，它选择了半途而废，这是最不可以被原谅的。
E: In a world where no one can tell the difference between paying due respects to making everything a meme, they've chosen to stop halfway. This is unforgivable.

C: 你放心，我们生意人最讲究信誉了，答应过你的我绝不会忘！
E: Don't worry! We business people are most reliable! I'll definitely make it worth your while!

C: 餐厅的侧门——里面或许是私人民宅、又或许是厨房重地，但总归闲人免进。
E: The side door to a diner — there may be a private residence within, or perhaps a kitchen. Whatever it is, it's off-limits to trespassers.

C: 文明总是伴随着定义各种各样的价值而发展。在某些时刻，这样的价值有助于人们团结在一起，满怀积极地面对生活…而在另一些时候，它又会变成自由的枷锁。
E: The advancement of civilizations has always been accompanied by myriad values, all of which have diverse definitions. At certain moments, such values will band the people together, living life with optimism... Other times, it becomes the fetters that bind freedom.

C: 我的伙食费、看诊的费用，还有不能上工的误工费，加起来给你便宜点算，总共<unbreak>9999</unbreak>利衡币，给你抹个零头，就按<unbreak>9000</unbreak>利衡币算。
E: My meals and treatment cost, and compensation for missed work... I'll give you a discount... A total of <unbreak>9,999</unbreak> Balance Coins! I'll round that down for you, <unbreak>9,000</unbreak> will do.

C: 高温浴池
E: Hot Bath

C: 浴场图书馆
E: Bathhouse Library

C: 神明啊——你们是否将此付之一笑？
E: Oh gods — does this amuse you?

C: 若你的长矛洞穿了我的咽喉或者心脏，那么便将王冠拿去，让悬锋新王浴血代冠。
E: If your spear had pierced my throat or my heart, you could have taken the crown and been bathed in the blood of Kremnos as the new ruler.

C: 我等愿不惜性命，想办法刺杀歌耳戈王后……
E: We are willing to sacrifice our lives and find a way to assassinate Queen Gorgo...

C: 不知那些在此踱步的智者们，可曾想过他们的户外课堂会被藤蔓占座。
E: Did those wise figures, who once wandered these paths, ever imagine that their outdoor classrooms would one day be claimed by vines?

C: 可现在再看这一幕，你不禁倒吸一口凉气，它更像是一个即将落幕的预言——知识之光终将被黑暗吞噬。
E: Yet as you gaze upon this scene now, a chill runs down your spine. It feels more like a prophecy nearing its end — the light of knowledge inevitably devoured by darkness.

C: 给我吧。我会在结课报告里为你留下第二作者的位置，还会在致谢环节诚挚赞扬你的美德，往后，你就算是在树庭的核心期刊上发表过论文了。
E: Give it to me. I'll credit you as the second author in my final report and express sincere gratitude for your virtue in the acknowledgments. From then on, you'll have a publication in one of the Grove's core journals.

C: 好在像布利萨那样牵涉进泰坦战争的城邦还不算多。希望和平能在翁法罗斯的大部分地方一直持续下去吧……
E: At least there weren't too many cities that were dragged into the strife of the Titans like Bulsa was. Let us hope that these days of peace will remain across the majority of Amphoreus...

C: 这些话都是从哪学来的？
E: Where did you learn to speak so eloquently?

C: …嗷呜叫的奇美拉？
E: ...The howling chimera?

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the uncollected nymphs?

C: 贵客，这里已经没有更多若虫了——您也太能干了吧！
E: Esteemed guest, there are no more nymphs left here — you're just too amazing!

C: o((>'ω´< )っ「你们的豹突猛进，撞得我豹头鼠窜！你们的实力，本豹…认可了」)∋
E: o((>'ω´< )っ "Your sealrious slam has me covering my blubbers for mercy! I... I acknowledge your strength." )∋

C: o((■ω■- )o「桀桀█，不要██太近…████！除非，█做好了被引力撕裂的准备！」)∋
E: o((■ω■- )o "Hehe█, don't get██too close... ████! Unless█prepared to be ripped apart by gravitational forces!" )∋
o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "Waah, a ghost!" )∋

C: 醉眼带笑的女神…
E: Goddess with intoxicating gaze and smile...

C: 激活圣烛。
E: Activate the holy candle.

C: …还是说你一直坐在这里，未曾离开？刚才你凑近圣烛的经历不过是一时的想象。
E: ...Or have you been sitting here the entire time, never having left? Was your encounter with the holy candle merely a fleeting illusion?

C: 你对废弃车厢有没有兴趣啊？
E: Are you interested in abandoned wagons or something?

C: 是这位叔叔给你送的东西。
E: It was him who delivered the items to you.

C: 但若能降下温柔的虹光，守护尽可能多的生灵……
E: But if I can bring down gentle rainbow light and protect as many lives as possible...

C: 他是翁法罗斯注定的负世者，通向翁法罗斯未来的门扉。
E: He is the destined Worldbearer of Amphoreus, the gate to Amphoreus's future.

C: 温和的水流已经冷却。冰凉的池水颤动音管，水漫琴的音色似乎比平日更加凄清悠扬。
E: The once-warm waters have cooled. The trembling pipes hum as the cold water passes through them, making the sound of water lyre even more wistful than usual.

C: 我、我全放了！
E: I—I set them all free!

C: …说的也是，那我去往他的行囊里多塞点面包。
E: ...Fair point. I'll toss a few extra loaves into his pack before he goes.

C: 要是这冥河里有鱼的话，你这样做是能钓上来点什么的。
E: If there were fish in this river, this might actually count as fishing.

C: 桀桀…桀。唉，老巴特鲁斯人不在这，这段对话是自动答录。没治，宝物归你了，就当是对你「见义勇为」的奖赏吧！桀！真不甘心！
E: Hehehe... heh. *sigh* Bartholos isn't here, so this message is prerecorded. No way around it — treasure's yours now. Consider it a reward for your good deed! Heh! Can't say I'm not a little bitter, though!

C: 按下按钮。
E: Press the button.

C: 据说某个眼睛掉色的人，曾在繁星遍布的地底获得一捧神奇的骨灰，后来他就成了王。或许你也可以试试呢？
E: Legend speaks of a man with fading eyes who claimed a handful of magic bone ashes beneath a starry underworld, and became a king. Perhaps you, too, could try your luck?

C: 那刻…阿那克萨戈拉斯教授，除了「名字」之外，我们还有什么需要注意的规矩呢？
E: Professor Anaxa... goras. Are there any other rules we should keep in mind apart from the "name" issue?

C: 很好，你们会理解这些坏名声不无道理。风堇，把教学大纲和读书清单发给他们吧…要学好这门课，课外阅读是必要的。
E: Good. You'll soon see those rumors aren't baseless. Hyacine, pass out the syllabus and reading list. If you want to excel in this class, extra reading is a must.

C: 不是，遐蝶，你真会啊？
E: Wait, Castorice, how did you do that?

C: 我们承认全能的刻法勒可能指出其他泰坦的缺漏，但那必然不是凡性的缺漏，而是神性之缺漏——它本身也符合完美的定义。
E: We acknowledge that the all-powerful Kephale could point out flaws in other Titans, but those would not be mortal flaws. They'd be flaws in divinity itself — which still aligns with the definition of perfection.

C: 你…还在？！
E: You're... still here!?

C: 他始终没有倒下…
E: He never once fell...

C: 我信赖他们。
E: I have trust in them.

C: 说说「记忆」浮黎吧？
E: Tell me about Fuli the Remembrance.

C: 你瞧这片宇宙，反物质军团的风暴扫过，文明的星火就像风中残烛。即便没有纳努克，许多世界也摇摇欲坠，步入黄昏。任由文明的记忆消逝是不可饶恕的破灭。
E: Look at the galaxy. After the incident with the Antimatter Legion, civilizations are like dying embers in the wind. Many worlds wither and crumble even without Nanook's influence. It is unacceptable to allow the memories of civilizations to simply vanish.

C: 不行，这是被禁止的。我可是守法忆者，我拒绝！
E: No, that's forbidden. I'm a rule-abiding Memokeeper. I refuse!

C: 不，再见。
E: No, goodbye.

C: 我、我来给您复述一下这次的行动目标：呃…扫荡「残响回廊」，清理所有出没的裂界怪物。对，是这么写的。
E: L—Let me recap your target this time: Err... Charge the Corridor of Fading Echoes, and defeat all the Fragmentum monsters lurking there. Yes, that's what it says here.

C: 行动的目标和前两次一样…扫、扫荡残响回廊，击败所有徘徊的敌人。
E: Our target is the same as the last two times: Ch—Charge the Corridor of Fading Echoes and defeat all the enemies lurking there.

C: （汪，听到了吗？汪？）
E: (Woof, can you hear me? Woof?)

C: （门卡住了…整个区域的门禁系统都坏了汪？）
E: (The door is stuck... The entire area's access control system is down, woof?)

C: （还要去追踪失窃的奇物呢，走吧。）
E: (We still have to track down the missing curio. C'mon.)

C: 嘤嘤……
E: Eeep...

C: 这附近的植株叶片与土壤上有可疑的油光——
E: There is a suspiciously greasy sheen on the leaves and soil in the surrounding area...

C: 本来…基于阮•梅女士教导我的社交礼仪，我应该与新来的客人简单寒暄几句的。
E: Actually, based on the social etiquette that Miss Ruan Mei taught me, I should have exchanged pleasantries with the new guests.

C: （感应系统没反应，大门被锁死了，<color=#dbc291ff>从这里是进不去的</color>。）
E: (The sensory system is not working, and the door is locked.<color=#dbc291ff> There is no way in from here</color>.)

C: 犯规！怎么突然学人家说话？不过…要精通妖精的密语，可没那么简单，要一直一直呆在一起，才能掌握门道哦？
E: That's cheating! How did you suddenly start copying me? But... it's no easy feat to truly master the fairy tongue. You have to stay close, together, to really get the hang of it.

C: 呀！听上去还真可怜呢，至少…永远不能满怀期待听故事了吧？
E: Ah! That sounds so sad, doesn't it? That means... they could never truly look forward to hearing a story, could they?

C: 为了不被掌控…
E: To avoid being controlled...

C: 小蝶…直到最后一刻，才发现她和传闻里完全不一样呢。
E: Cas... Only at the very end did I realize she was nothing like the rumors.

C: 是为了安慰人家吗？其实没关系啦……
E: Are you trying to comfort me? Honestly, it's okay...

C: 思来想去，果然还是「喜欢」最合适。毕竟只有最纯粹的感情，才能跨越时光，始终如一呀。
E: And after pondering again and again... "I like you" still says it best. Because only the purest feelings can stand the test of time and never fade.

C: 人家也听到过类似的说法呢，唔…听起来，总比「不想面对明天」要好？
E: I've heard people say something similar before. Hmm... It sounds much better than not wanting to face tomorrow, doesn't it?

C: 你还真是积极啊
E: You're so diligent.

C: 听说喝了苏乐达能长脚…
E: I was told that I could grow legs by drinking SoulGlad...

C: 还有这好事？
E: Is that for real?

C: …积木…都是积木害的！
E: ...Building blocks! It's all the building blocks' fault!

C: 大环境确实…不怎么样。但总有人不死心啊。这不，就有人求上门来了？
E: The macro-environment is... really not the best. But there's always someone unwilling to give up. As a matter of fact, it appears we have someone now?

C: 下回还会有占算的活计，您可别忘了。
E: Next time there'll be more routine divinations. Don't forget.

C: …我赔不起。
E: ...I won't be able to afford it.

C: 好歹毒的招数，我玩还不行么。
E: What a ruthless gambit. I can't say no now, can I?

C: 什么同僚？咱们是空艇上「四大天王」，行不改名坐不改姓，名号可不能乱来。
E: Colleagues? We're the Formidable Four of the airship! Titles are not to be changed lightly!

C: 那解释起来就方便了。
E: In that case, it simplifies the explanation.

C: 你们简直是手眼通天。
E: You people truly have connections everywhere.

C: 我想换成*简单难度*。
E: I'd like to change to *Easy Difficulty*.

C: 这座人台表面满是暗淡的纹路，显然已经被弃置于此许久了。在你触碰它的一瞬，阵阵流光重新焕发而出。
E: This mannequin is covered in dimmed patterns. It has obviously been left here for a long while. At the moment you touched it, streams of light radiated once more.

C: 嗯…有位织者苦心经营着一块歇脚地，意图将彼世的智慧传递。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>篝火边</color>等候冒险者的到来，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who diligently tends to a resting place, eager to pass on its wisdom of life. The golden thread brings tidings: They now sit <color=#dbc291ff>by the bonfire</color>, awaiting the arrival of adventurers. Go and seek them out.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: <unbreak>15</unbreak>位。
E: Fifteen warriors.

C: 勇士们都去哪了…
E: Where have all the warriors gone...?

C: 凭着这张地契，我们就能名正言顺地声索黎明机器的所有权。到时候我们说白天就是白天，我们说晚上，就马上两眼一抹黑！谁想晒到光，都得向我们乖乖交钱。
E: With this land deed, we will have a legitimate right to claim ownership of the Dawn Device. Then, when we say day, the sun will be high in the sky. When we say night, the world will fall dark before your eyes! If anyone wants to see the light of the sun, they will have to pay us a fair fee!

C: 对不住了，老人家！
E: Sorry, old man!

C: 这既不是价值连城的珠宝，也不是稀世罕见的古物。一个装着破烂的宝箱，竟然也拼了命不肯撒手……
E: This is not some kind of precious jewel or rare artifact. It's just some chest filled with junk, and yet you would still fight this hard to keep your greedy mitts on it...

C: 关于你的过去…
E: About your past...

C: 啊？这是什么没大没小的发言？我巴特鲁斯从一滩烂泥里诞生的时候，你爷爷的爷爷还不知道有没有出生在这世上呢！
E: Hey, watch that attitude! The universe was young when I came into being a mud puddle — long before your great-great-grandparents were even a twinkle in the Cosmos!

C: 咋搁这儿永恒轮回起来了？
E: Why are you doing this eternal cycle conspiracy theory?

C: 别自作多情了。
E: Don't flatter yourself.

C: 师父，快教我怎么偷记忆！
E: Master, quick! Teach me how to steal memories!

C: 你决定不给巴特鲁斯这个机会。
E: You decide not to give Bartholos this chance.

C: 嗝~白煮蛋要剥壳才能吃，箱子里的宝物也一样，让巴特鲁斯消化一下才能乖乖听话。
E: Burp~ You've gotta peel a hard-boiled egg before you eat it, and it's the same deal with treasure in a chest. O' Bartholos gotta digest it a little before it'll behave!

C: 对吧，有种灰暗而深沉的味道…但又充满了诗意的能量！
E: Right. It gives off an energy that's a little gloomy and deep... but extremely poetic!

C: 我很忙，你捡重点讲吧。
E: I'm busy. Please just get to the point.

C: 不错，溯寻顺利完成了，我们来看看结果吧。
E: Excellent, the extrapolation is complete. Let's see the result.

C: …我的故乡在哪？
E: ...Where is my homeland?

C: 舞台装置？我不知道你在说什么，你说是就是吧。
E: Stage mechanism? I don't know what you're talking about, but if you say so, then sure.

C: 这位祭司还真了解你。
E: This priest really knew you well.

C: 为什么不一起去？
E: Why aren't you coming with us?

C: 我？我这是在…我是……
E: I... what am I...? I am...?

C: 希望…我们能在西风的尽头…在那个阳光明媚、没有伤痛的世界重新相识。
E: Maybe... we'll meet again, beyond the western winds... in a world of light, free from pain.

C: 「嗯，我对银河大乐透动了点手脚，想靠它多获取点宇宙里的奇物。」黑塔敷衍地解释着，「我的初衷有问题吗？只不过现在收拾不了了…靠你了，{NICKNAME}。」
E: "Well, I made some edits to the Cosmic Big Lotto and wanted to use it to get more Curios from the universe." Herta explains half-heartedly. "My intent was perfectly fine. I just... can't fix it myself anymore... It's all up to you, {NICKNAME}."

C: 一声隆隆巨响从天际传来，在模拟宇宙回荡，久久不绝。你抬头上望，只见琥珀色的天空之上，是一尊巨大的无头巨像。眨眼间，巨像消失了，仿佛刚刚的一切只是你的幻觉，只有低低的响声仍在空气中激荡。
E: A loud rumbling sound descends from the sky, echoing endlessly within the Simulated Universe. You look up and a gigantic, headless colossus could be seen in the amber-colored sky. In the blink of an eye, the colossus disappears as if everything was an illusion, leaving only faint echoes rippling through the air.

C: 黑塔？
E: Herta?

C: 你肯定比我更懂八卦！
E: You must know more about gossip than I do!

C: 什么问题？
E: Yes?

C: 谢谢你的诚实。
E: Thanks for your honesty.

C: 这一页手稿在你看完后自动燃烬，它进行了严格的自我销毁——下面还有一页更为潦草的手稿；你相信看完后它也会阅后即焚……
E: This page of the manuscript starts burning by itself after you finish reading it. It carries out a strict self-destruction procedure. The next page contains a handwriting that is even more messy. You believe it will burn after you read it, too...

C: 他看上去已经跨越了自然生物的衰老。这是件煎熬的事情，他神情疲惫，称自己不知为何一直活着，他不停挠着脚踝，向你展示用沙子聚成的塔……
E: Despite having overcome aging, a natural biological process for living beings, he appears tormented. He looks exhausted and says that he doesn't understand why he just won't die. He scratches his ankles and shows you the sand towers he has crafted.

C: 快停下！你看见自己这么做的未来：…你会在第二天于尖叫声中在彩色黏液里醒来，并变成一只*虫子*！
E: Stop! You have foreseen the consequences that would follow... Waking up the next day screaming in colorful goo, transformed into an *insect*.

C: 你对*看不清面容的少女*非常提防——你对着光线，看不真切里面封存的「影子」究竟是什么。
E: Your guard against this *girl whose face you can't see* is on high alert. Faced against the light, you can't make out what exactly this "shadow" is sealed within.

C: 天外合唱班曾因歌声被高墙阻拦而和筑城者爆发了纠纷，直至一位年轻的歌者与其兄长施行*不分你我*的骗术翻越墙垣后，不慎跌落至深海中——
E: The Beyond the Sky Choir's singing was being muffled out by the high walls, thus becoming a source of dispute with the Architects, until a young singer tragically fell into the sea after climbing over the wall with his elder brother using the *inseparable* deception...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群热血慷慨的巡海游侠。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice changes into a group of fervent and passionate Galaxy Rangers.

C: 但阮•梅有些自己的想法。她打定主意，锚定了<color=#dbc291ff>「虫皇」塔伊兹育罗斯</color>陨落前的那段时空。
E: Ruan Mei has her own idea. She's made up her mind to anchor the cosmic time to the period before the fall of <color=#dbc291ff>Tayzzyronth the Imperator Insectorum</color>.

C: 行啊。我不喜欢。
E: Good for you. I don't.

C: 我没发现什么特殊的。
E: I haven't noticed anything odd.

C: 「我看到我们…」黑塔的声音变小了，「在下个『<color=#dbc291ff>时刻</color>』就要死了。」
E: "I see us..." Herta's voice becomes softer. "Dead in the next '<color=#dbc291ff>moment</color>.'"

C: 亲吻柯拉帕乌的手背。
E: Kiss the back of Korapao's hand.

C: 认知拓宽：「合伙人」•其二
E: Broadened Cognition: Associates (II)

C: 你加入这场洽谈，了解到这场*意外*的中心人物——卡彭。他曾是法恩莎最重视、最亲近的部下，二人间有着非同一般的关系。
E: You join the discussion and learn about the key figure behind the mishaps — Cappon. He used to be Farnsha's closest right-hand man. The relationship between them seemed to transcend a regular one.

C: 为了保护。
E: For protection.

C: 弹射脱离。
E: Eject away.

C: 不顾落地时溅的一身泥土，你狼狈地奔向他们，拍下一张照片。无论你能否在炮火中活下来，真实的故事将被记录，然后传播出去。
E: Ignoring the mud that splashed all over you as you landed, you hurry towards them to take a photo. No matter if you survive the war or not, the truth will be recorded so that it can be circulated one day.

C: 开始狩猎。
E: Begin the hunt.

C: 银蛰虫的浪潮似乎永无止境，恒星的光辉尚未落下，收复的卡里曼殖民地便又重新回到了狂乱的虫裔嗡鸣当中。
E: The waves of Silver Stings seem as though they'll never finish. The light of the stars has yet to fall, and the recaptured Kaliman colony had already returned to the frenzied buzzing of the insectoids.

C: 但事情没有向着你预估的方向发展，将你拦截在这里的舰队显然是有备而来。它们的炮火穿透你的思维单元，导弹的冲击更是让你拦腰截断。
E: But things don't work out as anticipated. The fleet that intersected you here seems to have weapons hot and ready. Their shells punch through your thought unit, and the impact from their missiles cuts you straight in half.

C: 好饿。
E: I'm starving.

C: 尽管每个人都告诉他们，不要和这个怪人说话。但孩子们还是会一窝蜂地涌进来，来到这个无论多少次都不会腻的游乐园。
E: Despite everyone telling them not to talk to this wacko, the kids can't help but swarm in to this amusement park no matter how many times they've visited before.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 送给他毁灭的花。
E: Give him flowers of Destruction.

C: 就在海岸线的另一端，水民与地民的战争一刻也未曾停止。
E: And, on the coastline across from you, the battle between the water and land people wages on ceaselessly.

C: 只要这样就可以了吗？
E: That's it?

C: 「这不是预测，这是编撰：边缘坍缩效应使沙盘的未来变成一幕白纸黑字的戏剧。学会希望我们能消除它的干扰，但我怀疑，谜底也许只在『末王』手里……」
E: "This is not prediction. This is editing: The peripheral collapse effect causes the future of the sandpit to play out like a drama written in black and white. Though the guild hopes we can eliminate its interference, we suspect that the answer to this mystery may lie in the hands of Terminus"

C: 我倒认为是条活路。
E: I actually think that could work.

C: 「你在干什么？！你答应过我，留下一架的。」齐奥尔科夫学士甩开控制室的门，他看到大气层中最后一丝火焰熄灭了。
E: "What are you doing!? You promised me that you'd leave one standing!" Scholar Cholkov throws open the control room doors to see the final flames being extinguished in the atmosphere.

C: 正如资产评估部门的准则——「物有所值」，公司的每一件资产都必须发挥全部价值。
E: The Asset Evaluation Department always goes back to the same principle... "Value for money." All IPC assets must be used to their full potential.

C: 其三是<color=#dbc291ff>统合</color>，以粒子筑巢穴，能量为枝桠，以待从卵中孵化出大一统方程，诠释万事万物的分解与重组。
E: The third is <color=#dbc291ff>Integration</color>, building a nest with particles and branches with energy, awaiting the hatching of the grand unified equation from the egg, interpreting the deconstruction and reconstruction of all things.

C: 加入对暴行的抗议。
E: Join in the protest against this atrocity.

C: 「我们都被关在了知识圆圈里，看到的都只是现象，而非本质。」
E: "We are all trapped inside the Circle of Knowledge. All we see are phenomena, not reality."

C: 从我求学开始，每当头脑中知识扩大到一定范围，即将突破已知的圆圈，进入未知的世界时，我就会遭遇某种阻碍。
E: Since I began my search for knowledge, whenever the knowledge inside my brain reached a certain level and was about to break through the known circle into the world of the unknown, I would encounter some kind of obstacle.

C: 曾有一种信条，将世界视为一台精密的发条钟表，倘若掌握每颗粒子的信息，便能预测出所有运动的轨迹。也即，未来已经被过去所决定。虽然这一想法不过是痴人说梦，但在此之外，宇宙中却存在更为直观的参考系——由博识尊演算出的「时刻」。
E: There was once a belief to view the world as a meticulous clockwork piece, where if information about every atom is grasped, then all movements' trajectories could be predicted. Simply put, the future is already determined by the past. While this concept is no more than words spoken in a fool's dream, a more intuitive frame of reference exists in the universe beyond — The concept of "Instant" as extrapolated by Nous.

C: 「你有没有想过，『完美的计算』也是一种求知——你很清楚，没人能违背祂的计算。」
E: "Have you ever considered that 'Perfect Calculation' is also a form of seeking knowledge? You should be very aware that no one can defy THEIR calculations."

C: <size=36>「阿哈！」</size>
E: <size=36>"Aha!"</size>

C: 没有战争。
E: There is no war.

C: 他们都消失了。
E: They all disappeared.

C: 我要怎么得知「繁育」的秘密？
E: How will I learn of Propagation's secrets?

C: 你遇到了黑塔的人偶，在模拟宇宙里遇到她的人偶实体，你还是有些惊讶。
E: To your surprise, you run into a physical Herta puppet in the Simulated Universe.

C: 或是雅各宾数理院的老家伙们最爱的科学装置演出，他们将人工智能「普朗托专家系统」用于计算戏剧性情节。
E: Or it might be a scientific installation performance, the favorite of the old folks from the Jacobin School of Mathematics and Science. The Pronto Expert System, an AI device, is used to calculate the plot of the play.

C: 神秘的嗡鸣在你的耳边响起，巨大的吸力拉扯你。你的精神力变得异常懒散。环绕你的气流并无实体，你肌肉松懈，眼皮蜷缩…
E: An inscrutable humming rings next to your ears, and a tremendous force is pulling at you. Your mental prowess becomes unusually weak, and the air flowing around you is not of a material nature. Your muscles are relaxed, and your eyelids are drooping...

C: 他挪动蛇尾，墨绿鳞片窸窣，反射金属光泽。「嘶嘶——」他开口，联觉信标运作，你逐渐理解半蛇人语言。
E: His dark green scales rustle and reflect a metallic glint as he moves its tail. "Hiss..." He speaks. Thanks to the Synesthesia Beacon, you can slowly understand his language.

C: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
E: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

C: 你对这景象很熟悉…你来到了柜台前。
E: The scene is familiar to you... You walk up to the counter.

C: 在洞穴的底部，沉眠的蠧役嗅到了香气，它与你四目相对，透过那双眼睛，你看到了溶化的血肉，互相啃食的虫子，以及，宛如一粒尘埃的自己。
E: In the depths of the cave, the sleeping devourer drone catches your scent and locks eyes with you. In its eyes, you see visions of melted flesh, insects devouring each other, and yourself as no more than a speck of dust.

C: 你看见万年不息的舞蹈，伶人们在贡多拉哭泣，钻石雨从天幕落下。当喧嚣重新回到你的世界，吟游诗人已不见踪影。正如他所言，带走了你的诗句。
E: You see a dance that never stops, actors weeping on a gondola, and a rain of diamonds falling from the sky. When the hustle and bustle returns to your world, the poet is nowhere to be seen. Just as he said, he had taken your verses.

C: 你砸碎手中的奇物，破坏的欲望和愤怒从你心中泛起，地面上传来微弱的震颤。眨眼间，钢铁的大门已向你敞开。
E: As the urge for destruction and wrath surge within your heart, you shatter the Curio in your hand. A faint tremor courses through the ground, and in the blink of an eye, the steel gate swings open before you.

C: 事隔经年，曾经的年轻人已是闻名一方的云骑骁卫。你偷得片刻清闲，在长乐天饮下半碗浓茶。可长路漫漫，你仍有使不完劲儿想要发挥，你要做仙舟上响当当的英雄！
E: After many years, the once-young man has become a famous Cloud Knight Lieutenant. Having stolen a moment of leisure, you down half a bowl of tea in the Exalting Sanctum. But the road ahead is long, and you still have unspent energy you yearn to put to use. You want to become a well-known hero on the Xianzhou!

C: 随着斑斓的色彩和线条落下，独眼独脚的妖怪顿时重获新生。
E: As the bright colors and lines fall, the one-eyed and one-legged monster is suddenly granted new life.

C: 人群并未因你的失败而叹息，他们无视了落寞的你，催促着下一局多洛斯骰子的游戏。
E: The crowd isn't sighing at your failure. They are oblivious to your desolation, as their chants urge for the next round of Dolos dice.

C: 「我宣判，你有罪！」空寂的审判室内，智械法官的二十三个分形将你团团围住，象征律令的戒尺插入地底的数据网络，如同被压扁的管风琴。
E: "I hereby declare, you are guilty!" In the silent courtroom, the Intellitron judges' twenty-three fractals surround you, with a ruler symbolizing discipline stabbed into the digital network underground, like a flattened pipe organ.

C: 说真的，在很长一段时间里，你都不想再和超自然事件打交道了。
E: To be honest, you want nothing more to do with the supernatural for a long time.

C: 你深吸一口气，卯足全力划动船桨，无视掉溅入船里的鱼腥味，让船笔直地撞进暗礁。
E: You take a deep breath, mustering all your strength in your rowing, ignoring the fishy stench that has splattered onto the boat, steering it straight for the submerged reef.

C: 你深吸一口气，卯足全力划动船桨，无视掉溅入船里的鱼腥味，让船笔直地撞进暗礁。
