E: You take a deep breath, mustering all your strength in your rowing, ignoring the fishy stench that has splattered onto the boat, steering it straight for the submerged reef.

C: 但大地终究无法承载如此的重量，它的脊骨崩裂，化作沟壑，涌出的血液汇聚成河流，吞没坠落的生命。
E: Yet the earth could not sustain such a burden. Its backbone shattered into ravines, spewing forth blood that formed rivers, devouring the fallen lives.

C: 在公正之秤的见证下，它与众神签订了誓约。以冥河为界，死亡将平衡翁法罗斯的生命，逝去的灵魂终归于塞纳托斯的国度，登上摆渡者的长船，从今生去往来世。
E: Under the watchful eye of the Scale of Justice, they swore oaths with the gods. The River of Souls marked the boundary, where death would balance life in Amphoreus. Departed souls would journey to the realm of Thanatos, boarding the ferryman's long boat to transition from this life to the next.

C: 作为交换，这对伴侣的造物和眷属，它们将作为礼物赠予死亡。从此，塞纳托斯的国度里，也有了花朵与蝴蝶。
E: In exchange, the creations and kin of the couple were offered to Death as a gift. Since then, the realm of Thanatos has flourished with flowers and butterflies.

C: 还是恋人的胜利？
E: Or a triumph of love?

C: 当刻法勒的火种被点燃，担负起创造生命的重任，雅努斯轻点命运的丝线，它们在刻法勒的眼前化作两条道路。若是走上第一条，它将创造出力量与智慧的结晶，比艾格勒冶炼的奇兽更富逻辑。
E: When the Coreflame of Kephale is lit, taking on the heavy responsibility of creating life, Janus gently nudges the threads of fate, which split into two paths before Kephale. If the first path is chosen, they will make beings of strength and intellect, forming a creation more logically complex than the mythical beasts forged by Aquila.

C: 「您算是赶上时候了，促销活动火热进行中，再不出手下次可就不一定有这个机会了。」商人拼命怂恿你。
E: "Lucky you! We're running a very special promotion right now — hesitate, and you might never see a deal like this again!" The merchant prods.

C: 目前还没有人通过面试，那些从隔音面试间出来的学者，要么嚎啕大哭得像个孩子，要么愤怒地撕碎自己的论文，看来评委极其擅长给人上压力。
E: So far, not a single person has passed. Those emerging from the soundproofed interview rooms are either weeping uncontrollably like lost children or ripping their papers to shreds in pure rage. No doubt about it — the judges are experts in breaking wills.

C: 巨人又俯下身躯，唤醒大地。造物将以吉奥里亚的神体为躯壳。
E: The giant bent down once more and awakened the earth. Their creations would take form from Georios's divine body.

C: 一切都已准备妥当，唯有巨人尚未给自己的造物献上祝福。于是巨人割开自己的手臂，黄金般的血液流淌而出。这血液赋予了造物真正的生命。
E: Everything was prepared. Yet the giant had not yet given their own blessing. So Kephale cut open their own arm, and golden blood flowed forth. This divine ichor bestowed true life upon the creations.

C: 两条腿的类人生物满地跑，但像你一样人品出众的实在太稀少啦。
E: Two-legged humanoid creatures abound in this world, but someone with your outstanding character is a true rarity.

C: 哎，等你想明白了再回来找我吧，这岗位我先给你留着……
E: Ah, come back to me once you figure it out. I'll hold this position for you...

C: 破碎的奇物，裂痕周遭有粒子漂浮，折射出不稳定的光，这让你联想到了某种古早的显像管设备，还有一条不知为何流传甚广的神秘规则：「拍一拍就好了」。
E: A shattered Curio, with particles floating around the crack refracting unstable light. It reminds you of some kind of ancient cathode-ray tube device, and a mysterious rule that everyone somehow knows — if it's not working, try hitting it.

C: 拍一拍。
E: ...tap it a few times.

C: 说吧！你是不是来自一个迥然不同的世界？你是不是生活在星神的「高维世界」里？
E: Tell me! Are you from a radically different world? Do you come from the higher dimensional world of the Aeons?

C: 放心吧。我真想坑你，你一命呜呼了都不知道怎么回事。
E: Don't worry. If I want to swindle you, you'll never see it coming.

C: 你这人怎么回事，吓我一跳！
E: Who the — what the!? You scared the heck out of me!

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：背叛。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Betrayal."

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：振翅。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Flapping wings."

C: 会议室里充斥着咕嘟咕嘟的闷响…就像是人淹没在沼泽中，被污泥封堵喉咙时绝望的呜咽——这是它们的语言，但你根本听不懂——因为你还没有植入联觉信标。
E: The meeting room reverberates with muffled gobbling noises... it sounds like the whines of despair made by a person drowning in a swamp as mud slowly blocks off their airways. This is the Claymen race's language, but you can't understand a word of it — you have yet to implant a Synesthesia Beacon.

C: 你感到不解。看看大橘——多可爱啊！难道有谁能抗拒抚摸那柔软的绒毛，听它发出满意的咕噜声吗？退一步讲，它们明明温顺得很…到底为什么要消灭它们？
E: You can't even fathom it. Look how cute Big O is! Can anyone resist petting its delightfully soft fur or listening to its satisfied purring? If you think about it, they are clearly docile creatures... Why exterminate them?

C: …在心中默默复习了这个小小的知识点后，你感到十分满意。智慧生物就是喜欢为自己拥有他人不曾拥有的冷僻知识感到骄傲。你嘴角上扬，转身走向厨房。
E: ...After quietly reviewing this bit of new-found knowledge in your mind, you swell with satisfaction. Intelligent lifeforms always enjoy taking pride in knowing obscure trivia that others don't. The corners of your mouth rise up as you turn to go to the kitchen.

C: 快来吃我~
E: Come and eat me~

C: 从未有过的感觉…
E: A feeling you've never had before...

C: 安可！
E: Encore!

C: 温暖的篝火啊…
E: The warm bonfire...

C: 瞧一瞧，看一看！
E: Come and feast your eyes on this!

C: …可万一她说的是真的呢？
E: ...But what if she was telling the truth?

C: 哎…算了算了！是我漆黑的虎克大人没把规则说清楚…总之，荣誉队员——
E: Geez... Whatever! I, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, did not explain the rules clearly... Anyway, honorary member...

C: 只有坚持强健体魄、砥砺技艺，你的灵魂才能如肉体般坚不可摧喀！
E: A strong body and sharp skills make for an unbreakable spirit, crrk!

C: 咕噜噜噜噜…
E: *gurgle*...

C: …原来如此！
E: ...That explains it!

C: 多么神圣的存在…
E: What a holy presence...

C: 你将颤抖的手伸入一片漆黑中，抓住了那个——不对，是那一堆——坚硬的、发光的东西。
E: Your hands tremble as you reach into the pitch-black darkness. You take hold of a single — no, a pile of rigid, shining objects.

C: 桌子下面不错。
E: Below the table could work.

C: 不愧是我！
E: I impressed myself!

C: 你已经听到虎克那欢快的声音从远处传来，可你根本没有选好合适的藏身处！
E: You can hear Hook's excited voice from afar off, but you haven't chosen a suitable place to hide yet!

C: 你们怎么都不说话？
E: Why aren't any of you saying anything?

C: 又见面了，外来者。怎么说，要谈生意，还是说你找我有事？
E: Hello again, outsider. What brings you here, business or something personal?

C: 有没有人！快来救虫啊——要、要掉下去了喀！
E: Help! Somebody help! I'm falling, crrk!

C: 刻法勒啊，你真受累；雅努斯啊，你爱跑腿！
E: O Kephale, how you toil away. O Janus, always on your way!

C: 就是它带领你找到我的嗡！
E: And it's these bonds that led you to find me, buzz!

C: 话说回来…出征的黄金裔英雄们何时才会归来呢嘤？
E: That being said... when will the Chrysos Heirs return from their expedition, eep?

C: 这里是那些亡语蝶休息的地方。如果在这里说些什么的话，它们一定可以听清。
E: This is where those Eulogistic Butterflies rest. If you say something here, they will surely hear it clearly.

C: 要是哪天刻法勒的火种被人偷走了，元老院还像群鸵鸟一样后知后觉，我也完全不意外。
E: If one day the flame of Kephale is stolen, and the Council of Elders remains oblivious like a bunch of ostriches, I wouldn't be surprised at all.

C: 机巧鸟都像你这样能说会道吗？
E: Are all cycranes such gifted orators?

C: 机巧鸟这辈子最不能做的只有两件事，一件事是言而无信，另一件就是让所爱的人流泪。
E: There're two things a cycrane can never do: The first is to break a promise. The second, is to let someone cry.

C: 已经没有时间留给我犹豫了，既然有人需要我的帮助，我就应该响应。
E: There's no time left for my hesitations. Someone needs my help, so I should respond in kind.

C: 梓桥让我找你回去。
E: Ziqiao sent me to get you back.

C: 今天我非要给你出难题。
E: I am definitely giving you a difficult one today.

C: …你也就现在还能笑得出来了。
E: ...This will be the last time you'll be laughing at this.

C: 这群异端！
E: These heretics!

C: 我吃，我吃！
E: Let's eat. Let's eat!

C: 可一路走来，却一条岔路都没有…难道说，虫的一生其实根本没得选喀？！
E: And yet, after all my travels, I've never once encountered a fork in the road... Could it be that a bug's fate was never ours to choose, crrk!?

C: 好吧，我放弃了。
E: Alright, I give up.

C: 究竟是怎么回事呢？
E: What really happened?

C: 可以收工了吗？
E: Can we pack up for the day?

C: …我可没有得罪人！
E: ...I didn't do anything wrong!

C: 该走了。
E: It's time to go.

C: 很酷的扶手椅，坐垫只能容纳一位乘客的屁股。看上去很有气势，适合很酷的你。
E: This is a cool armchair that has space only for one passenger to sit on. There's a majestic air to it, a perfect match for a cool person like you.

C: 难道这就是传说中的…
E: Could it be a legendary...

C: 我是说未来的人生！
E: I meant your future!

C: 别急，我们慢慢找就是了。
E: Don't panic. We'll keep looking.

C: 妈妈，我们还要继续走吗？
E: Mommy, are we going to keep traveling?

C: 祷词是飞升的阶梯…
E: Our prayers build the path to ascension...

C: 我不要新世界，还我姐姐！
E: I don't want a new world — give me back my sister!

C: 下一个世界的我们……
E: In the next world...

C: 这就是黑潮怪物吗…
E: So this is a black tide monster...

C: 借我一枚，我帮你扔。
E: Give me a coin. I'll help throw it for you.

C: 这种事情都不记得了吗？没想到{NICKNAME}是这样子的人……
E: Don't you remember? I never thought you'd be like that, {NICKNAME}...

C: 完全没有哦！
E: Not at all!

C: 呜…没有，只是…等等，别把列车长当成小孩子帕！
E: Boohoo... No, it's just... Hang on, Don't think of Pom-Pom as a child, okay?

C: 态度不要这么敷衍帕！
E: Don't skimp out on me here!

C: 呜…为什么要欺负帕姆…为什么要给帕姆一分，这毫无道理帕！不行不行！
E: Oh... Why are you bullying Pom-Pom? Why would you give Pom-Pom just one out of ten, and that doesn't make sense! No no no!

C: （讲述旅途中的趣事）
E: (Tell a funny story about your journey)

C: 即便耳朵里没有声音，那种情绪也挥之不去的！
E: Even if there's dead silence, the voices don't go away!

C: 但是，就这么放着不管也不行，呜哇！怎么办帕！
E: But, Pom-Pom can't just leave things as they are. Waaah, what should Pom-Pom do?

C: 那倒不用。
E: Not really.

C: 按照养殖手册的说法…这几天就应该开花了，但是现在叶片上长了点斑点，明显不太对劲。难道是发生了异变吗？
E: According to the propagation manual... They should have bloomed within the past few days, but instead, the leaves are all spotty. Something's obviously going on. Are they starting to mutate?

C: 火腿什么的看来可以安排上。
E: I think ham and sausages will be right up your alley.

C: （跟着帕姆一起唱）
E: (Sing along with Pom-Pom)

C: 你太累了，该休息会儿了。
E: You're too tired. It's time to take a rest.

C: 不要哇！那样的话跃迁的时候很容易发生危险事故的！
E: Oh, no! It'll be dangerous for me during a Warp!

C: 但是单纯地跑步难免有些单调，所以帕姆选择趣味跑步法！喏，这个球球你拿着。
E: Yet, jogging can be boring, so I've decided to use a fun jogging method! Here, take this ball.

C: 请教管理经验…
E: Please give me some management advice...

C: 不过，帕姆怎么不记得当时列车上有什么设备要修呢？
E: But Pom-Pom doesn't remember the Express needing any kind of repairs at the time...

C: 还有…为什么大家总是把手机丢在卫生间的洗手台上呢？真是奇怪啊，我总是能在那儿捡到大家的手机。
E: And... why does everyone always leave their phones on the bathroom counter? It's so weird, I'm always finding people's phones there.

C: 向你致敬，{NICKNAME}教官。哔——啵。
E: I salute you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. Beep — boop.

C: 没错。就是那边的大家伙。
E: That's right. It's the big guy over there.

C: ——虽然我压根没有血！哈！哈！哈！
E: — Even though I don't have any blood! Bwahaha!

C: 「副官」呢？
E: Where the aide at?

C: 再次感谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Once again, thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 第二部分就是<color=#dbc291ff>「基座」。只要把「热能核心」安插到「基座」上，就可以启动「照雪灯炉」，放射出足以削弱裂界怪物的能量场</color>。
E: The second part is the <color=#dbc291ff>base. Slotting the thermic core into the base activates the Snowshine Lamp and radiates an energy field, which can weaken the Fragmentum monsters</color>.

C: 启动灯炉，然后<color=#dbc291ff>把那些杂碎吸引到能量场里</color>逐个击破吧。
E: Fire up the lamp, then <color=#dbc291ff>lure those scums into its energy field</color> to destroy them one by one.

C: *电波滤音*加油，我们胜利在望。
E: *electronic voice* Keep at it! We're doing great!

C: 不过这一趟收获不少，至少我们搞清楚了异象的元凶——次元扑满。
E: But at least we've figured out something. Turns out those Warp Trotters are the ones behind the anomaly.

C: 毕竟，对于这种能跨维度的生物，我们也谈不上知根知底。
E: After all, we don't know much about these dimension-leaping creatures.

C: *电波滤音*还得提醒你一次，<color=#dbc291ff>「回响发生装置」</color>能够发现怪物的位置，请酌情使用。
E: *electronic voice* As another reminder, the <color=#dbc291ff>Reverberation Generator</color> will help you locate the monsters. Please use it wisely.

C: 请您拿着这只谛听吧。（递给玩家）这是工造司改造过的。只要活用这只谛听，就能看到那些看不见的线，从而避免无意义的战斗了。
E: Please take this Diting. (Hands to player.) This was modified by the Artisanship Commission. You will be able to see those invisible wires by using this Diting. That'll allow you to avoid any unnecessary battles.

C: 沉默、优雅、遗世独立，甚至有点…黑暗。除此之外，你还看到封面上写着几个歪歪扭扭的大字「邀请函」。
E: Silent, elegant, independent, even a hint of... darkness. You also see "Invitation" written in big, crooked letters.

C: 什么？！玛丽竟然被{NICKNAME}击败了…！
E: Oh no, {NICKNAME} has beaten Mary...!

C: 神秘的孩子
E: Mysterious Kid

C: 你听，我的好妹妹……
E: Listen, my darling sister...

C: 我懂——快来人啊！有炸弹！
E: I know... Call someone, please! There's a bomb here!

C: 如果崇高道德确有实体，那么它大概会在此刻向你皱眉。
E: If High Morals were a real person, it'd probably be frowning so hard at you right now.

C: …等等，味道？味道也是能用来判断衣柜优劣的维度吗？
E: Wait a minute, scent? How is scent a measurement of how good a closet is?

C: 出去？你确定？不，我可不建议你那么做。
E: Go out? Are you sure? No, I don't think that'd be good for you.

C: 你这样也算是帮了我们一个忙。请稍等，我去准备给你的报酬……
E: You've done me a huge favor. Hang on a moment. Let me prepare a reward for you...

C: 你怎么知道的？！
E: How'd you know!?

C: 刀孤零零地靠在墙角，好像一名依然雄姿英发的战士蜷缩在布满灰尘的角落里乞讨，令人心生怜惜。
E: The blade leaned against the corner alone, like a once-majestic warrior curled up in a dusty corner begging for alms and looking piteous.

C: …你就不反驳两句？亏我还满期待你能说些什么。
E: ...Aren't you even going to fight me a couple of times? Here I am, expecting you to come back at me with something.

C: 我刚刚就是发现忘记拿展阅了，才特意回来一趟。
E: I just realized that I forgot to take back my flexible display, so I came back to do that.

C: 进不去！怎么想都进不去吧！
E: What? There's no way the Trailblazer can fit in there!

C: 哈哈哈哈，是吗？那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千化变千妙脱骨。
E: Hahaha, really? That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.

C: （把手伸进去。）
E: (Reach in with your hand.)

C: （站住不动。）
E: (Stand still.)

C: 这几次真是辛苦您了！我们下次再见！
E: Thanks for all your help the past few times! See you next time!

C: 比起找到失物，当下最紧迫的还是去找到问题源头的药王秘传，抓紧时间吧。
E: Finding the missing items isn't our priority now. We should locate the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus who are the source of the problem, first. Hurry up!

C: 另外，那些地方现在算不上安全，所以途中可能会遇到一些危险，也请你最好准备。
E: Side note, these places are not entirely safe, so there might be some dangers along the way. Please be prepared.

C: 您真是一个善良的人，愿意和我这样的人搭讪。
E: You really are a kind person if you're willing to strike up a chat with someone like me.

C: 你需要这枚小零件吗？
E: Do you need this thingamabob?

C: 你好像对「鲛人泪」感兴趣。
E: You seem pretty interested in Draconic Tears.

C: 这可是「宝箱」啊！
E: C'mon, it's a chest!

C: 好，我交钱。
E: Alright, here's the money.

C: 真的有人会去玩吗？
E: Will anyone actually play it?

C: …奇怪，我感觉…突然冷静了下来。
E: ...Strange, I feel... suddenly very calm.

C: 每天玩8小时游戏就好了。
E: Just game for eight hours a day and you'll be fine.

C: 说来可能有些奇怪，但面对您时，我竟生出一种能够被倾听、被理解的幸福感。这种感觉就像苏乐达糖浆一样让人欲罢不能。
E: It might sound strange, but when I converse with you, I feel a happiness that comes from being listened to and being understood. This happiness is as addicting as SoulGlad.

C: 您好，请问有什么是我可以为您效劳的吗？
E: Hello, is there anything I can help you with?

C: 很有名吗？
E: Is it famous?

C: …什、什么…怎么回事…呃…呜啊啊啊——
E: ...Wh—What... What is going on? Er... wahhh...

C: （持续的哽咽与抽泣声）
E: (more choking and sobbing)

C: 先别急着拒绝，来，看看这个——新鲜出炉的《银幕冲击波》！来好好见识一下老头子我的能耐吧！
E: Don't be so quick to shoot me down. Take a look at this freshly released Silver Screen Shockwave! Come see what this old man can do!

C: 让我猜猜她是怎么和你说的——
E: Let me guess what she told you...

C: 而且以公司的作风，我这个第一发现人肯定要被盘问个不停；不如早点溜走，好歹能捞着个清静。
E: Plus, based on the IPC's style, I knew I'd face endless interrogations as the person who made first contact. I'd be far better slipping off and getting some peace and quiet.

C: 那就一路平安吧——这是对无名客最好的祝福。
E: Then safe travels — the best wishes there could ever be for the Nameless.

C: 当我们打开舰长室的大门时，眼前只有空空如也的玻璃缸和杂乱丢弃的输液管——其中最大的那根链接着韦兰的后背……
E: When we opened the door to the captain's quarters, all we could see was an empty glass tank and scattered drips hanging about the place — the largest of which was hooked up to Wyland's back...

C: 接吻，洗澡，捉迷藏…这还真是花样繁多。
E: Kissing, washing, hide-and-seek... These sure are diverse.

C: 话说到一半，惠特克爵士冷笑了一声。
E: Sir Whittaker sneers.

C: 要是变得像他们一样，那还不如干脆把人生交给苏乐达呢！
E: I'd rather live my life drinking SoulGlad than become someone like them!

C: 要是变得像他们一样，那还不如干脆把人生交给苏乐达呢！
E: I'd rather live my life drinking SoulGlad than become someone like them!

C: 不就是一张纸吗？
E: It's just a piece of paper, right?

C: 明显是，没看见上面贴的纸条吗？「长效专利捍卫一纸通」…这又是什么新式整蛊？
E: Obviously. Didn't you see the note taped to it? Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier?... What kind of new trickery is this?

C: ——不行，撕不下来。看来不是一般的纸条，要不还是把这事汇报上去吧？
E: ...Hmm, I can't rip it off. It doesn't seem to be an ordinary note. Maybe we should report it?

C: <size=36>哈哈哈哈哈哈！！！</size>
E: <size=36>Hahahahaha!!!</size>

C: 我已经是银河巨星了。
E: I'm already a cosmic superstar.

C: 别拍马屁了，这份赔金得从你的酬金里扣。
E: Spare me your flattery. I'll deduct the compensation from your pay.

C: 幸存的门达希亚人自此开始流浪，无人相信星际难民口中的世外桃源，声乐之星存在过的证据只有几首叫做「纯美之歌」的音乐……
E: The surviving Mendasians have been wandering ever since, and no one believes in the paradise spoken of by those refugees. Only a few musical pieces, known as the "Song of Beauty," serve as evidence of the existence of the planet of canticles...

C: 歌声时而尖锐，时而粗野，你甚至不知道灵长目的声带能发出这样的声响，也无法评价这样的音乐是否能称得上动听，但你能感受到歌声中狂野的活力。
E: The song is sometimes shrill, sometimes raw, and you didn't even know these are sounds producible by a human's vocal cords. It's hard to tell if the music can be called "melodious," but the wild vigor within the song is palpable.

C: 哈，你未免把我想得太脆弱了…虽然我确实算不上硬汉。
E: Haha, I'm not that weak, though I'm not exactly tough either.

C: 我知道，所以我才会一直没法忘怀……
E: I know, and that's why I've not been able to move on from the incident...

C: 之前格拉克斯大道上有对小两口吵架，我出于好心上去调解。结果呢？两边一起怼起我来了。
E: Some time ago, a couple was bickering on Glaux Avenue. I went up to mediate out of goodwill, but what happened next? Both sides turned on me at the same time.

C: 你也不像本地人啊？
E: You don't look like a local either.

C: 唉，心累！我知道自己选择的并非一条康庄大道…我得一直抓踩着荆棘往上爬，这样才能离那些高高在上的梦想近一点、再近一点……
E: This is exhausting! I understand I've chosen a challenging path for myself... I have to brave through numerous hurdles to get closer to my lofty ambition...

C: 年轻人越发努力，他想要成功、想要证明自己。后来他又进军电影行业，想要让自己的作品为更多人所了解、所喜爱。
E: The youngster worked even harder, driven by a desire for success and a need to prove himself. Later, he ventured into the movie industry, aiming to make his works known and appreciated by a wider audience.

C: 总之，只要能得到垃圾，我就可以对它们进行无害化分解。
E: Anyway, I can break down all trash that comes my way into harmless substances.

C: 「想想看，我们在宇宙中曾经有那么多军事基地，里面肯定保存着前文明时期的超级兵器。」
E: "Think about all the military bases we used to have across the universe. There must be a lot of pre-civilization superweapons there."

C: 至少你活了下来。
E: At least you survived.

C: 感谢你，年轻的生命，感谢你对我的帮助，也感谢你愿意听我诉说。
E: Thank you, young one, for helping me and hearing me out.

C: 直到我来到匹诺康尼，并受邀加入了猎犬家系…他们看重我的天赋，认为我的「能力」能帮他们镇压暗藏于梦中的可怕存在。
E: That was until I came to Penacony and joined the Bloodhound Family... They valued my gift, and thought that my ability could help them suppress the terrifying existences that lurked in the dreams.

C: …嗯？我刚刚笑了吗…没什么，只是想着*罗斯玛丽*应该快到了……
E: ...Hmm? Did I just smile... It's nothing. I was just thinking about *Rosemary's* impending arrival...

C: 出乎意料…意图连结银河的开拓客，发言竟会如此粗鄙。回答你的问题——我是麦考。家主外出期间，我就是这间公馆的代理。
E: My word... Who knew Trailblazers hoping to unite the entire cosmos could be so uncouth? To answer your question: I'm McCoy, and I'm responsible for this pavilion while the family head is away.

C: 低价卖给匪徒们军火的是谁，我当然知道。只要他们还在反抗，我们就不得不继续从那女人手里收购军火。这么好的摇钱树，她怎么可能放手？
E: Of course, I know who cut those crooks a discount on those weapons. And we'll have to keep buying weapons from that lady for as long as they resist us. Why would she ever give up a cash cow like that?

C: 不是你雇去的？
E: They're not hired by you?

C: 一个叫奥科萨娜的军火商即将引发一场星系战争。
E: An arms dealer named Oksana is about to set off an intergalactic war.

C: 可这下好了，都怪那个小混蛋！
E: Bah, fantastic! It's all that brat's fault!

C: 我是您最忠实的仆从、最虔诚的信徒，您所指的方向将会是我前进唯一的道路！
E: I am your most loyal servant, your most devout follower. Wherever you command me, it shall be the only path I go!

C: 首先要找的是谐乐学院的<color=#dbc291ff>哈里森</color>。那个老小子延毕了这么多年，是时候挪窝了——懂我意思吧？
E: Firstly, you must find <color=#dbc291ff>Harrison</color>, a student at Charmony Academy. Having delayed his graduation for so many years, it's time for that old bloke to head out into the world... if you catch my drift?

C: 咕咕——你是一个热心肠的孩子，老鸟相信你只是在开玩笑。就算是认真的，也权当给老鸟这只<color=#dbc291ff>初代校长</color>一个面子，好吗？
E: Hoot, you're a warm-hearted child, so I trust you were just joking. But if you were serious, could you see it as doing a favor for the <color=#dbc291ff>first dean</color> instead?

C: 可惜，真正的才华，根本就不是从学校里教出来的……
E: It's such a pity that true talent is not something that can be taught in schools...

C: 在逐渐模糊的声音中，忆泡破裂了，那光在你眼前转瞬即逝。
E: As the voices become faded, the Memory Bubble bursts and the light dissipates before your eyes.

C: 「该不会没有下文了吧？」你试着揣测黑塔的作风，但很快又将这个念头从脑子里摘了出去，因为以黑塔的性格，她可能只会公开一章「作者序」就作罢了。
E: "Is that all she wrote?" You try guessing at Herta's style but quickly erase that idea from your mind — because Herta very well might just have published an author's preface and left it at that.

C: 农业设备。
E: Agricultural equipment.

C: 你掀开箱盖，里面是随手堆放的信号灯和金属外壳。
E: You open the crate to find a messy pile of signal lights and metal casings.

C: 怎么样，东西带来没有？
E: Well, did you bring me the items?

C: 哈欠——我得赶快回大树了，不然妃色夫人要发现咱在偷懒了啾~
E: Yawn — I have to get back to the big tree soon, otherwise Lady Vermilion is gonna find out I'm slacking off, tweet~

C: 真讨厌，大家总是在偷懒啾，这种态度怎么做好筑梦鸟，气死了啾！
E: So annoying. Everyone's always slacking off, tweet. How can they be good dreambirds with that kind of attitude. I'm livid, tweet!

C: 啾~讨厌啦，客人为什么总是追着人家不放啾~
E: Tweet~ Oh, please no! Why are you always chasing after me, dear customer? Tweet~

C: 这是一个四分音符…
E: This is a quarter note...

C: （无动于衷）
E: (Indifferent)

C: 不、我不信啾…啾！我知道了，你一定就是我等待已久的「命中注定的对手」啾！
E: No, I don't believe it, tweet... Tweet! I know, you must be the one I've been waiting for a long time — my destined rival!

C: 至、至于来看流星的情侣们，我只是顺带瞄一眼…没错，就一眼啾！
E: A—As for the couples who're here to watch the shooting stars, I just happen to have had a quick look... That's right. Just a quick look, tweet!

C: 哎呀，甜果子不够分了啾！
E: Oh dear, there are not enough treats to go around, tweet!

C: 在你动手前…我还有最后一个问题…啾……
E: Before you make your final blow... I have a last question... Tweet...

C: 小鸟粗暴地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
E: The bird snatches the coin from you viciously, and then... gobbles it up!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个助手总觉得<color=#dbc291ff>广场上的「消防栓」</color>不够酷炫，想在设计上多加点花样啾~想法足够酷炫，但做出来的效果…嗯嗯……
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a helper that always complains that the <color=#dbc291ff>fire hydrant at the plaza</color> isn't stylish enough, and wants to create even more designs, tweet! It's got some great concepts, but when the actual thing is created... Mmm...

C: 欢迎您来到全小镇最宏大、最华丽的奇迹——「金叶广场」啾！
E: Welcome to the town's grandest and most magnificent miracle — Goldleaf Plaza, tweet!

C: 大战石头老板看腻了…
E: I'm sick of watching Boss Stone fight...

C: 捡宝石！
E: Pick up gems!

C: 因为恐龙头顶没有毛。
E: Because the dinosaur has no hair on its head.

C: 钟表乐园——啾——
E: Clockland... Tweet...

C: 庆祝美梦小镇里值得纪念的每一天啾~
E: We celebrate every day in Dreamville, as they are all worth commemorating, tweet~

C: 美梦小镇在上，我要找主办方退钱啾！
E: By the name of Dreamville, I'm going to get a refund from the organizer, tweet!

C: 一想到她在历经千辛万苦后，还是倒在了终点线前，我的眼泪就会像苏乐达一样喷出来啾。
E: Each time I recall her arduous hardships, only to falter just before the finishing line after all that she's been through, my tears flow like SoulGlad, tweet.

C: 还是多休息下吧。
E: Rest more.

C: 小鸟怎么会调这种饮料啊，你是来找茬啾？
E: How could a bird make that? Are you looking for trouble, tweet?

C: 哼哼，喜欢折纸小鸟的人可多了，超乎你的想象啾。
E: Heh-heh, there are plenty of people — beyond your wildest imagination — who like origami birds, tweet.

C: 啾啾，啾？我怎么跑气球里了？
E: Tweet tweet, tweet? How'd I get in this balloon?

C: 你好熟练...
E: You really know your stuff...

C: 怎么听起来像上班一样...哦，我懂了，你肯定是靠着锲而不舍的精神才变得如此强大，对不对？
E: Why does that feel like a real job... Ah, I see! You mean that you only became this strong through hard work and perseverance, correct?

C: 丹枢大人让你不必担心，她只是来陪小鱼玩的，不会做什么坏事的。
E: And she asks you not to worry. She said she's just here to play with me and won't do anything bad.

C: 再见啦，丹枢大人。
E: Farewell, Lady Dan Shu.

C: 我恰好是来回收禁书的。
E: Don't worry. I'm here to retrieve this forbidden book.

C: 你放心，我会小心的。
E: Don't worry. I will be careful.

C: 您才是一定要小心啊！
E: Please, do be careful!

C: 你交还了《瘈狂之卷》并讲述了回收它的过程。
E: You return the Manuscript of Delirium and explain how you've retrieved it.

C: 就比如说前几天吧，我抽中了「苍城」签，这个卦象的意思是「突如其来的惨烈打击」……
E: For example, I drew the "Cangcheng" hexagram the other day, which indicates "a sudden and tragic blow"...

C: 感觉他实在太倒霉了。
E: His bad luck is really something else.

C: 你注意到似有狂徒在此处进行了某些破坏行为，墓碑上厚厚的尘土与附近的纸屑便是最好的证明。
E: You notice some loons have done a bit of vandalism nearby, as evidenced by the thick dust gathered on the tombstone and scraps of paper nearby.

C: 「尚滋味」的燕翠大厨！
E: Master Yancui at the Spices Supreme!

C: 就像是有一位香炉领导对着众香炉说「你们之中谁想接受这个困难的任务，就向前迈出一步」，结果其他香炉默默地往后退了一步。
E: It's like an incense burner leader barking at its incense burner rookies: "Whosoever wants to take on this difficult assignment, take one step forward!" — and seeing them all shuffle back in silence.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 你简直——不可理喻！
E: You... You are unbelievable!

C: 有一点你说对了…你在追求的「美」不过是个诅咒。你根本不懂如何去爱……
E: You were right about one thing... The "beauty" that you seek in life is nothing more than a curse. You never understood how to love...

C: 老爸心里有数…
E: Your father knows what he is doing...

C: 旅途罹患
E: A voyage through peril, fraught with woe,

C: 您愿意帮我吗？真是太好了，您真是一位人{F#美}{M#俊}心善的{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: Really? That's wonderful! You're so kind and {F#enchanting}{M#dashing}, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}.

C: 我又不是酒。
E: I am not alcohol.

C: 如今因我一瓶的过错，耽误了黄和小红的前程，你们去吧，最香醇的酒非你们莫属。
E: Now, because of my mistake, I have delayed both of your futures, Yellow, Red. Both of you, go on ahead, the title of finest wine belongs to you.

C: 哈？！就它们俩那玩意儿还好意思笑我牌子？也不倒半杯出来照照自己是什么东西。
E: Wha—!? Those cheap toys dare mock my label? Why don't they pour out half a glass each and see what swill they're filled with!

C: 工业酒精？当初赚我入伙的时候，是谁夸我是三瓶里最辣的那个？
E: Industrial alcohol? When they tricked me into joining, who was it that said I was the most ferocious of us all?

C: 说来也惭愧，目前为止，我还没找到真正有用的线索。
E: Though I am ashamed to admit it, I've yet to discover any useful clues for this case...

C: 广告牌侦探低着头，若有所思地离开了。
E: Billboard Detective hangs his head and leaves as if deep in thought.

C: 这可真是让人意外。你永远可以信赖这个冰冷的男人…呃，他物理意义上的温度确实不算高，对吧？
E: Now that was unexpected! You can always count on that cold man... Ahem, well his biological temperature is not high, is it?

C: …她果然真就在这里。一语成谶。
E: ...She really was already here. Seriously, speak of the Devil...

C: 那还能有假？要不我这第一门徒的身份哪儿来的？
E: Do you not believe in me? How do you think I've become THEIR first disciple?

C: 对吧，而且我们也不是天天都在抢劫，平时也会一起打打牌、玩玩以太战线、看看钟表小子什么的。
E: Right? Plus we ain't robbin' people every day. Sometimes we play cards or Aetherium Wars together or just watch Clockie n' stuff...

C: 我会先向你演示一遍，很难的，请一定要记住。
E: I'll demonstrate it for ya. It's real hard, so make sure ya memorize it.

C: 你有没有发现，周围的臭味都消失了？那可都是我的功劳哦。
E: Don't know if ya noticed that the stench 'round here has disappeared? That was my hard work!

C: 给你买台加压器？
E: You want me to buy you a pressurizer?

C: 虽然不易察觉，但你确实注意到她一时间似乎怔住了。但她很快恢复镇静，对你笑了笑——尽管声音依旧有些颤抖。
E: The reaction is almost imperceptible, but you definitely notice her momentary shock. She restores her composure very quickly, and flashes a smile at you — even if her voice trembles ever so slightly.

C: 我要走咯？
E: Should I be off, then?

C: 喔！
E: Whoa!

C: 我看老板你是个英明的开明的精明的…咳、总之是个明白人，所以就想着给出点合理建议——
E: I reckoned that in all your brilliance and enlightenment and astuteness... Ahem, you know what's up anyway, so I thought I'd offer a suggestion...

C: 其实咱的要求也不高，有没有名气不重要，唱的好就成…对了，我还有个小小的不情之请……
E: It's not like our expectations are all that high. Fame is secondary, as long as the person sings well... Oh yes, I also have a teensy-weensy favor...

C: 我会一刻不停地为你鼓掌~
E: I will be applauding non-stop for you!

C: 「鸟儿会在落日时分歌唱吗？」
E: "Will birds sing at sunset?"

C: 你想起在流梦礁遇见的一位女士，思忖片刻后，你笃定这正是她大显身手的好机会。
E: You remember meeting a lady at the Dreamflux Reef. After a moment's contemplation, you decide that this is the perfect opportunity for her to flaunt her talents.

C: 在你的主动邀请下，她答应前来表演。
E: On your invitation, she agrees to perform.

C: 嗯，还是交由{NICKNAME}自己来操作吧，该看什么{F#她}{M#他}心里清楚。
E: Hmm, we should leave the controls to {NICKNAME}. {F#She}{M#He} would know best what to show us.

C: …我也不知道。
E: ...I don't know either.

C: 准备好了？
E: Are you ready?

C: 现在知道了也只是满足好奇心。
E: Even if we discovered the secret, it would only satisfy our curiosity now.

C: 喂，你是逃犯吧。
E: Hey, you're an escaped prisoner, aren't you?

C: 我已经联系狱卒了。
E: I've already informed the prison guards.

C: 记得。
E: I remember.

C: 倒是不用。他们似乎确认了我们并非是「求药使」，打算放我们走了。
E: Oh, that won't be necessary. It seems like they have verified that we're not Elixir Seekers and have decided to let us go.

C: 剧本不用写了，剪辑也不需要，主打一个原汁原味的沉浸式体验。
E: Forget the script and the editing. Let's focus on an original and authentic immersive experience.

C: 老白这人爱舰如命，竞锋舰既是他亲手设计的孩子，也是仙舟的脸面。
E: Old Bai treasures this ship like he does his own life. The Skysplitter is his child that he designed himself, and it is the face of the Xianzhou.

C: 当然，我也不会一直按着你的头，要求你抬头看编队表演…现在你可以自由活动，自由观察，要是看完有任何心得，请记得向我报告！
E: Of course, I'm not planning on holding your head the whole time and forcing you to keep watching the flight team... You are free now, free to watch as you please. If you have any thoughts to share after watching, make sure to come and tell me!

C: 现在，开始点名——威廉·威尔逊！
E: Now for roll call — William Wilson!

C: 算了，旁边那个智械小子，你起来答。
E: Forget it. That Intellitron fella beside you, you answer.

C: 一阵清脆的碰撞声，出现在你面前的是……
E: A crisp bang, and the one appearing before you is...

C: 叫{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！
E: It's {F#Miss}{M#Mister}!

C: 诶诶诶，怎么变回来了？
E: Wait! Hold on! How did I turn back?

C: 还是别乱碰了。
E: Don't touch it.

C: 你按响了一旁的叫餐铃，那位神秘的「心理诊疗师」很快来到了你面前。
E: You ring the bell for service on the side, and the mysterious Psychotherapist quickly approaches you.

C: 只剩半杯水了…
E: The glass is half empty...

C: 您身上有一定「悲观开拓者」的因素。但请别担心，您能够充分预见开拓途中遭遇的困难，并早早做好准备，这也是非常重要的特质。
E: You are a bit of a Pessimistic Trailblazer. But don't worry. That gives you an important quality, which is the foresight to prepare for challenges ahead while trailblazing.

C: …为什么要我把手放进去？
E: ...Why do you want me to put my hand inside?

C: 真的吗？你真是这么认为的吗？在你实际遇到这种情况，并把钱掏出来之前，希望能有人来拦住你。
E: Really? Are you absolutely sure? If you really run into such a circumstance, I hope someone stops you before you whip out your wallet.

C: 这是什么又臭又长的题目，这群狮子越来越花里胡哨了。
E: Such a disgustingly long-winded problem. This rabble of lions is getting creative.

C: 人不可能在两天履行同一份契约。所以，你根本不用还钱。
E: No one would be able to fulfill the same contract on two different days. Thus, you don't need to fork out a single coin.

C: 嘿嘿，切莫急着回答，还有一个要求——
E: Heehee, don't be hasty with your answer. I have another request...

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
E: My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: 看来阿格莱雅仍在忙碌，只有这两句谜题般的回应…但既然她如此笃定，莫非题目里还藏有什么玄机？
E: From her cryptic but curt messages, it seems like Aglaea is still busy... but if she's so sure, perhaps there are still some mysteries hidden within the question?

C: 是阿格莱雅。
E: It was Aglaea.

C: 「另附：你的防火墙被数据紊流轰出一个缺口，我就是从那里溜进来的，建议尽快补上。」
E: "P.S. Your Firewall was breached by data turbulence, and that's where I slipped in. I suggest you patch it up as soon as possible."

C: 还是看看冰箱里都被他们塞了什么东西吧……
E: Let's see what they've stuffed this refrigerator full of, shall we...?

C: 呼呼，感谢，遇见你真是太好了。我孤苦无依地躺在这好久，路过的人们络绎不绝，可谁都不愿停下来看我一眼！哎，世风日下啊……
E: *crackle* I'm very thankful to have met you. I was down on the ground for a long time, but no one stopped and paid me any mind! What has this world come to...

C: 这不是我需要的薪柴！呼呼，灵火蕴含万物，但想熔化这个还是太费劲了！
E: This is not the firewood I need! *crackle* The spiritual flame contains everything, but it will take too much effort to melt this.

C: 我直接跳上桌子吃吃吃。
E: I'll join the table and start feasting on the delicacies.

C: 这位陌生人啊，设身处地的想一想吧。倘若你在大街上见到有人故意破坏公物，你要怎么做？
E: Stranger, please think in my shoes. What would you do if you caught someone damaging public property on the streets?

C: 协助修复谐乐大典。
E: I'd assist in fixing the mistake and make sure the Charmony Festival can run smoothly again.

C: 真是多亏了你…
E: It's all thanks to you...

C: 当然是钱。
E: Money, of course.

C: 当然是抢钱！
E: Robbing people of money, obviously!

C: 好，我教你如何清理垃圾。
E: Alright, I'll teach you how to clean up trash.

C: 说得对，我这腿还不够强健…腿要怎么练？请师傅赐教！
E: You're right, my legs aren't quite strong enough... How should I train them? Please teach me, Master!

C: 我给你跪下了！你能不能不要这么说话，天哪，我的垃圾疙瘩都要掉出来了，好恶心……
E: I'm begging you... Can you stop talking like this? My goodness, all of my trashy goosebumps were about to fall off. How disgusting...

C: 无视垃圾桶，继续前行。
E: Ignore the trashcan and continue forward.

C: 打电话叫你来帮忙。
E: I'll call you for help.

C: 如果是白厄的话，一定会这么做的。
E: If it were Phainon, he definitely would.

C: 你小心翼翼地打开信箱的门，震下阵阵草屑。蛛网和苔藓之间，一封新的来信正躺在那摞信封的顶端。
E: You gently open the door, scattering bits of grass and dust. Amid the cobwebs and moss, a brand-new letter lies on top of the old stack.

C: 怀着忐忑不安的心情，你在信箱附近等了一整天。直到某个时刻，你忽地听见了「哐当」的声响……
E: With a nervous heart, you waited by the mailbox all day. Until, at a certain hour, you heard a sharp "clang"...

C: （你要好好吃饭，好好睡觉，每天都要开开心心的！）
E: (Make sure you're eating well, sleeping tight, and smiling every single day!)

C: 点点红色从叶片间绽放而出，那是新生的花朵。
E: Tiny specks of red peek out from between the leaves — newborn flowers awakening.

C: 无论如何…我们必须联系上他们。
E: In any case... we must reach them somehow.

C: 为了探得权杖内部的讯息，我曾花费半个琥珀纪的时间，制作出一枚<color=#dbc291ff>识刻锚</color>。
E: To explore information inside the scepter, I once spent half an Amber Era creating a <color=#dbc291ff>Chronocognitive Anchor</color>.

C: 告诉你一个秘密，这些在风中转悠的大家伙其实不是摆设哦。
E: Let me tell you a secret. These big contraptions that turn amidst the winds aren't just decorations.

C: 书上说，每当夜晚降临，会有一颗贼星划过永夜之帷的画布。它会偷听人们许下的愿望，悄悄将其实现……
E: I read that when night falls, a Thief Star will streak across the Veil of Evernight. It will eavesdrop on the wishes people make and quietly fulfill them...

C: …刻法勒的信者？看你的衣着整齐，不像是上战场的人，倒确有几分可能。
E: ...A disciple of Kephale? Judging by your proper appearance, I guess I can believe that you were not one for the battlefield.

C: …这时，你的球棒从口袋中掉了出来，不偏不倚正好砸在木马的壳上。
E: ...At that very moment, your baseball bat falls from your pocket and happens to strike the frame of the wooden horse.

C: 我是听说有位神驹在传送过程中迷失了，却没想到是在悬锋城。
E: I knew of a divine foal lost in teleportation, but never guessed it would be at Castrum Kremnos.

C: 哼，神驹独自在世间奔行，谁不曾忍受过旅途的孤寂？只因为有使命在身。
E: Hmph. Every divine foal gallops alone in the world, and all of us have experienced the biting pains of solitude. We bear it for our calling.

C: 「死亡从未平等」
E: There's no equality in death

C: 木马无言地杵在原地。能感觉到，它身上曾流淌的某种灵智已然彻底消散。
E: The wooden horse stands motionless, now an empty vessel. The spark of life that once animated it has faded into nothingness.

C: 队长，我的丈夫和孩子还在市集里…求求您去救救他们吧！
E: Captain, my husband and child are still in the market... Please, I beg you, save them!

C: 宝贝儿…带秘酿来…不管聊天还是别的…我都陪你……
E: My dear... Bring ambrosia... Chat or otherwise... I'll accompany you...

C: 看，深呼吸，像是我这样，吸气…呼气…没错，这样就能调节好了。
E: Take a deep breath. Inhale... exhale... right, this is how I adjust my breathing.

C: 你喜欢莱斯莉吗？
E: Do you like Lesley?

C: 咳……咳咳！！好难受…这也太难喝了。
E: *Cough* I can't take it anymore... it's disgusting.

C: 算你识相。以后少来管教我，也不要到处打听关于莱斯莉的消息。
E: That's a wise thing to do. Leave me alone. And stop prying on Lesley.

C: 你怎么一副不感兴趣的样子？难道这还不算有意思的事情么？
E: You don't seem very interested. Isn't it interesting to you?

C: 嗯…那就一三五让古恩来整理，二四六让温天翁来整理吧！
E: Well... I'll ask Gunn to come in the even days of the week and Wen Tianweng to come in the odd days of the week!

C: 我还有些问题想要问…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 当然可以！你算是问对人啦，整个空间站里至少八成的包裹是我的……
E: Of course! You are asking the expert. Of every <unbreak>10</unbreak> parcels delivered here, 8 are mine...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 才不是呢！不许这么说阮•梅女士！她只是、她只是…只是在忙别的事，这里这么乱也不方便回来！
E: That's impossible! Don't ever say such things about Miss Ruan Mei! I'm sure she's just... just caught up by other matters. There's no good time for her to come back as the place is too much of a mess now!

C: 好了好了，别再喊我了！
E: Alright, alright! Stop calling for me!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 我还不确定，这是否能证明它们有和人类相似的大脑分区与思考模式…总之还是要继续观察下去。
E: I can't say for sure whether this can prove they possess brain issues and thought patterns that are similar to those of humans... Anyway, I need to keep on observing.

C: 再见。
E: Bye.

C: 他们怎么不说话了？不会真是赝品吧？
E: Why aren't they talking? Could the items be counterfeit?

C: 矛的成色，再试验一番……
E: The lance's quality, one shall test again...

C: 仪式的开启需要三种道具，而你注意到卷轴底部印有某种烫金，三种道具的纹路都嵌在纹章的图样之中。
E: The ceremony initiation requires three types of objects. You notice that something is gilded at the bottom of the scroll — the patterns of the three items are embedded in golden stamps.

C: 仪式的开启需要三种道具，而你注意到卷轴底部印有某种烫金，三种道具的纹路都嵌在纹章的图样之中。
E: The ceremony initiation requires three types of objects. You notice that something is gilded at the bottom of the scroll — the patterns of the three items are embedded in golden stamps.

C: 好，依我看，我们不妨继续刚才的辩论。理念与现实，究竟何者更为可靠？
E: Very well. I think that we may as well continue the debate that we were having before: Ideals or reality, which is more reliable?

C: 覆灭前的阿卡索斯，与现今被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯，是否为同一物？
E: Are the Icatus that existed before its destruction and the Icatus that has now been devoured by the black tide the same thing?

C: 你究竟在想什么？！做出这种事情——你难道不知道可能有队员会因此丧命吗？！
E: What the heck were you thinking, pulling a stunt like that? ...Don't you know that could get someone killed!?

C: 当然，这并不代表她还活着——只是考虑到老人现在的状态，你并未将这半句说出口。
E: Of course, this doesn't necessarily mean that she's still alive... But out of consideration for the old lady's condition, you spare her the second half of that thought.

C: 就算你不怕危险，也得先做好准备再启程。你也不希望半途而废吧？
E: You might not be afraid of anything, but you still need to get yourself ready before you head out again. You don't want to give up halfway, do you?

C: 现在还不是松懈的时候，至少我们要先把收尾工作处理好。
E: Stay focused. We still have cleanup duties to handle.

C: 现在，你想再重温一遍那时的情景吗？
E: Would you like to revisit that moment now?

C: 黑潮怪物的尸骸毫无生气地散落一地。此刻它这副安静的模样，让人很难想象其在尚可活动时，是多么的危险与疯狂。
E: The lifeless remains of black tide monsters lie scattered about. Their current stillness makes it hard to imagine how dangerous and frenzied they were while still active.

C: 一把刃尖破损、但整体尚且完好的剑，剑身上布满黑褐脏污，让人几乎难以分辨其原貌。
E: A broken-tipped sword, still largely whole, lies coated in stains that mask its original appearance.

C: 嗯…五点一条去结账吧。
E: Mmm... one for 5 credits, please.

C: 我这不是急着用嘛！我和你什么交情啊，你都忘了是吧？
E: I'm in a hurry here! Aren't we supposed to be friends? Have you forgotten that?

C: 哼，等着吧！
E: Hmm, hold on!

C: ……你为什么要把她的声音比作闹铃，把她的身影比作呜呜伯？
E: ... Why do you have to compare her voice to an alarm clock — and her figure to a Wubbaboo?

C: …总之就是很焦虑。
E: ...So, I'm really anxious right now.

C: 思念是一种病啊！
E: Longing is a sickness!

C: 科可波阁下，听我诉说——我知道悬锋族人在奥赫玛过得极为不易，也深知适应绝非一朝一夕便能完成，但这是我们必须走的路。
E: Kokopo, hear my plea — I know the Kremnoans struggle in Okhema, and adaptation isn't something achieved overnight. But this is the path we must walk.

C: 是神明！害我众叛亲离，妻离子散……
E: The gods! They've left me isolated, betrayed, and bereft...

C: 贵宾，您说的是那个小女孩吗？
E: Distinguished guest, are you referring to that small girl?

C: …等下次见到那个老爷爷，还是和他道个歉吧。他也只是活在自己的世界里……
E: ...Next time I see that old man, I should still apologize to him. He's just living in his own world...

C: 不过话说回来，今天我的确没有签名的兴致。
E: But that being said, I'm really not in the mood to sign autographs today.

C: 还是想想更可靠的办法吧。
E: Maybe we should think of a more reliable plan.

C: 而且，必须要报仇雪恨…可恶的怪物，害得我们的翻本计划全泡汤了！
E: And we must avenge ourselves... those stupid monsters ruined our whole plan to make a comeback!

C: 我们之前被元老院没收的假货…呃，货物，就放在附近，我们可以把它取来。
E: The counterfeit goods... uh, the merchandise that was confiscated by the Council of Elders before, are nearby. We can go retrieve them.

C: 抓紧时间吧，你们可以每人向泰坦祈祷一会儿。
E: Don't waste time. You can all pray to the Titan for a while.

C: 会伸出手把我们接应到新世界吗？还是说，在我们死了很久以后，吹一口气让我们重新复活？我很害怕死，我、我希望是前面那种……
E: Will you reach out and take us to the new world? Or it's like, after we've been dead for a long time, you'll breathe a breath and resurrect us? I'm very scared of dying, so I—I hope it is the first...

C: 「欢宴之出口，虚妄的边境」…他是想，离开斯缇科西亚？！
E: "The egress of banquets, the border of futility"... Is he planning to leave Styxia!?

C: 嗯，当然没事，我还想接着与大家欢享这场盛宴呢。
E: Hmm, of course I'm fine. I'd love to keep enjoying this banquet with everyone.

C: 那，维吉妮娅的告白……
E: So, about Verginia's confession...

C: 不，小维吉妮娅，你说得对，这里就是新世界。我的意思是…也许是时候，直面并希求你那澎湃的心灵了。
E: No, little Verginia, you're right, this is the new world. What I mean is... maybe it's time to face and embrace that passionate soul of yours.

C: 去看看吧。去看看那悬石滚落、微风倾止的幻宴边境，我那些伙伴们…最真实的样子。
E: Go and see. Go see the border of this illusory banquet, where stones hang suspended and gentle winds cease. See my companions... in their truest form.

C: 无论是怒而离开树庭，还是身先士卒讨伐海洋…你总是将自己视作一枚顽石，试图悬住世界的命运。
E: Whether storming out of the Grove in anger, or leading the charge against Ocean... you always see yourself as an immovable boulder, trying to hold the world's destiny in balance.

C: 我不知道海瑟音在哪。
E: I have no idea where to find Hysilens.

C: 抿一下。
E: Take a sip.

C: 它还挺擅长推销的。
E: They've got quite the silver tongue.

C: 柔和的口感，花香，水生调…这真的是蜜酿？不对，你确信这个味道似乎在哪里……
E: Silky consistency, floral fragrance, water elements... Is this actually honey brew? No, wait... this taste seems familiar, like you've had it somewhere...

C: 唔，我算是明白为什么总有人喜欢这种古老笨重又不方便的「大块头」了。
E: Huh... What with them being so big and heavy, I used to wonder why anyone would ever buy a Phonograph. Think I'm starting to get it now.

C: 哇，列车的窗外就是宇宙吗？
E: Wowwww, so everything outside the window is the universe?

C: 虎克就特批帕姆为鼹鼠党的荣誉队员吧。
E: Hook will make Pom-Pom an honorary member of The Moles.

C: 现在，贝洛伯格的自然环境现正在逐步恢复正常，那些令使随时都有可能卷土重来……
E: Things are getting back on track for Belobog, but those Emanators could return one day...

C: 啊，没有冒犯的意思。在下略懂医术，观你的行气节奏，感觉脉象有异。
E: Goodness! I don't mean to offend... I happen to have some medical knowledge, and while observing the flow of your qi, I noticed something unusual about your pulse.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you all right?

C: 你就这么想走吗？
E: Looky here, someone is in a rush to leave.

C: 梦里有我吗？
E: Was I in your dream?

C: 嗯，如果你还有什么和星神有关的问题，可以随时来找我。
E: Okay. You can come find me again if you have any other questions about the Aeons.

C: 哦…是{NICKNAME}啊。抱歉，我还以为是那些人过来了……
E: Oh... It's you, {NICKNAME}. Sorry, I thought those people are here...

C: 曾经的波少粉丝后援会核心会员，现如今的卡波特头号抵制人员…哎，你也或多或少有听说的吧？在拉明娜那件事儿之后，大家对我的看法什么的。
E: The previous core members of the Master Capote Fan Club are now my biggest haters... You've heard about this, right? About how everyone views me after what happened with Lamina?

C: 我还有些事要给你说…
E: I still need to talk to you about something.

C: 哈欠——困死了。啊…又是你，这次又是什么事？
E: *Yawn* I'm so sleepy. You again? What's up?

C: 没想到，贝洛伯格以外的天地居然这么广阔……
E: I never thought the world beyond Belobog could be so huge...

C: 前两天我在雪原里找到了这个……
E: I found this in the Snow Plains the other day...

C: 噢，这话我爱听！虽然我也想去更有生机的地方看两眼，但那些地方毕竟不是自己的家乡，你说是吧？
E: Yeah, that's the spirit! I wanna see some places with a little more get up and go, y'know? Still, those places wouldn't be home.

C: 哈，真壮观！
E: Wow, how magnificent!

C: 我看你们也经常要和险恶的敌人作战，不进行常规化的体能训练怎么行！
E: I figured you folks fight nasty enemies all the time. How can you not have regular physical training?

C: 训练…训练。
E: Training... Training...

C: 很久没遇上像你这么有趣的人了。下次有机会，我们再好好交流交流~
E: I haven't met anyone as interesting as you for a while. We should talk more when we get another chance!

C: 藿藿，欢迎来到星穹列车。
E: Welcome to the Astral Express, Huohuo.

C: 我听列车长说，你在黑塔空间站遭遇意外，然后突然就踏上了星际旅途？
E: I heard the conductor say something happened on Herta Space Station... and then without meaning to, you found yourself on a journey through the stars.

C: …唔，其实我也这么觉得。
E: ...Hee-hee, I think so too.

C: 任务罢了。
E: Work is still work.

C: 指尖触碰纸张的触感，翻动书页时的声响，都会在思路闭塞时给予大脑刺激，引导你一步步走出瓶颈。
E: The sensation of paper under one's fingertips, the sound of turning a page — they provide psychological stimulation when one's thoughts are stalled, leading you gradually out of any mental impasse.

C: 他宝贝的！我难道中邪了？总觉得这股怨气越来越重…也不知道是什么仇什么怨，有问题打一架不就行了！
E: Holy fudgin' shirtballs! Am I possessed? It feels like the resentment is getting stronger... I don't even know what this grudge is about, but if there's a problem, then let's just fight!

C: 说实话，这种费脑子的哲理我根本就不在意。但谁让我那天被一个小孩儿讲了半天道理呢？
E: To be honest, I don't care for this kind of mind-numbing philosophy. But the other day, I got lectured by a little kid about this!

C: 放心吧！帕姆不会怪你的！
E: Don't worry! Pom-Pom won't be mad at you!

C: 不愧是你，{NICKNAME}。这是带有「记忆」祝福的特有文字，来自一个遥远的古老星球。
E: Impressive, {NICKNAME}. These are words specially imbued with a blessing of Remembrance — they hail from a distant, ancient planet.

C: …虚幻和空想似乎困住了你。若不想原地止步，需强制自己从美好的幻想中脱离出来，回到现实，这样才能找到属于自己的方向。
E: ...The illusory and imaginary appear to have you shackled. If you do not wish to stay stagnant, you must force yourself to break free from these fantasies and return to reality — this is the only way you can find your own path.

C: 记得，连盆栽都记得。
E: Of course I remember, I even remember the plant.

C: 嗯，嗯嗯！我帮你问问。
E: Okay! I'll ask for you.

C: （甜甜的，有着浓郁奶香气息的糕点，吃下去一定很幸福吧……）
E: (A pastry with this sweet, rich milk flavor must taste so good...)

C: 难道是这「开拓」的空气异于常世？那小女子可要趁着机会好好呼吸了…呼……
E: Could it be that the air of "the Trailblaze" is different from normal air? Then I must use this opportunity to take a few deep breaths... Ah...

C: 正在抢修中……
E: Undergoing emergency repairs...

C: 外面好可怕，要不是有「威名赫赫」大人在，我们一定…呜呜！
E: It's scary outside. If it were not for our Sir Exemplary, then we'd surely... *sob*

C: 我头顶的颜色是天生的，你这个…是在哪里染的吗？
E: The color on top of my head is natural. Did you get yours dyed somewhere?

C: 在科员们撤走以后，全局监控系统仍在运行。
E: The overall station surveillance system has been operating normally since the evacuation of the researchers.

C: 不过别太声张，我华劳斯怎么也是个有头有面的人物…不要闹得满城皆知！
E: But keep it discreet — I'm a well-known figure out there... I wouldn't want the whole city in an uproar!

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 帕姆喜欢甜甜圈、星穹列车，还有…列车上的所有乘客！
E: Pom-Pom loves donuts, the Astral Express, and all the passengers aboard the train!

C: 呵呵，人呐，一辈子总得来趟行政区，要不怎么好自称贝洛伯格人呢？你还是挺幸运的，不像我，打小在这长大，住得都麻木了。
E: Heh, everyone needs to visit the Administrative District at least once in their lifetime. How would they be able to call themselves a citizen of Belobog if they don't? You're lucky, I've grown numb to this place from growing up here.

C: 合理分配工作和休息时间，有利于我们提高工作效率。我能理解大家焦虑的心情，但还请你们耐心等待。
E: A reasonable time allotment for both work and break helps improve efficiency. I understand your anxiety, but I'll have to ask you to be patient.

C: 听明白了吗，这位市民朋友？
E: Do you understand, my friend?

C: 还有，下层区的民生问题并不在我的职责范围内。你要想咨询下层区的事务，请咨询下层区临时政务官员。
E: Also, the livelihoods of people in the Underworld is not within my job responsibilities. If you want to inquire about the Underworld, please submit your inquiries to an Underworld interim administrative official.

C: 你应该去写小说…
E: You should write a novel.

C: 严格来说，是行政区唯一的房产中介——我在别的区有几个竞争对手，不过嘛，你看地盘就知道谁更厉害，他们可休想染指行政区。
E: Technically, I'm the only one in the Administrative District. I do have a few competitors in other districts, but I'm sure you can tell who deals with bigger clients judging by the areas we operate in. They won't be a threat to me in a million years.

C: 如果您能赏光在这里留下自己的签名，那就帮大忙了。当然，如果您有任何顾虑，也尽可发问……
E: It would be wonderful if you could sign here. Of course, feel free to raise any concerns...

C: 没错，没错！当然了，我只是用一种非常浅显的方式向你解释，这里面的玄机其实深了去了……
E: Yes, yes, well I'm trying to explain things in layman's terms. The real mechanism behind this is far more complicated...

C: 哪有音乐剧演员是自己不能开口唱歌的。这不就和演话剧的不背台词，要找人配音念剧本一样可笑嘛……
E: How embarrassing would it be if a musical performer can't sing with her own voice? It's ridiculous! I'll be like thespians who can't remember their lines and need others to read out the script for them.

C: 干脆我试试找些演员们，商量下类型不同的新剧目…如何？
E: You know what? I'll see if I can bring some artists together and try some new things. How does that sound?

C: 我有问题想问你…
E: Can I ask a question...?

C: 那可真是一本好书呀，之前被查禁了真的很可惜…你也是《奇谭》的书迷吗？我现在正在全程跟进相关信息哦，如果有什么新进展肯定第一时间告诉你！
E: That book series is simply fantastic. It was such a shame that it was banned before... Are you a Tales fan? I've been keeping up with all the news about it. If I hear any updates, I'll be sure to tell you right away!

C: 嘿嘿，您甭着急！再看看这个：「七人聚众火锅，六人相继昏倒；调查发现火锅里并无有害物质，凶手如何达成完美犯罪？」
E: Hold on! Check out this one — Six out of seven people fainted while eating hot pot. No harmful substances were found in the hot pot. How did this perfect crime happen?

C: 你想急死我？
E: Are you messing with me?

C: 我可没有讨厌「地火」，我只是觉得他们太过理想化了。别看我是个家庭主妇，但外面的情况我还是知道的。
E: I don't hate Wildfire. I just think they're too idealistic. I might be just a housewife, but I know a thing or two about the outside world.

C: 那不然呢？成天就知道惹事，安分点找个稳定的工作不好吗？
E: Of course. They stir up trouble all day. They should settle down and get stable jobs.

C: 另外，流浪者那边好像有说唱表演来着？我欣赏不来，也没去过，只是有所耳闻。你要是感兴趣可以去逛逛，就是去的时候得注意安全。
E: Also, I heard there will be a rap concert where the vagrants are? I don't know how to appreciate that kind of thing, so I've never been there. Go check it out if you are interested. Just be careful there.

C: 总觉得…
E: I feel...

C: …至于磁场，虽然眼睛看不见，但你也不能断定它不存在，是吧？
E: As for the magnetic field, although its not visible, you can't fully deny its existence, right?

C: 嗐，这个鼹鼠党早就知道啦！{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}可别把我们当成那种反应迟钝的组织喔！
E: Ah, the Moles already knew all that! {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you should know we're smarter than that!

C: 完了完了……
E: It's over... it's all over...

C: …嗐，算了吧。想不起来就说明和我没多大关系，不想了。
E: ...*sigh* Forget it. If I can't recall it, it just means it has nothing to do with me. I'm done thinking.

C: （不理睬他）
E: (Ignore him)

C: 呵呵，当然…毕竟，请求他人帮助是你的权利。如果你因各种缘故未能行使权利，我们自然会想办法弥补你的。
E: You bet... After all, it's your right to request help from others. If you are unable to exercise your right due to various reasons, we have to find a way to compensate you.

C: 平时客人多吗？
E: Do you usually have a lot of guests?

C: 所以，我们家族当时也算是个首屈一指的大家族——现在的「朗道」家族，你听过吗？我猜啊，那阵子我们估计和他家现在差不多！
E: Our family used to be very influential. Have you heard of the Landau family? I guess we were similar to what they are today!

C: 你平时都会挣外快吗？
E: Do you take any side jobs?

C: 从她给我的信里，我能看到她真诚的一面；但她也会对我隐瞒重要的信息，用手段逼迫我们照她的思路行事。
E: From the letter she gave me, I could sense her sincerity. Yet she would also withhold important information from me, and coerce and manipulate us into doing what she desires.

C: 你能想象吗，{NICKNAME}？或许有朝一日——等我卸下大守护者的职责之后——我们真的可以并肩旅行。这不再是个白日梦了。
E: Can you imagine, {NICKNAME}? There may come a day — once I step down from my role as Supreme Guardian — that we could really set out to travel together. This is no longer just a pipe dream.

C: 有关造物引擎和造物之柱…
E: About the Engine of Creation and Pillars of Creation...

C: 关于布洛妮娅的选择...
E: About Bronya's decision...

C: …诊所还是人满为患呢。虽然上层区的医疗设施更完备，人手也更充足……
E: ...The clinic's still packed with patients. Even though there're better medical facilities and more health staff up in the Overworlds...

C: 哟，这不是「开拓者」{NICKNAME}嘛。欢迎光临机械屋！
E: Oh hey, it's {NICKNAME} the Trailblazer. Welcome to the workshop!

C: 要不拿这件事写首歌吧。
E: Why don't you write a song about it?

C: 啊...你放心，我的灵魂才不会被重力束缚呢。
E: Ah... Don't worry, my spirit can't be weighed down.

C: …这怎么了？
E: ...What's wrong with that?

C: 好了，聊了这么多，我也该回去工作了…你还有什么问题吗？我会尽可能为你解答。
E: Alright, after all this chit-chat, it's time for me to get back to work... Anything else you'd like to ask? I'll do my best to answer.

C: 其余的部分嘛…我只能用四个字评价：惨不忍睹。大到武器维护、小到仪容仪表，他身上能挑出的毛病简直比筛子眼还多。
E: As for the other aspects of his life, I can only say he is hopeless. There are so many things he can do better, be it maintaining his weapon or his appearance.

C: 不好意思，我开玩笑的。
E: Sorry, I'm just kidding.

C: 好笼统的描述…
E: That's a broad description...

C: 对于朗道家而言，姐姐的行为无疑是离经叛道。也难怪我们的管家隔三差五便跑去机械屋，劝谏她找份正经工作。
E: To the Landaus, my big sister's acts are irrefutably traitorous to the clan. It is no wonder our butler regularly goes to the workshop to persuade her to find a proper job.

C: 如果让克拉拉来说的话…应该是「家人」吧？
E: Well, if I had to say... more like family?

C: 她的动机难以分析——但情感模块产生的直觉信号告诉我，这是正确的决定。
E: It's hard to understand her motivations... But the intuition signals from my emotion module tell me that this was the correct decision.

C: 还有克拉拉？
E: Clara's part of the gang too?

C: 虽然难以置信，不过能以和平手段解决是再好不过了。
E: Although it is hard to believe, resolving this situation with peaceful methods is the best-case scenario.

C: 星星来的战士，为他人逆流而上
E: Go against the grain like that alien guardian

C: 为了面包，为了解放
E: Just for a crust of bread, just for liberation

C: 啊，你是说我跟史瓦罗大佬的那场比赛？
E: Ah, you mean the match between me and Svarog?

C: 呜咕…呜咕！
E: Groo... grooo!

C: 你意识到自己讲了个糟糕透顶的笑话。显然，冰原熊是用不着冬眠的。
E: You realize you told the worst joke ever. Clearly arctic bears don't hibernate in the winter.

C: 原来地底还有这种生物……
E: Turns out there are creatures like that underground...

C: 真的吗？我都没见过！
E: Really? I've never even seen them!

C: 我之前看杂志，上边讲这个贝洛伯格有一「正当权益会社」。
E: I read in a magazine once that Belobog has a Rightful Rights Society.

C: 什么时候是个头啊……
E: When will it ever end...

C: 那可是好东西，不能丢啊。
E: I just can't afford to lose my treasure.

C: 随意参观吧，如果想了解展品背后的故事也不妨告诉我——身为儿童公社的负责人，我可是很擅长讲故事的哦。
E: Just take a look around. If you want to find out the stories behind each exhibit, you can come to me. As the person in charge of the clinic nursery, I'm pretty good at telling stories.

C: 她向你报以一个灿烂的微笑，随后将目光挪向别处，小声嘟哝着：「奇怪，这博物馆里为什么找不到任何雪原生物相关的展品呢……」
E: She beams a bright grin at you, then shifts her gaze elsewhere while muttering, "Weird, why can I not find anything about Snow Plains creatures anywhere in this museum..."

C: 大家都躲到哪里去了…可恶……
E: Where did everyone go? Drats...

C: 不急，我们慢慢看。
E: We can take our time here, no rush.

C: 那你去忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to work then.

C: 幽囚狱环境错综复杂，所收押犯人也是三教九流，若{NICKNAME}大人在这里遇到任何问题，都可以随时找我。
E: The Shackling Prison is a complicated area, and we detain prisoners of all sorts here. Feel free to come to me anytime if you need help with something, {NICKNAME}.

C: 没有其他想问的事儿了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: （拍手打节奏）
E: (Clapping in rhythm)

C: 没别的事了，你忙吧。
E: That's all. I can see you're busy.

C: 仙舟上有长生不老的人、有新奇的科技，还有异星的奇人异士…但是大家就喜欢看暴风雪山庄里没有云骑军、没有科技、没有超能力的原始作案手段。
E: On Xianzhou, we have immortal people, novel technology, and fantastical visitors from exoplanets... But somehow everyone wants to read about primitive crimes conducted in snowbound manor houses with no Cloud Knights, no technology, and no super powers...

C: 仙舟的书样式还挺复古…
E: The appearance of books on Xianzhou all seem kind of retro...

C: 我感觉写得还蛮好的…呃，你的表情是怎么回事……
E: I think it's quite well-written... Um, what's with your expression...

C: 怎么样？阿合马铁窗集团有什么能为您服务的吗？
E: How is it? How can the Arma Correctional Group be of service?

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 这是一道数学题啊？
E: Is this a math question?

C: …不过话分两头说啊，仙舟上的人都知道，这建木再生准不是什么好事，希望我那位在鳞渊境的朋友平安无事。
E: ...But let's break it down into two parts. Everyone in Xianzhou knows that the Ambrosial Arbor's regrowth is definitely not a good thing. I hope my friends down at Scalegorge Waterscape are all doing okay.

C: 在我们仙舟，要想取得「成年资格」就得参加一系列考核。我现在在做的志愿公益活动就是考核的一环。
E: Here on Xianzhou, we have to take a series of examinations in order to qualify for our rite of passage. The community service program that I'm volunteering for is a part of this examination.

C: 行了行了，不和你扯了，我还得想办法通过考核呢。你要是帮不上忙的话就一边去吧。
E: Alright, fine, I gotta stop wasting time. I still have an examination to pass. If you're not gonna help me, then get out of my way.

C: 地衡司是个怎样的地方？
E: What sort of place is the Realm-Keeping Commission?

C: …我这不是想不起了嘛，其实非要说是西边儿的那位也成。
E: ...I can't actually remember. Actually, it might be that one to the west.

C: 姐，人家是在提醒咱俩，这是公共场合，说话注意一些分寸。
E: Sis, they're reminding us that this is a public place here. Let's be careful about what we say.

C: 快别说了…怪丢人的……
E: Please shut up... You're embarrassing me...

C: 先生好兴致。
E: You're in an excellent mood today.

C: 这么多档案，该怎么管理呢？
E: How do you manage this many files?

C: 我岁数比你大。
E: I'm older than you.

C: 对不起，我想起了一些好笑的事情，噗嗤——
E: I'm sorry. I just thought of something funny. Tfft pfft—

C: 好嘞，那我们下次见。不要忘记之后来我这里买一些过期货物哦～
E: Alright, see you next time. Don't forget to come by later and buy up some of these abandoned goods.

C: 再后来，星际和平公司与我们建立了联系，「埃伊加文明」才初次加入到信用点结算体系之中，这不，我才能来到仙舟做生意嘛。
E: Later on, the IPC made the first contact with us, and the Aigaian civilization was officially added to the credits macro-economy. Only then could I finally come to the Xianzhou to conduct business affairs.

C: 在这危急关头，我看到大人您挺身而出，先是左蹬腿踢飞了一个药王残党，然后从背后掏出一根硕大的球棒，对着右前方那名步离狼卒就是一记痛击！
E: Just at that crucial moment, you bravely put your life on the line and sent a Sanctus Medicus disciple to your left flying with a mighty kick. Not a second later, you pulled a great baseball bat from your back and unleashed a mighty swing at the Borisin Wolftrooper in front of you!

C: 虽说现在您用不着，但以后万一有需要了，指不定就有用到我的地方了，嘿嘿。
E: You might not need it now, but just in case there's some time in the future when I could help you out... haha!

C: 三百多岁的人，没有「记忆力好」以外的一技之长，没有值得依靠的社会关系，甚至没有一个…能回去的家……
E: For a three hundred-year-old person with no skills beyond having a "good memory," no social connections on which they could rely, not even a home to return to...

C: 您都这样说了，我也不好驳您的面子，聊吧。
E: If that's the case, how can I refuse? Chat away.

C: 嗯好…哦对了，差点忘了，你要是来参观穷观阵的，你远远地看一眼就好，未经太卜大人许可，外人可是不得靠近的。
E: Fine... Oh yes, I almost forget. If you come and visit the Matrix of Prescience, please view it from a distance. Outsiders are forbidden from approaching it without permission from the master diviner.

C: 咳——我之前和云骑军举报过几次化外民的可疑行为，仅此而已，你别瞎想。
E: *Ahem* I've reported a few suspicious Outworlders to the Cloud Knights before, that's all. Don't overthink it.

C: 护珠人啊…这可是个古老的行当。持明族蜕生成卵时，除了珠壳之外，对外界的危险毫无抵抗力。因此持明内部历来会赋予在世的青壮「护珠」的职责。
E: Pearlkeepers are... an ancient profession. When Vidyadhara molt into eggs, they have no protection from the outside world other than their eggshells. That's why the Vidyadhara have historically bestowed the role of Pearlkeeping upon their young and strong.

C: 那三人以伸出的利爪刺入云骑身体里，仿佛汲走了他的生命，他的脸一瞬间变得灰败苍老。
E: The three of them stabbed into the knight with their claws. And as if sucking away his life, the knight's face instantly grew old and gray.

C: 我不敢犹豫，于是我…我动手了。我用云吟术指挥武器，将那三人…将那三个人击倒在地。他们再也无法蜕生了。
E: I didn't dare hesitate, so I... I took action. I used cloudhymn magic to direct my weapon at those three and I... I struck them all down. They won't have another hatching rebirth ever again.

C: 先不打扰你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you for now.

C: 这次就这样吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 不过我现在有些累了，休息下再战吧。
E: I'm a little tired now though. I'll get some rest before trying again.

C: 不错，这正是占卜第二次的直接原因。
E: Exactly. That's the direct reason.

C: 将他们赶走是有什么目的吗？
E: Why are you trying to get rid of them?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 只不过嘛，咱后来还是去做了餐饮业，没继承武馆，但终归还是留下了不少武人的傲骨呀，嘿嘿。
E: It's just that I went into the food business in the end, so I didn't take over the martial art school. But I've still retained the pride of a martial artist, heehee.

C: 我看客人您是第一次光临小店，我送您一杯烈焰浓茶，就当是交个朋友吧。
E: Since you're a new face here, please accept this cup of Flaming Potent Tea as a token of my goodwill. It's on the house.

C: 你难道不会从旁引导话题吗？
E: You wouldn't lead the conversation? Even subtly?

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 有什么新茶需要我测试吗？
E: Any new teas you want me to taste?

C: 你好像不是罗浮本地人？
E: You are not a Luofu local, are you?

C: 要帮你安装脖子以下的部分吗？
E: Do you need me to restore your body below your neck?

C: 过去，短生种朋友曾经告诉我，我的音乐让她感觉到内心平静。于是我想，我应该走上街头去做我能做到的事，哪怕只是抚平人们心中的情绪，我就满足了。
E: A short-life species friend once told me that my music had soothed her soul. So I thought, perhaps I should do whatever I could? In the end, I decided to perform in public, hoping that my performance would also soothe the souls of those in distress.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 文玩千奇百怪，保存不易，这都是我们文玩圈子里的规矩，让您见笑了。
E: I apologize for the inconvenience, but these rules have been in place in our circle for decades, as reserving fandangles is always a painstaking endeavor.

C: 你卖的药品合法吗？
E: Are your medicines licit?

C: 喔，青镞究竟说了什么？
E: Oh? What did she say?

C: 听你口气，你不是本地人？
E: Sounds like you are not a local here, are you?

C: 至少在你们登上仙舟之后见到的「停云」是幻胧假扮的。
E: I can only declare for certain that the Tingyun you saw after you boarded the Xianzhou was impersonated by Phantylia.

C: 嘿，{NICKNAME}，好巧啊，怎么在这里遇见你了？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, what a coincidence to run into you here!

C: 「我们」认为，这是不言自明的。强调：因为有机体是可憎的，所以有机体是可憎的。
E: The reason is self-evident. Emphasis: Loathsome organic lifeforms are loathsome.

C: 「我们」彼此连接，将十万七千三百三十六个意识合众为一。
E: Mutually connected to one another, we are <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> individual minds merged into one.

C: 哪里哪里，多亏了{NICKNAME}大人的福，现在心情好多了。
E: Don't be silly, you've really lifted my spirits, {NICKNAME}.

C: 如果你在协助十王司进行相关工作时，遇到了未知的情况，请随时与四卅七号或其他金人勾魂使沟通。我们的记忆玉兆中很可能有你需要的信息。
E: If you have questions when assisting the Ten-Lords Commission, please approach No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> or other aurumaton spectral envoys. Our jade abacus may contain the information you need.

C: 至于十恶逆…解释起来多费功夫。我手头有一本小册子，你不妨拿去读一读。
E: Regarding the Ten Unpardonable Sins... They're somewhat difficult to explain. I have a booklet here, feel free to have a read.

C: 它的性能较前一代旗舰「瑞兆<unbreak>14</unbreak>」整整提高了五分之一。能匹配您的视觉模式自动留影成像……
E: Compared to the previous flagship product, the Auspicious XIV, this product's specs are higher by a whopping twenty percent, and can match your vision to automatically take images...

C: 简而言之，如果亲亲是第一次买玉兆，或者说只是想换新，体验最前端的玉兆科技，那么买「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」准没有问题。
E: Put simply, babe, if you're buying your first jade abacus or upgrading to a new one to experience the latest in cutting-edge tech, then the Auspicious XV is a great choice.

C: 亲亲，别怪我说话不好听哦。不是「玉器珠宝会这么潮流」，而是你们化外民对玉器珠宝的认识太过古旧了。
E: Babe, please forgive me for speaking so frankly. It's not that jade jewelry is so popular here. It's just that Outworlders have an antiquated understanding of jadeware.

C: 在仙舟啊，衰老跟年龄没有什么关系，这心态要是老了，人才是真的老了。
E: On Xianzhou, aging has nothing to do with your age. If your mind is old, then you truly are old.

C: 要是客人对开店经商感兴趣了，可以考虑给自己的小店备一尊。
E: If you are interested in opening a shop, you can consider preparing one.

C: 哎呀，一想到这亦真亦假的造化故事，茶汤就仿佛多了一道韵味，您不会这么觉得吗？
E: Ahh... thinking over such half-truths and legends really lends the tea some extra texture. Don't you think?

C: 士兵们议论纷纷，谁也没去阻止他。新兵们虽然对这人赖在擂台不下心生不满，却也想知道「无罅飞光」的剑技究竟如何。
E: The soldiers murmured among themselves. No one confronted him. The recruits were unhappy about this man's shamelessness, but they also wished to know the power of the Transcendent Flash.

C: 喝茶享受，可不是来找罪受的，而客人喜欢稍浓一些的茶汤，这「仙舟红茶」汤色红，入口微涩，对您来说是再合适不过的。
E: Drinking tea is for pleasure and not a torment. Since you like it rather strong, then this Xianzhou Black Tea with its red color and slightly astringent taste should suit you perfectly.

C: 好啊，正好我蛮闲的。你想知道什么？
E: Sure, I'm bored as it is. What do you wish to know?

C: 你试试就明白了——啊不对，为了你着想，你还是不要试了。
E: You'll understand once you try... ah, that's not right. It's best if you don't try.

C: 可惜他命不好，生个儿子是天生的智力残障人士。搁仙舟这儿被称为「天缺者」…咳，扯远了。
E: A pity that he wasn't very lucky. He had a son who was intellectually impaired. They are what us Xianzhou people call "Incomplete Ones"... Ahem, I digress.

C: 「不沾板，不沾框、不沾网」。
E: "Don't touch the board; don't touch the frame; don't touch the net."

C: 「息土不耗减，掘之益多」…这样土壤不仅挖不尽，不断挖还有更多。
E: "Soil that does not deplete, but self-replicates"... so you never run out of soil, but instead always end up with more.

C: 你是怎么来仙舟的？
E: How did you get to Xianzhou?

C: 嗯，我们各忙各的去吧。如果你看到了什么有趣的历史遗存，记得通知我一声。
E: Yes, let us part ways here. If you see any interesting historical relics, give me a holler.

C: 我正在这里执勤，看看有没有人超速驾驶星槎，保障交通安全。
E: I'm on duty here right now, making sure no one is speeding with their starskiffs and ensuring traffic safety.

C: 喏，这个送给你吧，当做封口费了，可不许出去乱说哦。
E: Here, this is for you. To keep your mouth shut. Don't breathe a word of this to anyone.

C: 算了，春分不打算考虑得这么深入。
E: Forget about it, I shouldn't think so much about this kind of stuff.

C: 凌解在这本笔记上写了很多生活小妙招，比如被吓了一跳之后，如何假装镇定，厚着脸皮说自己早就预料到了…很可惜，我没有能实践成功。
E: Ling Jie wrote a lot of life tips out for me in her notebook, like how to play it cool when freaked out and pretend that you'd been expecting that... Unfortunately, I've never been able to pull it off successfully.

C: 没问题，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}。我会帮你，你也要帮我呀。
E: No problem, {F#sister}{M#brother}. I scratch your back and you scratch mine.

C: 神策府方面传来消息说，犯人已经供出了不少同伙，事情会向着顺利的方向进行的。
E: According to the Seat of Divine Foresight, the arrested provided information about many accomplices. I believe things will work out smoothly.

C: 哎，刚到罗浮…
E: Hey, I just got to the Luofu...

C: {F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}你看在我这么卖力介绍的份上，买一瓶苏乐达好不好？
E: So, {F#miss}{M#mister}, how about a bottle of SoulGlad? Promoting products is hard work, you know!

C: 价格确实是我们的一大劣势——高浓度糖浆、忆质、星际运输的运费，甚至还包含天舶司收取的关税。咱们成本比仙舟本土饮料贵多了。
E: It's true that our prices don't work to our benefit. High-concentration syrup, memoria, cross-galactic freight costs, and even Sky-Faring Commission's import duties... Our production costs are much higher than those of local Xianzhou beverages.

C: 这下寄了！
E: Mail it now!

C: 驭空大人好帅…
E: Madam Yukong is so graceful...

C: 叫「游云逆旅」，你试着念一下吧。
E: It was called the Cloud-Striding Hotel for Travelers Near and Far. Go on, try saying that ten times fast.

C: 哦哦，听起来很不错。所以就起名叫做……
E: Oh, that sounds lovely. So then it's called...

C: 以您常识来看，是不是应该…适当打发我点什么了？
E: Using your common sense, shouldn't it be time to... offer me something?

C: 你只需要知道的是，这对庞然大物产生的动力足以推动一颗小行星。
E: All you need to know is that the power generated by this colossal entity can move a small asteroid.

C: 如果有机会的话，哈哈，谢谢您。
E: If there's a chance, haha, thank you.

C: 把你这货箱赶紧开走！
E: Get your cargo crate outta here!

C: 那都是骗小孩儿的。
E: That's just how they trick kids.

C: 感觉你会招惹同行…
E: Feels like you might be provoking others who share a trade as you...

C: 阿灼。
E: Luxie.

C: 你们人类总喜欢夸大「爱」的作用…爱能战胜敌人、爱能超越时间、爱能使人突破阻碍……
E: You humans love playing up the power of "love"... How love can conquer anything, can transcend time, can give people strength enough to overcome obstacles...

C: 你们岁阳还有重生的说法吗？
E: You heliobi have rebirths?

C: 那当然是因为…呃，当然是因为，因为你们人类对金钱的热爱感动了我。
E: Well, of course that's because... er, of course it's because... because I found the human love for money to be touching.

C: 想找你聊聊天。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 哈哈哈，你问的好！
E: Hahaha, great question!

C: 你出差期间呼雷越狱了…
E: Hoolay escaped from prison while you were gone...

C: 未来的文学…
E: The future of literature...

C: 正常，毕竟技术工种…
E: Sure, they're all technicians...

C: 哼，有点意思…说下去。
E: Hmm, interesting... Go on.

C: 我看你是有妄想的能力。
E: I think you're delusional.

C: 哎，遇到件特别无语的事罢了，总之一言难尽。
E: *sighs* I was involved in a pretty absurd matter. Anyway, it's a long story.

C: 希望如此吧，谢谢你。
E: I hope so. Thank you.

C: 你怎么一副失望的样子，梦碎了？
E: Why do you look so disappointed? Is your dream dashed?

C: 真是歹毒啊，不知药王秘传的妖人们使了什么法子…
E: It's really vicious. Who knows what tricks those Sanctus Medicus devils have up their sleeves...

C: 会不会太勉强塞涅俄丝了…
E: Will we be pushing Seliose too hard...?

C: 当然有啦！锵锵！这是*我们*亲手缝制的娃娃，怎么样，很可爱吧？
E: Of course! Ta-da! This is a doll that we made by hand. Adorable, isn't it?

C: 之后有什么打算吗？
E: Any plans after this?

C: 我已经习惯那些面孔在我面前短暂地停留，然后匆匆离去。
E: I've grown used to those faces briefly lingering before me, and then hastily departing.

C: 这就是我们征战时渴求的，最平常简单的幸福啊……
E: This is the simple happiness we've been longing for during our battles...

C: 晚些时候我会去找她对酌，几位就请尽享此刻吧。不尽兴不归哦。
E: I'll join her for drinks later. For now, please enjoy yourselves to the fullest. And remember: We're not leaving until our cups run dry!

C: 干杯，海瑟音。
E: Cheers, Hysilens.

C: 如果可以我也想换个发型。
E: I wish I could change my hairstyle too.

C: 哀地里亚的女孩会把花冠送给即将远行的旅人，祈祷花瓣的枯萎气息帮助旅人躲过塞纳托斯的窥探，平安回到故乡。
E: Girls in Aidonia give flower crowns to travelers who are about to embark on long journeys. They pray that the scent of the withered petals will help the traveler evade Thanatos's gaze and return home safely.

C: 需要提醒才能记住的东西，恐怕本来就没有记住的必要吧？
E: If you need a reminder to remember something, maybe it wasn't worth remembering in the first place, huh?

C: 回聊回聊。
E: We'll talk later!

C: 不必再有第二步了。
E: No need for a second step.

C: 我早知凯撒会如此推脱，过来前便与他们开过庆功宴了。
E: I knew you'd try to weasel out of it, so I already celebrated with them before coming here.

C: 关到绩效考核结束就好！
E: Just lock me up until the end of the performance review!

C: 你是怎么回事？怎么又进来了？
E: What happened to you? Why are you here again?

C: 我也不知道，只记得上届在几百年前。
E: I don't know. The last one was a few centuries ago, though.

C: 楼上装修的电钻。
E: A drill for home renovation.

C: 洗衣机的转轴一刻不停地旋转，可名为世界的衣服却从来不曾干净。
E: Though the washing machine never stops spinning, the clothes we call "the world" are never clean.

C: 尝试想象一下。
E: Attempt to imagine.

C: 怕什么，十步之外才枪快！
E: There's nothing to fear. Beyond ten steps, the gun is always quicker!

C: 先学学他的招式！
E: Learn his skills first!

C: 这种花每隔约一千年便会结一次果。其果实味道鲜美，零糖零脂，广受健身人士好评。
E: The plant of the flower bears fruits once every thousand years or so. The fruit is delicious, sugar-free, and fat-free, making it well-loved by gym-goers.

C: 这是「四方览镜」，每个地衡司公廨都至少有一台。执事们用它来整理信息、调取机巧鸟影像、汇总气象水文情况等，承担了公廨中绝大部分工作量。
E: This is a Foursquare Mirror, and every Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery owns at least one. The officers use it to sort out information, play videos taken by cycranes, and form weather forecast reports. It bears the bulk of the workload at the chancery.

C: 毕竟…你也不想看着它在自己面前爆炸，对吧？
E: After all... You wouldn't want to see it blow up in your face, would you?

C: 把箱子寄回去。
E: Return it to the recipient.

C: 一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边。半掩的箱盖下有一叠厚厚的纸在风里微微晃动。
E: There is a courier package left open on the roadside. Under the half-opened lid is a thick stack of papers that flips gently in the breeze.

C: 翻箱子。
E: Check the package.

C: 占卜店「鉴爻轩」的广告。据说店主若月前不久才被太卜司开除，被迫在此地接过家族事业。
E: An advertisement for the Looking Bronze divination shop. Rumor has it, the owner Ruoyue was fired from the Divination Commission and was forced to take over the family business.

C: 上一页。
E: Previous page.

C: 仔细看看广告上的图片，物流机巧鸟与快递箱之间没有真正的物理连接…等等，这真的不会有任何问题吗？
E: Looking closely at the advertisement, you see that there is no actual physical contact between the courier cycrane and the package... Wait, are they sure this is really okay?

C: 「此外，我想请你归还在这些年纪念日与节日期间我赠送给你的玉兆和衣服，如不能归还则请向我的账户支付三万一千五百二十巡镝……」
E: "Also, I would like you to return all the jade abacus and clothes I bought you for every anniversary and holiday over our years together. If you won't return them, then please pay <unbreak>31,520</unbreak> strales to my bank account..."

C: 「骚乱平息后，没有任何人前来认领这些货物。」
E: "When the chaos fell quiet, no one came forward to claim these goods."

C: 怎么样？有没有感受到艺术对你灵魂的洗涤？
E: Well? Do you feel the power of art cleansing your soul?

C: 怎么会没有？
E: Why not?

C: 不过，其实倒也不必可惜，能用来镇伏岁阳的镇妖塔才是最好的镇妖塔。
E: But there's no need for pity, for only the best towers can be used to subdue heliobi.

C: 你仔细辨认着墓碑上的字：「抱歉，这次我要断更了。」这似乎是某位小说作者的墓碑。
E: You carefully read the inscription on the tombstone: "Sorry, I can't update the story anymore." This seems to be the tombstone of a novel author.

C: 什么声音都没有。你尝试将耳朵贴在门板上，细心去察觉。恍神间，你好像听到了枪械上膛的声响，就在房门对面。
E: There is no sound at all. You try pressing your ear against the door and listen closely. Suddenly, you feel like you hear the sound of a gun being loaded on the other side of the door.

C: 「想要品尝『元年苏乐达』的味道吗？赶快前往『黄金的时刻』吧！」
E: "Do you want to try the taste of Epochal SoulGlad? Hurry toward the Golden Hour!"

C: 打包好的垃圾，会在来宾看不到的角落统一销毁。
E: Packaged trash will be disposed of, out of sight of the guests.

C: 「唉…难道没人能拉我一把吗？」
E: "*sigh*... Is there no one who can help me?"

C: 即便以梦境的尺度来看，这里的藏书数量也堪称夸张，仿佛过往历史的丰碑。
E: Even by Dreamscape measurements, the number of books stashed here border on hyperbole, as if monuments to history.

C: 这确实是个不容易发现的地方。向你介绍这里的人一定非常珍视你们的关系、才会把这幅美景与你分享。
E: It's not an easy place to find. The person who introduced it to you truly values your friendship by sharing this view.

C: 触碰到这簇忆泡时，一股浓郁的、莫名的情绪淹没了你。
E: When you touch this memory bubble cluster, an intense, inexplicable emotion drowns you.

C: 「…为什么…不嗨起来……」说罢，架子鼓发出了几声闷响，声音如同铁锤敲击墙壁。
E: "... Why... can't we get high" On that note, the drum set produces a few muffled notes, like a hammer knocking away at a wall.

C: 本区域暂未开放，请不要擅自翻越护栏。
E: This area is closed. Please refrain from climbing over the velvet rope barrier.

C: 正当你想要伸出手触碰这尊雕像时，它竟在转瞬之间消失得无影无踪。
E: As you attempt to touch the statue, it suddenly vanishes into thin air.

C: 在这座充满欢闹与喧嚣的美梦中，这只猎犬选择保持沉默，冷眼旁观。
E: This Hound chooses to remain in silence amidst the lively and joyful dream.

C: 记得，我们以前见过
E: Yes. We've met before.

C: 您主动搭话，莫非是对我们的理财产品感兴趣？
E: Since you want to talk, does that mean you're interested in our financial products?

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 哎呀，刚才的事是我们的错，没做好过往客户的维护工作，让您看笑话了。
E: Oh dear, it was our fault just now for not looking after our past clients well. We're truly ashamed.

C: 还有那个浑身劣质香水味的客户，见面就让我亲他手背，咋的不敢让我叫他一声父亲呢？穿件黑西装就真把自己当个大人物了不是？
E: And that client with the nauseatingly foul perfume, making me kiss the back of his hand every time we meet. How about I just call him my uncle and let him treat me like a dog? Think you're some big shot just because you're decked out in a snazzy black suit?

C: 成功，发财，奋斗，梦想…还搁这喂公子吃饼。我呸！
E: Success, wealth, hustling, dreams... and I still have to treat this man like he's my master. Phooey!

C: 呜呜，谢谢你。你太好了。我、我也相信，你是我最好的朋友。
E: *sob* Thank you. You're too kind. I, I'd like to believe it too, that you're my best friend.

C: 跟你说了会儿话，感觉心里没那么堵了。但不知道为什么，我还是好想哭……
E: I feel much better after talking to you. But I don't know why, I still feel like crying...

C: 没什么想去的地方。
E: I have nowhere that I want to go.

C: 以我对这个宇宙运行规则的理解——塑造「完美」的事物往往需要付出巨大的代价。在匹诺康尼的家族背后，恐怕深藏着某些不为人知的丑恶罪行。
E: According to my understanding of the rules of this universe, the creation of such perfection always requires a hefty price. Lurking in the closets of The Family, I fear there are unknown sinister acts in motion.

C: 我想发掘出那些罪行，然后把真相公之于众。哪怕需要将这虚构的美好全部砸碎，哪怕这会引起很多人的不满。
E: I want to unveil these misdeeds, and present the truth to the public, even if I have to completely shatter this facade of brilliance, even if I invoke the wrath of many.

C: 不经意间，旧东西都已经堆了这么多了啊……
E: I collected a stockpile of this old stuff before I knew it...

C: 虽然我知道您并非那般轻浮之人，但请千万不要再提出这样的请求了哦。
E: I know you're not the careless type, but I would implore that you don't ask to do this ever again.

C: 如果有机会的话，您要不要和我一起调查？如果是您的话，或许真能找到些线索呢。
E: If the opportunity arises, do you want to investigate with me? I think we'd find some clues if you were around.
Woo...

C: 就因为你们的偏见，才导致这城市如此匮乏生命力…才让这大街上满是人的臭味！
E: It's your prejudice that's making this city so lacking in life... that's making the streets stink of humans!

C: 我当然知道这是必要的，是维系梦境稳定的手段，但……
E: I know all of this is necessary and a means to maintaining stability in the dreamscape. However...

C: 客人好眼光！路灯小姐可是深受各路富商的喜欢。我这就把它给您带来。
E: Great choice! Miss Street Lamp is the most favorable among the rich merchants. I'll call her in now.

C: 这些道具多么可爱啊，比动物有趣多了，对吧？
E: Look at how adorable these props are. They are much more interesting than animals. Am I right?

C: 男人努力让表情显得平静。你知道，那只是一副脆弱的面具。
E: The man tries to stay calm. You can tell that's only a mask to hide his weakness.

C: 男人努力让表情显得平静。你知道，那只是一副脆弱的面具。
E: The man tries to stay calm. You can tell that's only a mask to hide his weakness.

C: 一二三、二二三……哦{F#小姐}{M#先生}！我正在练习呢！
E: 1, 2, 3, 2, 2, 3... Oh, {F#miss}{M#sir}! I am in the middle of practice!

C: 或许吧。
E: Perhaps.

C: 广告牌不再说话，似乎陷入了沉思。
E: The billboard has stopped talking. It seems to have fallen into deep thought.

C: 如果再也没法与她见面，或者，或者她讨厌我，不接受我的感情怎么办？
E: What if I never get to see her again? What if she hates me and doesn't accept my love?

C: 暂时没有别的消息。
E: I have no more news right now.

C: 您知道吗——或许这个说法算不上得体——在我看来，麦克斯先生和我们简直是「天生伴侣」。
E: In my opinion, although it may not be entirely appropriate... Maestro Max and we are simply natural partners.

C: 你给她讲列车与同伴、讲迄今为止的旅途。老妇人专注地听着，渐渐露出餍足的神色。
E: You talk to her about your Express companions, about the journey thus far. The old lady listens intently, her expression gradually growing sated.

C: 还要聊聊吗？
E: Still want to chat?

C: 这么说你就能懂了吧？这些自动机器看似是在提供便利，实则是在迫害它们身为有机生命的同行，是在扼杀各个行业的未来！
E: Do you understand what I'm saying now? These automatic tools may seem convenient, but they're actually cannibalizing their organic counterparts, killing the future of every industry!

C: 好的，您有需要的时候可以随时过来。
E: Certainly, feel free to drop by whenever you require assistance.

C: 我还有事，下次再聊。
E: I have things to take care of. Let's speak again another time.

C: 我喜欢漫画，漫画是这个世界上最伟大的叙事艺术。但如果没有来到匹诺康尼，遭受到这莫大的冲击，我对漫画的认知恐怕会永远陷入浅薄的泥沼。
E: I like manga, as it is the greatest storytelling art form in existence. However, if I had never come to Penacony and experienced this shock, I fear that my knowledge of manga would have been forever stuck in the shallows.

C: 我是隶属「猎犬」的奥希洛特，负责这片区域的安保工作。
E: I am Auslotte of the Bloodhound Family. I am responsible for security in this area.

C: 你张了张嘴，但最终还是没有大喊出声——并不是崇高的道德突然充盈你的心灵，而是你觉得这么做并没有用。
E: You open your mouth but ultimately decide against shouting anything, not because you realize your rudeness, but because you realize that it won't work.

C: 这个…您不觉得调酒的过程非常有趣吗——
E: Well... don't you find the process of mixing drinks interesting?

C: …哎哟，就凭您这身打扮，任谁看上一眼都会印象深刻的。
E: ...Well, you see... Your outfit is so striking that it practically introduces you.

C: 你脑中突然响起一道玄妙的无声之音——「灵感鉴定：成功」。
E: Suddenly, a mysterious voice echoes in your mind, "Insight check: Successful."

C: 你能提供什么服务？
E: What services do you provide?

C: 愿您在这「美梦之城」玩得开心、玩得尽兴。
E: May you have fun and enjoy your stay in the City of Dreams.

C: 然而动身当天，你那年刚过百的狐人小师妹却缠住了你，教你放弃好勇斗狠的念头，陪她一起偷偷逃离仙舟、去到那星间流浪。
E: However, on the day of your planned departure, your junior foxian soror, who is just over a hundred years old, dissuades you from pursuing the title. She persuades you to secretly escape from the Xianzhou ship, embarking on a stellar voyage together.

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：素裳的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Sushang's dream.

C: 倘若每个孩子都能得到这么一把玩具枪，他们肯定会收获一段震撼的童年回忆。
E: If every kid owned this toy gun, I'm sure they would have a very memorable childhood.

C: 疾风——力量！
E: Speed is power!

C: 那辆车啊，性格不错，就是脑子不太好使，要命的话还是离远点。
E: Oh, that one. It has a pleasant personality, but it's not exactly the smartest car out there. Steer clear if you don't want to die.

C: 哪怕这些脆筒修建了草房子，也拦不住胃口大开的你。
