E: Even those houses made of cones are not spared by your ravenous appetite.

C: 你来找我不会就为了发呆吧。
E: Don't tell me you're here just to zone out.

C: 你和这只蓝色的小鸟面面相觑。它似乎没有要开口的意思。
E: You and the blue bird stare at each other, but it doesn't look like it's going to speak anytime soon.

C: 等你帮它们<color=#dbc291ff>找到足够数量的折纸小鸟后，我就会给你奖励</color>——「故事情节」是这么写的。
E: When you have helped them <color=#dbc291ff>find the required number of origami birds, I'll give you rewards.</color> This is written under the "Storyline" section.

C: 你盯着小鸟，誓要从它脸上挖出些许端倪。
E: You scrutinize the birdie, determined to catch some hints from its expression.

C: 懂了，你就是贪财。
E: I get it. You're just hungry for the money.

C: …嗯，今晚还是去吃钟表披萨吧。
E: ...Hmm, maybe I will have a Clockie Pizza for dinner tonight.

C: 你决定悄悄走开，不去惊扰这场梦中的白日梦。
E: You walk away quietly so as not to disturb his daydream inside the dream.

C: 真是有活力啊……
E: How energetic...

C: 我的那位老朋友…他曾是我的向导、我的领路人，可最后…他反倒成了我前行的最大阻碍。我为此感到…遗憾。
E: That old friend of mine... He used to be my role model and mentor, but... he ended up becoming the biggest obstacle to my progress. I feel... regretful about that.

C: 到了最后…就连争吵的声音也消失了。我们之间仅剩沉默。
E: At the end of the day... we didn't even argue with each other anymore. What was left between us was sheer silence.

C: 就先聊到这儿吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 他说自己手上有来自朋克洛德的「以太卡带」，急着出手，只要五万信用点就卖给我。当时我只带了苜蓿钞，跟家人们借了个遍才凑齐那么多信用点。
E: He claimed to own an Aether Cartridge from Punklorde and was eager to sell it to me for just <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits. I only brought Alfalfa credits with me at that time, so I had to borrow from some of my family to afford it.

C: 结果后来，我在星际网络上搜到了一模一样的同款，就是一盘普通的磁带——才五百信用点不到！
E: In the end, I came across another cartridge that looked exactly the same on the Interastral network as the one I bought. It was just a regular cartridge worth less than <unbreak>500</unbreak> credits!

C: 你是商人？
E: Are you a merchant?

C: 所以有多少块？
E: So, how many tiles are there?

C: 汽水先生，小镇上最有「内涵」的家伙，他的汽水总能让我精神百倍，滴答！
E: Mr. Soda is the most "cultured" person in town. His sodas always get me brimming with energy, tick-tock!

C: 别用这种看待罪犯的眼神盯着我…要怪，就只能怪他们雇的设计师太蠢，留下这么明显的漏洞，不被人钻空子才奇怪呢！
E: Don't look at me like I'm a criminal... If you want to blame someone, blame the foolish designers they hired! It would be strange if people didn't exploit such obvious loopholes!

C: 软糖酸梦彩梦好，圣代百层薯条佳；\n噼咔汽水兑糖浆，脆筒最配爆米花！
E: Sour Dreams and Dreamlight are good, sundaes with fries are the best.\nPika soda and syrup or crispy cones and popcorn beat all the rest!

C: 既然是您主动发起的邀约，还是请先开口吧？
E: As you invited me to talk, you should probably start?

C: 想听听你的脱口秀表演。
E: I want to hear your stand-up comedy performance.

C: …因为狗狗很自卑？
E: ...Because the dog has low self-esteem?

C: 觉得他们都挺无害的，对吧？至于那些有害的…呵呵，在美梦里还是不聊这个了。
E: You think they were harmless, right? Well, as for those that weren't so harmless... Hehe, we won't chat about that in the Dreamscape.

C: 欧利马笑呵呵地擦了把汗，疲惫的身体里，又被振奋地挤出几分活力。
E: Olma wiped off a bit of sweat as she giggled. The excitement allowed her tired body to squeeze out just a bit more energy.

C: 知道吗？我的工资又涨了5％！平均下来，每天多到手的钱可以买三瓶苏乐达！
E: Did I tell you? My pay went up by 5%! That means with the extra money I get every day, I can basically buy three bottles of SoulGlad!

C: 这日子过得就像在推一块石头，每次推上山，就会带着你滚回低谷，我真的快撑不下去了。
E: Each day feels like I'm pushing a massive boulder, and every time I reach the top of the mountain, it pushes me back down the valley. I really can't do this anymore.

C: 那些高高在上的家伙有把我们当作人吗？我们只是齿轮和零件！损耗了就扔掉。工厂零件还要定期花钱保养呢。
E: Do the higher-ups even see us as people? We're nothing more than cogs and gears! We're easily replaceable. Even factory components require maintenance.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 我是星穹列车的成员。
E: I'm part of the Astral Express's crew.

C: 噢，别客气！为外人宣扬家族的谐乐是我的使命，你可以尽情提问。
E: Oh, you're welcome! Promoting The Family's harmony to others is my mission, so ask away about anything you'd like.

C: 如果还是走老路，搞那些传统谐乐，我们是绝对出不了头的！
E: If we continue down the old path and keep doing all that traditional music, we'll never be able to make it!

C: 怎么就你一个？其他人都跑哪儿去了？
E: Why is it just you? Where has everyone else gone?

C: 伊丽莎白——我的名字叫伊丽莎白。奇怪，我为什么要把真名告诉你？我们也不熟啊……
E: Elizabeth — my name is Elizabeth. That's weird, why am I telling you my real name? We barely know each other...

C: 喂。你叫什么名字，是从哪来的，到这个地方想做什么？别想糊弄我，这把盗贼的匕首见识过太多谎言，每个都得到了他们应有的下场。
E: You. What's your name? Where'd you come from? Why're you here? Don't try anything funny, my bandit dagger has seen enough liars and they've all got what was coming for them.

C: 我们得拯救匹诺康尼…和我一起把那些怪物赶回噩梦吧，让它们再也不能出来害人！
E: We have to save Penacony... Help me fight off those monsters together. We have to chase them back into the nightmare and make sure they can't come out and harm people again!

C: 虽然不像筑梦师那么专业，但只要决心足够坚定，任何人都可以把梦境塑造成想要的样子。你得先这样，再这样……
E: Though we may not be as professional as Dreamweavers, all it takes is firm determination and anyone can mold the Dreamscape into the vision they desire. First you do this, then you do that...

C: 啧…我只是想体验男耕女织的简单生活，为什么就这么难呢！
E: Tsk... I just want to experience a simple, traditional life. Why should that be so hard!?

C: 需要思维训练的学科。
E: Subjects that require mental training.

C: 流梦礁给了我许多美好的记忆，我的研究成果也即将发表。
E: The Dreamflux Reef has given me many beautiful memories, and I am also about to publish my research.

C: 没问题，来挑些你喜欢的吧。
E: No problem. Pick out whatever you like.

C: 最近我进的货质量越来越差，制造这些原料的厂商还和我抱怨，大家都以次充好，他们要是不同流合污根本赚不到钱。
E: I've been getting worse and worse stock lately, and the manufacturers who make the raw materials complain about people selling counterfeit copies at a mark-up. Unless they themselves stoop as low, they can't make any money.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 嘿呀！你也知道那位伟大的猫头鹰老师？全美梦小镇我最敬佩的就是它老人家啾。
E: Oho! You also know our great Professor Owl? He's the one I look up to the most in Dreamville, tweet.

C: 咳咳，你瞧，人年纪大了，就喜欢回忆过去…但重要的东西是将来！
E: Ahem, don't mind me. The old love to reminisce on the past... What's important is the future!

C: 现在集团大则大矣，一件小事都要经过无数领导的批示，想要做些创新简直难如登天。这样下去，我们很快会丧失竞争优势。
E: The current company is now a juggernaut. Every minute detail has to be scrutinized by countless managers. Trying to implement some innovation is as hard as getting into heaven. At this rate, we'll very quickly lose our competitive edge.

C: 虽然螺丝咕姆那样伟大的同胞提出了很多理论来证明我们的相近，但从诞生起就在取悦人类的我无法认同那些理论。
E: Our great comrade Screwllum may have posited many theories to prove our similarities, but I, who was made to provide joy to humans, do not accede to those theories.

C: 我没有见过他口中那位伟大的阿基维利。但在我心中，拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔就是「开拓」的符号。
E: I've never seen that great Akivili that he spoke of. But in my heart, Mikhail Char Legwork was a symbol of the Trailblaze.

C: 祝你玩得开心，也愿你不要忘记哈努努的事迹。
E: Happy times to you, and may you never forget Hanunue's deeds.

C: 或许是「钟表匠」的动画起了作用，或许是如今宇宙中的有识之士越来越多…总而言之，这是个好兆头。
E: Perhaps the Watchmaker's cartoons are working, or that there are more knowledgeable individuals in the cosmos nowadays... All in all, this is a good start.

C: …让您见笑了。说来惭愧，方才那样的闹剧总是隔三差五就会来一场，我已经差不多习惯了…除了名声受损外，我并未因此蒙受其他损失。
E: Not at all. I'm ashamed to say that the farce that happened just now reoccurs on a rather frequent basis. I've pretty much gotten used to it... Apart from my reputation being impacted somewhat, such issues have never affected me in other ways.

C: 你忙吧，不打扰了。
E: I'll let you get back to your work.

C: 这样一个可笑的理由也能支撑着他，可我…我又为什么一直都留在了这里？
E: That man is driven by such an absurd reason, yet I... I have chosen to stay here all this time. Why?

C: 随身携带的粮草早已消耗殆尽。你想尝试狩猎，可这里的动物那么矫健，光是躲过追杀就耗尽你所有力气。
E: "Your food supplies are gone. Despite attempts at hunting, the animals are too quick, and you've spent all your energy just avoiding predators."

C: 这里有什么商机？
E: What kinds of business ventures do they have around here?

C: 足足等了三年啊，这个项目终于营利了！连本带利翻了不少倍，哈哈，谁让当时去参加路演的其他投资人都是胆小鬼，只有我敢投呢！
E: After three years! This project finally hit profit, multiplying my investment along with its interest! Haha, too bad for the others who balked at the roadshow back then. I was the only one bold enough to jump in!

C: 可惜…说归说，但做不做得到又是另外一回事了。当你看到客户的眼泪时，你就会明白…在我们漫长的人生里，有许多思想斗争其实根本没必要。
E: Sadly, talk is cheap. Actually practicing it is a whole other business. When clients come to you in tears, you realize that most of the ideological struggles you spent all your life being conflicted over are in fact meaningless.

C: 但我最擅长的，是那种看起来无解的案子——其他律师一看就头疼的那种。对我来说，挑战越大，越能证明我的价值。
E: My expertise, though, lies in cases that seem hopeless. These are cases that other lawyers find torturous, but to me, the greater the challenge, the stronger the testament to my abilities.

C: 咳咳，咳咳咳咳…抱歉，我还在学习您的发音，能看到您本人我有点兴奋过头了，以至于刚刚舌头打结发音都错乱了！
E: *cough, cough cough*... My apologies, I'm still trying to learn your pronunciation and got too excited seeing you in person, so I got tongue-tied and ended up saying gibberish!

C: 您再多聊两句嘛，您的嗓音这么好听，我还想多听一会儿呢！
E: Please say something else. Your voice is so beautiful that I want to hear more!

C: 跟我介绍下你的乐队吧。
E: Tell me about your band.

C: 那倒没有。其实调饮让我发现了一种新的艺术形式，我对节奏的感觉和手指的灵活性，在调饮时得到了新的应用。这或许是音乐给我的另一种礼物。但是……
E: That, I haven't. You know, I realize mixing drinks is a whole new way of looking at art. My sense of rhythm and dexterous fingers come together differently when crafting drinks. Maybe this is music's blessing for me, but...

C: 好的，那回头再聊，我也得继续工作了。
E: Alright, talk to you later then. I should get back to work too.

C: 都怪我…执迷不悟……
E: It's all my fault... Why was I so stubborn...?

C: 集中注意力，别让我发现你们中有人在偷懒！看到没，船长来了，大家要好好表现，否则…哼哼！
E: Stay focused, and don't let me catch any of you slacking off! Do you see that? The captain is here! Do your best, everyone! Or else... Hmph!

C: 我选钟表小子！
E: I'll go with Clockie!

C: 船长～愿您与其他同伴都能在未来的航行中找到自己的价值和位置。
E: May you and your companions find self-worth and a place to belong to in future flights, Captain.

C: 我们家的孩子们都很听话，您要是有什么吩咐尽管说，我们随时待命！
E: All of my children are happy to comply to orders, so let us know if you need anything. We're always available!

C: 哈哈，老佩德罗我无非是一句话——让大家成为家人。我把船员们当家人对待，大家也把我当家里长辈看待，那咱们这空艇就稳了。
E: Haha, if there's one thing I believe in, it's to consider everyone family. I regard the crew members as my family, and they think of me as their elder. That's how we'll make it together as an airship.

C: 哎，这时间的圈套……
E: *sigh* This trap of time...

C: 我们乐队的吉他手毕业后去了博识学会任职。离校那天，我一路把他送到了车站。
E: After graduation, our band's guitarist went to work at the Intelligentsia Guild. On the day he left school, I sent him all the way to the train station.

C: 我还想和你聊聊。
E: I want to continue chatting with you.

C: 年轻时，体育也不是我的强项，我是靠才华赢取女孩芳心的那款。
E: Even when I was younger, sport was never my strong suit. I was always the type who relied on my talent to win girls.

C: 你看，只要会扯淡，我这种贪图享乐的学生也能化身大慈爱家，全看你怎么解读了。或者，你觉得我的诡辩确实有几分道理？
E: See? With the right spin, even a playboy like me can come off as a big philosopher. It's all about how you look at it! Or, do you actually think my argument makes some sense?

C: 行，如果你想到了好点子，记得来找我。
E: Alright. Come look for me when you get a good business idea.

C: 所以偶尔我会想，我和他…是否有共同前行的可能？
E: So I sometimes think to myself... maybe he and I could find a common thread?

C: …嗯？偷听得如此理直气壮，你也是个人才。所以这位同学，你找我有事吗？
E: ...Hm? Being able to eavesdrop and still seem so self-righteous is a talent. Was there something you wanted to talk to me about?

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 呃…要不今天先到这？你这故事咳、我是说，你提供的讯息非常有趣，我会好好记录下来的！
E: Uh... Maybe we should leave it here for today? This story of yours — uhh — I mean this information you have given me is extremely interesting. I will make sure I get it all written down!

C: 你还知道什么怪谈？
E: Do you know any other ghost stories?

C: 还能有什么八卦？之前发售的梦泡里加了些植入广告，在折纸论坛上出现了不少负面评价，结果引来老观众们疯狂吐槽。
E: What kind of gossips are you expecting? We recently put some product placement into our dream bubbles, which attracted a lot of negative criticism on the Paperfold Forum and a crazy amount of complaints from viewers.

C: 我想请你帮我写段留言…毕竟我们一起举办过那么精彩的演出，经历过那么多重要的时刻，不知道你现在方不方便？
E: I was hoping to get you to write a message for me... After all, we've organized many exciting performances together and experienced many crucial moments. Would you be available now?

C: 要是经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}感兴趣的话…当然可以！我们的关系都这么好了，表示下亲昵也很正常。来，试试吧，这正是进一步加深彼此间信任的机会！
E: If you're interested... Of course you can! We're so familiar with each other, it's normal to show some affection. Come, try it, this is a good opportunity to deepen our trust!

C: 我们是为你好啊！
E: It was for your own good!

C: 督促学生认真学习，这不是教师的职责么…我做错了吗？
E: To guide a student's diligent study... Is that not a teacher's duty...? Have I done something wrong?

C: 悲伤：遭到学员误解，或许是所有教师的宿命。
E: Sorrow: Being misunderstood by students is perhaps just the wretched life of all teachers.

C: 我真的可能成名吗……
E: Will I really be famous...

C: 好久不见，恰丽卡。
E: Long time no see, Chaletka.

C: 多亏了你们的影片，我的甜品在学校中越来越有名了。以前我都是大家瞧不起的差生，现在就连学校保安都会来我的摊位排队……
E: It's all thanks to your film that my desserts are getting more popular at school. I used to be a student with bad grades that everyone looked down on, but now even the school's security guard is a patron of my stall...

C: …知无不言，但那个称呼，还是让它成为往事吧。
E: ...I'll tell you everything I know, but I'd prefer not to be called that in the future.

C: 这个名字自问世起，就不是为了对付「一个人」而存在的。
E: Since its inception, it was never meant to be used against a single person.

C: 你惊讶地发现，这些汽水身上没有任何品牌的标记，与外面展柜的藏品相比，显得格外简陋。
E: You are astonished to discover these sodas don't have any brand symbols on them. Compared to the collection items in the display case outside, they look extremely garish.

C: 在某些特别的时刻，家族的服务员会趁着上菜的机会，在环形餐桌的圆心处突然登场，为宾客表演才艺。
E: During certain special moments, as The Family's servers serve food, they will take the opportunity to make surprise appearances in the center of the ring of dining tables to perform for guests.

C: 你试图在里面找到些值钱玩意儿，但很可惜，本阶段预售已结束，保险柜里什么也没有。
E: You try to look for something valuable inside but unfortunately, since the pre-sale period for this phase has ended, there's nothing left inside the safe.

C: 不贵不要钱！
E: If it's not expensive, then you can have it for free!

C: 那不是纯受罪吗？
E: So that's just pure suffering, no?

C: 千万要轻拿轻放！
E: Be careful with it!

C: 好好好，真送吗？
E: Sounds great! Can I really get a free ticket?

C: 卖甜~品嘞！
E: Want some desserts?

C: 我也会登上梦境之巅！
E: I'll be at the peak of the Dreamscape, too!

C: 对身材不好。
E: It's bad for your health and figure.

C: 听说最近有忆域迷因…
E: I heard they've found a Memory Zone meme...

C: 维护？什么时候维护不好，偏偏赶在这个时候！
E: Maintenance? Now? Of all the time!?

C: 宝箱怪？在哪？还有这种好事？！
E: Mimics? Where are they? They're extremely rare!

C: 我只是想逛逛。
E: I'm just browsing around.

C: 可是我幸福不起来啊！为什么要这个时候提分手啊？呜呜呜……
E: But I just can't be happy! Why did you have to break up with me!? Boo-hoo...

C: 哼，没用的老东西，多大年纪了还不懂收敛脾气，活该没一次吵架赢得过我。
E: Tsk, you just can't control your temper, you old idiot. That's why you've never won an argument with me. You deserve it.

C: 等等等——就知道等！自从和他一起约看电影，我就再没见到过片头！
E: Wait, wait, wait... Is that all you ever say!? Ever since we started to go to movies with him, I've missed the opening credits every time!

C: 欢迎来到热砂分会场！
E: Welcome to Scorchsand Hall!

C: 要我说啊，这背后一定有什么惊天大阴谋！
E: If you ask me, I'd say some deep conspiracy is afoot!

C: 没想到家族中居然会有叛徒，真是可恶。
E: I didn't expect there would be a traitor within The Family. It's truly despicable.

C: 好像听到有人在和我说话？
E: Did I hear someone speak to me?

C: 我们的梦…也该醒了……
E: Our dream... it's time to awaken...

C: 可以再来一杯特调吗？
E: Can I get another glass of the special drink?

C: 请二位放心，家族向两位保证，我们已经解决了所有的安全问题，并且保证不会再有这种情况发生。
E: Please do not worry. The Family promises both of you that we have already resolved all safety issues. We guarantee that such circumstances will never occur again.

C: 不过来坐会儿吗？
E: Aren't you going to come over?

C: 贵家系也人才辈出…
E: Your lineage is also brimming with talent...

C: 这个季度的报表…
E: This quarter's report...

C: 说好的不聊工作呢？
E: I thought we weren't gonna talk about work?

C: 哎…这样有什么意义呢。
E: *sigh* ...What's the point of all this?

C: 这一季的《钟表小子》片头曲深入人心——「女士们，先生们，小鸟们~钟表小子和他的朋友们~」
E: The opening song for this season of Clockie is truly memorable — "Ladies, gentlemen, birds, Clockie and all his friends!"

C: 过去，阿斯德纳星系有一伙认为「梦境是个球」的愚昧学者，他们的学说已经被丢进了历史的垃圾堆——现在大家都知道，梦境的形状是乱七八糟的。
E: In the past, there were a bunch of ignorant scholars on the Asdana star system who believed that the dreamscape was a ball. Their theories have been discarded into the trash pile of history — everyone knows now that the shape of dreams is a chaotic mess.

C: 「不要问价格是否虚高，卡片是否保值，重要的是这玩意能刺激经济。」——某位路过的财富学院学生分析道。
E: "Don't ask if the price is a little too high, or if the cards can maintain their value. What's important is that this stuff can stimulate the economy." — The analysis of some Fortune Academy student passing by.

C: 幸运的是，你找到了四名志同道合的同学，共同组成了轻音乐队。你成功过上了吃着茶点悠闲度日的生活，不需要为卖票或成员关系而有任何烦恼。
E: Luckily, you find four like-minded students and form a light music band. You successfully experience an idyllic life of chill music and crumpets, not having to worry about selling tickets or drama between members.

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 哼，哼哼~
E: Oink, oink oink~

C: 据说在遥远的黄金世，有一艘会飞的大船叫做阿尔戈，而他的船主也叫做伊阿宋。那位伊阿宋用飞船载着他的大地兽朋友纵横世界、见义勇为，就像今天的黄金裔一样。
E: Legend has it that in the Era Chrysea eons ago, there was this massive airship called Argo, whose captain was also named Iason. Iason sailed the world with his dromas buddies, helping out those in need, much like the Chrysos Heirs do these days.

C: 嘘…有客人来了，一会儿再聊。
E: Shh... we've got a customer. Let's catch up later.

C: 你好呀，这位客人——欢迎光临金织裁缝铺，请问有什么需要的吗？
E: Hey, there! Welcome to Goldweaver tailor! What can I help you with today?

C: 下次有机会再讲吧。
E: Let us talk next time.

C: …抱歉给您添麻烦了，但美食为人们带来的从不只是味蕾的刺激，还有精神上的慰藉与享受。所以如果不去了解其所在的文化背景，就……
E: ...I apologize for any inconvenience, but food isn't just about the chemical excitations on your tongue. It's also about finding spiritual comfort. Without understanding the historical and cultural significance, it's...

C: 有什么外邦美食？
E: What foreign dishes do you have on the menu?

C: 摆满香蕉的小岛，蕉蕉～
E: An island full of bananas! Bananas~

C: 我有什么能帮你做的吗？
E: Do you need my help with anything?

C: 说说元老院的故事。
E: Tell me more about the Council of Elders.

C: 或者这么说吧——翁法罗斯或许真的在被一些我们尚不清楚的秘密支配…但了解那些秘密的人肯定不在元老院里。
E: Or maybe, let's put it this way: Amphoreus might actually be under the control of enigmatic forces beyond our grasp... But those who hold such knowledge certainly aren't seated in the Council of Elders.

C: 听上去你似乎不满意自己的工作。
E: Sounds like you're not too excited about your job.

C: 就我的观察来看，受了轻伤而前来泡澡疗愈的客人变得更多了，也有一些老熟客缺勤…希望他们平安无事。
E: From what I've noticed, there has been a rise in guests with minor injuries coming for a soak, as well as a downturn of regular customers... I hope they are all right.

C: 《再创者之歌》
E: Epic of the Era Nova

C: 只是…希望她不要太勉强自己呀。
E: I just... I hope that she doesn't overexert herself.

C: 提问！想更了解缇宁一些！
E: I want to know more about Trinnon!

C: 好呀好呀，明天见可是个特别、特别好的祝福呢。小灰明天见！
E: Okay, sure! "See you tomorrow" is such a wonderful blessing! See you tomorrow, Gray Hair!

C: 尼卡多利是个怎样的泰坦？
E: What kind of Titan is Nikador?

C: 在我的家乡那边，人们都说西尔菲翁是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}亲手栽下的植物，只在那座山里生长。
E: Back in my hometown, people always say Silphion was planted by {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, and that it only grows in the mountains.

C: 抱歉，我其实只是路过……
E: I'm sorry. I'm actually just passing through...

C: 想想看，一株会说「你好」的泪葱，多有意思啊！
E: Imagine how fascinating it would be to have a tear onions plant say "Hello" to you!

C: 每隔一段时间，他们就会找到我，让我用一次「扫除」使塔兰顿的天平恢复整洁…至于过程，我不便多说，恐怕你也不会乐于听到。
E: Every so often, they would come to me and ask me to go on a "sweep" to restore the purity of Talanton's scales... As for how I did that, I will spare you the details. I fear that you will not enjoy them.

C: 我没听懂。
E: I don't understand.

C: 悬锋伙友？克拉特鲁斯？
E: Kremnos vanguard? Krateros?

C: 尤利克赛斯？那个懦夫？哼，当然听说过……
E: Ulixes? That coward? Hmph, of course I've heard of him...

C: 有机会再说吧。
E: Let us speak again when chance allows.

C: 「磐岩之脊」，吉奥里亚，大地之泰坦，山峦的神明。
E: The Pillar of Stone, Georios, the Earth Titan, God of the Mountains.

C: 解释不好。白厄，形容过——「用顺手了。」
E: Explain well, I cannot. "Have become used to it," said once Phainon.

C: 哎嗨，您别放在心上，就是发发牢骚。好啊朋友，来找老希聊天的？
E: Bah, don't sweat it. I'm just griping. All right, friend, you here to chat with me?

C: 我海量！
E: I've got a sailor's thirst!

C: 真有这么神奇？
E: Is it truly that amazing?

C: 有点上头…
E: It's a little strong...

C: 远处的灯光熄灭了……
E: The distant light has gone out...

C: 给我算算命！
E: Tell me my fortune!

C: 如果真的发生了遗憾的事情，愿欧洛尼斯给你一个美好的梦境。
E: If something sad has truly happened, may Oronyx gift you with a beautiful dreamscape.

C: 或许近来你有些疲倦。别太勉强自己，就算像山之民那般坚韧如岩石，也会有累坏的时候。
E: Perhaps you've been tired out recently. Don't push yourself too hard. Even a sturdy rock as tenacious as a Mountain Dweller will be burned out sometimes.

C: 没事，守城辛苦！
E: No worries, guarding the city is tough work!

C: 哈！看起来，你似乎还未完全被说服？
E: Hah! I see that you are still not entirely convinced?

C: 算了吧，我对这些不感兴趣。
E: Hold it right there. I'm not interested in this stuff.

C: 哈哈，传信石版上的东西确实不能保真！
E: Haha, you can't trust everything you read on the teleslate!

C: 好啊，看来这装置成功发挥出了它的效用……
E: Well, looks like this device is working just as intended...

C: 行啊，画好记得给我看看。
E: Sure, go ahead. Show me once it's finished.

C: 大多数情况下，只要我得到值得挥洒颜料的灵感，就会当场找个地方作画。有的时候如果在墙壁上难以完全表达那份触动，我就把它画在其他地方，比如瓶瓶罐罐。
E: In most cases, as long as I get inspiration worth putting paint to, I'll find a place to paint on the spot. Sometimes, if I can't fully express that feeling on the wall, I'll paint it somewhere else, like on bottles or jars.

C: …那些人眼中的「原创艺术」更类似于一种「工具」，每次给他们画东西都让我郁闷透了。所以我就从废稿堆里随便抽一张出来，随便加两笔就交过去。
E: ...In their eyes, "original art" is more like a "tool." Every time I paint something for them, it just depresses me. So I just grab a random sketch from the pile of discarded drafts, add a few strokes, and hand it over.

C: 面前的男人用种极度不可置信的眼神望着你，仿佛你说出了什么禁忌的言论。
E: The man in front of you looks at you with an expression of extreme disbelief, as though you've said something forbidden.

C: 凭什么由你说了算？
E: Why should it be up to you?

C: 说来，最里面的架子还收了不少浴场客人自己的手稿，甚至还有些账本什么的——至于内容嘛，见仁见智了。
E: By the way, the innermost shelves hold many manuscripts from the bath guests themselves, even some account books... as for the content, well, it's all up to personal interpretation.

C: 我听到了你的「希望」。
E: I can hear your hope.

C: 听起来就挺让人羡慕的。
E: Sounds like an enviable position.

C: 虽然被称为「园丁」，但其实是学者。平时的工作就是在花园里培育和管理奇美拉，就像照看那些花花草草那样。
E: We may be called the Gardeners, but more accurately, we are scholars. Our usual work consists of caring and handling the chimeras in the Garden, no different from caring for flora.

C: 如果说奥赫玛真是最后的方舟…那么这方舟究竟在用什么形式保护我们的过去，就难免令人焦虑了。
E: If Okhema really becomes the final ark... Then, exactly how this ark is preserving our past is a cause for anxiety.

C: 大家都认为，奇美拉智慧、狡黠的一面就是继承自菲莉丝兽的物种特征。
E: Most believe that the chimera's intelligence and cunning are inherited from the traits of the Felys.

C: 那必须的！
E: Who doesn't?

C: 那些花园与庭院后来成为了「神悟树庭」——一个供世人醒神、求识、悟道的学院，一个在学术上兼容并包、百花齐放的圣地。
E: The garden and grove later became the Grove of Epiphany — an academy where people awoke their minds, sought knowledge, and invoked enlightenment. A sanctuary where academia embraces inclusivity and teems with diversity.

C: 怎么样，如此一番对比下来，果然我们「曳石学派」才是最好的选择吧！
E: How about it? Having compared them all, our Helkolithism is still the best, aren't we!

C: 我们姐妹俩的理念就是水火不容。她想把树庭变成一个解决日常问题的作坊，而我则要让它成为彻底开源的源泉，让翁法罗斯的每个人都能感受到瑟希斯的智慧！
E: Our philosophies are as opposite as fire and ice. She wants to turn the Grove into some workshop that can resolve everyday problems, while I want to turn it into a wellspring of openly shared knowledge, for everyone in Amphoreus to revel in Cerces' wisdom!

C: 啊？什么网？你是说万帷网吗？
E: Huh? What net? You mean the World Wound Web?

C: 好，你可真爽快，等我检查下库存，我手头里可是有不少热门货呢——我记得有个能让庄稼产量翻倍，有个能处理生活污水的……
E: Great, you're decisive. Let me take a look at my stock. I do have quite a few popular products on hand. I remember there's something that can double crop yields and another that can treat household wastewater...

C: 糟了，传信石版有点问题，我和树庭那边没联系上。等修好了我再喊你，现在先把你放在预定名单里，抱歉抱歉……
E: Drats, there's something wrong with the teleslate. I didn't manage to link up with the Grove. I'll holler when I fix it, for now I'll put you on the reservation list, so sorry about that...

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 你喝这么多没关系吗？
E: You sure you're fine drinking so much?

C: 奥赫玛总是这么亮，不知道丹恒为什么能睡得那么好。
E: Okhema is always so bright, I can't understand how Dan Heng manages to sleep so soundly.

C: …我真没遇到过。
E: ...Never seen them before.

C: 巨大的海豹玩偶，看起来就很柔软的样子。面对毛茸茸的物体，没有人能忍住抱上去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: A giant seal doll that looks very soft to the touch. When faced with something this fluffy, no one can resist the urge to squeeze it tight. So, you...

C: 尤利安。
E: Julian.

C: 华劳斯的投资算是打水漂了。
E: Wallace's investment has gone down the drain.

C: 来聊聊天吧…
E: Let's have a chat...

C: 要不你去前线探望他？
E: Why don't you visit him on the front lines?

C: 虽然但是，我还有正事要办。
E: Nevertheless, I have things to do.

C: 那么，阁下，我还是那句话：天底下并无免费的神谕。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
E: Very well, My Lord. Then I must remind you: There is no such thing as a free prophecy in this world. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.

C: 太好了，是神谕，我们有救了。
E: Great, we have a prophecy! We're saved!

C: 三相神殿的神谕绝对真实，也从未出过错。阁下还是尽早返乡，将贵邦从黯淡的命运中拯救出来吧。
E: The prophecy of the Temple of the Three Fates is absolute, and they have never been mistaken before. My Lord, you must return home immediately and rescue your home from its dim fate.

C: 就聊这些吧。
E: Let's leave it there for now.

C: 回见。愿命运泰坦们庇佑你！
E: Farewell. May the Fate Titans bless you!

C: （讲讲缇宁吧）
E: (Talk about Trinnon)

C: 我还什么都没说呢。
E: I haven't said anything yet.

C: 我是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}神圣造物嗷呜，不要把我和那些缺乏智慧的生物混为一谈。我也是要面子的嗷呜。
E: I am a sacred creation of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, awoo! Don't lump me in with those unintelligent creatures. I have my pride, awoo!

C: 可不知从何时起，她突然变得与我们那般疏离，整日在奥赫玛之外漂泊羁旅，连与她面对面道声好都是那么奢侈。
E: But somewhere along the way, she became distant and spent all her days wandering beyond Okhema, and it became a rare luxury just to greet her face-to-face.

C: 感觉身体暖暖的！
E: I feel all warm and fuzzy!

C: 一切艺术作品都不过是时代的涟漪。而致力于从时代逃脱的创作者——所谓「真正的」艺术家，很难用艺术去养活自己。
E: Every work of art is just a ripple in the tide of its time. Those who strive to escape their era — the so-called "true artists" — often find it hard to sustain themselves through their creations.

C: 你可以随时回来找我。
E: You can come back any time.

C: 我对*墓志铭*很感兴趣。
E: I'm very interested in epitaphs.

C: 这是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}给我的使命。在这乱世，我们更要守望相助。
E: This is the mission {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has given me. In these turbulent times, we must help and support one another.

C: 元老院不给报酬吗？
E: Doesn't the Council of Elders compensate you?

C: 哼，至少你没有撒谎。我在此地侍奉{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}几十年，每日晨昏的祭仪从不敢怠慢——
E: Hmph, at least you know better than to lie. I have served {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} here for decades, and never have I neglected the morning and evening rituals —

C: 这是为你准备的奖励，拿着吧——只有它能为我提供些许参与感。
E: This is the reward prepared for you. Take it. Only this can give me a sense of participation.

C: 我想起来了…有位织者曾是宝库的管理员，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>王室的宝库内</color>独自慨叹呢。
E: I remember now... A weaver was once the administrator of the treasury. It is now sitting in the <color=#dbc291ff>royal treasury</color>, sighing to itself.

C: 倘若有什么手段能让人们在新世界也得以留存的话……
E: If only there were a way for people to remain intact even in the new world...

C: 灾变发生时，我正在裁缝铺里。听说云石天宫有人受伤，急需麻布止血，我就赶忙收拾了些布匹过来。
E: When the catastrophe struck, I was in the tailor's shop. I heard that there were injured people at Marmoreal Palace in urgent need of material to stop the bleeding, so I quickly gathered some fabric and rushed over.

C: 我先走了，注意安全。
E: I'll be going now. Stay safe.

C: 又一位迷途者？不不不！哈哈，不过是和我一样，又一个被抛弃的可怜虫罢了！
E: Another lost pilgrim? No, no! Haha, just another forsaken soul, cast aside like me!

C: 为何要抛下我们！为什么无动于衷啊…又是你？你来干嘛，和我一样寻找那个失踪的泰坦吗？
E: Why desert us! Why stay silent— You again? What are you doing here, looking for the missing Titan like me?

C: 嗯…有位织者不满于美的凋零，总想为人们添加一分亮色。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>城墙外道的花坛边</color>，为匆匆离去的友人担心呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver unsatisfied with the fading of beauty, who wishes only to add a touch of brightness to others. The golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>the flowerbed by the city wall's outer path</color>, worrying about the friends who are leaving in a hurry.

C: 嗯…有位织者喜好乐理。金丝带来消息，它正和伙伴们仍在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的水漫琴旁</color>倾听演奏，或许你也可以去听上一曲。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has a deep love for music theory. The golden thread brings tidings: They are still listening intently to a performance <color=#dbc291ff>beside the water lyre of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you might join them as well.

C: 你不也在这儿躲着？
E: Aren't you hiding here as well?

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望光明。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>某处的壁炉上</color>，感受着火光的温暖呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who longs for light. The golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>a certain fireplace</color>, enjoying the warmth of the flames.

C: 这里也有衣匠？
E: There are even Garmentmakers here?

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 没错，相信贵客应该也见识过，织者能够短暂抵御黑潮的侵袭。虽不能在其中自由活动，但黑潮确实无法将它们彻底吞噬。
E: That's right. I believe the esteemed guest has also witnessed that the weavers are able to temporarily resist the invasion of the black tide. While they cannot move freely within it, the black tide indeed cannot completely engulf them.

C: 不错的功绩，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: A fine achievement, honored guest. Now, I will begin unraveling one of the many prophecies.

C: 外面是什么样呢？
E: What's the outside world like?

C: 那可不行！说了不就一点儿惊喜都没了吗！要是没法让他边震惊边夸奖我，这些天的努力可就白费了！
E: No way! That'd spoil the fun! If I can't get him shocked and impressed at the same time, all this effort will go to waste!

C: 还真是什么都瞒不过你…嗯，收拾好了，后天出发。
E: Can't hide anything from you, huh... Yeah, I'm all set. Heading out the day after tomorrow.

C: 还有点没想好…
E: There are still a few things I haven't figured out...

C: 不是捉，只是在观察！那是只翅膀带星斑的银翅蝶，可好看了……
E: Not chasing. I'm just observing! That one was a Silverwing Butterfly, the kind with little star-shaped spots on its wings. So pretty...

C: 在我巡逻的日子里，不允许任何事故发生！
E: Nothing's allowed to go wrong on my patrol!

C: 阳光晒着懒洋洋的麦穗，风吹过送来香甜的气息……
E: Lazy wheat swaying under the sun, a breeze carrying the sweet smell...

C: 结果鹅卵石砸中树杈，蝉蜕像下雨一样哗啦啦落下来了迷。
E: Then the cobbles hit a tree branch, and the cicada shells came raining down like a summer storm, memi.

C: 站…站在巨人的肩膀上，也是一种本事嘤！
E: Standing... standing on the shoulders of giants counts as being capable too, eep!

C: 飞得越高，望得越远，整片麦田的景象尽收眼底——这都是农民伯伯们辛勤劳作的成果嘤。
E: The higher you soar, the farther you see. From up here, you can take in the whole wheat field — all the fruits of the farmers' hard work, eep.

C: 那，该做些什么好呢？
E: Well then, what should we do next?

C: 否则，该怎么让迷境里的妖精都知道我很有钱迷？
E: After all, how else would everyone in the Maze know I'm loaded?

C: 给我增设个游戏厅吧。
E: Make me an arcade.

C: 你这个「出神」，它正经吗…
E: Is your... current state of "ecstatic communion" legitimate...

C: 嗝…你好啊，贵客，没想到在这里也能遇见你。
E: Hic... Oh, greetings, honored guest. Never thought I'd run into you here as well.

C: 是食材有差异吗？
E: Is it the ingredients?

C: 更何况，跟着店里的主厨打下手，我也学到了不少东西迷。
E: And working with the chefs has taught me so much, mem.

C: 一口一口品尝会破坏精心营造的神秘感。迷地一口把烤饼全吞下去，在咀嚼中揭晓真相，才是正确的品尝方式迷！
E: Nibbling bit by bit ruins the carefully woven mystique. The right way is to eat the entire pancake in one go, and let each chew reveal the truth, mem!

C: 懂了。但是不好意思，我信艾格勒。
E: I get it. But I'm afraid my faith lies with Aquila.

C: 所以结论显而易见——摆盘时需要尽量堆高，越高，代表这道菜越能触碰到艾格勒的眼眸。
E: So, the conclusion becomes obvious: While being served, the food must be piled up as high as possible — the higher it is, the better it could feast Aquila's eyes.

C: 开玩笑，要想让菜肴的艺术价值更上一层楼，材料的搭配才是重中之重。
E: As if. If you want to take your culinary craft up a notch, it's the combination of ingredients that is most critical.

C: 刻法勒啊！这些可爱的小东西们真是它最美妙的造物！
E: Holy Kephale! These adorable little things are really its prettiest creations!

C: 我这天天都来的，你再便宜点呗？
E: I'm a regular customer. Can't you give me a better price?

C: 太对了。
E: So true.

C: 我这天天都来的，你再便宜点呗？
E: I'm a regular customer. Can't you give me a better price?

C: 在这里的时间转瞬即逝，对我而言，每一天都好像刚刚来到这里一样。
E: Time flies here. But for me, every day still feels like the first.

C: 这次军团中的敌人，是反物质融铸而成的银河兵器——你知道这意味着什么吗？
E: The enemies in the Legion are cosmic weapons made of antimatter. Do you know what that means?

C: 我应该没什么想问的了。
E: I don't think I have anything to ask.

C: 我还有些事情需要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 希望你能够尊重我！我在这里的行为，不仅是为了我自己的灵魂誓言，更是为了众多生灵的平安！
E: Show me some respect, please! I do what I do, not only because I swore on my soul, but also for the sake of peace!

C: 莱斯莉多久会回来呢？
E: When will Lesley come back?

C: 我只不过比她晚出生一些日子，但无论是才学还是实践，我都比她强。
E: I was only born a bit later than her. I am better than her no matter in talent or practice.

C: 人与人之间的关系，可比搞科研有意思多了。
E: The relationship between people is much more interesting than scientific research.

C: 我没有什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 要不是那什么物质军团来捣乱，这种事情才不会交到我手里。
E: If it wasn't for the Legion's invasion, this kind of thing wouldn't have become my duty.

C: 要我说，科室之间的矛盾与鄙视链再这没下去，我老头子还没彻底合眼，恐怕就能看见这座空间站的覆灭——因为自己的问题，内部的瓦解！
E: If conflicts and contempts continue to exist among different departments, I'm afraid the space station will collapse before I die. Its own issue leads to its internal disintegration!

C: 老板真忙呢~
E: Boss sure is busy~

C: 去去去，你小子，想要学徒自己找去，少惦记我们家孩子。
E: Shoo shoo shoo, you punk! If you want an apprentice, go find one yourself. Keep your eyes off my kid.

C: 感谢你所做的一切，翁法罗斯的大英雄，向你致敬。
E: Thank you, great hero of Amphoreus, for everything you've done.

C: 恭喜。然后呢…
E: Congrats. And then...?

C: 呵呵…其实村长我，心里至今也还怀着一个冒险的梦哪……
E: Heh heh... Truth is, I still harbor a dream of adventure even today...

C: 呜嗡！（上次我把一个树庭学生的作业石板吃掉了！）
E: Grumph! (Last time I ate a Grove student's homework slate!)

C: 呵，但「冬霖爵」说起话来，往往让身边人如沐冬风，难受了许多，粉发的爱卿却像春日林间摇曳的微光，所以取了这个称号。
E: Heh, but Dux Brumalis's words often carry the bite of frigid winter, causing much discomfort to those around her. My dear pink-haired subject is like the dappled sunlight in a spring forest. Hence her title.

C: 有瓜？让我也吃一吃！
E: Ooh, drama? Count me in!

C: 看来，无论任何世界，生灵们都有自己和「大地」相处的方式，虽说不上反叛，却也在摩擦中不断前行呐！
E: It seems that in any world, living beings have their own way of dealing with the "Earth." While it may not be outright rebellion, they keep moving forward through friction!

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 这块石板只是个模型，里面没写一个字。不过，咱照着翁法罗斯的风格印了个封面，看着是不是有模有样？
E: This tablet's just a prop. There's not a single word written inside. But hey, I copied the Amphorean style for the cover. Looks pretty legit, don't you think?

C: 苦了你了，三月七。
E: Sorry you had to go through that, March 7th.

C: 三个人在一起才算完整，对吧？
E: Three's company, right?

C: 有些事情想要请教。
E: There's something I want to ask.

C: 在我出生以前很久很久，星穹列车就坠落在我的星球上了。我在少时发现了它，从那时起，我的生活就与它紧紧联系在了一起。
E: Long before I was born, the Astral Express crashed onto my world. I found it when I was still young. From then on, my life became closely bound to it.

C: 在这样一颗被冰雪覆盖，灭绝生机的世界里，还有这么多值得探索的东西。如果不是亲身经历，确实很难想象。
E: There's still so much to explore in this snow-covered extinct world. If you didn't see it for yourself, it'd be really hard to imagine.

C: 哔嘟…正在处理请求……
E: Beep, beep, beep...Processing request...

C: 选取上层的货箱
E: Select the crate on top

C: 关于《冒险鼹鼠队》的事…
E: About The Adventurous Moles...

C: 一台「熊蜂」型的自动机兵瘫痪在路边——若不出意外，它可引领你找到些有趣的东西。
E: An automaton of the Bumblebee model is lying paralyzed on the roadside. If there are no surprises, it might lead you to something interesting.

C: 在在在在周围地面侦测到疑似爆炸物反应，请请请在《银鬃铁卫爆炸物威胁搜查排除手册册册》指导下将其排除除除除——
E: Suspected exp—p—p—plosive is detected in the vicinity. P—p—p—please follow the instructions from the "Silvermane Guards' Guide to Exp—p—p—plosive Disposal" to deactivate the b—b—b—bomb.

C: 他们平时就待在矿区的流浪者避难所。我之前跟老师傅打过招呼了，见了他只要报我的名字就行。
E: They usually stay at the vagrant shelter in the mines. I've already told that senior mine cart operator about this. When you see him, just say my name, and he'll know.

C: 啥？什么助教……
E: Huh? What assistant instructor...

C: 还得等等。
E: Still need a bit more time.

C: 矿车和铁轨就不说了，你打小就长在下层区，哪怕不认识也该听说过。
E: I'm not going to explain how mine carts and tracks work. You grew up in the Underworld, so even if you've never seen them before, you've probably heard of them.

C: 是我太贪心了，你什么也不用做。我真的很喜欢你…只要远远看着你就好……
E: I was too greedy, you don't have to do anything. I just really like you... but admiring you from afar is enough for me...

C: 我收到了和你有关的短信。
E: I got a text message that has something to do with you.

C: 你也可以把它想成一封挑战书，或是胜者的嘲笑…那人反向骇入了我的设备，占据了这里。
E: You can also think of it as a written challenge, or a taunt from the winner... From the guy who hacked into my device and took over the whole place.

C: 我想问点别的…
E: I want to ask about something else...

C: 「加油，祝你好运。」
E: "Good luck, I'm rooting for you."

C: 他出身于贝洛伯格艺术学院，是当今「巡回艺术画派」的代表人物，可以说，当今贝城画坛巨擘非他莫属了。
E: A graduate of the Belobog College of Art, he is currently the icon of the nomadist school and the pinnacle of this city's art scene.

C: 于尔丹！多么悦耳的名字！幸会幸会……
E: Uldan! What a delightful name! Nice to meet you!

C: 其中这些物件非常适合在综合展馆展出，但它们现在散落在贝洛伯格各地——凭我这把老骨头，想要独自把它们全部带回来恐怕有点困难……
E: These would all be great for the General Hall, but they're scattered all over Belobog now — and I'm afraid there's no way an old-timer like me can get to them all...

C: 幸苦你了，还请让我看看…
E: Good job. Let me take a look-see...

C: 要不然还是扔去垃圾场吧。
E: Maybe we should just chuck it in the trash?

C: {NICKNAME}，有件事想要拜托你帮忙。
E: {NICKNAME}, there's something I need your help with.

C: 那我们等下在<color=#dbc291ff>边缘通路</color>见！
E: Then I'll catch you at <color=#dbc291ff>Backwater Pass</color> later, then!

C: 多谢，贝洛伯格的英雄{NICKNAME}，你可是帮了我大忙了！
E: Thank you so much, Hero of Belobog, {NICKNAME}. You've done a real solid for me here!

C: 在你的帮助下，综合展馆的展品已经全部集齐——现在，贝洛伯格的观众们可以更好地了解这座城市的前世今生了。
E: Thanks to your help, the General Hall is filled with exhibits. Now, visitors from all over Belobog will be able to understand the background of this city better.

C: {NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒，这就是他们的名字。若你时常想念为众人带来拯救的开拓者们，不妨抬头仰望——他们或许正在星海间畅游，而冬城的希望也在彼处。
E: Their names were {NICKNAME}, March 7th, and Dan Heng. If you often find yourself missing the Trailblazers who brought salvation, look up and gaze. They might be traveling among the stars, with wishes of the Everwinter City by their side.

C: 嘘——这是我擅自行动的，我家那位司舵大人可不允许我追查什么幽灵星槎。
E: Shh — I acted on my own. Madam Helm Master won't allow me to track down anything like a phantom starskiff.

C: 到底是谁啊，看得这么清楚？
E: Who is that rumormonger? They have pretty good eyesight.

C: 街谈巷议就是这样，明明没有的事情，却说的十分确凿。
E: That's how rumors and street talks come about. Some things didn't happen, yet they can make it sound conclusive.

C: 这时候就别插科打诨啦！追上去瞧瞧。
E: Now's not the time for jokes! Let's follow her.

C: 但…驭空还没来，你们又是谁？
E: But... Yukong isn't here yet. Who are you?

C: …我猜，驭空大人之后还会回来的吧。
E: ...I believe Madam Yukong will still return to this place in the future.

C: 你收起了相机，呜呜伯似乎在表达不满。
E: You pack up your camera and the Wubbaboo seems displeased.

C: 总感觉如果失去了这些记录，这些回忆也会被淡忘…但肯定都是错觉！本姑娘可不会忘记我们一起经历的旅程！
E: I felt like if I lost these records, these memories would just fade away... But, that's not true! There is no way I would forget our journeys together!

C: 三月七把你们的合照放到了照片墙
E: March 7th put your photo on the photo wall.

C: 谢谢高阿姨！
E: Thank you, Auntie!

C: 当然可以，不过要是遇到需要动脑子的事情，我肯定帮不上忙。所以……
E: Of course! It's just... I'm better with brawn than brains...

C: 连烟姐姐，请你转告会长，我找到了帮手能够拯救金人巷码头…不止如此，我认为{F#她}{M#他}能帮助金人巷再次复兴。
E: Miss Lianyan, please tell the president that I have someone who can help us with the leasing situation at the dock... and also bring Aurum Alley back to its former glory.

C: 会长可能有什么难言之隐？
E: Perhaps they weren't feeling too well.

C: 检查完毕，准备发货。
E: The inspection is over. We'll send the goods on their way.

C: 这是码头闹剧中装着「浓云金蟾」的快递箱。发件人处被刻意划掉了姓名、联系方式，鹤运物流记录中显示寄件人是阿丰。
E: This is the box that was opened earlier at the dock — the one containing the Golden Cloud Toad. The name and contact information of the sender were deliberately crossed out, but records from the Heron Express show that the sender is A-Feng.

C: 这会长到底有些什么本事啊……
E: What exactly does the president have up their sleeve...

C: 另外，这笔钱还会用于码头整体的修缮升级…也就是说，我们暂时无法使用码头物流。
E: The funds will be used for the overall repair and upgrade of the dock... which means we won't be able to use the dock's shipping logistics for a while.

C: 金人巷是充满人情味的街道，无论是小吃街还是文玩旧货都是围绕当地居民与游客建设，这是金人巷的独特性与吸引力。
E: Aurum Alley is a place brimming with personality — from the delicious food to the cultural antiques. Everything is built around visiting tourists and local residents, and that's what makes it such a special place.

C: 既然霄老大愿意参加金人巷复兴计划，事不宜迟，咱们现在就开始物流规划吧。
E: Now that Mr. Xiao is on board, his shop can be part of the logistics network we've been working on.

C: 金人巷，陌生人合影的好地方。
E: Aurum Alley — Come Meet Some Strangers.

C: 金人巷商铺的意向调查？
E: The Aurum Alley business opinion poll?

C: 不出意料，公司与金人巷商会成为了留下的中标候选人。
E: To no one's surprise, the IPC and the Merchant Guild are the only two contenders left standing.

C: 素裳说得对呀。
E: Well said, Sushang.

C: 谢谢你这么捧场，阿姨是打算做外卖的，只是我有些其他的请求……
E: Thank you! Starting the takeout business is indeed on my priority list. It's just...

C: 不好意思呀，我实在很难把这东西当作是食物…食物，到底是什么来着？
E: Sorry. I really am having trouble thinking of this as food... Food. What's that again?

C: 你应该反抗，直接罢工！
E: You should go on strike! Stand up for yourselves!

C: 你们想要的繁荣会消灭金人巷的传统与个性，那是我们承受不起的繁荣。
E: The prosperity under your proposal means diminishing the Alley's tradition and personality — we can afford neither.

C: 小少爷，你把自己看得太高了。
E: You think too highly of yourself.

C: 你们是来这里假扮云骑军的？
E: Are you guys impersonating Cloud Knight Officers?

C: 我怀疑他们是公司雇人假扮的云骑，故意来这里捣乱的。
E: I think, they're actually heavies hired by the IPC to pretend to be Cloud Knights, and they're just here to make trouble.

C: 「客制运单」是什么？
E: What are "custom orders?"

C: 「前方直行<unbreak>50</unbreak>米」可这前面明明是墙啊，这要怎么「直行」，难不成要从墙根下钻过去？
E: "Go straight ahead <unbreak>50</unbreak> meters" — but there's a wall blocking the way. How can we "go straight"? Don't tell me we're supposed to dig under.

C: 很恐怖对吧，所以我——
E: Sounds horrible, right? So I just...

C: （虽然没找到「嫌疑人」，但还是先跟燕翠说一声吧……）
E: (Although I haven't figured out who did this yet, I should inform Yancui anyway...)

C: 感谢您的协助，十王司成功回收此处的「逸散岁阳」，谢礼就留在此地，希望大人笑纳。
E: Thank you for your assistance. The Ten-Lords Commission has successfully retrieved the dispersed heliobi at this area. I shall leave your reward here. I hope you receive it well.

C: 实验样本来源于一个胖乎乎的机器人，世玲没有见过，不过拜托你的话，拿到一些样本材料应该没有问题吧？
E: The experimental sample comes from a chubby robot. I've never seen it before, but acquiring some sample materials shouldn't be an issue, right?

C: 白日梦做完记得做实验。
E: Remember to do the experiments once you finish daydreaming.

C: 你在现场还有没有发现别的什么东西？给我看看，说不定可以推进研究！
E: Did you find anything else at the scene? Show it to me. Maybe it can move the research forward!

C: 这次的地方已经给你标注好了，你多上点心，可别漏了什么关键线索！
E: I've marked the location for you this time. Pay attention and don't miss anything!

C: 我的意思是我们还没有基础资金呢……
E: What I mean is we don't have our base capital...

C: 打扫得很干净的看板，上面没有「异常」的图画痕迹，甚至连灰尘都很少。
E: A well-swept display board that has no traces of anomalous drawings on it, and there is even very little dust.

C: 你来了，伙计。有一个好消息和一个坏消息，我先讲好的。
E: Hey, buddy. I have good news and bad news. Let me tell you the good one first.

C: 这些事真的发生过吗？
E: Did any of these things happen in real life?

C: 哈努兄弟的领导。
E: Hanu's leadership.

C: 但是还缺少证据。
E: But it still lacks evidence.

C: 呼…能、能看出来。
E: Phew... I, I can see that.

C: 哈哈哈。既然都跟我学了调饮，就没有让你离开的选择了。安心留在这吧。
E: Hahaha. Since you've decided to learn from me, there's no backing out now. Just chill out and make yourself at home here.

C: 我也没做什么特别的。
E: I haven't done much.

C: 不对不对，要更积极地思考，要时刻告诉自己，所有人都很喜欢我！
E: No, no, I should stay positive! I've got to remind myself that everyone likes me!

C: 呜呜呜呜呜呜。你去吧，就让我在这自生自灭好了。
E: Boohoooo... Just go ahead and leave me be.

C: 汪汪！听说那个「黄金的时刻」特别大、人也特别多，你可要跟紧了，别走丢了哇！
E: Woof! I hear that Golden Hour is huge and crowded, so stick close and don't get lost!

C: （…没时间解释了，先阻止他们吧！）
E: (...No time to explain. I've got to stop them first!)

C: 要是处理不好，恐怕它们会再次陷入狂乱。
E: If we don't handle it well, they might go into a frenzy again.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 前无名客•玛姬？
E: Mag, a former Nameless?

C: 虽然这份「意志」没有形体，却能将「遥祝启程」带往未来；而你，能将「开拓经历」转化为开拓的祝福…我们都有各自的使命。
E: Although my will is formless, it can lead the Graced Voyager to the future. As for you, you'll be able to take the trailblazing experience and turn it into Trailblaze's blessing... We all have our duties.

C: 嘿嘿，在你成为列车组成员之前，在姬子成为领航员之前…在很久很久以前，列车上还有着彼时的列车组…那个时候，我曾登上过星穹列车。
E: Hehe, before you became a member of the Crew, before even Himeko became a Navigator... A long time ago, the Express had another Crew... I was aboard once during that period.

C: 这么重要的东西也不带走？
E: He didn't take such an important item with him?

C: 上啊，钢铁鳄鱼，给我狠狠咬哈努兄弟的屁股！
E: Go forth, Steely Gator! Go bite Brother Hanu's butt!

C: 听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
E: I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.

C: 家族想要干什么？
E: What's The Family after?

C: 他问我：「你认为《钟表小子》能带给人们什么」，我回答：「幸福、欢笑、感动，以及对美梦的一点儿反思」——但说实话，最后一个是我喝醉了瞎掰的。
E: He asked, "In your opinion, what does Clockie bring to the people?" I replied, "Happiness, laughter, heartwarming moments, and a bit of reflection on the sweet dreams." Honestly, the last one was just me blabbering away in my state at the time.

C: 审核批注：<s>包含敏感信息，建议封禁。</s>不符合《钟表小子》作品的过往风格，可能造成不良影响。建议暂时封禁，需传唤主创人员进行面谈。
E: Review: This movie contains controversial topics and should be banned. The style of this movie deviates from the previous Clockie pieces and has the potential to cause negative effects. A temporary ban is recommended, and an interview should be arranged with its creator.

C: 有点道理。
E: You've got a point.

C: 但我依然很重视钟表小子…如今我向家族提议收购版权，也是为了保护它——如果克劳克影业创作的内容继续冒犯家族，那么可能会面临比现在更糟的结局……
E: I still care a lot about Clockie... I suggested that The Family acquire its copyright to protect it... If the content created by Clock Studios continues to violate The Family's standards, Clockie could end up much worse than its current predicament...

C: 因为「钟表匠」留下的胶卷……
E: Because of the film reels left behind by the Watchmaker...

C: 是啊，他用人生向前开拓，用作品铭记身后的路……
E: You're right. He has been trailblazing forward with his life and engraving his past memories in his creations...

C: 呵呵，用他的话来说，那是你自己选择的「航路」。而且——现在还不晚，不是吗？
E: Heh heh. To put it in his words, that is the "route" you've chosen. Moreover... it isn't too late now, is it?

C: 不是的，胶卷给你。
E: That's not true. Here, you can have the film reel.

C: 啥意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 那是我在克劳克影业的升职面谈，他居然把面谈地点放在了「夕阳号」的游轮舞会上。
E: It was an interview for my promotion. He actually held the interview at a party on the cruise ship "The Sunset."

C: 哎，我本该干些更有价值的事情……
E: *sigh* I should be doing something more worthwhile...

C: 我们明明找回了所有的苏乐达！难道说，是因为那些没能消除的苏乐达地板……
E: We've gotten all the SoulGlad back! Unless, it's because of those SoulGlad floors we didn't get rid of...

C: 这个声音，是石头老板的脚步声！石头老板要回来了！
E: This sound, it's Boss Stone's footsteps! Boss Stone is coming back!

C: 非常优秀的作品！不愧是{NICKNAME}导演。
E: A most excellent masterpiece! That's Director {NICKNAME} for you!

C: 我在你身上看到了难得的拍摄天赋…考虑加入鸢尾花家系，做我的摄影助手吗？
E: I see a rare talent for camerawork in you... How about considering joining the Iris Family and becoming my camera assistant?

C: 「为表示感谢，折纸小鸟愿送出自己的魔法——但机会只有一次，到底该实现谁的愿望呢？」
E: "As thanks, the origami bird is willing to part with its magic, but it only works once — whose wish shall be granted?"

C: 等我再琢磨一下…
E: Allow me to ponder it a bit more...

C: 成了新的石头老板。
E: Became the new Boss Stone.

C: 「但汽水先生被哈努兄弟和钟表小子救了出来，成为了他们的伙伴，一起对抗石头老板。」
E: "But Mr. Soda was saved by Brother Hanu and Clockie, who teamed up with him to fight together against Boss Stone."

C: 哼，说不准——除了那些到处寻找创作素材的导演与作家，普通人从不在意匹诺康尼的过去，搞不好这个名字只是哪部电影里的虚构角色而已。
E: Well, I don't know... Everyday people don't care about Penacony's past, except for directors and artists constantly mining everything for new material. Maybe the name is actually just a fictional one borrowed from some movie.

C: 哼，那又怎样？咱们拍的是动画，不是历史纪录片——你挑个自己喜欢的方案就好了，真假又不影响票房！
E: Hmph, so what? We're making an animation, not shooting a historical documentary — so just pick your favorite one. Whether it's true or false won't impact ticket sales!

C: 对了，我在盛会巨星卡里看到过，隐夜鸫家系过去的家主「格拉克斯」是长着猫头鹰脑袋的扎兹卡人——说不定他就是猫头鹰老师的原型！
E: Oh yeah, I saw on Festive Superstar ticket that the former head of the Nightingale Family, Glaux, was actually a Zatzka with an owl head — perhaps he forms the prototype for Professor Owl!

C: 直到家族改革，出现了五大家系之上的「梦主」。那位神秘的梦主，改变了自由散漫的匹诺康尼，让家族的目光遍布整片梦境，混乱的梦境才回到正轨。
E: It stayed that way until The Family conducted their reforms and created the Dreammaster, who ruled above the Five Lineages. The mysterious Dreammaster changed free and lax Penacony, letting The Family's gaze cover all of the Dreamscapes until those chaotic dreams were back to normal.

C: 关于梦主。
E: About the Dreammaster.

C: 好！这下我懂了，我就按你的说法开始创作了，别反悔哦——冲冲冲冲冲！
E: Great! I get it now. I'll start pulling some things together based on what you said, so there's no going back now... Go, go, go!

C: 对，这件事闹腾得挺厉害的，算是「公司」的机密吧…就连温世齐大哥也不敢张扬，他让我私下找你，切莫声张。
E: Yes, this is all rather confounding and one of the IPC's top secrets... Not even Wen Shiqi dared spread the word. He asked me to find you in private and to keep things quiet.

C: 你扑腾一声跪倒在地，向你的商界对手哐哐磕大头。人能平安活一世，无非就靠四个大字——「好汉饶命」！
E: You drop to your knees with a resounding thud and start to repeatedly bash your head hard against the floor, kowtowing enthusiastically to your business rival. The key to a peaceful life lies in these five powerful words — "Show me mercy, pretty please!"

C: 恭喜你们成为了最早的逐梦客！你们受到「钟表匠」感召，却失望地发现匹诺康尼根本没有遍地黄金，无奈之下，你们从底层做起，等待成功的机会。
E: Congratulations on becoming the first group of Dreamchasers! Answering the call from the Watchmaker, you are disappointed to learn that Penacony isn't paved with gold. Resigned to your current plight, you start from the hierarchical dredges, biding your time for a chance at success.

C: 很好，各位，看来你们很快就上手了！
E: Very good! Looks like you've got the hang of it!

C: 我已经迫不及待想要看你完成「筑梦拼图」了…呵呵。加油，哈努兄弟。
E: I can't wait to see you finish the Dream Jigsaw... Best of luck, Hanu!

C: 哼…哼！
E: Hmph... Hmph!

C: 加…加…拉……
E: Gal... lag... her...

C: 一道无形的壁障隔开了你与「沉眠」。
E: An invisible barrier parted you from "Dormancy."

C: 不，我悼念的并不是{RUBY_B#终将}早已{RUBY_E#}毁灭的世界，我是在悼念注定走向「终末」的{RUBY_B#往昔}未来{RUBY_E#}。
E: No, I'm not mourning the worlds that are {RUBY_B#eventually}already{RUBY_E#} destroyed, but the {RUBY_B#past}future{RUBY_E#} that is destined to reach to Finality.

C: 求索「终末」的踪迹——这便是我等「葬仪知宾」的使命。
E: Seeking traces of Finality... That is the calling of us Creed Exequies.

C: 母亲的怀抱重新淹没了他们。
E: Their mother's embrace drowned them once again.

C: 借由把烛墨学派的档案引入差分宇宙的沙盒，以「凡人」作为演算的跟踪目标，构建出命途的模型，我将这一课题命名为：「人间喜剧」。
E: By incorporating the archives from the Candelagraphos into the sandbox for the Divergent Universe and by using "mortals" as the focus of the extrapolation, I have constructed models for Paths and named this research project "The Human Comedy."

C: 于是我找到这些记录，将它作为量化分析的样本。通过对人类行为的推演，让剑拔弩张的双方放下了武器。
E: Thus, I discovered those records and used them as samples for my quantitative analyses. By extrapolating human behavior, I managed to persuade both factions to lay down their weapons.

C: …要是想不到具体的人，不如把目标设定得简单一些，比如用剑能同时打倒多少个对手？
E: ...If you can't think of anyone specific, why not set a simpler goal? Like how many opponents do you want to defeat at once with a sword?

C: 三月七信守赌约，承认了自己剑艺不精。
E: March 7th honored the bet and admitted her swordplay was lacking.

C: 老规矩，我们要打赌的。
E: Let's make a bet.

C: 没事，感谢几位及时相助。不过，小店遭化外游客非难不过是小事一桩，三月小姐要与他踢馆竞技可不是小事…梦茗于心有愧，是小店给三月小姐添麻烦了。
E: Yes, thank you all for your timely help. The shop facing a bit of flak from visitors is a minor issue, but Miss March's decision to challenge him is serious... I feel responsible, as if the shop has inconvenienced you.

C: …我、我怎么没底了，我能做到吧，二位师父？
E: C—Come on! How could I possibly lack confidence! You believe in me, right, masters?

C: 恭喜恭喜，恭喜你！
E: Yeah! Congratulations!

C: 你不会真以为我傻了吧唧的吧！
E: You don't really think I'm dumb, do you?

C: 就是就是！
E: No, you won't!

C: 对啊，猪叫呢！
E: Yeah, don't forget the squealing!

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}，三月七小姐！
E: Long time no see, {NICKNAME} and Miss March 7th!

C: 没错没错，能够提升学习效率的方法多的是，本姑娘可聪明了。
E: That's right! There are many ways to increase learning efficiency. I'm super smart!

C: 你找死！
E: What the heck did you just say!?

C: 原来斯科特小时候是如此心地善良。
E: So, Skott was kind-hearted as a kid.

C: 好嘞，看剑！这样就行了吗？
E: Hey, take this! Did it work?

C: 我没有什么建议，只有评价，我的评价是「上班上的」。
E: I don't have suggestions, only an opinion, and that is "He's a hopeless workaholic."

C: 刚才这个话题就到这吧，没意思，赶紧开始下一个话题吧。
E: Let's move on, this topic's getting boring. Time for the next one.

C: …欸，这次你好正经。
E: ...*sigh* You're suddenly all proper this time.

C: 话说…这些药材还蛮贵的吧？
E: So... aren't these herbs pretty expensive?

C: 黑蛇变成了…赤龙？
E: The black snake turned into a ... Crimson Dragon?

C: 哎～这都怪我！不过批评归批评…最后灵砂大人还是问了我是否需要「赤龙血」……
E: Oh dear, it's all my fault! But reprimanding aside... Master Lingsha still asked me if you wanted the Crimson Dragon Blood in the end...

C: 既然来都来了，那你喝吗？{NICKNAME}。
E: Since you're here, are you going to drink it, {NICKNAME}?

C: 嗯嗯，谢谢椒丘先生，谢谢灵砂大人。
E: Yes, yes, thank you both, Mr. Jiaoqiu, Master Lingsha.

C: 不要害羞。如果发自内心喜爱一件事，而它又无害于人，那我们为什么不大大方方地承认呢？
E: There's no need to be embarrassed! If you truly love something and that love does not hurt anyone, why would you not celebrate it loud and proud?

C: 但老实说，我的真实答案是「不知道」。
E: But, if I'm truly honest, my answer is: "I don't know."

C: 开始今日拍摄。
E: Let's begin today's shoot.

C: 差点交代在梦里。
E: I almost met my end in a dream.

C: 佩拉害羞地展示了自己主笔的同人文——那是与好朋友玲可一起成为贝洛伯格魔法少女的故事。
E: Pela shyly shows a fanfic she wrote — it's a story of her and her good friend Lynx becoming magical girls of Belobog together.

C: 抱歉，我不是那个意思！我感觉自己眼前的一切都像是幻觉……
E: Sorry, I didn't mean it that way! I just feel like everything I'm seeing is a hallucination...

C: 我也准备好拍摄了！
E: I'm also ready to record some footage!

C: 接下来一段时间是休赛期，暂时没有安排。卢卡选手正好趁这个机会好好休息一下吧。
E: There's a break coming up, so there won't be any fights. Luka, you can use this chance to rest and recuperate.

C: 拜托了，希望他们的医术和娜塔莎一样高明。
E: Please, if you don't mind. I hope they are as good as Natasha.

C: 气氛好沉重，大家都不说话。
E: This is sad, nobody's saying anything.

C: 好梦…气泡饮？
E: Sweet Dreams... Soda?

C: 不要用那种警惕的眼神看着我啦！
E: Stop staring at me with those wary eyes!

C: 我！一定会赢的！最后站在擂台之上的，一定是我！
E: I, will be victorious! The last one standing in that ring can only be me!

C: 哈…哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Ha... Hahahaha!

C: 遵命，老板。你人真是太好了，老板。
E: Understood, boss. You're seriously the best, boss.

C: 反悔还来得及吗？
E: Is it too late to back out?

C: 特邀调饮师，正式开工！
E: Guest drinksmith, now open for business!

C: 连接至匹诺康尼网络，根据本地点赞量最高的回答——当然是知更鸟女士。
E: Connecting to the Penacony network. Based on the most-liked answer at this location — the answer is, of course, Miss Robin.

C: 前线来报，敌军主力被尽数歼灭。但大敌仍作困兽之斗，率领残党直奔此处来了。
E: Urgent report! The enemy's main force has been obliterated. But the Overlord's not done yet. It's leading a desperate charge straight toward us.

C: 我应该没说梦话吧？
E: I didn't sleep talk, did I?

C: 不是，给我读到哪个档来了？
E: Hold up, what save file did I just load into?

C: 今后有机会再邀请她吧……
E: Next time, maybe...

C: 你怎么不去寻宝？
E: Why haven't you gone down yourself?

C: 我再想想。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 你先休息一下，我接下来会开始挖掘通向更深处的通道。
E: Get some shut-eye. I'll start digging a passage down to the next level.

C: 好嘞！那就麻烦您了！
E: Wonderful! If you could be so kind!

C: 「只要将这三个炉鼎中藏着的三种天材地宝取出，放在一起九转烧炼，便能造出令人脱胎换骨的——『九转升天丹』！」
E: "Once put together, these three divine ingredients can be concocted into the Elixir of Dragon Oil, which can make you be born anew and achieve transcendence."

C: 「此刻{NICKNAME}已经获得了『生灭灵芝』。现在还差一味药材，就能炼制出『九转升天丹』了！」
E: "Right then, {NICKNAME} had the Life-Death Polypore, lacking only one final medicinal herb before the Elixir of Dragon Oil could be concocted!"

C: 你胡编乱造也得有个度…
E: There is a limit to suspension of disbelief, you know...

C: 你向西衍先生讲起了丹恒一路追赶你们，以及他在鳞渊境中遭遇的冒险。
E: You fill in Mr. Xiyan about Dan Heng chasing you all the way, and the adventures he has encountered at Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 我认可你的{RUBY_B#破坏力}赤诚之心{RUBY_E#}了，这个测试就跳过吧，跳过。
E: Lemme just acknowledge your {RUBY_B#destructive power}Heartfelt Devotion{RUBY_E#}. And now let's just skip this part of the trial.

C: 刚刚蜕生的龙尊，还有那个干掉了我们很多兄弟姐妹化外民！你们果然在这里！
E: The freshly-reborn high elder and that outworlder who took out so many of our brothers and sisters! So this is where you are!

C: 下一折——「镇玄根义侠斗幻胧，斩妖邪孤勇建奇功」，在下已经构思得差不多了，就等您来做最后确认了。
E: Our next scene: "Warrior Quells Phantylia, Hero Earns Regalia." I've already put this whole scene together, but I'm just waiting for your final confirmation.

C: 嗯…大概明白了。还有什么特征吗？
E: Mmm... I think I got it. And any other features?

C: 当心促进你舌头的生长…
E: Hope it doesn't stimulate any growth of your tongue...

C: 哎呀，您别着急嘛。之前都说了很多次了嘛，战斗桥段在下分分钟就可以写完，不要急，我等一下就写。
E: Ah, don't worry. I've told you many times already — the battle scenes write themselves. It's fine. I'll finish them up later.

C: （录制西衍先生的评书）
E: (Record Mr. Xiyan's storytelling shows.)

C: 哈，这就是我所头疼的地方了——顾客的意见都很重要，但是要听谁的才好呢？
E: See, that's what gives me a headache! Customers' opinions are important, but whose opinions should I prioritize?

C: 好了，世界总算清静下来了，这是你倒下前脑海中闪过的最后一丝念头——
E: "Well, at least the world has become quiet again..." That is the last thought that flashes through your mind before you collapse.

C: 怎么样，你感觉如何？要是有哪里不舒服记得要告诉我，实在不行我去把丹鼎司的医士喊过来。
E: How are you feeling? Let me know if you feel bad in any way, and I'll call the healers from the Alchemy Commission if I have to.

C: …维尔德？这谁呀？《以太战线》又是啥？
E: Huh... Who's Wilder? ...And what's "Aetherium Wars"?

C: 哎，你们几个，差不多得了！欺负小孩算什么本事？
E: Hey, that's enough! Picking on a kid, are we?

C: 没事，这里交给我们就好。
E: Don't sweat it — leave them to us.

C: 哪儿来的面具男？我是不是玩家关你什么事？
E: Where did mask-dude come from? And what does it have to do with you whether I'm a player or not?

C: 欸，真的吗？总觉得有点……
E: Really? Sounds a little...

C: 那么，次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神——虽然不知道你是什么来头，但就让我们一起出发，在庆典里拿下冠军吧！
E: Alrighty then Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord, even though I don't know where you're from or how you got here, let's go and win that tournament!

C: 哟，大家都在啊——还有{NICKNAME}和小三月呢！是什么风把两位大英雄给吹来了啊～
E: Hey, everyone's here — {NICKNAME} and little March, too! What lucky charm lured these two great heroes our way?

C: 哈哈，真是酣畅淋漓的战斗，好久没有这样乐在其中过了！
E: Now that was intense! I can't remember the last time I had so much fun.

C: 多亏了三月七！
E: It was all March!

C: 这样啊…要是能找到托帕小姐问问，说不定还能有些眉目。
E: I see... Perhaps if we were able to find Miss Topaz, she'd be able to give us some clues.

C: 哼哼！哼……
E: Oink! Oink...

C: 次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神可是我们的伙伴！
E: But Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is our friend!

C: …我明白了。我们相…我们暂且相信你。
E: ...Alright. I guess we'll just have to trust you... for now.

C: 明白了吗——！
E: Got that?

C: 算了——一人一个问题，不许多问，问完赶紧走人哈。
E: *sigh* Fine, since you're here, I'll throw in a Q&A. One question per person, and make it snappy!

C: 这只次元扑满——准确地说是以太灵——在性格方面似乎有些不对劲。你有什么头绪吗？
E: This Warp Trotter — I mean — Aether Spirit... they've been acting a little strange. Do you have any idea what the reason could be?

C: 原来我们要找的不是凭证，而是呜呜伯吗？
E: Wait a minute, so we're actually looking for Wubbaboos, not passes?

C: 想要了解更多信息的话，就去找那位向导吧。我还有事，就先失陪啦～
E: If you need any information, your best bet is to talk to the guide. Unfortunately, I've got a few other matters to attend to right now, but I wish you both the best of luck!

C: 注意：「自动机兵•蜘蛛」是一次性消耗品——请务必<color=#dbc291ff>在目标聚集时</color>再引发爆炸——
E: Be aware: Automaton Spiders may only be used once. Trigger explosions <color=#dbc291ff>when targets are grouped closely together</color>.

C: 厉害。被你这样的高手打败，我的摇滚之魂也久违地燃起来了。哈哈哈......
E: Amazing. Being defeated by a master like you has got my rock'n'roll soul all fired up! Hahaha...

C: 精彩的战斗，游戏中的比拼果然也需要技巧与训练啊…我输得心服口服。
E: A wonderful battle. I see contests in gaming also require skills and training... I admit complete defeat.

C: 没问题，我随时奉陪哦。
E: No worries, I'll be ready any time.

C: 哈哈哈，果然又输给你啦，但这次玩得也很开心，谢啦！
E: Haha, you won again. That was a lot of fun though, thanks!

C: {NICKNAME}，又见面啦！本以为「表演赛」需要咱准备什么节目，没想到是要再较量一次啊。
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}! I thought the "exhibition match" meant we had to prepare some kind of performance, I didn't realize we would be battling again!

C: …好强悍的气场！
E: ...Wow, things are getting tense!

C: 哼哼！哼！
E: Oink, oink, oink!

C: 自我们家几个兄弟姐妹落户仙舟以来，这还是我头一回出远门！没想到这一跑就跨越了几个星系，跑到这个冰雪星球来啦。
E: I don't think I've ever been this far away from the Xianzhou before! Who'd have thought I'd be hopping star systems only to wind up on this cold, icy planet?

C: 高歌猛进的新锐玩家——来自星穹列车的开拓者——！
E: The daring Trailblazers of the Astral Express⁓!

C: 不对，还没结束呢——乔瓦尼先生说过的那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>，你忘了吗？
E: Not yet — don't forget the <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color> that Mr. Giovanni mentioned.

C: …但今晚，各位不如先抛开那些疑问，尽情享受你们这来之不易的胜利，如何？
E: For now, I suggest you forget about that and enjoy your victory, you've earned it after all!

C: 你们感情真是越来越好了。
E: Seems like you two are really starting to click!

C: 所以关键问题不是「出逃」啊，你看下文——
E: That's not the point — here, read this part...
WHAT!? UNWORTHY!?

C: 这怎么有两…两个白露大人……
E: ...Wh—Why are there two of her?

C: 咱们不如玩个游戏，「别让人抓到」！
E: I know! Let's play a game called "don't let anyone catch us!"

C: 粉丝数多起来，果然就能收到一些新线索…你们看，我的战略没有错！
E: And as predicted, we got some new leads... Looks like my strategy is working like a treat!

C: 现在还是专心休息吧…抓岁阳的事，还是等我的心肺功能缓过劲来再说吧……
E: I'd rather focus on resting first... I need to wait for my heart rate to recover before I go chasing another heliobus.

C: 我赐予你们力量！
E: Receive my power!

C: 万事俱备，去吧，<color=#dbc291ff>将白露赶进藏月瓠的阵法之中</color>吧！
E: All is set. Now go on, <color=#dbc291ff>drive Bailu into the matrix of the Lunaumbra Gourd</color>!

C: 太卜司可能被某种不明生物盘踞了，要是贸然闯进去，你也会成为受害者！
E: The Divination Commission may have been infiltrated by some unknown creature... If you rush in, you could become a target too!

C: 是是，都看到了。可我要是现在转身走了，不就变成旷工了吗？上班摸鱼归摸鱼，旷工可就不为太卜所容了。
E: Yeah, yeah, I've seen it alright... but if I leave now, won't that count as unauthorized absence? I can get away with slacking off, but the Master Diviner won't tolerate complete abandonment of my post.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 它毕竟是岁阳…
E: Well, he is a heliobus...

C: 找到尾巴了？
E: Did you find Tail?

C: 我没事。可笑我连他的动作都没看清，就倒在了地上。
E: Yes, I'm fine. The funny thing is that I didn't even see him move — I just fell straight to the ground.

C: 在一切失控前，咱们得快些赶上他。
E: We've got to catch up with him before things get out of hand.

C: 不必惊慌。在我看来，这座剑阵可是真实不虚的武库宝藏。只要抬头观望其中的任意一柄剑，便有千般招式在我眼中伸展演绎，无穷无尽，远超彦卿过去的所知所学。
E: Don't be alarmed. To me, these swords form a precious arsenal. When I gaze upon any one, a thousand sword fights dance before my eyes — the swordplay far exceeding anything I have learned.

C: 你用尾巴的下落蛊惑了她。
E: You lied to her about Tail's whereabouts.

C: 寒鸦小姐，请诚实地告诉我，十王司有什么办法吗？
E: Miss Hanya, tell me straight... Does the Ten-Lords Commission actually have a solution?

C: …另外就是，尾巴大爷不在的时候，别的岁阳都欺负我，还是有大爷在的时候比较安心。
E: ...Besides, when Mr. Tail isn't around, the other heliobi pick on me. I feel safer when Tail is here.

C: 你一开始就出手就好了嘛。
E: It would've been easier if you'd stepped in from the start...

C: 我没有装可怜…
E: I'm not...

C: 藿藿，对不起。就当爸爸妈妈已经不在了……
E: Huohuo, I'm sorry. It's better that you pretend mom and dad are no longer here...

C: 即便是亲生父母，也能这么绝情吗。人类啊……
E: How can your own flesh and blood be so heartless? These humans...

C: 尾巴感受到这扇门只是幻障迷境的虚构，门后什么也没有。
E: Tail senses that this door is just an imaginary structure in the Illusory Maze with nothing behind the door.

C: 解散，现在就各忙各的吧！
E: Alright, let's split up gang and get to our tasks!

C: 我第一次看帖子，我还以为是几千年前的棋盘上附带了什么妖祟呢。如果没有完成极致的对决，是不会满足的。
E: When I first saw the post, I thought some malevolent spirit had possessed an ancient chess board. I thought it would never be satisfied unless it completed the ultimate battle of wits.

C: 有一回我在菜市场撞见他，就问起这件事，他才告诉我——是他分别了三十多年的妻子若昔从域外回来了。
E: One time I bumped into him at the market and asked him about it. He told me, it was his wife Ruoxi finally coming home after over thirty years abroad.

C: 我看明白了，两位都是演员。
E: I understand. Both of you are actors.

C: 尾巴大爷怎么看呢？
E: What do you think, Mr. Tail?

C: 是啊，懂的都懂。这件事在旁人看来或许没什么奇特的地方，但在咱们司部内的人看来，当真是极为诡异。
E: That's right, you understand. This may not seem so strange to the average person, but everyone in our department finds this whole thing extremely abnormal.

C: 想创业发财很怪吗？
E: Is it that strange to want to start a business and get rich?

C: 展开讲讲。
E: Explain.

C: 呼，太卜走了。唉，我一定是被岁阳附身了对吧，{NICKNAME}，判官大人？
E: Phew, the Master Diviner's gone. Ah, I must have been possessed by a heliobus, right {NICKNAME}, Judge?

C: 我们的竞业同行最喜欢用「玩法」来挑刺，说说你们准备了什么新玩法？
E: Our competitors like to use our lack of "game modes" as criticism. Tell me, what new game modes have you all come up with?

C: 怎么样，本座略施小计，就轻易动摇这家伙的美梦了。
E: What do you think? I put a little plan together and easily crushed their dreams!

C: 毫无疑问，这肯定是岁阳！
E: There's no doubt about it. It's a heliobus!

C: 这样吧，有些事情我没有在帖子里讲，讲完以后，你们肯定就明白了。
E: Fine. There are some things that I did not mention in my original post. You'll understand once I explain.

C: （放弃）
E: (Give up)

C: 从「1」开始…
E: Start from "1"...

C: 咕咕的快递箱。里面似乎有饥饿的小兽等待投食，除非你有食物，否则它不会让你打开快递箱。
E: A courier package that is making a growling sound. It sounds like there is a small hungry creature in there waiting to be fed. Throw it some food or it won't let you open the courier package.

C: 汪汪汪……
E: Woof, woof...

C: …要让它过来的话，要不要试试铃铛之类的？
E: ...If you want it to come closer, why don't you try using a bell or something?

C: 你们看这张照片，和房产证上的是不是同一个人？
E: Look at this picture. Isn't this the same one that's on the deed?

C: 但是仙舟上也有一句话叫作「乱拳打死老师傅」，意思就是不按常理出牌、乱中取胜。也许这才是素裳的「王牌」。
E: But, there is a phrase on the Xianzhou: "Enough random punches can kill a grandmaster," meaning sometimes it is possible to win through pure chaos that defies normal logic. Perhaps this is the "ace up her sleeve."

C: 阿月姑娘，你能给我们讲讲到底是怎么一回事吗？
E: Miss A-Yue, can you please tell us what's going on?

C: 打断一下，你们是不是忘了什么…
E: Excuse me. Have you forgotten about something...?

C: 过了好一会儿，她深深地吸了一口气，这才开口打破这份尴尬的寂静。
E: After a while, she takes a deep breath to finally break this most awkward of silences.

C: 嗯，看她那样，估计要回去好好消化一段时间了。
E: Yeah. Seeing how she was, she would probably need to go back and digest things for a while.

C: 算了算了，「夜半惊魂」什么的事好歹算是解决了。她俩能再见面也算是某种团圆了嘛。
E: Ah, forget it. This "midnight terror" or whatever is now resolved. The two of them meeting up again is like some kind of reunion.

C: 三月七？
E: March 7th?

C: 总感觉问题在你身上…
E: Perhaps the problem lies with you...

C: 三月七关闭了鸟笼的禁制，但宝烛并没有就此离去。
E: March 7th lifts the constraints of the birdcage, but Arkeri doesn't leave immediately.

C: 是、是打光效果…
E: I—It's just the lighting effects...

C: 再往上据我所知就没有更高级别的奖牌了，确实挺珍贵的。
E: As far as I'm aware, there's no higher medallion on offer. So yes, it's indeed quite precious.

C: 然后就是去往绥园了，理由大家都懂的，走吧。
E: Next up it's time to go to Fyxestroll Garden and I think everyone knows the reason why. Let's go.

C: 又冒出来个新帖，而且这个用户名…这个风格……
E: There's another new post. And the username... and the style...

C: 呃，主要内容其实是模拟战斗，维修科的人说，以机器的性能，就只能支撑这种体量的内容。
E: Er, the main format is actually a simulated battle. The maintenance team said that a machine with these specs could only support content of that size.

C: 没关系，休眠舱已就绪，如果您想要继续测试，随时启动休眠舱即可。
E: No problem. The cryosleep pod is Ready. You can restart the cryosleep pod at any time if you would like to continue with the test.

C: 接下来，请继续培育造物，这将加快我们的研究进度。您所追寻的问题，届时会有科学的解答。
E: Next, please keep nurturing creations to help speed up our research progress. The answers to all the questions you seek can be found through science.

C: 根据空间站界种科的命名规则，你可以喊我藤萝饼，能遗传到我这一类基因特征的幸运儿，都可以叫这个名字。
E: If we follow the Station Department of Ecology rules of nomenclature, then you can call me Wisteria Cake. Anything lucky enough to inherit these quality genetic traits can be called that, too.

C: 对话到此为止吧，我并不擅长。若你想听故事，可随时找我。我有很多故事可以讲给你听。
E: That's enough conversation for now. I'm not the best at this. Stop by any time if you'd like to hear a story. I've got lots of stories to tell you.

C: 哈哈哈！确实如此。在下倒是觉得，这份「诡异」恰恰是它最有趣的地方。
E: Hahaha, indeed! I actually think this "weirdness" is what's most fascinating about it.

C: 「我们问——它是谁？汽水瓶回答：嘀嗒嘀•嗒嘀元帅！」
E: "We inquire, who is it? The soda bottles reply: It's His Excellency, Marshal Tick-Tock!"

C: …人家很好奇呀，那杯饮料真的会有效果嘛？
E: ...I'm curious. Will that drink really work?

C: 「左边的门代表*是*，右边的门代表*否*。」
E: "The door on the left means 'yes,' and the one on the right means 'no.'"

C: 经常。几乎每天都会。
E: Very often. Pretty much every day.

C: 嘎嘎嘎…这是个什么鬼地方，睡了个觉，醒来人全没了，还到处都是…呜呜，都是怪物！
E: Hmm... what's this terrible place? I woke up and found myself here, with nobody but... *sob* monsters!

C: 随着梦境逐渐坍塌，仍然能保持理智的「美梦剧团」已经不多了。
E: The Dreamscape is collapsing, and there aren't many Sweet Dreams Troupe members who can keep their sanity.

C: 叫你给我来个<color=#dbc291ff>超级浓厚的小杯饮料</color>，听见了吗！
E: I told you to make me a <color=#dbc291ff>super thick drink in a small glass</color>, you hear me!?

C: 唉。强烈的欢乐过后，无止境的空虚再次包裹了我。
E: *sigh* Following the bliss, boundless emptiness once more consumes me.

C: 不达目的绝不罢休！
E: I wouldn't give up until I got what I wanted!

C: 上次和您聊过后，我的头脑如今变得无比清晰。哈哈哈哈，这就是得到拯救的感觉吗！
E: My mind has become so clear since we last talked. Hahahaha! Is this what salvation feels like?

C: 嘿嘿。作为奖励，能为我再调杯饮料吗？这次想要<color=#dbc291ff>大杯，味道强烈的，口感浓厚的那种！还是多分几层颜色！</color>
E: Hee-hee. As a reward, can you make me another drink? This time I want <color=#dbc291ff>a large glass, with a strong taste and thick texture, and with a few more layers of color!</color>

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 对，它的情绪太不稳定，没法记住复杂的东西，最容易闹出事来。就像个小孩子，需要哄，有时候也得好好教训。
E: Yeah, they're emotionally unstable and can't remember complex things, and they're most likely to throw a fit. They need to be treated like a kid, and sometimes they need a lesson.

C: …装饰物？
E: ...Decorations?

C: 我也…有点累了。
E: And I'm starting to... feel tired.

C: 你太善良了，谢谢你哇！
E: You are too kind. Thank you!

C: 曾经我也像你这样，忙着给每位顾客送饮料，别人对我说话，我只能回答：「收到汪」。
E: I used to be like you, busily serving drinks to customers. If anyone said something to me, I'd just respond with, "Roger, woof!"

C: 是我是我！你没找错人。
E: Yeah, it's me! You've found the right person.

C: 那不就是外挂？
E: Isn't that just cheating?

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 汪汪汪
E: WoofWoofWoof

C: 绝对<rhythm>禁止
E: Absolutely <rhythm>forbidden

C: 呼，可真晕死我了，拿最少的钱，干最累的活。
E: Phew, this is a bit too much. Getting such paltry pay for the toughest job.

C: 唉，家族说什么安全检查…查到最后搞出了一堆惊梦剧团和忆域迷因，我们珍贵的超大银幕还被不知道什么东西砍成了两半，真是气人！
E: The Family said they were doing a security check... but ended up creating tons of Dreamjolt Troupe monsters and Memory Zone memes! And something even chopped our precious mega-screen in half. It's outrageous!

C: 对了，据说你能在梦里看到别人看不见的东西，还能改变别人的情绪…是吗？
E: By the way, I heard you can see things that other people can't in your dreams, and you can also alter people's emotions... Is it true?

C: 因为银狼对我念念不忘。
E: Silver Wolf said she was thinking of me all the time.

C: 啾——我***的两个**，气死鸟了啾！
E: Tweet! #@%$ the two $@%#^$%, I'm so livid, tweet!

C: 都给我滚开啊啾！
E: Get out of my way, tweet!

C: 像什么？
E: What is?

C: 啊，抱歉，耽误得似乎有些久了…我们现在是不是该回去了？
E: Ah, I'm sorry! I held you up for a while, didn't I? Is it time we head back?

C: 如果商品无破损情况，我就先离开了，还有两百份包裹需要在这个系统时内派送——当然，这里是梦境，就算有破损也多半是美术设计。
E: If the item isn't damaged, then I need to go. There are still <unbreak>200</unbreak> packages I need to deliver before the next system hour — And since we're in the Dreamscape, any damage is probably a deliberate aesthetic choice anyway.

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 根本就没得选嘛！
E: Why is there only one option!?

C: 这么多人一起上去，恐怕没处落脚。三月，和列车长陪{NICKNAME}上去看看新房间吧。
E: There won't be enough space to fit all of us. March, you and the conductor should go with {NICKNAME} to see {M#his}{F#her} new room.

C: 「哦，糟糕。」你脑中响起了一个声音，「姬子小姐制作的咖啡，口味可未必是你能承受的……」
E: "Oh, no." A voice in your head says, "Miss Himeko's coffee might not be to your taste..."

C: （…等我有钱了，就雇两个全副武装的智械在这里站岗！）
E: (...When I have the money, I'll hire two Intellitrons fully armed to the teeth to stand guard here!)

C: 如果玩多人竞技游戏时缺队友，可以随时联系我。你的杨叔可是宝刀未老呢。
E: If you ever need teammates for multiplayer games, feel free to contact me. I'm still going strong!

C: 地宫是什么？
E: What's a hypogeum?

C: 真是神奇…不过初步观察下来，这只幼兽除了有些虚弱外，没有其他问题。
E: Fascinating... From what I can tell, this little one seems fine, just a bit weak.

C: 与它四目相对，你们的眼中映照出相同的色彩。一个美妙的名字在你脑海中逐渐成型。
E: When your eyes lock with it, the same colors shimmer in both your gazes. The perfect name comes to you.

C: 「大奇美拉」。
E: "The Great Chimera."

C: 呜嗡！（超级大•地兽！）
E: Grumph! (Super Dromas!)
Grumph? (Eh?)

C: 呵，能患上此种疾病并非缺陷，而是意味着它受到了欧洛尼斯的青睐——比起治疗，更需要的是学会控制这份礼物。
E: Heh. To be afflicted by such a condition isn't a flaw. That means it has been favored by Oronyx. What it needs isn't a cure — but the strength to control this gift.

C: 我都没这么熟练。
E: Even I'm not that skilled.

C: 做得好，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大。
E: Well done, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas.

C: 否，只是我的论文《论大地兽取代渎职祭司的可行性》被他们联名批判了而已。
E: No. They just collectively criticized my paper On the Feasibility of Replacing Negligent Priests with Dromas.

C: 哦哦哦哦哦——你居然、居然可以和我沟通不了的大地兽沟通？
E: WHOOOA... You can actually talk to the dromas I can't?!

E: Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas, cool. Georios, not cool.

C: 尽管放马过来，即使是你造的也逃不过我的眼睛，虽然我知道你不会的。
E: Bring it on. Even if you made it, it won't escape my scrutiny, though I know you wouldn't do that.

C: 真没意思。记得要多来找我玩喵。
E: Boring. Make sure you come hang out with me more often, meow.

C: 我同意，多就是好。
E: I agree. More is always better.

E: Goldweaver

C: AMPHOREUS://DATA//ChrysosHeirs//*.core
E: AMPHOREUS://DATA//ChrysosHeirs//*.core

C: 独守孤城，恶战连连，\n黑潮的呢喃，常在他耳边回荡。
E: Guarding the city alone and embroiled in war,\nThe murmurs of the black tide constantly sound in his ears.

C: 来自万径之门的回响，\n偶尔将她惊醒；
E: Echoes from the Gate of Infinity\noccasionally jolt her awake,

C: 诗人们为孩童的预言谱曲，\n沿着磐岩之脊的身躯，\n每个足印都刻录着歌谣。
E: The bards compose songs for the children's prophecy,\nAnd along the corpus of the Pillar of Stone,\nLay their footprints upon which ballads are carved.

C:
命运的金光，
掩不住权位的阴黯。

夺去孩童唯一的亲人，
只需要一封密谋的信函。
E:
Alas, the golden light of destiny,
Cannot illuminate the shadows of power and greed.

All it takes to rob the child of her only kin,
Is a letter of dark conspiracy.

C:
大地因他们轰鸣，
海潮为他们翻涌。
命运的天平剧烈震颤，
最后缓缓平歇——
E:
The earth roared for them.
The tides surged for them.
The scales of destiny shivered violently,
Then slowly calmed —

C:
那座城邦名为多洛斯，
据说扎格列斯也曾在此受骗。

国王重金悬赏完美谎言，
欲再造欺骗泰坦的伟业。
E:
That city is named Dolos,
Where even Zagreus was once tricked.

The king promises to reward the perfect lie,
Wishing to recreate the deceit of the Titan, his grand feat.

C: 黯沉的天空下，\n金血浸透了飞贼的披风——
E: Under the somber sky,\nGolden blood soaked the thief's cloak —

C:
但你不会再彷徨。
踢踏，踢踏，跫音复响。
你牵住伙伴的手向前奔跑，
身后是永恒的一页安详。
E:
But you will dither no longer.
Tap, tap... footsteps echo in rhythm.
Hand in hand with your companion, you run ahead,
leaving behind a page of eternal peace.

C: 因苦痛而昏聩的泰坦长叹着阖目——\n「我不怪你…荒蛮的万灵之祖。」
E: The Titan, in a painful daze, closed their eyes with a sigh...\n"I do not blame you... wild ancestor of all souls."

C: 震颤的岩层是巨龙的眼眸——\n它看见大地兽沦为役工与食粮，\n奇兽充当战争的兵戈。
E: The trembling bedrock is the Giant Dragon's eyes —\nThey see dromases reduced to laborers and food,\nMythical beasts turned into weapons of war.

C: 「我不…接受…！」 褶曲的岩层如同怒涛。 而那剑士并不生畏，只是喟叹， 仿佛早已习以为常。
E: "I... won't... accept this!" The twisted rocks rise like a roaring tide. Yet the swordmaster shows no fear, merely sighs, As if long accustomed to such sights.

C: 直到战火中哭号的黎民，\n被利刃相接的声音裹挟，\n野心的烈火将<color=#9a7d62>「律法」</color>烧尽。
E: Until the masses crying out amidst the flames of war,\nWere swept away by the sounds of sharp swords locking,\nThe fires of ambition incinerating the "<color=#9a7d62>Law</color>."

C: 「帕姆以前有一套高领的制服，\n三月来后就很少穿了。」\n——丹恒
E: "Pom-Pom used to have a turtleneck uniform,\nbut they've rarely worn since March arrived."\n— Dan Heng

C:
回忆编织成过去，逐渐累积。
已经在来时路上，
投下了长长的影子。
今后的我，又会留下什么故事呢？
E:
Memories weave the past, bit by bit.
They stretch long behind me,
Like shadows on the path I've walked.
I wonder... what stories will the future me create?

C:
她的故国背叛盟约，
依「律法」当诛。

可她授我棋艺，
墓碑上刻录<color=#9e5738>「吾师」</color>之称，
又有何妨？
E:
Her state betrayed our alliance
And must be executed according to Law.

But she taught me chess,
So why can't I chisel the word <color=#9e5738>"teacher"</color>
On her tombstone now?

C:
凯撒召集诸位英雄商讨，
沉吟间最终作罢。
既已锚定<color=#9e5738>「大地」</color>之兽的肩脊，
且让那飞贼侥幸多活几个晨昏。
E:
The Imperator summoned the heroes to discuss,
Finally stopping after much hesitation.
As they had already pinned down the bones of <color=#9e5738>Earth</color>'s beast,
They let that thief live for a bit longer in bliss.

C: 信使睁大眼睛，\n「阿雅，你又瞒着我偷吃！」
E: The messenger's eyes opened wide,\n"Agy! You've been snacking behind my back again!"

C: 尽管他已讲过多遍，\n女孩的眼中仍闪烁着熙光。
E: Though he had told this story many times before,\nA light in the girl's eyes still shines.

C: 哀丽秘榭的白厄。
E: Phainon of Aedes Elysiae

C: 他并不谈论自己的来历，\n只是以这个名字……\n轻描淡写地自称。
E: He never spoke of his origins,\nOnly using this name...\nto nonchalantly identify himself.

C: 此篇乃是旧事重提：\n某日，他的一位学生神情兴奋，\n于树庭当中横冲直撞——
E: This is a tale buried in history:\nOne day, a student elated in victory,\nDashed around the Grove's territory —

C: 「倒是煽惑诱人的饵料， 可惜非我所求。」 神力唾手可得， 但学士不为所动。
E: "What a tempting bait, But that's not my desired chalice." Divine power is within his reach, But the scholar is not moved by that essence.

C: 可惜金丝是任性的事物。\n从不因同情、怜悯而动摇。
E: Unfortunately, gold threads are willful things.\nThey are never swayed by sympathy or pity.

C:
这是因追逐神的「火种」，
而开启的宿命吗？

她跪拜于神像前，
祈求「浪漫」的墨涅塔，
瞧瞧这些战火中浸满鲜血的衣裳。
E:
Is this the destiny unleashed,
For their act of chasing gods' "Coreflames"?

She kneels before the divine statues
And prays to Mnestia of Romance,
To look at these garments soaked in blood from the flames of war.

C:

That is when the one who seized the Coreflame finally knows,
There's no difference between a "demigod" and a true deity.
The golden blood that congealed through divinity,
Only in this heavy heat can temporarily flow,
And let this "golden butterfly" feel a fleeting warmth.
"...Cyrene?"

E: "Trity!" The children laughed, swinging on her hair like a playground swing. Tribios smiled too. Even though their unclear speech could only pronounce the two syllables "Trity," Tribios had known since childhood that they were her best playmates, the ones who understood her heart the most.
