C:
「大地」的火种已被归还。

吉奥里亚是大地的泰坦，天空和海洋，也都诞生自它在沉眠时的呼吸。黄金裔的神话认为所有山脉都曾是吉奥里亚的神体化身，它是体积最大，也最温和、善良的泰坦，人世的守护神。传说在黑潮降临之际，它耸起众多山峰、拉开巨大的沟壑，最终四分五裂、再也无法苏醒。

吉奥里亚同时也是耕作和历史之神。它将自身的神体赠予泰坦们，以此作为创造生命的基石。在死亡和饥饿降临时，它更是不顾瑟希斯的愤怒，将耕种的知识传授给世人，与大地一同陪伴翁法罗斯走过数千年的岁月。人们常用「沙漏」纪念这位和蔼慈爱的神，而不求回报的吉奥里亚，从来以沉默应对世人的赞美。

翁法罗斯的「山之民」和「大地兽」皆是吉奥里亚的造物。笨拙的泰坦总是掌握不好捏造的精度，往往让手中的造物变得过分巨大。但同时，造物们也汲取了吉奥里亚的秉性，变得沉稳而和善。倘若说，还有什么能让这样一位泰坦陷入愤怒，恐怕就只有破坏大地与粮食的愚行了。
E:
The Coreflame of "Earth" has been returned.

Georios is the Titan of earth. The skies and the seas were also born of their dormant breath. Chrysos Heir mythology believes that every mountain range was once a physical manifestation of Georios. They are the largest, gentlest, and most benevolent Titan that protects the mortal world. Legend states that when the black tide descended, their mountain peaks raised and caused huge ravines to open up. They were split into pieces and unable to ever reawaken.

Georios is also the god of agriculture and history. They gifted their body to the Titans to become the cornerstone of the creation of life. When death and famine raged, they ignored the wrath of Cerces and shared knowledge of agriculture with the people of the world. This knowledge stuck with the Amphoreus for millennia. People often use the "hourglass" to commemorate this benevolent deity. Not wishing for any kind of compensation, Georios has always been silent in the face of the praise of mortals.

The "Mountain Dwellers" and "dromases" of Amphoreus are all creations of Georios. The clumsy Titan never quite grasped the finer points of creation and always made their creations far too big. However, at the same time, their creations also absorbed Georios' natural disposition to become tacit and kind. If there were anything that could send such a Titan into a rage, it would be foolish actions such as damaging the earth or crops.

C:
艾格勒是司掌天空、天体以及昼夜循环的泰坦神明，同时也曾是疆域最广阔的泰坦神明，它高居翁法罗斯的天穹之上，笼罩并注视着整个世界。在大多数传说中，艾格勒的傲慢没有遮蔽它的友善，它向世人投下目光，温暖大地，降下甘霖。但它也可化作最为可怕的天灾，任何试图僭越天空的狂徒，都会被它施以严酷的惩戒。

在翁法罗斯人的传说中，艾格勒被形容为一位长有百眼的天空巨鸟。它注视大地的眼睛睁开时，世界迎来光明；它的眼皮垂下时，世界陷入黑暗。在与灾厄泰坦的战争中，艾格勒的许多双眼睛都被「刺盲」——这也是为何在如今，翁法罗斯的诸多城邦都陷入了永夜。

艾格勒也是创造、发明之神，遍布大地的智械奇兽便是它的创作，工程师和数学家们时常祭拜这位百眼的神明，希冀从它的赐福中获得些许灵光与启迪。
E:
Aquila, the Titan of the sky, celestial bodies, and the cycle of day and night, was also the Titan that once had the largest realm. They reside above the heavens of Amphoreus, encompassing and watching over the entire world. In most legends, Aquila's pride does not obscure their kindness. They gaze upon humanity, warming the earth and bringing down life-giving rain. However, they can also transform into the most fearsome calamity, harshly punishing any who dare to overcome the sky.

In the tales of Amphoreus, Aquila is depicted as a colossal sky-bird with a hundred eyes. When their eyes open, light fills the world, and when their eyelids fall, darkness envelops the land. In the war against the Calamity Titans, many of Aquila's eyes were "blinded." This is why many city-states in Amphoreus are now shrouded in eternal night.

Aquila is also the god of creation and invention, credited with creating the mechanical beasts scattered across the land. Engineers and mathematicians frequently pay homage to this hundred-eyed deity, hoping to receive inspiration and enlightenment from their blessings.

C:
「律法」的火种已被归还。

塔兰顿是律法与公正的泰坦。它少以实体现于人间，传说中的记载也寥寥无几。人们说，它是命运的规则、是万物的律法、是违背规则与律法后的天罚。

塔兰顿被认为是公义的化身，它捍卫翁法罗斯的禁忌与边界，为万物指定逻辑与法。它创造出利衡币，令交易得以等价进行。它维护世间的平衡，任何打破律法的行为，都当受到惩戒。正如永不倾斜的天平本身，万事万物都不应过度，想要获得，就必然失去，若求取泰坦的赐福，便要为之付出代价，乃至成为可怖的怪物。因此，众神往往将它看作纷争的调停者，当泰坦间的矛盾已无法化解，唯有它的审判，方能让血亲们信服。

塔兰顿以严苛的律法约束翁法罗斯，也以相同的誓言约束自己，绝不容许偏袒和不公。它和它的信徒基于誓言行事，对弃誓者和越界者下达裁决——即便那是另一位泰坦。
E:
The Coreflame of "Law" has been returned.

Talanton is the Titan of law and justice. They rarely appear in the mortal world in physical form and there are almost no records of them in legend. People often say that they are the rules of destiny, the law of all things, and the divine retribution for violation of such rules and laws.

Talanton is seen as a manifestation of justice. They uphold the taboos and boundaries of Amphoreus and lay down logic and laws for all things. They created Balance Coins to ensure that all transactions are of equivalent exchange. They maintain the balance of the world. Any action that would damage these laws will be subject to retribution. Just as a scale that never tilts, all things must be free of excess. If one wishes to obtain, they must first lose. If you wish to receive the benediction of this Titan, you must pay a cost. Some people even end up being transformed into terrifying monsters. For this reason, the gods often view them as the mediator of strife. When a dispute between Titans cannot be resolved, only their judgment is able to satisfy their kin.

Talanton has bound Amphoreus with strict laws, and themselves with an equally strict vow to never allow for favoritism or injustice. They and their disciples act according to this vow, sentencing those who break their vows or violate boundaries to punishment... Even if the subject of this judgment is another Titan.

C: 看我的！
E: Watch this!

C: 世间万物纷繁复杂，研究者只有将之条分缕析才能略有成果，她却以一种奇迹般的方式揭示了它们的本质。若非亲眼得见，实在难以相信。
E: The world is full of extraordinary complexity. Normally, researchers are only able to glean truth after dissecting the universe into categories... yet she revealed the essence of all things in such a miraculous way. If I hadn't seen it with my own eyes, I would never have believed it.

C: 看来你们需要吃点苦头。
E: Seems you need to experience some hardship.

C: 唉…一旦停下来，就很难继续了哦？
E: It's tough to get going again once you've stopped, don't you think?

C: 哎，大衣脏了，有些难办。
E: *sigh* Is that a stain? I like this coat.

C: 黑塔女士也在？这下就没什么好担心的了！
E: Oh! Madam Herta? We've got nothing to worry about.

C: 这儿也能看到星星么？
E: Can you see the stars from here too?

C: 就这样吧，人偶而已，别要求太多。
E: Happy? Word of advice: Don't expect too much from a puppet.

C: 能不能安静一点！
E: Maybe you can keep it down!?

C: 战斗开始了？请下达指令，御主。
E: The battle has begun? Please give your command, Master.

C: I am the bone of my sword. Steel is my body, and fire is my blood. I have created over a thousand blades. Unknown to Death. Nor known to Life. Have withstood pain to create many weapons. Yet, those hands will never hold anything. So as I pray—
E: I am the bone of my sword. Steel is my body, and fire is my blood. I have created over a thousand blades. Unknown to Death. Nor known to Life. Have withstood pain to create many weapons. Yet, those hands will never hold anything. So as I pray—

C: 朗道家的三妹…对吧？我听杰帕德谈起过她，但还素未谋面。照他的说法，「玲宝」应该是个聪明过人的孩子。
E: The third child of the Landau family, right? I've heard Gepard mention her before, but I've yet to meet her. From what I've heard, "Lynxy" — as they call her — is very smart for her age.

C: 真是难缠。
E: How troublesome.

C: 来得正好，开始巡逻吧。
E: Right on time — let's start the patrol.

C: 休息好了吗，娜塔？别累着啊。
E: Managed to grab some sleep, Nat? Don't burn yourself out.

C: 不算什么。
E: That's it?

C: 听说她最近一直在帮忙照顾受伤的流浪者，非常了不起…我刚见到克拉拉的时候，虽然她会熟练地给机器人替换零件，自己的伤口却发炎了，看得我心疼坏了。
E: I heard she's been looking after the wounded vagrants. What a girl... When I first met Clara, she was replacing parts for her robots like a mechanic, but leaving her own wounds unattended. It was heartbreaking to watch.

C: 不错的小游戏~
E: Cute little game~

C: 该做决定了。
E: Time to make a decision.

C: 已全部收整，没有遗漏。
E: All in order — leave nothing behind.

C: 当你胸有成竹，自认为已经看穿她诡计的时候，就该特别小心了——保不准，这也是她鬼点子的一部分。她狠起来，可是连自己都骗啊。
E: Think you've got her all figured out, do you? That's exactly what she wants you to think! Trust me, she's so cunning she could even outwit herself!

C: 为了去往远方…
E: To travel far away...

C: 重新出发吧。
E: Let's start again.

C: 听说了吗？下层区的三大特产：地髓，没良心的矿头，还有卢卡沙包大的拳头！
E: Have you heard of the three wonders of the Underworld? Geomarrow, heartless supervisors, and Luka's fist of steel!

C: 唉呀…{NICKNAME}你也在，那咱俩凑个局呗~
E: Hey... {NICKNAME}, you're here, too! Let's get this game going~

C: 歪打正着而已。
E: Fluke.

C: 百事贞吉，一心同归。
E: Good omens, fight as one!

C: 机巧之术，颇有趣味。
E: These mechanisms function in intriguing ways.

C: 在那个被她称之为「游戏」的世界里，她不放弃，便不会死去。
E: Within that world she calls a "game," she will never give up, nor yield to death.

C: 剑下不必留情。
E: A blade's edge knows no mercy.

C: 再走近一些也无妨。
E: We can get closer.

C: 风云不测，若涉渊水。
E: Our fortune is clouded with uncertainty.

C: 回忆无法选择。无论如何，我的过去都不会改变。
E: One cannot pick and choose their recollections. My past is unalterable.

C: 诸般后果，我来背负。
E: The consequences are mine to bear.

C: 都归你吧。
E: It's all yours.

C: 别看小妹平时阴恻恻的，若吾还阳有片刻闲暇，她都兴高采烈地拉吾到处闲逛。吾只好陪她。
E: My sister may not strike you as an extrovert, but when I have wakespan to spare, her eyes light up. We'll wander around and do silly things together. It's good to keep her company.

C: 听说工造司的「造化洪炉」里关着很多岁阳，后来炉子坏掉了，岁阳们趁机逃出来了…再后来，我的工作量就增加了……
E: I heard a lot of heliobi were sealed in the Artisanship Commission's Creation Furnace, but they all escaped when the furnace broke... That's why my workload is the way it is...

C: 藿藿：非、非得战斗吗？\n尾巴：对喽~别逃啊~
E: Huohuo: D—Do we have to fight?\nTail: Why, of course!

C: 虽然这火锅吃法多样，可我总以为红油海椒才是火锅的极意——这一口下去辛辣十足，真是教人直呼过瘾。若非如此，这生活怕是连丁点滋味都没有了。
E: There are many ways to cook hot pot, but I've always thought that chili peppers were the essential ingredient... A mouthful of spicy goodness, that's what satisfies. If it were not for this, life would have no flavor at all.

C: 这不是助教老师吗？来助我一臂之力吧。
E: If it isn't the assistant teacher. Give me a hand here.

C: 魔剑尚未敛尽。
E: There are still cursed swords to be destroyed.

C: 藏着什么好东西～
E: What do we have here?

C: 依妾身之见，丹鼎司的根本问题在于内耗。医士与丹士，不热心于治病救人，也不醉心于学术研究，唯独惦记着争权夺利，如何顾及漏网的莳者与心怀叵测的龙师？
E: From my point of view, the fundamental problem with the Alchemy Commission is internal strife. The healers and alchemists are not earnest about curing sickness, nor are they wholly interested in academic research. Their only concern is the struggle for power. How should we attend to the Disciples who slipped through the cracks and the scheming Preceptors...?

C: 你暴露了。
E: You've been exposed.

C: 旅途可还顺利？若是得闲，我这又来了一批好茶，等着列位恩公登门品鉴。
E: Has your journey been smooth? If you have the time, I've received another batch of fine tea, waiting for all of you to come and taste.

C: 不加速，也不推迟死亡，生命总会枯萎。我们虽会变成粒子，却能触达新的高度。
E: We may accelerate or postpone the arrival of death, but life will always wither. Though we will one day all be reduced to particles, we can still reach new heights.

C: 慢慢来。
E: What do we have here?

C: 如何？这儿有让你拔刀的理由么…「令使」？
E: Any justification here for you to unsheathe your blade... Emanator?

C: 也好，舍去了挣扎的工夫。
E: Half the work is already done.

C: 能用来告别的时间，本就不多了。
E: Hasten — we've hardly any time left to say farewell.

C: 我为逝者哀哭……
E: I weep for the departed...

C: 有点…疼……
E: That... kinda tickles...

C: 纵使遍地荆棘，也当砥砺前行。
E: Even through thistles and thorns, we must keep moving forward.

C: 公司那帮烂人里，她风评算好的吧？有什么用？只要还在公司一天，她和其他人都是一路货色！
E: In that bunch of no-goods at the firm, she's considered one of the better ones, right? But as long as she's with the IPC, she's no different from the rest of 'em – all cut from the same cloth!

C: 记得瞄心脏！
E: Remember to aim for the heart!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>缭乱•忍侠</color>，前来讨伐！
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Dazzling Ninja</color>, here to vanquish!

C: 斩！断！破！
E: Slash! Cut! Cleave!

C: 不认识我了？早和你说过——人类，女性，年轻，貌美，可爱。
E: You don't recognize me? I've told you who I am already — human, female, young, beautiful, attractive.

C: 时间就是金钱呐，咱们刚刚共度的时光——就算我请你的啦~回见~
E: Time is money, and I just gifted you some of mine. Consider it my gift~ Until next time!

C: 千千万万的记忆，巨细无遗的记录…等等，那她岂不是知道我的大宝库在哪里？！但如果是她，我也愿意分享一半…不，一大半好了…我最受不了对自己不好的人了！
E: Countless memories, meticulous records... Wait. Does that mean she knows where my grand treasury is!? Although, I wouldn't really mind sharing half of it with her... No, I'll give her more than half. I can't stand people who don't treat themselves well!

C: 随便玩玩的把戏结束了。
E: Our cute play session is over.

C: 尽管这家伙从不袒露自己的心声，他的心绪总是昭然若揭——简单到只剩下故乡，也沉重到只剩下叹息…这或许就是我们成为同路人的原因。
E: He never says what he thinks, but his simple and heavy feelings are always evident — so simple that they contain nothing except his home, and so heavy that they are reduced to nothing except sighs... Maybe that's why we became kindred spirits.

C: 若遇紧急情况，还请先救治其他人。
E: If an emergency unfolds, please focus on healing the others first.

C: 三月小姐，感谢你与翁法罗斯站在了一起。
E: Thank you for standing with Amphoreus, Miss March.

C: 无论等待多久，我都不会放弃。
E: I won't give up, no matter how long I must wait.

C: 得拦住他们…
E: Gotta stop them here...

C: 这次又有何妙计？愿闻其详。
E: What wondrous plans do you have this time? I'm all ears.

C: 那些璀璨的花朵，正是新生的梦。
E: Those brilliant flowers are newborn dreams.

C: 听说过「粉霞天女」的传说了吧？嗯，我很满意~谁能不爱粉霞天女？
E: Have you heard the legend of the "Rosy Celestial Maiden"? Mmm, I'm quite pleased~ Who wouldn't love the Rosy Celestial Maiden?

C: 「迷路迷境」的小妖精，是不是很可爱？创造它们的人一定有颗纯真的心吧。哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻，七种音符谱写出数不尽的歌谣，就像一成不变的岁月，也能铭记不同以往的故事♪
E: Aren't the little fairies in the Membrance Maze cute? The one who made them must have a super pure heart. Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti... The seven notes can compose countless songs, just like how time, unchanging, can record the varied stories of the past ♪

C: 愿「生死」萌发新蕊。
E: May "Life and Death" sprout new buds.

C: 这故事，如我们所书！
E: This story... is as we've written!

C: 好多了。
E: Much better.

C: 做得好哇，迷迷！
E: Good job, Mem!

C: 选择目标右
E: Select Target — Right

E: Team Lineup

C: 巡航
E: Cruise

E: Legendary Challenger

E: Event Details

C: 【共舞者】的击破特攻提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。施放天赋的<u>追加攻击</u>时，使所有【共舞者】下一次<u>行动提前</u><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>。
E: Increases Dance Partners' Break Effect by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When using Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, <u>advances the next action</u> of all "Dance Partners" by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 使敌方全体陷入【败谢】状态，持续<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>回合。随后造成等同于大丽花<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的火属性伤害，由敌方全体均分。\n【败谢】状态下，敌方目标防御力降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>，并且会被添加所有【共舞者】属性的弱点。
E: Inflicts a "Wilt" state on all enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Then, deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Dahlia's ATK, which is distributed evenly across all enemies.\nEnemy targets in the "Wilt" state have their DEF reduced by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> and will be implanted with Weakness of all Dance Partners' Types.

C: 完成开拓任务「树上的灾兆」获得
E: Obtained from completing the Trailblaze Mission "Omen in the Trees"

C: 遥远地平的长音
E: Horizon's Echo From Afar

E: Breaking its Weakness will dispel the "Juvenile Sting's" "Rapid Evolution" state

E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge

C: 它迎着朝阳绽放，
E: It bloomed in the morning sun,

C: 无一不死。
E: Will one day die.

C: 我做得到，对吧？
E: I can do it, right?

C: 帮倒忙
E: Disservicer

C: 不老实
E: Not-So-Honest

C: 目标是奇美拉大师！
E: My goal is to become a Chimera Master!

C: 自身受到伤害时：使随机同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When this unit takes DMG: A random ally's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 自身受到伤害时：对后1格同伴造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: When this unit takes DMG: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to the companion 1 tile behind.

E: Do not show again

E: Hint

E: ・ As a collaborator of the Stellaron Hunters, met with Firefly at Dreamflux Reef, revealing the existence of the Dream of Gnawing Oak.

C: 她要走了吗？
E: She's leaving?

C: 人们从未将它看透，包括刚取回那段记忆的你
E: No one has ever truly understood them, not even you who just recovered that memory

E: {NICKNAME}, when it comes to Destruction

C: 我该知道吗？
E: How should I know?

E: When this unit's attack deals DMG to any target, converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to <u>"Corrosion"</u>.

C: 诸界噩兆，蚀生虫鸣
E: Universal Blight, Howl of the Life Eater

C: 腐败骤陨
E: Descending Decay

C: 高歌邀客入席
E: Melody of Invitation

C: 大丽花提及知更鸟，她曾在你入梦后为你「调律」，之后却成为一场凶案的受害者。是谁杀死了知更鸟？
E: The Dahlia mentioned Robin, who once "tuned" you while you were dreaming, but later became a victim of a murder case. Who killed Robin?

C: 年幼的知更鸟与兄长探讨「鸟为什么会飞」，认为让它自由地选择飞翔就好。歌斐木对知更鸟的回答感到满意，并赠予她「临别之礼」。
E: The young Robin discussed "why birds can fly" with her elder brother, believing that letting them freely choose to fly is enough. Gopher Wood was satisfied with Robin's answer and gave her a "parting gift."

C: 大丽花好奇，为何黑天鹅如此珍视你的存在。黑天鹅请你从容登上最后的舞台，并亲自决定命运的去向。
E: The Dahlia wondered why Black Swan valued you so much. Black Swan invited you to calmly take your place upon the final stage and personally steer the course of destiny.

C: 你找到流萤。流萤表示不是故意想躲着你，请你让她自己留在这里。你会如何选择？
E: You found Firefly. She said she hadn't meant to hide from you, only that she wished to stay here by herself. What would you choose?

C: 「梦幻的」
E: Imagined

C: 完成戮力双雄「困难」难度挑战
E: Complete the Synergy Duo challenge in Hard mode

C: 请求其他奖励。
E: Request other rewards.

C: 烧掉他全部的家当。
E: Burn all of his belongings.

C: 归寂的骰（头）
E: Asat Pramad's Dice (Head)

C: 门关月的焚烧
E: Enkindle of Month of Gate
● Initial Curios: #1, #2, and #3

E: After receiving a certain number of attacks from the targets, immediately uses "Psychedelic Elegy."

C: 伤害提高
E: DMG Boost

C: 魂契
E: Soul Pact

C: 没关系，忘记了也不奇怪。喜新厌旧的习惯，说不准…{F#她}{M#他}就是从我这里学去的呢。
E: No worries. It's okay if {F#s}he forgot. {M#He's}{F#She's} always preferred the latest new thing... Maybe {F#s}he picked up that bad habit from me.

C: 好的，来了。
E: Alright. Coming!

C: 还需要我做什么吗？
E: Is there anything else I need to do?

C: 当然。我不介意为此徇私。
E: Of course. Who says I can't play favorites once in a while?

C: 看来是我多虑了。抱歉，{NICKNAME}…还有流萤小姐。也许这只是一段美好的相遇，仅此而已。
E: I guess I was worried for nothing. Sorry, {NICKNAME}... and Miss Firefly. Maybe this was just a beautiful encounter, nothing more.

C: 再然后…声音就消失了。
E: And then... the voice just vanished.

C: 我留在匹诺康尼的时间不多，能为「同谐」代劳的机会更少。只要愿意前往，我会事先熟悉每一个人——
E: I don't spend a lot of time in Penacony, and have even fewer chances to help out the Harmony. If I'm willing to go, I always make sure to get to know everyone beforehand...

C: 刚才不便直言。知更鸟，你为何要来这里？
E: I couldn't speak freely earlier. Robin, why did you come here?

C: 刚才那是怎么回事？
E: What happened just now?

C: 除了驾驶「火萤IV型」以外，我都必须呆在休眠舱里。否则，失熵症会进一步恶化。
E: When not piloting the Fyrefly Type IV, I must stay in the cryosleep pod. Otherwise, my Entropy Loss Syndrome will only get worse.

C: 今天过后，耶佩拉的名字就会从银河历史中消失，而永火官邸将取而代之，在不远的未来收到一封邀请函……
E: After today, Jepella's name will disappear from cosmic history, and the Ever-Flame Mansion will take its place. In the not-too-distant future, you'll receive an invitation...

C: 便要坠毁于白昼
E: It will shatter in the light of day

C: 我会留心的，多谢提醒。
E: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks for the heads-up.

C: 是，甚至很多时候…像是我自己。
E: Yes... And in many moments, looking at her is like seeing myself.

C: 无论成功与否，你的记忆我都会妥善奉还。
E: Whether I succeed or not, I'll return your memories to you safe and sound.

C: 橡木本就容易「生虫」，没什么好意外的。
E: Oak wood is prone to "insect infestations." Nothing surprising about that.

C: 是啊，就算你们是同行的伙伴，也没办法轻易跟进去。
E: That's right. Unfortunately, you won't be able to follow them in so easily, even if you've traveled together as companions.

C: 或许，无法走上同一条道路，也……
E: Maybe we can't walk the same path, but...

C: 我试着揭开希佩的第三重面相，可我错了，那并非「繁育」。可命运如此仁慈，借此令我发觉——
E: I tried to unveil Xipe's third face, but I was wrong. It wasn't the Propagation. Yet destiny was so merciful, making me realize...

C: 不错，我从未堪破「繁育」之秘，如今一分为四，一击之力，也无法奈何那猎手。
E: True, I never unraveled the secrets of the Propagation. Now split into four parts, a single strike of mine cannot harm that Hunter.

C: 您该知道，我不会认同。
E: You should know that I won't agree with this.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>12</unbreak>：<unbreak>00</unbreak>█我将飞上高空，变作天上的太阳。万众在我的光芒中热烈生长，而一切罪恶将无所遁形。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>12</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>█I shall ascend to the heavens, becoming the scorching sun. Bathed in my light, my people shall flourish, while all evil shall be eradicated."</color>

C: 匹诺康尼
E: Penacony

C: 我和它有什么渊源？
E: What connection do I have with the cat?

C: 也许没有什么敌人，一切只是场恶作剧。而我抱着你飞上天空时，天空中不是可怕的虫群，而是…我没能看到的烟花。
E: Maybe there were no enemies at all. It was all just a prank. And when I carried you up into the heavens, what we saw there wasn't the terrifying Swarm, but rather... the fireworks that I never got to see.

C: 握着她的手，完成她的愿望。
E: Hold her hand and fulfill her wish.

C: 来吧，被命运选中的匠人，请再一次修好我！
E: Come then, fate's chosen tinkerer. Please fix me one more time!

C: 「叽里咕噜说什么呢？」你完全没听懂小奇美拉的论证，只知道今天的工作要是没做完，就不给饭吃！
E: "What's all this mumbo-jumbo?" You couldn't understand the little chimera's reasoning at all, but you know one thing for sure: No food to eat if today's work isn't finished!

C: 听了小奇美拉的话，你陷入了沉思。对啊，工作的意义到底是什么呢？生命是有限的，工作却是无限的。奇美拉所做的，不过是重复将巨石推上山顶罢了……
E: After hearing the little chimera's words, you sink into deep contemplation. Yeah, what's the meaning of work, anyway? Life is finite, but work is endless. What the chimera does is nothing more than repeatedly pushing a boulder up the mountain...

C: 样式奇特的卷轴默立于此，周身散发出暗红光芒，仿佛是自这血色天幕垂落的一声哀泣。
E: A strangely wrought scroll stands in silence, radiating a dark red glow, like a sorrowful cry falling from the blood-colored sky.

C: 不知道发生了什么，但我不愿放弃这些伟大的记忆，便只好留在这里，等待传奇的讲述者们归来。
E: Urania doesn't know what happened, but Urania could not give up these magnificent memories. So Urania remained here, waiting for the storytellers of legend to return.

C: 桑博（？）
E: Sampo (?)

E: This character cannot be sold. If the preparation area is full, please try selling a different character.

C: 亲爱的，还有什么遗言吗？
E: Any last words, sweetheart?

C: 这一次，你又会如何反叛命运呢？
E: How will you rebel against fate this time?
